imn: Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv mbaengc ndaamv-lungh. Meih se baengh fim hnangv Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mbong.

eng: your justice like the great deep. You, Lord , preserve both people and animals. How priceless is your unfailing love, O God!
imn: Meih dunx sic se hnangv ndo haic nyei koiv. O Ziouv aac, mienh maanh caux saeng-kuv meih yaac njoux. O Tin-Hungh aac, meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh se za'gengh jaaix haic.

eng: People take refuge in the shadow of your wings. They feast on the abundance of your house;
imn: Baamh mienh hlo-hlo faix-faix yiem meih nyei ndaatv-ndiev nyei dongh linh. Ninh mbuo nyanc yiem meih nyei biauv bungx-zuoqc nyei ga'naaiv beuv,

eng: you give them drink from your river of delights. For with you is the fountain of life;
imn: meih yaac bun ninh mbuo hopv meih nyei orn-lorqc ndaaih nyei wuom. Weic zuqc yiem wuov maaih ziangh maengc nyei wuom-zingv.

eng: in your light we see light. Continue your love to those who know you,
imn: Yiem meih nyei njang yie mbuo duqv buatc njang. Tov meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv jienv mingh dongh hiuv duqv meih wuov deix,

eng: your righteousness to the upright in heart. May the foot of the proud not come against me,
imn: yaac baengh fim nyei zoux bun hnyouv zingx nyei mienh. Tov maiv dungx bun zoux maux nyei mienh nyei zaux caaiv yie,

eng: nor the hand of the wicked drive me away. See how the evildoers lie fallen—
imn: yaac maiv dungx bun mienh waaic mienh nyei buoz zunc yie biaux. Mangc maah! Zoux orqv nyei mienh king njiec bueix jienv wuov.

eng: thrown down, not able to rise!
imn: Ninh mbuo zuqc fongv ndorpc mingh, maiv haih aengx jiez sin daaih.

eng: Do not fret because of those who are evil or be envious of those who do wrong; for like the grass they will soon wither,
imn: Maiv dungx weic zoux orqv nyei mienh guaax hnyouv. Yaac maiv dungx mueic jieqv zoux dorngc nyei mienh. Weic zuqc ninh mbuo hnangv miev nor, siepv-siepv nyei nyaux mingh.

eng: like green plants they will soon die away. Trust in the Lord and do good;
imn: Yaac hnangv miev-maeng nor, nqaai nzengc. Oix zuqc kaux Ziouv yaac zoux kuv sic,

eng: dwell in the land and enjoy safe pasture. Take delight in the Lord ,
imn: meih ziouc duqv baengh orn nyei yiem naaiv norm deic-bung. Oix zuqc a'hneiv lorz Ziouv nyei orn-lorqc,

eng: and he will give you the desires of your heart. Commit your way to the Lord ;
imn: ninh ziouc ziux meih nyei hnyouv oix nyei ceix bun meih. Oix zuqc zorqv meih nyei jauv fungx bun Ziouv,

eng: trust in him and he will do this: He will make your righteous reward shine like the dawn,
imn: yaac kaux ninh, ninh ziouc tengx meih zoux ziangx. Ninh oix bun meih zoux baengh fim nyei jauv hnangv njang nor ziux cuotv daaih,

eng: your vindication like the noonday sun. Be still before the Lord
imn: bun meih nyei gong-fim hnangv lungh aanx zanc nyei njang. Oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien sekv-sekv nyei longc noic zuov ninh.

eng: and wait patiently for him; do not fret when people succeed in their ways, when they carry out their wicked schemes. Refrain from anger and turn from wrath;
imn: Maiv dungx weic ei ganh nyei jauv duqv longx fai ei waaic nyei za'eix zoux wuov deix guaax hnyouv. Maiv dungx qiex jiez, oix zuqc guangc nqoi nouz mienh nyei hnyouv.

eng: do not fret—it leads only to evil. For those who are evil will be destroyed,
imn: Maiv dungx guaax hnyouv, naaiv kungx dorh mienh mingh zoux orqv sic hnangv. Zoux orqv nyei mienh oix zuqc pai guangc mingh,

eng: but those who hope in the Lord will inherit the land. A little while, and the wicked will be no more;
imn: mv baac zuov jienv Ziouv wuov deix duqv nzipc naaiv norm deic-bung. Maiv lauh maiv maaih orqv mienh aqv.

eng: though you look for them, they will not be found. But the meek will inherit the land
imn: Maiv gunv meih longx-longx nyei mangc ninh yiem nyei dorngx, ninh maiv yiem naaic aqv. Mv baac nyiemc ganh zoux faix wuov deix oix duqv nzipc naaiv norm deic-bung.

eng: and enjoy peace and prosperity. The wicked plot against the righteous
imn: Ninh mbuo yaac bungx-zuoqc, baengh orn nyei yiem. Mienh waaic mienh daav za'eix hoic kuv mienh,

eng: and gnash their teeth at them; but the Lord laughs at the wicked,
imn: yaac dorng jienv ninh mbuo ngaatc nyaah. Ziouv kuh jatv haic zoux waaic nyei mienh

eng: for he knows their day is coming. The wicked draw the sword
imn: weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv ninh mbuo zuqc mietc nyei ziangh hoc oix taux aqv. Orqv mienh baeng cuotv nzuqc ndaauv yaac baeng juang-zinx,

eng: and bend the bow to bring down the poor and needy, to slay those whose ways are upright. But their swords will pierce their own hearts,
imn: oix hoic mienh jomc mienh caux dangx-donx nyei mienh, yaac daix zoux horpc nyei mienh. Mv baac ninh mbuo nyei nzuqc ndaauv oix nzopv ninh mbuo ganh nyei mba'nziu,

eng: and their bows will be broken. Better the little that the righteous have
imn: ninh mbuo nyei juang-zinx yaac oix zuqc wuotv nauv. Kuv mienh maaih nyei deix baav ga'naaiv,

eng: than the wealth of many wicked; for the power of the wicked will be broken,
imn: corc gauh longx mienh waaic mienh maaih nyei yietc zungv zinh zoih. Weic zuqc mienh waaic mienh nyei buoz oix zuqc nauv,

eng: but the Lord upholds the righteous. The blameless spend their days under the Lord ’s care,
imn: mv baac Ziouv zoux longx bun kuv mienh. Ziouv hiuv duqv maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei mienh nyei hnoi-nyieqc.

eng: and their inheritance will endure forever. In times of disaster they will not wither;
imn: Ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc oix yietc liuz yiem. Ninh mbuo yiem kuonx naanh nyei hnoi-nyieqc maiv zuqc nyaiv,

eng: in days of famine they will enjoy plenty. But the wicked will perish:
imn: ngorc hnaangx nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo duqv nyanc beuv. Mv baac mienh waaic mienh oix zuqc mietc.

eng: Though the Lord ’s enemies are like the flowers of the field, they will be consumed, they will go up in smoke. The wicked borrow and do not repay,
imn: Ziouv nyei win-wangv se hnangv lomc nyei miev-biangh nyei njang-laangc ziec nzengc, hnangv douz-sioux nor, mitc mi'aqv. Mienh waaic mienh gaav mingh yaac maiv jaauv,

eng: but the righteous give generously; those the Lord blesses will inherit the land,
imn: mv baac kuv mienh hnyouv jangv, fungx zingh nyeic bun mienh. Weic zuqc Ziouv ceix fuqv nyei mienh oix duqv nzipc naaiv norm deic-bung,

eng: but those he curses will be destroyed. The Lord makes firm the steps
imn: mv baac zuqc ninh zioux wuov deix oix zuqc pai guangc. Ziouv liepc wuonv mienh yangh nyei zaux-caaiv.

eng: of the one who delights in him; though he may stumble, he will not fall,
imn: Ninh yaac a'hneiv wuov dauh yangh nyei jauv. Maiv gunv ninh ndorpc, ninh maiv ziangh dauh king njiec,

eng: for the Lord upholds him with his hand. I was young and now I am old,
imn: weic zuqc Ziouv nyei buoz baav jienv ninh. Zinh ndaangc yie lunx, ih zanc yie gox aqv,

eng: yet I have never seen the righteous forsaken or their children begging bread. They are always generous and lend freely;
imn: mv baac yie maiv buatc jiex kuv mienh zuqc guangc, yaac maiv buatc jiex ninh nyei zeiv-fun tov nyanc. Ninh zoux hnyouv jangv yaac a'hneiv bun mienh gaav,

eng: their children will be a blessing. Turn from evil and do good;
imn: ninh nyei fun-faqv bun ninh duqv fuqv. Oix zuqc leih nqoi orqv sic, zoux kuv sic,

eng: then you will dwell in the land forever. For the Lord loves the just
imn: meih ziouc duqv yietc liuz yiem. Weic zuqc Ziouv a'hneiv baengh fim nyei jauv,

eng: and will not forsake his faithful ones. Wrongdoers will be completely destroyed ; the offspring of the wicked will perish. The righteous will inherit the land
imn: ninh yaac maiv guangc ninh nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx. Ninh oix yietc liuz beu jienv kuv mienh, mv baac mienh waaic mienh nyei zeiv-fun oix zuqc pai guangc. Kuv mienh zungv oix nzipc naaiv norm deic-bung,

eng: and dwell in it forever. The mouths of the righteous utter wisdom,
imn: yaac duqv yiem naaiv weic yietc liuz. Kuv mienh nyei nzuih gorngv cong-mengh nyei waac,

eng: and their tongues speak what is just. The law of their God is in their hearts;
imn: ninh nyei mbietc gorngv baengh fim nyei jauv. Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc yiem ninh nyei hnyouv,

eng: their feet do not slip. The wicked lie in wait for the righteous,
imn: ninh nyei zaux maiv caaiv piatv. Mienh waaic mienh cienh kuv mienh,

eng: intent on putting them to death; but the Lord will not leave them in the power of the wicked
imn: oix lorz qangx daix ninh. Ziouv maiv guangc ninh yiem win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev,

eng: or let them be condemned when brought to trial. Hope in the Lord
imn: fai zuqc siemv nyei ziangh hoc yaac maiv bun ninh zuqc dingc zuiz. Zuov jienv Ziouv,

eng: and keep his way. He will exalt you to inherit the land; when the wicked are destroyed, you will see it. I have seen a wicked and ruthless man
imn: ei jienv ninh nyei jauv zoux, ninh ziouc taaih meih, bun meih duqv nzipc naaiv norm deic-bung, mienh waaic mienh zuqc pai guangc wuov zanc, meih ziouc duqv buatc aqv. Yie buatc jiex mienh waaic mienh maaih hatc maaz hlo haic,

eng: flourishing like a luxuriant native tree, but he soon passed away and was no more;
imn: hnangv Le^mbaa^norn Mbong nyei yietc diuh hlang jiex nyei domh si^ndaa zongh ndiangx nor. Mv baac yie aengx yangh naaic jiex, ninh zitc mi'aqv.

eng: though I looked for him, he could not be found. Consider the blameless, observe the upright;
imn: Maiv gunv yie lorz ninh, yaac lorz maiv buatc. Samx mangc maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei mienh, yaac mangc longx kuv mienh,

eng: a future awaits those who seek peace. But all sinners will be destroyed;
imn: weic zuqc hnamv baengh orn nyei mienh maaih hoz doic zeiv-fun, mv baac baamz zuiz nyei mienh zungv oix zuqc mietc nzengc.

eng: there will be no future for the wicked. The salvation of the righteous comes from the Lord ;
imn: Orqv mienh nyei zeiv-fun oix zuqc pai guangc mingh. Kuv mienh duqv njoux se yiem Ziouv daaih,

eng: he is their stronghold in time of trouble. The Lord helps them and delivers them;
imn: zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc, ninh zoux ninh mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Ziouv tengx ninh mbuo, njoux ninh mbuo.

eng: he delivers them from the wicked and saves them, because they take refuge in him.
imn: Ninh tengx ninh mbuo biaux ndutv mienh waaic mienh yaac njoux ninh mbuo, weic zuqc ninh mbuo ndaauh kaux ninh.

eng: Lord , do not rebuke me in your anger or discipline me in your wrath. Your arrows have pierced me,
imn: O Ziouv aah! Maiv dungx qiex jiez, hemx yie, yaac maiv dungx nouz yie, dingc yie nyei zuiz. Weic zuqc meih nyei forng-cang buonv bieqc yie gu'nyuoz,

eng: and your hand has come down on me. Because of your wrath there is no health in my body;
imn: meih nyei buoz njiec daaih ngatv jienv yie. Weic zuqc meih nouz yie, yie nyei sin cingx maiv wangc siangx.

eng: there is no soundness in my bones because of my sin. My guilt has overwhelmed me
imn: Laaix yie nyei zuiz yie benx baengc mi'aqv. Yie zoux dorngc nyei zuiz yiemx gauh hlang jiex yie nyei m'nqorngv,

eng: like a burden too heavy to bear. My wounds fester and are loathsome
imn: yaac hnangv ga'naaiv hniev jiex ndaangc yie nyei qaqv. Laaix yie zoux hngongx nyei sic

eng: because of my sinful folly. I am bowed down and brought very low;
imn: yie mun nyei dorngx zueix yaac huv. Yie zuqc kouv, ndoqv njiec, zungv mbaapv njiec ndau.

eng: all day long I go about mourning. My back is filled with searing pain;
imn: Ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz nzauh nyiemv jienv yiem. Yie nyei jaaiv jorm hnangv douz buov jienv nor,

eng: there is no health in my body. I am feeble and utterly crushed;
imn: yie nyei sin maiv maaih yietc norm dorngx wangc siangx. Yie suei nzengc, kouv taux ndiev.

eng: I groan in anguish of heart. All my longings lie open before you, Lord;
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv mun, njunh jienv yiem. Ziouv aah! Yie nyei hnyouv oix longc nyei meih hiuv nzengc mi'aqv.

eng: my sighing is not hidden from you. My heart pounds, my strength fails me;
imn: Yie njunh jienv nyei qiex bingx maiv mbueiz meih. Yie nyei mba'nziu dongz seix nyei, yie nyei qaqv yaac mau jienv njiec.

eng: even the light has gone from my eyes. My friends and companions avoid me because of my wounds;
imn: Liemh yie nyei m'zing zungv maiv njang aqv. Laaix yie nyei zeqc naanc yie nyei doic caux gorx-youz simv yie go,

eng: my neighbors stay far away. Those who want to kill me set their traps,
imn: yie nyei cien-ceqv yaac simv yie go haic. Oix zorqv yie nyei maengc wuov deix zaeng ninh mbuo nyei mungz.

eng: those who would harm me talk of my ruin; all day long they scheme and lie. I am like the deaf, who cannot hear,
imn: Oix hoic yie wuov deix kungx gorngv hnangv haaix nor haih bun yie zuqc baaic, ninh mbuo ziangh hnoi daav za'eix nduov yie. Mv baac yie hnangv m'normh ndung nyei mienh muangx maiv haiz.

eng: like the mute, who cannot speak; I have become like one who does not hear,
imn: Yaac hnangv ga'naaiv-hngongx, maiv haih gorngv waac. Yie hnangv yietc dauh muangx maiv haiz nyei mienh,

eng: whose mouth can offer no reply. Lord , I wait for you;
imn: nzuih maiv haih dau. O Ziouv aah! Yie zuov jienv meih.

eng: you will answer, Lord my God. For I said, “Do not let them gloat
imn: O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Meih zungv oix dau yie. Weic zuqc yie daux gaux gorngv, “Yie nyei zaux caaiv piatv nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: or exalt themselves over me when my feet slip.” For I am about to fall,
imn: maiv dungx bun ninh mbuo jatv yie fai ceng-hlo.” Weic zuqc yie zungv oix ndorpc haic aqv.

eng: and my pain is ever with me. I confess my iniquity;
imn: Yie yaac zanc-zanc mun jienv yiem. Yie nyiemc yie nyei zuiz,

eng: I am troubled by my sin. Many have become my enemies without cause ;
imn: yie weic yie nyei zuiz nzauh. Yie nyei win-wangv youc camv youc henv.

eng: those who hate me without reason are numerous. Those who repay my good with evil
imn: Nzorng yie mv baac maiv maaih gorn-baengx nyei mienh yaac maaih camv. Longc orqv sic jaauv yie zoux nyei kuv sic wuov deix caux yie doix-dekc,

eng: lodge accusations against me, though I seek only to do what is good. Lord , do not forsake me;
imn: weic zuqc yie kungx lorz zoux horpc nyei jauv hnangv. O Ziouv aah! Tov maiv dungx guangc yie.

eng: do not be far from me, my God. Come quickly to help me,
imn: O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Maiv dungx leih go yie. Njoux yie wuov dauh Ziouv aah!

eng: my Lord and my Savior.
imn: Tov siepv-siepv nyei daaih tengx yie.

eng: I said, “I will watch my ways and keep my tongue from sin; I will put a muzzle on my mouth while in the presence of the wicked.” So I remained utterly silent,
imn: Yie gorngv, “Yie oix mbungh yie nyei jauv, weic bun yie nyei nzuih maiv baamz zuiz. Da'faanh orqv mienh yiem yie nyei nza'hmien yie oix nqapc jienv yie nyei nzuih, maiv ko lo. Yie sekv nzieqc nyei, maiv ko lo.

eng: not even saying anything good. But my anguish increased; my heart grew hot within me.
imn: Yie maiv gorngv waac mv baac maiv tengx haaix nyungc yie. Yie nyei hnyouv nzauh kouv jienv faaux. Yie nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz za'gengh nzauh duqv kouv haic.

eng: While I meditated, the fire burned; then I spoke with my tongue: “Show me, Lord , my life’s end
imn: Yie hnamv nyei ziangh hoc hnangv douz zieqc jienv yie nyei hnyouv nor, yie ziouc gorngv cuotv waac. O Ziouv aah! Tov bun yie hiuv duqv yie setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc.

eng: and the number of my days; let me know how fleeting my life is. You have made my days a mere handbreadth;
imn: Yie haih ziangh duqv ndongc haaix lauh? Tov bun yie hiuv duqv yie nyei maengc oix jiex ndongc haaix siepv. Meih bun yie ziangh nyei hnoi-nyieqc ndongc i ziex buoz-zaangv jangv.

eng: the span of my years is as nothing before you. Everyone is but a breath, even those who seem secure. “Surely everyone goes around like a mere phantom;
imn: Ziux meih mangc yie yietc seix nyei maengc se hnangv maiv maaih haaix nyungc aqv. Gorqv-mienh nyei maengc kungx hnangv tauv nzunc qiex nor. Selaa Baamh mienh mingh mingh daaih daaih hnangv dongh linh nor,

eng: in vain they rush about, heaping up wealth without knowing whose it will finally be. “But now, Lord, what do I look for?
imn: ninh mbuo lunc jienv yiem yaac maiv lamh longc. Baamh mienh zornc daaih nyei ga'naaiv ndui jienv mv baac maiv hiuv duqv haaix dauh duqv siou. “Ziouv aah! Yie ih zanc zuov haaix nyungc?

eng: My hope is in you. Save me from all my transgressions;
imn: Yie kaux meih maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. Tov njoux yie leih ndutv yie nyei yietc zungv zuiz,

eng: do not make me the scorn of fools. I was silent; I would not open my mouth,
imn: maiv dungx bun mienh hngongx mienh jatv yie. Yie sekv nzieqc nyei, maiv gorngv waac,

eng: for you are the one who has done this. Remove your scourge from me;
imn: weic zuqc se meih ganh bun yie hnangv naaiv siouc kouv. Tov meih zorqv nqoi meih bun yie zuqc nyei zeqc naanc.

eng: I am overcome by the blow of your hand. When you rebuke and discipline anyone for their sin,
imn: Yie zuqc meih nyei buoz mborqv taux aav lamh daic aqv. Laaix mienh zoux zuiz meih gorngv-hemx weic mborqv njaaux.

eng: you consume their wealth like a moth— surely everyone is but a breath. “Hear my prayer, Lord ,
imn: Meih mietc mienh hnamv nyei ga'naaiv hnangv gaeng ngaatc waaic nzengc nor. Dauh dauh baamh mienh nyei maengc se hnangv tauv yietc nzunc qiex hnangv. Selaa “O Ziouv aah! Tov muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac.

eng: listen to my cry for help; do not be deaf to my weeping. I dwell with you as a foreigner, a stranger, as all my ancestors were. Look away from me, that I may enjoy life again
imn: Tov muangx yie heuc jienv jouh nyei waac. Yie nyei wuom-mueic liouc jienv tov maiv dungx zoux hnangv maiv haiz nor. Weic zuqc yie zoux hnangv meih nyei jiex jauv nyei kaeqv mienh, dingh zepv dangh baav hnangv yie nyei zuangx ong-taaix nor. Tov huin ganh bung maiv mangc yie weic bun yie aengx duqv deix orn-lorqc.

eng: before I depart and am no more.”
imn: Yie cingx daaih leih nqoi, maiv yiem aqv.”

eng: I waited patiently for the Lord ; he turned to me and heard my cry. He lifted me out of the slimy pit,
imn: Yie longc noic zuov jienv Ziouv, ninh bungx m'normh muangx haiz yie tov nyei waac. Ninh cie yie yiem zuqc mietc nyei kuotv cuotv daaih,

eng: out of the mud and mire; he set my feet on a rock and gave me a firm place to stand. He put a new song in my mouth,
imn: se ndo haic, nyouh haic nyei wuom-bamc, bun yie nyei zaux souv wuonv yiem la'bieiv-zorng gu'nguaaic, bun yie nyei zaux-mbiec caaiv duqv wuonv. Ninh bun yie nyei nzuih baaux diuh siang-nzung,

eng: a hymn of praise to our God. Many will see and fear the Lord and put their trust in him. Blessed is the one
imn: se ceng yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei nzung. Maaih mienh camv nyei duqv buatc ziouc gamh nziex aengx sienx kaux Ziouv. Haaix dauh sienx kaux Ziouv,

eng: who trusts in the Lord , who does not look to the proud, to those who turn aside to false gods. Many, Lord my God,
imn: maiv huin mingh lorz zoux maux, ceng-hlo nyei mienh, caux dorngc jauv gan jaav zienh nyei mienh, wuov dauh duqv orn-lorqc aqv. O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: but my ears you have opened — burnt offerings and sin offerings you did not require. Then I said, “Here I am, I have come—
imn: meih maiv zeiz lorz ziangh dauh buov ziec nyei saeng-kuv fai fiqv zuiz nyei ga'naaiv, mv baac meih bun yie maaih m'normh muangx duqv haiz meih nyei qiex. Yie ziouc gorngv, “Mangc maah! Yie daaih aqv.

eng: it is written about me in the scroll. I desire to do your will, my God;
imn: Yiem wuov sou-njunc fiev jienv yie nyei jauv-louc.” O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Meih nyei leiz-latc yiem yie nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz.

eng: your law is within my heart.” I proclaim your saving acts in the great assembly;
imn: Yie a'hneiv ei jienv meih nyei eix zoux. Yie yiem mienh camv gapv zunv nyei dorngx zunh njoux en nyei kuv fienx.

eng: I do not seal my lips, Lord , as you know. I do not hide your righteousness in my heart;
imn: O Ziouv aah! Meih hiuv duqv yie nyei nzuih meix maiv dingh liouh nyei zunh. Yie maiv zorqv meih tengx yie mbuo nyei njoux en bingx jienv yie nyei hnyouv.

eng: I speak of your faithfulness and your saving help. I do not conceal your love and your faithfulness from the great assembly. Do not withhold your mercy from me, Lord ;
imn: Yie gorngv meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv caux meih nyei njoux en. Yie yiem mienh camv gapv zunv nyei dorngx, maiv gem jienv meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh caux hnyouv zingx nyei jauv. Ziouv aac, tov meih maiv dungx ngaengc jienv maiv korv-lienh yie.

eng: may your love and faithfulness always protect me. For troubles without number surround me;
imn: Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie yaac bun meih nyei zien leiz zanc-zanc beu jienv yie. Maaih ciouv nyei zeqc naanc, zungv saauv maiv hingh, weih gormx yie,

eng: my sins have overtaken me, and I cannot see. They are more than the hairs of my head, and my heart fails within me. Be pleased to save me, Lord ;
imn: yie nyei zuiz zunc zaaic yie, taux yie mangc maiv buatc haaix nyungc. Zuiz gauh camv jiex yie nyei m'nqorngv nyei mba'biei, yie nyei mba'nziu yuqc nzengc. O Ziouv aah! Tov meih nqoi eix njoux yie.

eng: come quickly, Lord , to help me. May all who want to take my life
imn: Tov Ziouv siepv-siepv nyei tengx yie. Tov bun oix zorqv yie nyei maengc wuov deix mienh

eng: be put to shame and confusion; may all who desire my ruin be turned back in disgrace. May those who say to me, “Aha! Aha!”
imn: zuqc nyaiv zuqc lunc. Tov bun dongh a'hneiv yie zuqc kouv wuov deix tuix nzuonx nqa'haav yaac zuqc baaic hmien. Tov bun gorngv, “Haav, haav!” bun yie wuov deix

eng: be appalled at their own shame. But may all who seek you
imn: zuqc nyaiv, zuqc baaic. Tov bun yietc zungv daaih lorz meih wuov deix,

eng: rejoice and be glad in you; may those who long for your saving help always say, “The Lord is great!” But as for me, I am poor and needy;
imn: njien-youh orn-lorqc. Tov bun hnamv meih nyei njoux en wuov deix, maiv dingh liouh nyei gorngv, “ Ziouv za'gengh hlo haic.” Mv baac yie se kouv, jomc haic,

eng: may the Lord think of me. You are my help and my deliverer; you are my God, do not delay.
imn: tov Ziouv jangx yie. Meih se dongh tengx yie, njoux yie wuov dauh. O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih maiv dungx ngaih.

eng: Blessed are those who have regard for the weak; the Lord delivers them in times of trouble. The Lord protects and preserves them—
imn: Maaih hnyouv jangx mienh jomc mienh, wuov dauh maaih njien-youh aqv. Zuqc kouv nyei hnoi-nyieqc Ziouv oix njoux ninh. Ziouv beu jienv ninh, bun ninh maaih maengc ziangh.

eng: they are counted among the blessed in the land— he does not give them over to the desire of their foes. The Lord sustains them on their sickbed
imn: Yiem wuov norm deic-bung mienh oix heuc ninh zoux “Duqv fuqv nyei mienh.” Tov maiv dungx zorqv ninh jiu bun win-wangv sueih ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux. Ninh butv baengc bueix jienv coux nyei ziangh hoc Ziouv oix goux ninh.

eng: and restores them from their bed of illness. I said, “Have mercy on me, Lord ;
imn: Maaih baengc wuov zanc meih zungv oix zorc ninh longx daaih. Yie gorngv, “O Ziouv aah! Tov korv-lienh yie, tov zorc yie longx,

eng: heal me, for I have sinned against you.” My enemies say of me in malice,
imn: weic zuqc yie baamz zuiz dorngc meih. Yie nyei win-wangv gorngv doqc yie.

eng: “When will he die and his name perish?” When one of them comes to see me,
imn: Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Ninh taux haaix zanc cingx daic ni? Ninh nyei mbuox taux haaix zanc cingx zuqc mietc?” Haaix dauh daaih mangc yie,

eng: he speaks falsely, while his heart gathers slander; then he goes out and spreads it around. All my enemies whisper together against me;
imn: kungx gorngv jaav waac hnangv. Ninh nyei hnyouv nzauz maiv benx nyei jauv. Cuotv mingh taux haaix, ninh zunh jienv mingh. Nzorng yie wuov deix yietc zungv longc waac-sapv gorngv taux yie,

eng: they imagine the worst for me, saying, “A vile disease has afflicted him;
imn: ninh mbuo laaic yie duqv buangh gauh ciouv jiex nyei sic. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Ninh zuqc ciouv haic nyei baengc hoic ninh aqv.

eng: he will never get up from the place where he lies.” Even my close friend,
imn: Ninh bueix jienv coux yietc liuz maiv duqv aengx jiez sin.” Liemh yie gauh zuoqc jiex nyei loz-gaeng doic,

eng: someone I trusted, one who shared my bread, has turned against me. But may you have mercy on me, Lord ;
imn: se yie bungx hnyouv wuov dauh, dongh caux yie juangc hnaangx nyanc nyei mienh, yaac mbienv hnyouv bun yie. O Ziouv aah! Tov meih korv-lienh yie, bun yie longx,

eng: raise me up, that I may repay them. I know that you are pleased with me,
imn: tengx yie jiez sin daaih, haih jaauv win bun ninh mbuo. Yie ziouc hiuv duqv meih a'hneiv yie,

eng: for my enemy does not triumph over me. Because of my integrity you uphold me
imn: weic zuqc yie nyei win-wangv maiv haih hingh jiex yie. Meih baav jienv yie weic zuqc yie hnyouv zingx,

eng: and set me in your presence forever. Praise be to the Lord , the God of Israel,
imn: meih yaac bun yie yietc liuz yiem meih nyei nza'hmien. Ceng Ziouv, I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: from everlasting to everlasting. Amen and Amen.
imn: Oix zuqc ceng yiem loz-hnoi taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen caux Aamen.

eng: As the deer pants for streams of water, so my soul pants for you, my God. My soul thirsts for God, for the living God.
imn: O Tin-Hungh aac, yie nyei hnyouv ngorc meih hnangv njaih ngorc ndoqv nyei wuom-daaih nor. Yie nyei hnyouv ngorc Tin-Hungh, se ziangh jienv nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: When can I go and meet with God? My tears have been my food
imn: Yie taux haaix zanc cingx duqv mingh buatc Tin-Hungh nyei hmien? Yie ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz

eng: day and night, while people say to me all day long, “Where is your God?” These things I remember
imn: nyanc wuom-mueic dorngx hnaangx. Mienh yaac maiv dingh liouh nyei naaic yie, “Meih nyei Tin-Hungh yiem haaix?” Yie jangx zuqc naaiv deix ziex nyungc sic

eng: as I pour out my soul: how I used to go to the house of God under the protection of the Mighty One with shouts of joy and praise among the festive throng. Why, my soul, are you downcast?
imn: yie hnyouv mun jienv yiem. Yie jangx zuqc zinh ndaangc caux mienh camv mingh. Yie dorh jienv ninh mbuo bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv. Zuangx mienh lomh nzoih jiex zipv, heuc jienv baaux nzung laengz zingh. Yie weic haaix diuc ndongc naaiv nzauh?

eng: Why so disturbed within me? Put your hope in God, for I will yet praise him, my Savior and my God. My soul is downcast within me;
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc paan-paan puoqv-puoqv nyei? Oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh maaih lamh hnamv dorngx weic zuqc yie aengx duqv ceng ninh, dongh njoux yie yaac zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh. Yie nyei hnyouv za'gengh mun haic,

eng: therefore I will remember you from the land of the Jordan, the heights of Hermon—from Mount Mizar. Deep calls to deep
imn: yie ziouc yiem Jor^ndaen Deic, caux Hemon Mbong caux Misaa Mbong jangx zuqc meih. Wuom ndortv meih nyei domh mbaengx hnangv mba'ong nor, njunh njunh nyei mbui.

eng: in the roar of your waterfalls; all your waves and breakers have swept over me. By day the Lord directs his love,
imn: Ndo nyei dorngx aengv bieqc ndo nyei dorngx. Meih nyei domh wuom-laangc nqomz jiex yie gu'nguaaic. Lungh hnoi zanc Ziouv laauc yaangh ninh ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei jauv,

eng: at night his song is with me— a prayer to the God of my life. I say to God my Rock,
imn: lungh muonz zanc bun yie baaux ninh nyei nzung daux gaux bun yie nyei ziangh maengc nyei Tin-Hungh. Yie gorngv mbuox yie nyei La'bieiv , se Tin-Hungh,

eng: “Why have you forgotten me? Why must I go about mourning, oppressed by the enemy?” My bones suffer mortal agony
imn: “Meih weic haaix diuc la'kuqv yie?” Yie weic haaix diuc oix zuqc zanc-zanc nzauh nyiemv, laaix win-wangv hoic jienv yie? Yie nyei win-wangv huotv yie

eng: as my foes taunt me, saying to me all day long, “Where is your God?” Why, my soul, are you downcast?
imn: hnangv zoux bun yie nyei mbungv nauv nzengc. Ninh mbuo maiv dingh liouh nyei naaic, “Meih nyei Tin-Hungh yiem haaix?” Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc ndongc naaiv nzauh?

eng: Why so disturbed within me? Put your hope in God, for I will yet praise him, my Savior and my God.
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc paan-paan puoqv-puoqv nyei? Oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh maaih lamh hnamv dorngx weic zuqc yie aengx duqv ceng ninh, dongh njoux yie yaac zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: Vindicate me, my God, and plead my cause against an unfaithful nation. Rescue me from those who are deceitful and wicked. You are God my stronghold.
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih siemv bun cing yie maiv dorngc. Tov tengx yie caengx sic, bun maiv gan Tin-Hungh wuov deix guoqv nyei mienh zuqc suei. Tov njoux yie leih ndutv nduov mienh wuov deix caux maiv baengh fim nyei mienh. Weic zuqc meih zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: Why have you rejected me? Why must I go about mourning, oppressed by the enemy? Send me your light and your faithful care,
imn: Meih weic haaix diuc guangc yie? Yie weic haaix diuc oix zuqc zanc-zanc nzauh nyiemv, laaix win-wangv hoic jienv yie? Tov bun meih nyei njang caux zien leiz

eng: let them lead me; let them bring me to your holy mountain, to the place where you dwell. Then I will go to the altar of God,
imn: cuotv daaih yienz yie, dorh yie nzuonx taux meih nyei cing-nzengc mbong, yaac taux meih yiem nyei dorngx. Yie ziouc mingh taux Tin-Hungh nyei ziec-dorngh,

eng: to God, my joy and my delight. I will praise you with the lyre, O God, my God. Why, my soul, are you downcast?
imn: taux bun yie gauh orn-lorqc jiex nyei Tin-Hungh wuov. O Tin-Hungh, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie oix patv daanh baah ceng meih. Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc ndongc naaiv nzauh?

eng: Why so disturbed within me? Put your hope in God, for I will yet praise him, my Savior and my God.
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc paan-paan puoqv-puoqv nyei? Oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh maaih lamh hnamv dorngx weic zuqc yie aengx duqv ceng ninh, dongh njoux yie yaac zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: We have heard it with our ears, O God; our ancestors have told us what you did in their days, in days long ago. With your hand you drove out the nations
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Yie mbuo ganh nyei m'normh duqv haiz jiex, yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix mbuox jiex yie mbuo, loz-hnoi yiem ninh mbuo nyei seix zeiv meih zoux jiex hlo haic nyei sic. Meih longc meih ganh nyei buoz zunc cuotv yiem wuov nyei norm-norm guoqv nyei mienh,

eng: and planted our ancestors; you crushed the peoples and made our ancestors flourish. It was not by their sword that they won the land,
imn: yaac liepc yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix yiem wuov. Meih bun wuov deix ganh fingx zuqc kouv, mv baac bun yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix zoux bungx nqoi nyei mienh. Weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv zeiz weic ganh nyei nzuqc ndaauv duqv wuov norm deic-bung,

eng: nor did their arm bring them victory; it was your right hand, your arm, and the light of your face, for you loved them. You are my King and my God,
imn: yaac maiv zeiz ninh mbuo ganh nyei buoz tengx ninh mbuo duqv hingh, mv baac se weic meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz caux meih nyei hmien nyei njang-laangc, weic zuqc meih a'hneiv ninh mbuo. Meih zoux yie nyei Hungh caux yie nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: who decrees victories for Jacob. Through you we push back our enemies;
imn: Tov paaiv bun Yaakopv duqv hingh. Yie mbuo kaux meih fongv yie mbuo nyei win-wangv njiec.

eng: through your name we trample our foes. I put no trust in my bow,
imn: Yie mbuo kaux meih nyei mengh caaiv jienv caux yie mbuo mborqv jaax wuov deix. Yie maiv kaux yie nyei juang-zinx,

eng: my sword does not bring me victory; but you give us victory over our enemies,
imn: yie nyei nzuqc ndaauv yaac maiv haih njoux yie, mv baac meih njoux yie mbuo leih ndutv yie mbuo nyei win-wangv,

eng: you put our adversaries to shame. In God we make our boast all day long,
imn: bun nzorng yie mbuo wuov deix zuqc nyaiv. Yie mbuo ziangh hnoi weic Tin-Hungh bungx waac-maux.

eng: and we will praise your name forever. But now you have rejected and humbled us;
imn: Yie mbuo yaac oix yietc liuz dor-ziec meih nyei mbuox. Selaa Mv baac ih zanc meih guangc yie mbuo, bun yie mbuo zuqc suei.

eng: you no longer go out with our armies. You made us retreat before the enemy,
imn: Meih maiv caux yie mbuo nyei zuangx jun-baeng cuotv. Meih bun yie mbuo tuix nzuonx biaux win-wangv.

eng: and our adversaries have plundered us. You gave us up to be devoured like sheep
imn: Nzorng yie mbuo wuov deix win-jaa caangv yie mbuo nyei ga'naaiv. Meih bun yie mbuo hnangv zuqc daix nyanc nyei ba'gi yungh,

eng: and have scattered us among the nations. You sold your people for a pittance,
imn: yaac bun yie mbuo nzaanx mingh yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx. Meih laanh zaanc maaic meih nyei baeqc fingx

eng: gaining nothing from their sale. You have made us a reproach to our neighbors,
imn: hnangv maiv maaih jaax-zinh nyei ga'naaiv. Ziux maaic nyei jaax-zinh zungv maiv duqv yietc deix leic. Meih bun yie mbuo zuqc laangz zaangc mienh ki,

eng: the scorn and derision of those around us. You have made us a byword among the nations;
imn: zuqc weih gormx nyei mienh jatv yaac mangc piex. Meih bun yie mbuo yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx zoux gouv gorngv,

eng: the peoples shake their heads at us. I live in disgrace all day long,
imn: yiem fingx-fingx mbu'ndongx zuqc ninh mbuo huangx m'nqorngv jatv yie mbuo. Yie ziangh hnoi zuqc diev nyaiv,

eng: and my face is covered with shame at the taunts of those who reproach and revile me,
imn: yaac zuqc baaic hmien, laaix mienh gorngv doqc gorngv ki,

eng: because of the enemy, who is bent on revenge. All this came upon us,
imn: yaac laaix buatc win-wangv caux jaauv win nyei mienh. Yie mbuo zuqc naaiv deix yietc zungv sic

eng: though we had not forgotten you; we had not been false to your covenant. Our hearts had not turned back;
imn: maiv gunv yie mbuo maiv la'kuqv meih fai ngaengc meih caux yie mbuo laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Yie mbuo nyei hnyouv maiv daaux nqaang.

eng: our feet had not strayed from your path. But you crushed us and made us a haunt for jackals;
imn: Yie mbuo nyei zaux yaac maiv caaiv piatv meih nyei jauv. Mv baac meih zaax jienv yie mbuo,

eng: you covered us over with deep darkness. If we had forgotten the name of our God
imn: bun yie mbuo benx hieh juv yiem nyei dorngx, bun zuqc daic nyei dongh linh gomv jienv yie mbuo. Se gorngv yie mbuo la'kuqv yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei mbuox,

eng: or spread out our hands to a foreign god, would not God have discovered it,
imn: fai sung yie mbuo nyei buoz cuotv zaangc nyiec nyei zienh, Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz haih zaah cuotv naaiv deix sic fai?

eng: since he knows the secrets of the heart? Yet for your sake we face death all day long;
imn: Weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv mienh nyei hnyouv gem jienv nyei sic. Weic meih yie mbuo ziangh hnoi zuqc mienh daix jienv yiem.

eng: we are considered as sheep to be slaughtered. Awake, Lord! Why do you sleep?
imn: Mienh funx yie mbuo hnangv benx oix zuqc daix nyei ba'gi yungh nor. O Ziouv aah! Nyie daaih maah! Meih weic haaix diuc m'njormh?

eng: Rouse yourself! Do not reject us forever. Why do you hide your face
imn: Jiez sin aqv, maiv dungx yietc liuz guangc yie mbuo. Meih weic haaix diuc buang meih nyei hmien maiv mangc yie?

eng: and forget our misery and oppression? We are brought down to the dust;
imn: Meih weic haaix diuc la'kuqv yie mbuo zuqc kouv naanc, zuqc seix nyei sic. Yie mbuo zuqc mbaapv njiec taux nie-mbung,

eng: our bodies cling to the ground. Rise up and help us;
imn: ziangh sin naetv jienv ndau-beih. Tov meih daaih tengx yie mbuo.

eng: rescue us because of your unfailing love.
imn: Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh, tov njoux yie mbuo.

eng: My heart is stirred by a noble theme as I recite my verses for the king; my tongue is the pen of a skillful writer. You are the most excellent of men
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv maaih longx haic nyei jauv mienz cuotv. Yie weic hungh diex doqc naaiv diuh nzung. Yie nyei mbietc hnangv fiev nzaangc liouc nyei mienh nyei batv nor. Beiv lungh ndiev mienh, meih gauh nzueic jiex.

eng: and your lips have been anointed with grace, since God has blessed you forever. Gird your sword on your side, you mighty one;
imn: Meih gorngv waac mbiaangc, kuh muangx. Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh yietc liuz ceix fuqv bun meih. Henv haic nyei hungh diex aah!

eng: clothe yourself with splendor and majesty. In your majesty ride forth victoriously
imn: Zorqv meih nyei nzuqc ndaauv tapv paiv sai jienv jaaiv. Meih zoux hlo yaac maaih njang-laangc. Weic zien leiz caux suonc nyei jauv caux baengh fim nyei sic

eng: in the cause of truth, humility and justice; let your right hand achieve awesome deeds. Let your sharp arrows pierce the hearts of the king’s enemies;
imn: meih zoux hlo geh jienv maaz cuotv mingh hingh jiex. Tov bun meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz zoux cuotv mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Meih nyei forng laic, yaac yiem

eng: let the nations fall beneath your feet. Your throne, O God, will last for ever and ever;
imn: meih nyei hungh diex nyei win-wangv nyei mba'nziu. Fingx-fingx mienh king njiec meih nyei zaux-ndiev. O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih nyei weic

eng: a scepter of justice will be the scepter of your kingdom. You love righteousness and hate wickedness;
imn: oix yietc liuz yiem taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Meih oix baengh fim nyei gunv meih nyei baeqc fingx. Zoux kuv sic nyei meih hnamv,

eng: therefore God, your God, has set you above your companions by anointing you with the oil of joy. All your robes are fragrant with myrrh and aloes and cassia;
imn: zoux orqv nyei meih nzorng. Weic naaiv, Tin-Hungh, dongh meih nyei Tin-Hungh, ginv meih daaih ceix orn-lorqc bun meih gauh camv jiex meih nyei yietc zungv doic. Meih nyei lui ndaang haic,

eng: from palaces adorned with ivory the music of the strings makes you glad. Daughters of kings are among your honored women;
imn: maaih mu^yorc caux aa^lo ndie-ndaang caux gaan^mbun nyei qiex ndaang. Yiem zaangz-nyaah zorng nyei hungh dinc mienh patv daanh baah bun meih a'hneiv. Maaih deix hungh diex nyei sieqv

eng: at your right hand is the royal bride in gold of Ophir. Listen, daughter, and pay careful attention:
imn: yiem meih taaih nyei m'sieqv dorn mbu'ndongx. Hungh maac zorng jienv yiem Ofi daaih nyei jiem souv jienv hungh diex nyei mbiaauc maengx. O sieqv aah! Meih oix zuqc hnamv longx yaac baeng m'normh muangx.

eng: Forget your people and your father’s house. Let the king be enthralled by your beauty;
imn: Maiv dungx jangx meih ganh nyei mienh fai meih nyei die nyei biauv. Weic zuqc meih nzueic haic hungh diex oix meih aqv.

eng: honor him, for he is your lord. The city of Tyre will come with a gift,
imn: Ninh se meih nyei ziouv, meih ziouc oix zuqc mbuoqc ninh gunv. Tailaqv Mienh oix daaih fungx zingh nyeic tov meih tengx.

eng: people of wealth will seek your favor. All glorious is the princess within her chamber;
imn: Baeqc fingx gu'nyuoz gauh butv zoih jiex nyei mienh oix longc nyungc-nyungc jaaix nyei ga'naaiv bun meih a'hneiv. Hungh sieqv yiem gu'nyuoz zorng jienv njang-laangc haic.

eng: her gown is interwoven with gold. In embroidered garments she is led to the king;
imn: Ninh nyei zorng-zuqv longc jiem-finx zorpc jienv ndatv daaih. Ninh zuqv jienv longc ziex nyungc setv congx daaih nyei lui-ndaauv,

eng: her virgin companions follow her— those brought to be with her. Led in with joy and gladness,
imn: mienh ziouc dorh ninh mingh taux hungh diex wuov. Mbienz doic wuov deix maiv bueix jiex dorn nyei sieqv-dorn doic yaac gan jienv ninh mingh hungh diex nyei nza'hmien. Mienh dorh ninh mbuo njien-youh orn-lorqc nyei

eng: they enter the palace of the king. Your sons will take the place of your fathers;
imn: bieqc hungh diex nyei dinc. Meih oix duqv dorn camv nzipc jienv meih nyei ong-taaix nyei weic,

eng: you will make them princes throughout the land. I will perpetuate your memory through all generations;
imn: meih oix liepc ninh mbuo gunv gormx deic-bung. Yie nyei nzung oix bun doic jiex doic ceng meih nyei mengh.

eng: therefore the nations will praise you for ever and ever.
imn: Zuangx mienh ziouc yietc liuz ceng meih taux maanc gouv maanc doic.

eng: God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble. Therefore we will not fear, though the earth give way
imn: Tin-Hungh zoux yie mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx yaac zoux yie mbuo nyei qaqv. Yie mbuo haaix zanc buangh zuqc kouv naanc ninh yaac tengx. Weic naaiv, yie mbuo maiv gamh nziex maiv gunv lungh ndiev goiv yienc,

eng: and the mountains fall into the heart of the sea, though its waters roar and foam
imn: mbong yaac dongz, ndortv njiec taux koiv-ndoqv, maiv gunv wuom jiez laangc njunh njunh zoz-zoz nyei,

eng: and the mountains quake with their surging. There is a river whose streams make glad the city of God,
imn: zungv ndanc zuqc mbong dongz. Selaa Maaih diuh ndaaih bun njiec nyei ndoqv

eng: the holy place where the Most High dwells. God is within her, she will not fall;
imn: liouc mingh bun Tin-Hungh nyei zingh a'hneiv. Naaiv norm zingh se Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei dinc. Tin-Hungh yiem naaiv norm zingh gu'nyuoz, zingh ziouc maiv zuqc ndanc dongz,

eng: God will help her at break of day. Nations are in uproar, kingdoms fall;
imn: lungh ndorm yietv njang Tin-Hungh oix tengx naaiv norm zingh. Maanc fingx mbiouh mbiouh nyei lunc nzengc, maanc guoqv dongz nzengc,

eng: he lifts his voice, the earth melts. The Lord Almighty is with us;
imn: Tin-Hungh heuc cuotv qiex, ndau-beih yuqc nzengc. Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv caux yie mbuo yiem.

eng: the God of Jacob is our fortress. Come and see what the Lord has done,
imn: Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh zoux yie mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Selaa Daaih maah! Daaih mangc Ziouv zoux nyei sic.

eng: the desolations he has brought on the earth. He makes wars cease
imn: Mangc gaax ninh hnangv haaix nor zoux bun ndau huaang nzengc. Ninh bun mborqv jaax nyei jauv dingh taux jomc lungh ndiev,

eng: to the ends of the earth. He breaks the bow and shatters the spear; he burns the shields with fire. He says, “Be still, and know that I am God;
imn: wuotv nauv juang-zinx, bun cang muonc nzengc, longc douz buov mborqv jaax cie. Dingh njiec aqv, yaac hiuv duqv yie se Tin-Hungh.

eng: I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth.” The Lord Almighty is with us;
imn: Yie yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx duqv mienh taaih. Yiem gormx lungh ndiev yie yaac duqv mienh taaih. Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv caux yie mbuo yiem.

eng: the God of Jacob is our fortress.
imn: Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh zoux yie mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Selaa

eng: Clap your hands, all you nations; shout to God with cries of joy. For the Lord Most High is awesome,
imn: Maanc fingx mienh aah! Oix zuqc mbaix buoz longc njien-youh nyei qiex heuc Tin-Hungh. Oix zuqc gamh nziex Ziouv, dongh Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh.

eng: the great King over all the earth. He subdued nations under us,
imn: Ninh zoux domh Hungh Diex gunv gormx lungh ndiev. Ninh bun maanc fingx yiem yie mbuo nyei buoz-ndiev.

eng: peoples under our feet. He chose our inheritance for us,
imn: Bun maanc guoqv yiem yie mbuo nyei zaux-ndiev. Ninh weic yie mbuo ginv yie mbuo nzipc nyei buonc.

eng: the pride of Jacob, whom he loved. God has ascended amid shouts of joy,
imn: Se Yaakopv, dongh ninh hnamv wuov dauh, a'hneiv nyei buonc. Selaa Mienh heuc mbui houc Tin-Hungh faaux weic.

eng: the Lord amid the sounding of trumpets. Sing praises to God, sing praises;
imn: Nzatc nyei qiex mbui houc Ziouv faaux. Oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh, baaux nzung ceng.

eng: sing praises to our King, sing praises. For God is the King of all the earth;
imn: Oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng yie mbuo nyei Hungh Diex, baaux nzung ceng maah! Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zoux Hungh gunv gormx lungh ndiev,

eng: sing to him a psalm of praise. God reigns over the nations;
imn: oix zuqc baaux diuh singx nzung ceng ninh. Tin-Hungh gunv maanc guoqv.

eng: God is seated on his holy throne. The nobles of the nations assemble
imn: Tin-Hungh zueiz jienv ninh nyei cing-nzengc weic. Gunv maanc guoqv nyei jien gapv zunv

eng: as the people of the God of Abraham, for the kings of the earth belong to God; he is greatly exalted.
imn: caux jienv Apc^laa^ham nyei Tin-Hungh nyei baeqc fingx. Weic zuqc lungh ndiev nyei torngv-baaih benx Tin-Hungh nyei. Oix zuqc taaih ninh zoux hlo jiex.

eng: Great is the Lord , and most worthy of praise, in the city of our God, his holy mountain. Beautiful in its loftiness,
imn: Ziouv za'gengh weih hlo, yaac puix duqv mienh camv-camv nyei ceng yiem yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei zingh, se yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc mbong. Mangc naaiv norm mbong youc hlang youc nzueic,

eng: the joy of the whole earth, like the heights of Zaphon is Mount Zion, the city of the Great King. God is in her citadels;
imn: bun lungh ndiev nyei zuangx mienh njien-youh. Se Domh Hungh Diex nyei zingh, Si^on Mbong , yiem baqv bung go nyei dorngx, Tin-Hungh yiem zingh gu'nyuoz yietc norm wuonv nyei dorngx,

eng: he has shown himself to be her fortress. When the kings joined forces,
imn: bun cing ninh ganh benx wuonv nyei dorngx. Mangc maah! Zuangx hungh diex gapv zunv daaih,

eng: when they advanced together, they saw her and were astounded;
imn: lomh nzoih cuotv mingh oix mborqv naaiv norm zingh. Ninh mbuo yietv buatc naaiv norm zingh ninh mbuo mbuoqc horngh haic.

eng: they fled in terror. Trembling seized them there,
imn: Gamh nziex gau, huaang-huaang zaang-zaang nyei biaux. Ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic, sin zinx nzengc,

eng: pain like that of a woman in labor. You destroyed them like ships of Tarshish
imn: kouv gau, hnangv m'sieqv dorn mun gu'nguaaz nor, yaac hnangv Taansitv nyei nzangv

eng: shattered by an east wind. As we have heard,
imn: zuqc dong bung nyei domh nziaaux buonc waaic. Yie mbuo haiz jiex hnangv haaix nor,

eng: so we have seen in the city of the Lord Almighty, in the city of our God: God makes her secure forever. Within your temple, O God,
imn: ih zanc yie mbuo buatc hnangv wuov nor, yiem Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv nyei zingh, se yiem yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei zingh. Naaiv norm zingh Tin-Hungh liepc taux yietc liuz. Selaa O Tin-Hungh aac, yie mbuo yiem meih nyei biauv

eng: we meditate on your unfailing love. Like your name, O God,
imn: jangx zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. O Tin-Hungh aac, hnangv meih nyei mengh zunh jomc lungh ndiev,

eng: your praise reaches to the ends of the earth; your right hand is filled with righteousness. Mount Zion rejoices,
imn: mienh yaac hnangv wuov nor ceng meih taux lungh gorn. Meih longc baengh fim nyei jauv gunv. Tov bun Si^on Mbong nyei mienh a'hneiv,

eng: the villages of Judah are glad because of your judgments. Walk about Zion, go around her,
imn: bun Yu^ndaa Zingh nyei mienh njien-youh, weic zuqc meih baengh fim nyei siemv. Yangh gormx Si^on maah! Huing gormx nzengc.

eng: count her towers, consider well her ramparts,
imn: Saauv zingh nyei laauh. Samx mangc zingh nyei zingh laatc,

eng: view her citadels, that you may tell of them to the next generation. For this God is our God for ever and ever;
imn: zaah mangc zingh wuonv jiex nyei dorngx, weic gorngv mbuox hoz doic mienh. Weic zuqc naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh,

eng: he will be our guide even to the end.
imn: se yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Ninh yietc liuz yietc seix dorh yie mbuo.

eng: Hear this, all you peoples; listen, all who live in this world, both low and high,
imn: Maanc mienh aah! Muangx naaiv deix waac oc. Lungh ndiev mienh aah! Oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx, maiv gunv zoux hlo zoux faix,

eng: rich and poor alike: My mouth will speak words of wisdom;
imn: butv zoih fai mienh jomc mienh. Yie nyei nzuih oix gorngv cong-mengh nyei waac.

eng: the meditation of my heart will give you understanding. I will turn my ear to a proverb;
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv hnamv duqv tong, oix gorngv cuotv mengh nyei. Yie oix bungx m'normh muangx waac-beiv,

eng: with the harp I will expound my riddle: Why should I fear when evil days come,
imn: yie oix patv daanh baah porv mengh eix leiz. Buangh zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc

eng: when wicked deceivers surround me— those who trust in their wealth
imn: yie maiv gamh nziex, dongh zoux doqc hoic yie wuov deix win-wangv, weih gormx yie. Se kaux ninh mbuo nyei zinh zoih

eng: and boast of their great riches? No one can redeem the life of another
imn: yaac bungx waac-maux gorngv zinh zoih camv nyei mienh. Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih zuoqc ninh nyei gorx-youz nzuonx,

eng: or give to God a ransom for them— the ransom for a life is costly,
imn: fai tengx ninh cuotv zuoqc nyei jaax-zinh bun Tin-Hungh, weic zuqc yietc diuh maengc se jaaix haic.

eng: no payment is ever enough— so that they should live on forever
imn: Bun mbu'ziex yaac maiv haih gaux, weic bun ninh yietc liuz ziangh jienv,

eng: and not see decay. For all can see that the wise die,
imn: maiv zuqc mingh yiem yiemh gen. Ninh buatc cong-mengh mienh fih hnangv nyei daic,

eng: that the foolish and the senseless also perish, leaving their wealth to others. Their tombs will remain their houses forever,
imn: hngongx caux maiv hiuv nyei mienh yaac daic, guangc ninh mbuo nyei zinh zoih bun ganh dauh. Ninh mbuo nyei zouv benx ninh mbuo yietc liuz yiem nyei biauv,

eng: their dwellings for endless generations, though they had named lands after themselves. People, despite their wealth, do not endure;
imn: dongh ninh mbuo yiem nyei dorngx taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Maiv gunv ninh mbuo longc ninh mbuo ganh nyei mbuox cuotv bun ninh mbuo nyei ndau. Mienh butv zoih mv baac maiv tengx ninh mbuo maiv zuqc daic.

eng: they are like the beasts that perish. This is the fate of those who trust in themselves,
imn: Ninh ziouc hnangv saeng-kuv zuqc mietc mi'aqv. Naaiv se kaux ganh hngongx nyei jauv nyei mienh,

eng: and of their followers, who approve their sayings. They are like sheep and are destined to die;
imn: caux gan jienv ninh mbuo, a'hneiv ninh mbuo gorngv nyei waac wuov deix oix zuqc buangh nyei sic. Selaa Ninh mbuo hnangv dingc ziangx daix nyei ba'gi yungh.

eng: he will surely take me to himself. Do not be overawed when others grow rich,
imn: weic zuqc ninh oix zipv yie. Selaa Meih buatc mienh butv zoih, benx jienv faaux,

eng: when the splendor of their houses increases; for they will take nothing with them when they die,
imn: maiv dungx gamh nziex, weic zuqc ninh daic nyei ziangh hoc ninh maiv haih dorh haaix nyungc mingh,

eng: their splendor will not descend with them. Though while they live they count themselves blessed—
imn: ninh nyei njang-laangc maiv haih gan ninh njiec mingh. Maiv gunv ninh ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc, ninh funx ninh maaih orn-lorqc,

eng: and people praise you when you prosper— they will join those who have gone before them,
imn: yaac maiv gunv maaih mienh ceng weic zuqc ninh butv zoih jienv faaux, ninh oix zuqc guei seix hnangv ninh nyei ong-taaix mbuo nor,

eng: who will never again see the light of life. People who have wealth but lack understanding
imn: yietc liuz maiv duqv buatc njang. Mienh butv zoih mv baac maiv tengx ninh maiv zuqc daic.

eng: are like the beasts that perish.
imn: Ninh m'daaih caux saeng-kuv fih hnangv nyei zuqc mietc mi'aqv.

eng: The Mighty One, God, the Lord , speaks and summons the earth from the rising of the sun to where it sets. From Zion, perfect in beauty,
imn: Ziouv, Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh, gorngv. Ninh gorngv heuc lungh ndiev yiem mba'hnoi cuotv taux mba'hnoi muotv nyei dorngx. Yiem gauh nzueic jiex nyei Si^on Zingh ,

eng: God shines forth. Our God comes
imn: Tin-Hungh ziux cuotv ninh nyei njang. Yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh daaih,

eng: and will not be silent; a fire devours before him, and around him a tempest rages. He summons the heavens above,
imn: ninh yaac maiv zeiz sekv-sekv nyei, maaih douz yiem ninh wuov ndaangc maengx buov qui nzengc, maaih domh nziaaux-jieqv weih gormx ninh. Ninh heuc lungh caux ndau zoux zorng-zengx,

eng: and the earth, that he may judge his people: “Gather to me this consecrated people,
imn: weic ninh oix siemv ninh nyei baeqc fingx. Ninh gorngv, “Dorh yie ziepc zuoqv nyei baeqc fingx daaih yie naaiv,

eng: who made a covenant with me by sacrifice.” And the heavens proclaim his righteousness,
imn: dongh longc ziec nyei ga'naaiv caux yie liepc jiez ngaengc waac nyei mienh.” Zuangx lungh bun cing Tin-Hungh se baengh fim nyei,

eng: for he is a God of justice. “Listen, my people, and I will speak;
imn: weic zuqc ninh se siemv zuiz jien. Selaa “O yie nyei baeqc fingx aah! Muangx maah! Yie ziouc gorngv,

eng: I will testify against you, Israel: I am God, your God. I bring no charges against you concerning your sacrifices
imn: I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Yie oix zoux zorng-zengx gox meih mbuo aqv. Yie se Tin-Hungh, meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh. Yie maiv zeiz weic meih mbuo ziec nyei ga'naaiv gorngv-hemx meih mbuo.

eng: or concerning your burnt offerings, which are ever before me. I have no need of a bull from your stall
imn: Meih mbuo buov ziec bun yie nyei ga'naaiv zanc-zanc yiem yie nyei nza'hmien. Yie maiv qiemx zuqc yietc dauh yiem meih mbuo nyei ngongh laanh nyei ngongh gouv,

eng: or of goats from your pens, for every animal of the forest is mine,
imn: fai yiem meih mbuo nyei yungh guanh nyei yungh gouv. Weic zuqc yiem lomc nyei yietc zungv hieh zoih benx yie nyei,

eng: and the cattle on a thousand hills. I know every bird in the mountains,
imn: liemh yietc cin norm mbong nyei saeng-kuv yaac benx yie nyei. Yiem lungh nyei yietc zungv norqc yie yaac hiuv nyei,

eng: and the insects in the fields are mine. If I were hungry I would not tell you,
imn: yiem ndau maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv benx nzengc yie nyei. Se gorngv yie hnyouv sie,

eng: for the world is mine, and all that is in it. Do I eat the flesh of bulls
imn: yie maiv mbuox meih, weic zuqc baamh gen caux yiem baamh gen nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv benx yie nyei. Yie nyanc ngongh nyei orv fai?

eng: or drink the blood of goats? “Sacrifice thank offerings to God,
imn: Yie hopv yungh nyei nziaamv fai? Oix zuqc longc dor-ziec nyei waac benx fongc horc ziec bun Tin-Hungh nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: fulfill your vows to the Most High, and call on me in the day of trouble;
imn: yaac jaauv sung meih caux Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Buangh zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc tov yie.

eng: I will deliver you, and you will honor me.” But to the wicked person, God says:
imn: Yie ziouc njoux meih, meih yaac oix taaih yie. Mv baac Tin-Hungh gorngv mbuox orqv mienh,

eng: “What right have you to recite my laws or take my covenant on your lips? You hate my instruction
imn: “Meih maaih haaix nyungc leiz zunh gorngv yie nyei leiz-nyeic, fai bun meih nyei nzuih laengz yie nyei ngaengc waac? Meih nzorng yie mborqv njaaux nyei waac,

eng: and cast my words behind you. When you see a thief, you join with him;
imn: yaac zorqv yie nyei waac zoi guangc meih nyei nqa'haav nqaang. Se gorngv meih buatc dauh janx-zaqc,

eng: you throw in your lot with adulterers. You use your mouth for evil
imn: meih a'hneiv caux ninh zoux doic. Meih yaac caux hienx auv hienx nqox nyei mienh zoux doic. Meih nyei nzuih sueih gorngv orqv nyei waac,

eng: and harness your tongue to deceit. You sit and testify against your brother
imn: meih nyei mbietc hec duqv gorngv-baeqc. Meih zueiz jienv sueih binc gorngv ganh nyei muoz-doic,

eng: and slander your own mother’s son. When you did these things and I kept silent,
imn: yaac gorngv waac-huv hoic cien maa nyei fu'jueiv. Meih zoux naaiv deix sic, yie yaac maiv ko lo.

eng: you thought I was exactly like you. But I now arraign you and set my accusations before you. “Consider this, you who forget God,
imn: Meih hnamv daaih yie hnangv meih nor, mv baac ih zanc yie oix hemx meih, zorqv naaiv deix sic baaiv jienv meih nyei nza'hmien. “Meih mbuo la'kuqv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh aah! Longx-longx nyei hnamv mangc gaax!

eng: or I will tear you to pieces, with no one to rescue you: Those who sacrifice thank offerings honor me,
imn: Maiv zei aeqv, yie oix zorqv meih mbuo mietc nzengc, yaac maiv maaih mienh haih njoux. Haaix dauh dor-ziec weic zoux fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv bun yie,

eng: and to the blameless I will show my salvation.”
imn: wuov dauh taaih yie. Haaix dauh liepc dingc hnyouv yangh horpc nyei jauv, yie oix bun ninh duqv Tin-Hungh nyei njoux en.

eng: Have mercy on me, O God, according to your unfailing love; according to your great compassion blot out my transgressions. Wash away all my iniquity
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih korv-lienh yie, ziux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ziux meih ndongc naaic korv-lienh mienh, tov sortv guangc yie zoux dorngc nyei zuiz. Tov meih nzaaux nzengc yie nyei zuiz-nipc,

eng: and cleanse me from my sin. For I know my transgressions,
imn: tov saax nzengc zuiz bun yie cing-nzengc daaih. Yie zieqv duqv yie zoux dorngc nyei sic,

eng: and my sin is always before me. Against you, you only, have I sinned
imn: yaac zanc-zanc jangx zuqc yie nyei zuiz. Yie baamz zuiz dorngc meih, kungx dorngc meih hnangv,

eng: and done what is evil in your sight; so you are right in your verdict and justified when you judge. Surely I was sinful at birth,
imn: yaac ziux meih buatc, yie zoux orqv sic. Weic naaiv meih dingc yie nyei zuiz se baengh fim nyei, meih dunx yie nyei sic yaac dunx duqv horpc. Yie cuotv seix daaih benx zuiz-mienh,

eng: sinful from the time my mother conceived me. Yet you desired faithfulness even in the womb;
imn: yiem maa nyei ga'sie wuov zanc zungv maaih jienv zuiz. Meih oix nyei se mienh hnyouv zingx,

eng: you taught me wisdom in that secret place. Cleanse me with hyssop, and I will be clean;
imn: weic naaiv tov meih njaaux yie, bun yie maaih cong-mengh yiem hnyouv ndo nyei dorngx. Tov longc husopc miev saax yie, yie ziouc cing-nzengc daaih.

eng: wash me, and I will be whiter than snow. Let me hear joy and gladness;
imn: Tov nzaaux yie, yie ziouc gauh baeqc jiex sorng. Tov bun yie aengx muangx duqv haiz njien-youh, a'hneiv nyei qiex.

eng: let the bones you have crushed rejoice. Hide your face from my sins
imn: Maiv gunv meih bun yie zuqc kouv, tov bun yie aengx maaih orn-lorqc. Tov meih buang jienv hmien, maiv dungx mangc yie nyei zuiz,

eng: and blot out all my iniquity. Create in me a pure heart, O God,
imn: yaac tov sortv guangc yie zoux nyei yietc zungv zuiz-nipc. Tin-Hungh aah! Tov yiem yie gu'nyuoz zeix cing-nzengc nyei hnyouv,

eng: and renew a steadfast spirit within me. Do not cast me from your presence
imn: yaac bun yie maaih ziepc zuoqv nyei siang-hnyouv. Maiv dungx zunc yie biaux, leih nqoi meih nyei nza'hmien,

eng: or take your Holy Spirit from me. Restore to me the joy of your salvation
imn: yaac maiv dungx zorqv yiem yie nyei Singx Lingh cuotv. Tov bun yie duqv meih nyei njoux en nyei njien-youh hnangv loz nor.

eng: and grant me a willing spirit, to sustain me. Then I will teach transgressors your ways,
imn: Yaac bun yie maaih hnyouv oix gan longx meih. Yie ziouc zorqv meih nyei jauv njaaux zuiz-mienh,

eng: so that sinners will turn back to you. Deliver me from the guilt of bloodshed, O God,
imn: ninh mbuo zungv oix nzuonx daaih lorz meih. O Tin-Hungh aac, meih zoux njoux yie wuov dauh Tin-Hungh.

eng: you who are God my Savior, and my tongue will sing of your righteousness. Open my lips, Lord,
imn: Tov njoux yie leih ndutv daix mienh nyei zuiz. Yie nyei mbietc ziouc baaux nzung gorngv meih se baengh fim nyei. O Ziouv aac, tov tengx yie nyei nzuih haih gorngv waac,

eng: and my mouth will declare your praise. You do not delight in sacrifice, or I would bring it;
imn: yie ziouc longc yie nyei nzuih ceng meih. Meih maiv zeiz a'hneiv fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv.

eng: you do not take pleasure in burnt offerings. My sacrifice, O God, is a broken spirit;
imn: Se gorngv yie fongc horc buov ziec ga'naaiv, meih yaac maiv horpc hnyouv. Tin-Hungh oix nyei ga'naaiv-ziec se

eng: a broken and contrite heart you, God, will not despise. May it please you to prosper Zion,
imn: mienh hnyouv mun, hiuv duqv ganh zoux dorngc. O Tin-Hungh aac, hnyouv mun, hiuv duqv ganh zoux dorngc nyei mienh, meih maiv mangc piex. Tov ziux meih nyei kuv za'eix bun Si^on Zingh duqv longx.

eng: to build up the walls of Jerusalem. Then you will delight in the sacrifices of the righteous,
imn: Tov ceix jiez Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei zingh laatc. Wuov zanc meih ziouc a'hneiv mienh ziec duqv horpc nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: in burnt offerings offered whole; then bulls will be offered on your altar.
imn: caux buov ziec caux ziangh dauh buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv. Mienh yaac oix zorqv ngongh gouv an meih nyei ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic buov.

eng: Why do you boast of evil, you mighty hero? Why do you boast all day long, you who are a disgrace in the eyes of God? You who practice deceit,
imn: Mienh henv mienh aah! Meih weic haaix diuc bungx waac-maux meih zoux nyei orqv sic? Tin-Hungh ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Meih daav za'eix mietc mienh.

eng: your tongue plots destruction; it is like a sharpened razor. You love evil rather than good,
imn: Meih nyei mbietc hnangv teix-do nor laic, kungx longc weic gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh hnangv. Meih hnamv orqv sic gauh camv kuv sic,

eng: falsehood rather than speaking the truth. You love every harmful word,
imn: hnamv gorngv-baeqc nyei waac gauh camv gorngv zien leiz. Selaa O meih gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh nyei mbietc aah!

eng: you deceitful tongue! Surely God will bring you down to everlasting ruin:
imn: Meih hnamv yietc zungv hoic mienh nyei waac. Mv baac Tin-Hungh oix bun meih zuqc mietc taux yietc liuz.

eng: He will snatch you up and pluck you from your tent; he will uproot you from the land of the living. The righteous will see and fear;
imn: Ninh oix zorqv meih yiem ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz ciev cuotv daaih. Ninh oix yiem yaangh gen baeng meih cuotv hnangv liemh nzungh baeng cuotv nor. Selaa Kuv mienh duqv buatc yaac gamh nziex.

eng: they will laugh at you, saying, “Here now is the man
imn: Ninh mbuo oix jatv ninh yaac gorngv, mangc maah! Maiv ndaauh kaux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh,

eng: who did not make God his stronghold but trusted in his great wealth and grew strong by destroying others!” But I am like an olive tree
imn: kungx kaux ganh bungx-zuoqc nyei zinh zoih, yaac bangc zoux waaic nyei jauv liepc ganh wuonv. Mv baac yie se hnangv zungh ga'lanv ndiangx nyiemz

eng: flourishing in the house of God; I trust in God’s unfailing love for ever and ever. For what you have done I will always praise you
imn: yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz. Yie kaux Tin-Hungh, dongh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Yie oix dor-ziec meih taux yietc liuz weic meih zoux nyei sic.

eng: in the presence of your faithful people. And I will hope in your name, for your name is good.
imn: Yie oix dorng jienv meih nyei baeqc fingx zunh meih nyei mengh, weic zuqc meih nyei mengh se longx haic.

eng: The fool says in his heart, “There is no God.” They are corrupt, and their ways are vile; there is no one who does good. God looks down from heaven
imn: Mienh hngongx mienh yiem hnyouv gorngv, “Maiv maaih Tin-Hungh lorqc.” Ninh mbuo waaic haic, zoux gamh nziev haic nyei zuiz, maiv maaih yietc dauh zoux longx. Tin-Hungh yiem tin-dorngh mangc njiec,

eng: on all mankind to see if there are any who understand, any who seek God. Everyone has turned away, all have become corrupt;
imn: mangc baamh mienh. Oix mangc gaax, maaih haaix dauh maaih cong-mengh, maaih haaix dauh lorz Tin-Hungh. Mouz dauh mienh tuix nqaang,

eng: there is no one who does good, not even one. Do all these evildoers know nothing?
imn: dauh dauh fih hnangv nyei waaic nzengc. Maiv maaih haaix dauh zoux longx, yietc dauh yaac maiv maaih. Zoux orqv nyei mienh maiv hiuv haaix nyungc fai?

eng: They devour my people as though eating bread; they never call on God. But there they are, overwhelmed with dread,
imn: Ninh mbuo naqv yie nyei baeqc fingx hnangv ninh mbuo nyanc hnaangx nor. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv tov Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo yiem wuov za'gengh! gamh nziex haic.

eng: where there was nothing to dread. God scattered the bones of those who attacked you; you put them to shame, for God despised them. Oh, that salvation for Israel would come out of Zion!
imn: Maiv maaih jiex ndongc naaiv gamh nziex. Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix zorqv dongh liepc ciangv daaih mborqv meih wuov deix mienh nyei mbungv faatv nzaanx nzengc. Meih oix bun ninh mbuo zuqc nyaiv weic zuqc Tin-Hungh nqemh ninh mbuo. Tov bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei njoux en yiem Si^on cuotv.

eng: When God restores his people, let Jacob rejoice and Israel be glad!
imn: Tin-Hungh bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx nzuonx daaih duqv longx hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov zanc, Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun ziouc maaih orn-lorqc, I^saa^laa^en Mienh oix njien-youh.

eng: Save me, O God, by your name; vindicate me by your might. Hear my prayer, O God;
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Tov longc meih nyei mengh njoux yie. Tov longc meih nyei domh qaqv bun cing yie maiv dorngc. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih muangx yie daux gaux,

eng: listen to the words of my mouth. Arrogant foes are attacking me;
imn: muangx haiz yie nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Weic zuqc maaih deix ceng-hlo nyei mienh cuotv daaih mborqv yie.

eng: ruthless people are trying to kill me— people without regard for God. Surely God is my help;
imn: Mienh doqc mienh oix zorqv yie nyei maengc. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv gamh nziex Tin-Hungh. Selaa Tin-Hungh se dongh tengx yie wuov dauh.

eng: the Lord is the one who sustains me. Let evil recoil on those who slander me;
imn: Ziouv yaac baav jienv yie nyei maengc. Tov Tin-Hungh ziux win-wangv zoux nyei orqv sic winh bun ninh mbuo.

eng: in your faithfulness destroy them. I will sacrifice a freewill offering to you;
imn: Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei, tov mietc ninh mbuo. Yie oix cuotv fim zorqv fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv bun meih.

eng: I will praise your name, Lord , for it is good. You have delivered me from all my troubles,
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie oix ceng meih nyei mengh, weic zuqc meih nyei mengh se longx haic. Meih njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei yietc zungv kouv naanc.

eng: and my eyes have looked in triumph on my foes.
imn: Yie ganh nyei m'zing yaac buatc jienv yie nyei win-wangv zuqc suei.

eng: Listen to my prayer, O God, do not ignore my plea; hear me and answer me.
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Tov baeng m'normh muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac. Maiv dungx bingx, maiv muangx yie tov nyei waac. Tov muangx yie yaac dau yie oc.

eng: My thoughts trouble me and I am distraught because of what my enemy is saying,
imn: Yie hnyouv faanv lunc nzengc. Weic haiz win-wangv nyei qiex,

eng: because of the threats of the wicked; for they bring down suffering on me and assail me in their anger. My heart is in anguish within me;
imn: yaac weic orqv mienh zeix yie, weic zuqc ninh mbuo zorqv zeqc naanc jaa bun yie, ninh mbuo qiex jiez, nzorng yie. Yie nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz za'gengh! mun haic.

eng: the terrors of death have fallen on me. Fear and trembling have beset me;
imn: Zuqc daic nyei jauv haeqv yie gamh nziex gau. Yie gengh! gamh nziex, sin zinx nyanh nyanh nyei.

eng: horror has overwhelmed me. I said, “Oh, that I had the wings of a dove!
imn: Gamh nziex gau, siangx cuotv hanc-namx nyei. Yie gorngv, “Feix duqv yie maaih ndaatv hnangv baeqc gopv nor,

eng: I would fly away and be at rest. I would flee far away
imn: yie ziouc ndaix mingh lorz dorngx hitv. Yie oix youh jienv mingh go nyei dorngx,

eng: and stay in the desert; I would hurry to my place of shelter,
imn: mingh yiem wuov deic-bung-huaang. Selaa Yie oix gaanv jienv lorz dorngx bingx,

eng: far from the tempest and storm.” Lord, confuse the wicked, confound their words,
imn: biaux ndutv domh nziaaux-jieqv caux mbiungc.” O Ziouv aah! Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei za'eix waaic aengx bun ninh mbuo nyei waac lunc nzengc,

eng: for I see violence and strife in the city. Day and night they prowl about on its walls;
imn: weic zuqc yie buatc yiem zingh gu'nyuoz maaih qangv maanh zoux doqc nyei sic. Ninh mbuo ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz yiem zingh laatc gu'nguaaic youh jienv mingh huing gormx.

eng: malice and abuse are within it. Destructive forces are at work in the city;
imn: Yiem zingh gu'nyuoz maaih baamz zuiz nyei sic caux waaic sic buangv nzengc. Yiem zingh gu'nyuoz maaih zoux waaic nyei jauv.

eng: threats and lies never leave its streets. If an enemy were insulting me,
imn: Hei zaangc maaih hoic mienh, pienx mienh nyei sic buangv nzengc. Se maiv zeiz win-wangv jatv yie.

eng: I could endure it; if a foe were rising against me, I could hide. But it is you, a man like myself,
imn: Hnangv naaic yie diev duqv nyei. Yaac maiv zeiz nzorng yie nyei mienh ceng-hlo cuoqv yie. Hnangv naaic yie haih bingx ninh. Mv baac se meih, dongh caux yie wuov horngh mienh,

eng: my companion, my close friend, with whom I once enjoyed sweet fellowship
imn: se caux yie zoux doic mienh, zuoqc haic nyei loz-gaeng doic. Zinh ndaangc yie mbuo laanh caux laanh gorngv waac zuoqc haic,

eng: at the house of God, as we walked about among the worshipers. Let death take my enemies by surprise;
imn: yie mbuo caux mienh camv yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv yangh jiex mingh jiex daaih. Ninh mbuo jangx maiv zaaic nyei ziangh hoc

eng: let them go down alive to the realm of the dead, for evil finds lodging among them. As for me, I call to God,
imn: tov bun ninh mbuo zuqc mietc. Bun ninh mbuo liemh nangh nyei zuqc njiec mingh yiem yiemh gen, weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei biauv gu'nyuoz caux ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv orqv haic. Mv baac yie jouh Tin-Hungh,

eng: and the Lord saves me. Evening, morning and noon
imn: Ziouv zungv oix njoux yie. Maiv gunv lungh ndorm lungh muonz fai lungh aanx

eng: I cry out in distress, and he hears my voice. He rescues me unharmed
imn: yie njunh jienv gorngv yie kouv nyei jauv, ninh zungv muangx haiz yie nyei qiex. Ninh njoux yie nyei maengc

eng: from the battle waged against me, even though many oppose me. God, who is enthroned from of old,
imn: leih ndutv caux yie mborqv jaax nyei mienh, bun yie duqv baengh orn, weic zuqc caux yie mborqv jaax wuov deix camv haic. Tin-Hungh, dongh yiem loz-hnoi zueiz jienv weic gunv wuov dauh,

eng: who does not change— he will hear them and humble them, because they have no fear of God. My companion attacks his friends;
imn: oix baeng m'normh muangx yie aengx zatv ninh mbuo njiec, weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv kangv goiv hnyouv yienc eix, yaac maiv gamh nziex Tin-Hungh. Selaa Caux yie zoux doic nyei mienh sung ninh nyei buoz mborqv ninh nyei loz-gaeng doic,

eng: he violates his covenant. His talk is smooth as butter,
imn: yaac baamz ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Ninh nyei nzuih gauh mbiaangc jiex ngongh nyorx hmei,

eng: yet war is in his heart; his words are more soothing than oil, yet they are drawn swords. Cast your cares on the Lord
imn: mv baac hnyouv gu'nyuoz mborqv jienv jaax yiem. Ninh nyei waac gauh mau jiex hmei, mv baac hnangv baeng cuotv daaih nyei nzuqc ndaauv nor. Zorqv meih nyei kouv naanc fungx bun Ziouv,

eng: and he will sustain you; he will never let the righteous be shaken. But you, God, will bring down the wicked
imn: ninh zungv oix baav jienv meih. Ninh yietc liuz maiv bun kuv mienh zuqc ndanc dongz. Mv baac Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: into the pit of decay; the bloodthirsty and deceitful will not live out half their days. But as for me, I trust in you.
imn: Meih oix zorqv orqv mienh zoi njiec taux yiemh gen. Daix mienh nyei mienh caux maaic mienh nyei mienh zungv maiv ziangh taux ndaamv-seix. Mv baac yie ganh aeqv, yie oix kaux meih.

eng: Be merciful to me, my God, for my enemies are in hot pursuit; all day long they press their attack. My adversaries pursue me all day long;
imn: O Tin-Hungh aac, tov korv-lienh yie, weic zuqc mienh caaiv yie. Ninh mbuo ziangh hnoi mborqv yie, zeix yie. Yie nyei win-wangv ziangh hnoi ki yie,

eng: in their pride many are attacking me. When I am afraid, I put my trust in you.
imn: weic zuqc ceng-hlo, mborqv yie nyei mienh camv haic. Yie gamh nziex nyei ziangh hoc

eng: In God, whose word I praise—
imn: yie kaux meih. Yie kaux Tin-Hungh, dongh yie ceng ninh nyei waac wuov dauh,

eng: in God I trust and am not afraid. What can mere mortals do to me? All day long they twist my words;
imn: yie kaux Tin-Hungh, yie zungv maiv gamh nziex. Baamh mienh haih zoux haaix nyungc bun yie? Ninh mbuo ziangh hnoi mbienv yie nyei waac.

eng: all their schemes are for my ruin. They conspire, they lurk,
imn: Ninh mbuo hnamv nyei jauv yietc zungv kungx oix hoic yie hnangv. Ninh mbuo gapv zunv bingx jienv

eng: they watch my steps, hoping to take my life. Because of their wickedness do not let them escape;
imn: cienh mangc yie zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc jauv, zuov jienv oix zorqv yie nyei maengc. O Tin-Hungh aac, tov dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz weic ninh mbuo zoux nyei orqv sic.

eng: in your anger, God, bring the nations down. Record my misery;
imn: Tov meih qiex jiez jienv bun wuov deix zuangx mienh zuqc baaic njiec. Yie buangh nyei kuonx naanh meih saauv jienv.

eng: list my tears on your scroll — are they not in your record? Then my enemies will turn back
imn: Yie nyei wuom-mueic meih yaac dapv jienv meih nyei ndopv-mbuoqc. Naaiv maiv zeiz fiev jienv meih nyei sou-daan fai? Yie heuc jienv tov nyei hnoi-nyieqc,

eng: when I call for help. By this I will know that God is for me. In God, whose word I praise,
imn: yie nyei win-wangv oix tuix nzuonx nqa'haav. Yie hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh za'gengh oix tengx yie. Yie kaux Tin-Hungh,

eng: in the Lord , whose word I praise— in God I trust and am not afraid.
imn: dongh yie ceng ninh nyei waac. Yie kaux Ziouv, dongh yie ceng ninh nyei waac wuov dauh. Yie kaux Tin-Hungh zungv maiv gamh nziex.

eng: What can man do to me? I am under vows to you, my God;
imn: Baamh mienh haih zoux haaix nyungc bun yie? O Tin-Hungh aah! Yie oix zuqc jaauv sung yie caux meih laengz nyei ngaengc waac.

eng: I will present my thank offerings to you. For you have delivered me from death
imn: Yie oix zorqv ziec weic laengz zingh nyei ga'naaiv fongc horc bun meih. Weic zuqc meih njoux yie nyei maengc biaux ndutv zuqc daic nyei jauv,

eng: and my feet from stumbling, that I may walk before God in the light of life.
imn: yaac bun yie nyei zaux maiv zuqc ndorpc, weic bun yie yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien, maaih ziangh maengc nyei njang ziux jienv.

eng: Have mercy on me, my God, have mercy on me, for in you I take refuge. I will take refuge in the shadow of your wings until the disaster has passed. I cry out to God Most High,
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Tov korv-lienh yie. Tov! korv-lienh yie maah! Weic zuqc yie ndaauh kaux meih. Yie ndaauh kaux meih, yiem meih nyei ndaatv-ndiev nyei dongh linh zuov domh zeqc naanc jiex nzengc. Yie heuc Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh,

eng: to God, who vindicates me. He sends from heaven and saves me,
imn: se weic yie zoux ziangx nyungc-nyungc sic nyei Tin-Hungh. Ninh oix yiem gu'nguaaic lungh dau yie, njoux yie.

eng: rebuking those who hotly pursue me— God sends forth his love and his faithfulness. I am in the midst of lions;
imn: Ninh oix bun zeix yie wuov deix zuqc nyaiv. Selaa Tin-Hungh oix bun cing ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie yaac zoux hnyouv zingx. Yie bueix jienv sienh mbu'ndongx,

eng: I am forced to dwell among ravenous beasts— men whose teeth are spears and arrows, whose tongues are sharp swords. Be exalted, O God, above the heavens;
imn: se naqv baamh mienh nyei sienh. Ninh mbuo nyei nyaah se hnangv cang caux forng nor. Ninh mbuo nyei mbietc yaac hnangv nzuqc ndaauv nor laic. O Tin-Hungh aac, tov bun mienh taaih meih gauh hlang jiex lungh.

eng: let your glory be over all the earth. They spread a net for my feet—
imn: Tov bun meih nyei njang-laangc yiem buangv lungh ndiev. Ninh mbuo zaeng mungz yie nyei zaux caaiv nyei dorngx.

eng: I was bowed down in distress. They dug a pit in my path— but they have fallen into it themselves. My heart, O God, is steadfast,
imn: Yie zuqc naanc zingh ngatv jienv yie nyei hnyouv. Ninh mbuo wetv kuotv yie yangh nyei jauv, mv baac ninh mbuo ganh ndortv njiec. Selaa O Tin-Hungh aac, yie nyei hnyouv kaux wuonv.

eng: my heart is steadfast; I will sing and make music. Awake, my soul!
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv kaux wuonv. Yie oix baaux nzung, oix baaux nzung ceng meih. Yie nyei hnyouv aah! Nyie daaih maah!

eng: Awake, harp and lyre! I will awaken the dawn. I will praise you, Lord, among the nations;
imn: Domh daanh baah, fiuv-daanh baah aah! Nyie daaih maah! Yie oix bun mba'hnoi nyie daaih. O Ziouv aac, yie oix yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx dor-ziec meih,

eng: I will sing of you among the peoples. For great is your love, reaching to the heavens;
imn: yie oix yiem maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx baaux nzung ceng meih. Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh mbaengc lungh hlang.

eng: your faithfulness reaches to the skies. Be exalted, O God, above the heavens;
imn: Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv yaac mbaengc mbuonx hlang. O Tin-Hungh aac, tov bun mienh taaih meih gauh hlang jiex lungh.

eng: let your glory be over all the earth.
imn: Tov bun meih nyei njang-laangc yiem buangv lungh ndiev.

eng: Do you rulers indeed speak justly? Do you judge people with equity? No, in your heart you devise injustice,
imn: Meih mbuo zoux hlo nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo baengh fim nyei gorngv fai? Meih mbuo hnyouv zingx nyei siemv baamh mienh fai? Zungv maiv zeiz! Meih mbuo nyei hnyouv kungx hnamv zoux orqv nyei sic hnangv.

eng: and your hands mete out violence on the earth. Even from birth the wicked go astray;
imn: Meih mbuo yiem ndau-beih longc buoz zoux cuotv doqc haic nyei sic. Zoux orqv nyei mienh cuotv seix daaih m'daaih yangh orqv nyei jauv.

eng: from the womb they are wayward, spreading lies. Their venom is like the venom of a snake,
imn: Yiem ninh mbuo cuotv seix daaih ninh mbuo kungx gorngv-baeqc hnangv. Ninh mbuo nyei doqc qiex hnangv naang nyei ndie-doqc.

eng: like that of a cobra that has stopped its ears, that will not heed the tune of the charmer,
imn: Ninh mbuo zotv jienv m'normh hnangv m'normh ndung nyei naang-jieqv, ninh mbuo ziouc muangx maiv haiz zoux faatv bun naang hngongx nyei mienh nyei qiex

eng: however skillful the enchanter may be. Break the teeth in their mouths, O God;
imn: maiv gunv zoux faatv ndongc haaix guv guaix. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov mborqv nquaqv ninh mbuo nyei nzuih nyei nyaah.

eng: Lord , tear out the fangs of those lions! Let them vanish like water that flows away;
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov baeng naaiv deix sienh lunx nyei nyaah ngau cuotv. Tov bun ninh mbuo zutc nzengc hnangv wuom liouc mingh nzengc nor.

eng: when they draw the bow, let their arrows fall short. May they be like a slug that melts away as it moves along,
imn: Ninh mbuo baeng jienv juang-zinx oix buonv wuov zanc, tov bun ninh mbuo nyei forng-cang nauv ndutv. Tov bun ninh mbuo hnangv korng gueiv manc-manc huv yuqc nzengc.

eng: like a stillborn child that never sees the sun. Before your pots can feel the heat of the thorns—
imn: Yaac bun ninh mbuo hnangv gu'nguaaz-mbaang nor, maiv duqv buatc mba'hnoi. Longc njimv buov douz, maiv gunv njimv nyiemz fai nqaai,

eng: whether they be green or dry—the wicked will be swept away. The righteous will be glad when they are avenged,
imn: caeng zungv maiv gaengh haiz jorm, ninh ziouc guaatv orqv mienh mingh nzengc mi'aqv. Kuv mienh buatc orqv mienh zuqc jaauv win, ninh mbuo a'hneiv.

eng: when they dip their feet in the blood of the wicked. Then people will say,
imn: Ninh mbuo yaac longc orqv mienh nyei nziaamv nzaaux zaux. Mienh ziouc gorngv, “Kuv mienh ndongc haaix zungv oix duqv zingh nyeic.

eng: “Surely the righteous still are rewarded; surely there is a God who judges the earth.”
imn: Ndongc haaix zungv maaih dauh Tin-Hungh siemv lungh ndiev.”

eng: Deliver me from my enemies, O God; be my fortress against those who are attacking me. Deliver me from evildoers
imn: Yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv. Tov beu yie biaux ndutv oix mborqv yie wuov deix mienh. Njoux yie biaux ndutv zoux orqv sic wuov deix,
