eng: and save me from those who are after my blood. See how they lie in wait for me!
imn: se njoux yie biaux ndutv daix mienh nyei mienh. Mangc maah! Ninh mbuo bingx jienv zuov oix zorqv yie nyei maengc.

eng: Fierce men conspire against me for no offense or sin of mine, Lord . I have done no wrong, yet they are ready to attack me.
imn: Ciouv nyei mienh gapv zunv oix mborqv yie. O Ziouv aah! Maiv zeiz weic yie zoux dorngc fai yie zoux nyei haaix nyungc zuiz, maiv gunv yie maiv zoux haaix nyungc dorngc,

eng: Arise to help me; look on my plight! You, Lord God Almighty,
imn: ninh mbuo tiux daaih liuc leiz mborqv yie. Tov gaanv daaih tengx yie. Tov daaih mangc maah! Ziouv, Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh,

eng: you who are the God of Israel, rouse yourself to punish all the nations; show no mercy to wicked traitors. They return at evening,
imn: zoux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Tin-Hungh. Tov jiez daaih dingc maanc fingx nyei zuiz. Maiv dungx korv-lienh daav orqv za'eix nyei mienh. Selaa Ninh mbuo hnoi-hnoi lungh maanz-hmuangx nzuonx daaih,

eng: snarling like dogs, and prowl about the city. See what they spew from their mouths—
imn: hnangv juv nor njunh, yaac saau gormx zingh gu'nyuoz. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih qaqv gorngv maiv benx nyei waac.

eng: the words from their lips are sharp as swords, and they think, “Who can hear us?” But you laugh at them, Lord ;
imn: Ninh mbuo hnangv maaih nzuqc ndaauv yiem ninh mbuo nyei nzuih meix, weic zuqc ninh mbuo hnamv, “Haaix dauh haih muangx haiz yie mbuo?” Mv baac Ziouv aah! Meih jatv ninh mbuo.

eng: you scoff at all those nations. You are my strength, I watch for you;
imn: Meih huotv maanc fingx. Meih zoux yie nyei Qaqv. Yie zuov jienv meih.

eng: you, God, are my fortress, my God on whom I can rely.
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih zoux yie wuonv haic nyei dorngx. Yie nyei Tin-Hungh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie, oix daaih tengx yie.

eng: God will go before me and will let me gloat over those who slander me. But do not kill them, Lord our shield,
imn: Yie nyei Tin-Hungh oix bun yie duqv buatc yie nyei win-wangv suei. O Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei torngv-baaih aah!

eng: or my people will forget. In your might uproot them and bring them down. For the sins of their mouths,
imn: Maiv dungx daix ninh mbuo. Nziex yie nyei baeqc fingx haih la'kuqv. Tov longc meih nyei qaqv bun ninh mbuo faatv nzaanx, bun ninh mbuo zuqc baaic. Laaix ninh mbuo nyei nzuih nyei zuiz,

eng: for the words of their lips, let them be caught in their pride. For the curses and lies they utter, consume them in your wrath,
imn: caux ninh mbuo nyei nzuih meix gorngv nyei waac, tov bun ninh mbuo zoux maux nyei sic benx hlaang hlopv ninh mbuo. Laaix ninh mbuo zioux caux gorngv-baeqc, tov meih qiex jiez, bun ninh mbuo zuqc mietc,

eng: consume them till they are no more. Then it will be known to the ends of the earth that God rules over Jacob. They return at evening,
imn: mietc taux ninh mbuo zutc nzengc. Zuangx mienh ziouc hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh, zungv gunv taux jomc lungh gorn. Selaa Ninh mbuo hnoi-hnoi lungh maanz-hmuangx nzuonx daaih,

eng: snarling like dogs, and prowl about the city. They wander about for food
imn: hnangv juv nor njunh, yaac saau gormx zingh gu'nyuoz. Ninh mbuo hnangv juv nor,

eng: and howl if not satisfied. But I will sing of your strength,
imn: saau jienv mingh lorz hnaangx nyanc. Se gorngv maiv duqv nyanc beuv ninh ziangh muonz njunh. Mv baac yie oix baaux nzung ceng meih nyei qaqv.

eng: in the morning I will sing of your love; for you are my fortress, my refuge in times of trouble. You are my strength, I sing praise to you;
imn: Lungh ndorm yie oix baaux nzung mbui nyei ceng meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Weic zuqc meih zoux yie wuonv haic nyei dorngx, yie zuqc zeqc naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc meih zoux yie kaux nyei dorngx. O yie nyei Qaqv aah! Yie oix baaux nzung ceng meih.

eng: you, God, are my fortress, my God on whom I can rely.
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih zoux yie wuonv nyei laauh, dongh bun cing meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie wuov dauh Tin-Hungh.

eng: You have rejected us, God, and burst upon us; you have been angry—now restore us! You have shaken the land and torn it open;
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Meih guangc yie mbuo, mborqv baaic yie mbuo mi'aqv. Meih qiex jiez yie mbuo, tov bun yie mbuo nzuonx daaih hnangv loz wuov nor. Meih bun ndau dongz, mbaaix nqoi mi'aqv.

eng: mend its fractures, for it is quaking. You have shown your people desperate times;
imn: Tov zorc mbaaix nyei dorngx weic zuqc ndau lungh lungh laih laih nyei. Meih bun meih nyei baeqc fingx zuqc diev kouv.

eng: you have given us wine that makes us stagger. But for those who fear you, you have raised a banner
imn: Meih bun yie mbuo hopv diuv nquin, yangh jauv lingh lingh king-king nyei. Meih cie jienv geh bun taaih meih wuov deix mienh

eng: to be unfurled against the bow. Save us and help us with your right hand,
imn: daaih gapv zunv leih buonv juang-zinx nyei mienh. Selaa Tov dau yie mbuo, longc meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz njoux yie mbuo,

eng: that those you love may be delivered. God has spoken from his sanctuary:
imn: tengx meih hnamv nyei mienh duqv njoux. Tin-Hungh yiem ninh nyei singx dinc gorngv,

eng: “In triumph I will parcel out Shechem and measure off the Valley of Sukkoth. Gilead is mine, and Manasseh is mine;
imn: “Yie oix a'hneiv nyei zorqv Sekem bun nqoi, yaac ndorqc Sukc^kotv Horngz paaiv bun nqoi. Gi^le^aatc se yie nyei, Maa^natv^se yaac yie nyei.

eng: Ephraim is my helmet, Judah is my scepter. Moab is my washbasin,
imn: E^faa^im se yie mborqv jaax nyei muoc. Yu^ndaa se yie nyei hungh biaav. Mo^apc se yie nyei nzaaux buoz-zaux bunh.

eng: on Edom I toss my sandal; over Philistia I shout in triumph.” Who will bring me to the fortified city?
imn: Yie yaac zoi yie nyei heh njiec E^ndom. Yie heuc jienv gorngv, ‘Fi^li^saa^die aah! Yie hingh jiex meih aqv.’+” Haaix dauh oix dorh yie mingh taux wuov norm weih wuonv nyei zingh?

eng: Who will lead me to Edom? Is it not you, God, you who have now rejected us
imn: Haaix dauh oix dorh yie mingh taux E^ndom Deic-Bung? O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih maiv zeiz guangc yie mbuo fai?

eng: and no longer go out with our armies? Give us aid against the enemy,
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih maiv caux yie mbuo nyei jun-baeng guanh cuotv mingh mborqv jaax fai? Tov meih tengx yie mbuo mborqv win-wangv,

eng: for human help is worthless. With God we will gain the victory,
imn: weic zuqc baamh mienh tengx se maiv lamh longc. Yie mbuo kaux Tin-Hungh yie mbuo ziouc duqv hingh jiex.

eng: and he will trample down our enemies.
imn: Se dongh ninh oix caaiv yie mbuo nyei win-wangv njiec.

eng: Hear my cry, O God; listen to my prayer. From the ends of the earth I call to you,
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Tov muangx yie heuc nyei qiex. Tov muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac. Yie nyei hnyouv maiv lamh hnamv nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: I call as my heart grows faint; lead me to the rock that is higher than I. For you have been my refuge,
imn: yie yiem jomc lungh ndiev heuc meih. Tov dorh yie mingh taux gauh hlang jiex yie nyei la'bieiv. Weic zuqc meih zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx,

eng: a strong tower against the foe. I long to dwell in your tent forever
imn: zoux yie wuonv haic nyei laauh weic biaux ndutv win-wangv. Tov bun yie yietc liuz yiem meih nyei ndopv-liuh.

eng: and take refuge in the shelter of your wings. For you, God, have heard my vows;
imn: Tov bun yie yiem meih nyei ndaatv ga'ndiev bingx jienv. Selaa O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih muangx haiz yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac.

eng: you have given me the heritage of those who fear your name. Increase the days of the king’s life,
imn: Meih zorqv dongh taaih meih nyei mienh nzipc nyei buonc ceix bun yie. Tov jaa hungh diex nyei siouc nyuonh ndaauv,

eng: his years for many generations. May he be enthroned in God’s presence forever;
imn: bun ninh nyei hnyangx-jeiv ziangh duqv maanc doic. Tov bun ninh yietc liuz zueiz weic yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien.

eng: appoint your love and faithfulness to protect him. Then I will ever sing in praise of your name
imn: Tov meih hnyouv zingx caux ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei jauv beu jienv ninh. Hnangv naaic, yie oix yietc liuz baaux nzung ceng meih nyei mengh,

eng: and fulfill my vows day after day.
imn: yaac hnoi jiex hnoi jaauv sung yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac.

eng: Truly my soul finds rest in God; my salvation comes from him. Truly he is my rock and my salvation;
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv sekv nzieqc nyei zuov Tin-Hungh ganh nduqc dauh hnangv. Yie nyei njoux en yiem ninh daaih. Kungx ninh ganh zoux yie nyei La'bieiv

eng: he is my fortress, I will never be shaken. How long will you assault me?
imn: yaac zoux yie nyei Njoux En. Ninh se yie wuonv nyei dorngx, yie maiv zuqc ndanc dongz. Meih mbuo zuangx mienh oix mborqv

eng: Would all of you throw me down— this leaning wall, this tottering fence? Surely they intend to topple me
imn: oix baaic waaic yietc laanh mienh ndongc haaix lauh? Ninh hnangv zingh laatc laih mingh, yaac hnangv laatc nor tong huv nzengc. Ninh mbuo daav za'eix oix tuix ninh nyei baaih njiec.

eng: from my lofty place; they take delight in lies. With their mouths they bless, but in their hearts they curse. Yes, my soul, find rest in God;
imn: Ninh mbuo a'hneiv gorngv-baeqc. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv buang nyei waac mv baac hnyouv gu'nyuoz kungx zioux hnangv. Selaa Yie nyei hnyouv sekv nzieqc nyei zuov Tin-Hungh ganh nduqc dauh hnangv,

eng: my hope comes from him. Truly he is my rock and my salvation;
imn: weic zuqc se ninh bun yie maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. Kungx ninh ganh zoux yie nyei la'bieiv yaac zoux yie nyei njoux en.

eng: he is my fortress, I will not be shaken. My salvation and my honor depend on God ;
imn: Ninh se yie wuonv nyei dorngx, yie maiv zuqc ndanc dongz. Tin-Hungh se yie nyei njoux en caux yie nyei njang-laangc.

eng: he is my mighty rock, my refuge. Trust in him at all times, you people;
imn: Tin-Hungh yaac zoux yie henv haic nyei la'bieiv, zoux ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. O meih mbuo zuangx baeqc fingx aah! Oix zuqc zanc-zanc kaux Tin-Hungh.

eng: pour out your hearts to him, for God is our refuge. Surely the lowborn are but a breath,
imn: Zorqv ganh nyei hnyouv yietc zungv mbuox Ninh. Ninh zoux yie mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Selaa Haac horngh mienh beiv tauv yietc nzunc qiex.

eng: the highborn are but a lie. If weighed on a balance, they are nothing; together they are only a breath. Do not trust in extortion
imn: Zaangc horngh mienh yaac kungx jaav nyei hnangv. Longc tin-baengh dangv nziang ninh mbuo yaac maiv maaih hniev-daauh. I nyungc gapv daaih gauh heng tauv yietc nzunc nyei qiex. Maiv dungx bangc niouv mienh nyei sic weic duqv nyaanh,

eng: or put vain hope in stolen goods; though your riches increase, do not set your heart on them. One thing God has spoken,
imn: yaac maiv dungx hnamv kaux caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv. Se gorngv butv zoih camv jienv faaux yaac maiv dungx bungx hnyouv. Tin-Hungh gorngv nzunc,

eng: two things I have heard: “Power belongs to you, God, and with you, Lord, is unfailing love”;
imn: yie duqv haiz i nzunc, se domh qaqv benx Tin-Hungh nyei. O Ziouv aah! Se dongh meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.

eng: and, “You reward everyone according to what they have done.”
imn: Weic zuqc meih ziux gorqv-mienh zoux nyei winh zingh nyeic bun mienh.

eng: You, God, are my God, earnestly I seek you; I thirst for you, my whole being longs for you, in a dry and parched land where there is no water. I have seen you in the sanctuary
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Meih zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh, yie longc hnyouv zimh lorz meih. Yie nyei hnyouv ngorc haic meih, yie za'gengh! oix haic meih hnangv yiem deic-bung-haanz mborngx nqaai, maiv maaih wuom nyei dorngx nor. Yie yiem singx dinc buatc jiex meih,

eng: and beheld your power and your glory. Because your love is better than life,
imn: buatc meih nyei qaqv caux njang-laangc. Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh se gauh longx ziangh maengc,

eng: my lips will glorify you. I will praise you as long as I live,
imn: yie nyei nzuih ziouc oix ceng meih. Da'faanh corc maaih maengc nyei ziangh hoc yie oix ceng meih.

eng: and in your name I will lift up my hands. I will be fully satisfied as with the richest of foods;
imn: Yie oix dengv meih nyei mengh sung yie nyei buoz daux gaux. Yie nyei hnyouv hnangv nyanc beuv yinh wuic nyei lai-hnaangx.

eng: with singing lips my mouth will praise you. On my bed I remember you;
imn: Yie nyei nzuih yaac oix njien-youh nyei ceng meih. Yie bueix jienv coux jangx taux meih,

eng: I think of you through the watches of the night. Because you are my help,
imn: lungh muonz zanc yaac fei-fangv taux meih. Weic zuqc meih zanc-zanc tengx yie,

eng: I sing in the shadow of your wings. I cling to you;
imn: yie yiem meih nyei ndaatv-ndiev nyei dongh linh njien-youh nyei baaux nzung. Yie nyei hnyouv kaux wuonv meih.

eng: your right hand upholds me. Those who want to kill me will be destroyed;
imn: Meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz baav jienv yie. Oix hoic yie nyei maengc wuov deix mienh

eng: they will go down to the depths of the earth. They will be given over to the sword
imn: zungv oix ndortv njiec yiemh gen. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix,

eng: and become food for jackals. But the king will rejoice in God;
imn: zuqc hieh juv betv nyanc. Mv baac hungh diex oix kaux Tin-Hungh njien-youh.

eng: all who swear by God will glory in him, while the mouths of liars will be silenced.
imn: Da'faanh ziangv jienv ninh houv waac nyei mienh oix ceng ninh, weic zuqc gorngv-baeqc wuov deix zungv zuqc nqapc jienv nzuih.

eng: Hear me, my God, as I voice my complaint; protect my life from the threat of the enemy. Hide me from the conspiracy of the wicked,
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Yie tauv domh qiex nyei ziangh hoc tov muangx yie nyei qiex. Tov meih beu jienv yie nyei maengc, maiv zuqc win-wangv hoic. Tov meih tengx yie bingx jienv beic ndiev daav za'eix wuov deix orqv mienh,

eng: from the plots of evildoers. They sharpen their tongues like swords
imn: caux wuov guanh ceux lunc nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo nzioux ganh nyei mbietc hnangv nzuqc ndaauv nor laic,

eng: and aim cruel words like deadly arrows. They shoot from ambush at the innocent;
imn: ninh mbuo gorngv cuotv im haic nyei waac hnangv ziangx haic nyei forng. Ninh mbuo bingx jienv buonv maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh,

eng: they shoot suddenly, without fear. They encourage each other in evil plans,
imn: liemh zeih buonv ninh, ninh mbuo yaac maiv gamh nziex. Ninh mbuo laanh kuinx laanh ei ninh mbuo waaic nyei za'eix zoux.

eng: they talk about hiding their snares; they say, “Who will see it ?” They plot injustice and say,
imn: Ninh mbuo beic ndiev caangh laangh zaeng hlaang hlopv mienh. Ninh mbuo hnamv daaih, “Haaix dauh haih mangc duqv buatc yie mbuo?” Haaix dauh haih wetv cuotv yie mbuo zoux nyei waaic sic?

eng: “We have devised a perfect plan!” Surely the human mind and heart are cunning. But God will shoot them with his arrows;
imn: Yie mbuo hnamv cuotv guaix haic nyei za'eix.” Mienh nyei hnyouv caux eix za'gengh ndo haic. Mv baac Tin-Hungh oix longc forng-cang buonv ninh mbuo,

eng: they will suddenly be struck down. He will turn their own tongues against them
imn: ninh mbuo ziouc liemh zeih zuqc mun. Weic zuqc ninh mbuo ganh nyei mbietc oix hoic ninh mbuo zuqc baaic.

eng: and bring them to ruin; all who see them will shake their heads in scorn. All people will fear;
imn: Da'faanh buatc ninh mbuo nyei mienh ziouc huangx m'nqorngv. Zuangx mienh ziouc gamh nziex haic,

eng: they will proclaim the works of God and ponder what he has done. The righteous will rejoice in the Lord
imn: oix zunh yaangh Tin-Hungh zoux nyei gong, yaac hnamv taux ninh zoux nyei sic. Kuv mienh ziouc kaux Ziouv njien-youh

eng: and take refuge in him; all the upright in heart will glory in him!
imn: yaac oix ndaauh kaux ninh. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh yaac oix ceng ninh.

eng: Praise awaits you, our God, in Zion; to you our vows will be fulfilled. You who answer prayer,
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Yie mbuo horpc zuqc yiem Si^on ceng meih, yaac jaauv sung yie mbuo laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Meih muangx baamh mienh daux gaux nyei waac.

eng: to you all people will come. When we were overwhelmed by sins,
imn: Baamh mienh yietc zungv oix daaih lorz meih weic mienh baamz zuiz.

eng: you forgave our transgressions. Blessed are those you choose
imn: Yie mbuo nyei zuiz-nipc hingh yie mbuo nyei ziangh hoc meih zungv guangc mi'aqv. Meih ginv dorh daaih yiem nitv fatv meih wuov deix,

eng: and bring near to live in your courts! We are filled with the good things of your house, of your holy temple. You answer us with awesome and righteous deeds,
imn: se bun yiem meih nyei singx dinc nyei laatc gu'nyuoz nyei mienh, duqv orn-lorqc. Yie mbuo ziouc buangv eix weic yiem meih nyei biauv, se yiem meih cing-nzengc nyei singx dinc, duqv nyungc-nyungc longx. O yie mbuo njoux en nyei Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: God our Savior, the hope of all the ends of the earth and of the farthest seas, who formed the mountains by your power,
imn: Meih longc mbuoqc horngh nyei sic njoux yie mbuo, dau yie mbuo. Yiem jomc lungh ndiev caux go jiex nyei koiv nyei mienh kaux meih maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. Meih longc meih nyei qaqv liepc mbong jiez daaih,

eng: having armed yourself with strength, who stilled the roaring of the seas,
imn: bun cing meih henv haic. Meih bun koiv mbui nyei qiex

eng: the roaring of their waves, and the turmoil of the nations. The whole earth is filled with awe at your wonders;
imn: caux wuom-laangc nyei qiex sekv, yaac bun maanc fingx nauc nyei qiex sekv mi'aqv. Yiem lungh ndiev go jiex nyei dorngx nyei mienh

eng: where morning dawns, where evening fades, you call forth songs of joy. You care for the land and water it;
imn: ziouc weic meih zoux nyei jangx-hoc gamh nziex. Meih bun mba'hnoi cuotv caux mba'hnoi muotv wuov deix dorngx nyei mienh njien-youh nyei heuc. Meih goux ndau-beih yaac bun mbiungc njiec daaih

eng: you enrich it abundantly. The streams of God are filled with water to provide the people with grain, for so you have ordained it. You drench its furrows and level its ridges;
imn: bun ndau junc haic. Tin-Hungh nyei ndaaih maaih wuom buangv nzengc. Meih yaac bun mienh duqv laangh ziqc weic zuqc meih hnangv naaic liuc leiz ziangx ndau. Meih bun lungh duih mbiungc njiec laih ziangx nyei ndau,

eng: you soften it with showers and bless its crops. You crown the year with your bounty,
imn: bun laih liuz nyei nie yuonh nzengc. Meih duih mbiungc-mbuonv njiec bun ndau mau, ceix fuqv bun ga'naaiv-zuangx hlo. Meih bun hnyangx-daauh bungx-zuoqc,

eng: and your carts overflow with abundance. The grasslands of the wilderness overflow;
imn: maiv gunv meih mingh taux haaix, yaac maaih siou-sengh. Yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei miev-ciangv nyiemz haic,

eng: the hills are clothed with gladness. The meadows are covered with flocks
imn: mbong-aiv yaac njien-youh, orn-lorqc nzengc. Miev-ciangv hnangv maaih yungh guanh zorng jienv,

eng: and the valleys are mantled with grain; they shout for joy and sing.
imn: horngz yaac maaih mbiauh cuotv buangv, nyungc-nyungc lomh nzoih njien-youh nyei heuc yaac baaux nzung.

eng: Shout for joy to God, all the earth! Sing the glory of his name;
imn: Lungh ndiev nyei zuangx mienh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh nyei heuc jienv ceng Tin-Hungh. Baaux nzung ceng ninh njang-laangc nyei mbuox.

eng: make his praise glorious. Say to God, “How awesome are your deeds!
imn: Ceng ninh bun cing ninh njang-laangc haic. Oix zuqc mbuox Tin-Hungh,

eng: So great is your power that your enemies cringe before you. All the earth bows down to you;
imn: “Meih zoux nyei sic za'gengh mbuoqc horngh haic. Meih nyei qaqv henv haic, meih nyei win-wangv ziouc nyiemc faix aengx puoqv njiec meih nyei nza'hmien. Lungh ndiev nyei zuangx mienh baaix meih.

eng: they sing praise to you, they sing the praises of your name.” Come and see what God has done,
imn: Ninh mbuo baaux nzung ceng meih. Ninh mbuo baaux nzung ceng meih nyei mengh.” Selaa Daaih mangc Tin-Hungh zoux nyei sic maah!

eng: his awesome deeds for mankind! He turned the sea into dry land,
imn: Ninh yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx zoux domh mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh tiuv koiv benx ndau-nqaai,

eng: they passed through the waters on foot— come, let us rejoice in him. He rules forever by his power,
imn: yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix yangh jauv jiex ndaaih. Yie mbuo yiem wuov weic ninh zoux nyei sic njien-youh. Ninh longc domh qaqv yietc liuz gunv,

eng: his eyes watch the nations— let not the rebellious rise up against him. Praise our God, all peoples,
imn: ninh nyei m'zing zanc-zanc mangc jienv maanc fingx. Oix ngaengc Tin-Hungh wuov deix maiv dungx ceng ganh hlo. Selaa Maanc fingx mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh,

eng: let the sound of his praise be heard; he has preserved our lives
imn: bun mienh muangx duqv haiz ceng ninh nyei qiex mbui. Ninh beu jienv bun yie mbuo maaih maengc ziangh,

eng: and kept our feet from slipping. For you, God, tested us;
imn: yaac maiv bun yie mbuo nyei zaux caaiv piatv. O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih kauv yie mbuo.

eng: you refined us like silver. You brought us into prison
imn: Meih sinx yie mbuo hnangv sinx nyaanh nor. Meih bun yie mbuo zuqc mungz zaaux jienv,

eng: and laid burdens on our backs. You let people ride over our heads;
imn: bun yie mbuo zuqc siouc kouv hnangv zorqv hniev nyei ga'naaiv bun yie mbuo nyiex. Meih bun mienh geh mborqv jaax cie nganx yie mbuo nyei m'nqorngv.

eng: we went through fire and water, but you brought us to a place of abundance. I will come to your temple with burnt offerings
imn: Yie mbuo zuqc jiex wuom jiex douz, mv baac meih dorh yie mbuo taux norm bungx-zuoqc nyei deic-bung. Yie oix dorh buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv bieqc meih nyei biauv.

eng: and fulfill my vows to you— vows my lips promised and my mouth spoke
imn: Yie oix jaauv sung yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac ziux zuqc kuonx naanh nyei ziangh hoc

eng: when I was in trouble. I will sacrifice fat animals to you
imn: caux yie nyei nzuih meix gorngv cuotv nyei waac, se yie nyei nzuih laengz nyei. Yie oix fongc horc junc nyei saeng-kuv zoux buov ziec nyei ga'naaiv

eng: and an offering of rams; I will offer bulls and goats. Come and hear, all you who fear God;
imn: caux jienv ba'gi yungh gouv zoux ndaang nyei qiex. Yie longc ngongh gouv caux yungh gouv fongc horc bun meih. Selaa Da'faanh taaih Tin-Hungh nyei mienh gunv daaih muangx maah!

eng: let me tell you what he has done for me. I cried out to him with my mouth;
imn: Yie ziouc mbuox meih mbuo ninh weic yie zoux nyei sic. Yie heuc jienv tov ninh,

eng: his praise was on my tongue. If I had cherished sin in my heart,
imn: yie longc yie nyei mbietc ceng ninh, taaih ninh. Se gorngv yie sueih zuiz yiem yie nyei hnyouv,

eng: the Lord would not have listened; but God has surely listened
imn: Ziouv zungv maiv muangx yie. Mv baac Tin-Hungh za'gengh muangx yie.

eng: and has heard my prayer. Praise be to God,
imn: Ninh baeng m'normh muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac. Ceng Tin-Hungh weic zuqc ninh maiv nqemh yie daux gaux nyei waac.

eng: who has not rejected my prayer or withheld his love from me!
imn: Ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie, maiv guangc yie.

eng: May God be gracious to us and bless us and make his face shine on us— so that your ways may be known on earth,
imn: Tov Tin-Hungh korv-lienh yie mbuo, ceix fuqv bun yie mbuo. Tov zoux longx bun yie mbuo, Selaa weic bun lungh ndiev mienh hiuv duqv meih nyei jauv-louc,

eng: your salvation among all nations. May the peoples praise you, God;
imn: yaac bun maanc guoqv haih hiuv duqv meih nyei njoux en. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov bun fingx-fingx mienh ceng meih.

eng: may all the peoples praise you. May the nations be glad and sing for joy,
imn: Tov bun maanc fingx ceng meih. Tov bun maanc guoqv a'hneiv, njien-youh nyei baaux nzung,

eng: for you rule the peoples with equity and guide the nations of the earth. May the peoples praise you, God;
imn: weic zuqc meih baengh fim nyei siemv maanc fingx, yaac dorh lungh ndiev nyei maanc guoqv. Selaa O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov bun fingx-fingx mienh ceng meih.

eng: may all the peoples praise you. The land yields its harvest;
imn: Tov bun maanc fingx ceng meih. Ndau cuotv gaeng-zuangx.

eng: God, our God, blesses us. May God bless us still,
imn: Tin-Hungh, se yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh, ceix fuqv bun yie mbuo. Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv bun yie mbuo.

eng: so that all the ends of the earth will fear him.
imn: Tov bun yiem jomc lungh ndiev nyei maanc mienh taaih ninh.

eng: May God arise, may his enemies be scattered; may his foes flee before him. May you blow them away like smoke—
imn: Tov Tin-Hungh jiez daaih, bun ninh nyei win-wangv nzaanx nzengc. Tov bun nzorng ninh wuov deix yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx tiux biaux. Tov zunc ninh mbuo biaux,

eng: as wax melts before the fire, may the wicked perish before God. But may the righteous be glad
imn: hnangv douz-sioux zuqc nziaaux buonc nzaanx mingh nor. Tov bun orqv mienh yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien zuqc mietc hnangv mueiz-nzing zuqc douz buov yuqc nor. Mv baac tov bun kuv mienh a'hneiv,

eng: and rejoice before God; may they be happy and joyful. Sing to God, sing in praise of his name,
imn: bun ninh mbuo yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien, za'gengh njien-youh orn-lorqc haic. Baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh, baaux ceng ninh nyei mengh.

eng: extol him who rides on the clouds ; rejoice before him—his name is the Lord . A father to the fatherless, a defender of widows,
imn: Ceng geh jienv mbuonx wuov dauh, ninh nyei mbuox heuc Ziouv, oix zuqc yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien njien-youh. Tin-Hungh yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc dorngx

eng: is God in his holy dwelling. God sets the lonely in families,
imn: zoux guh hanh fu'jueiv nyei die yaac beu jienv auv-guaav. Tin-Hungh bun kou-ndoqc mienh maaih biauv yiem,

eng: he leads out the prisoners with singing; but the rebellious live in a sun-scorched land. When you, God, went out before your people,
imn: bun zuqc wuonx nyei mienh cuotv daaih duqv longx. Mv baac ngaengc ninh nyei mienh oix zuqc yiem deic-bung-haanz, ndau nqaai nzengc nyei dorngx. O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih yiem meih nyei baeqc fingx nyei wuov ndaangc maengx cuotv mingh

eng: when you marched through the wilderness, the earth shook, the heavens poured down rain,
imn: yangh jiex deic-bung-huaang wuov zanc, Selaa ndau dorng jienv Tin-Hungh dongz,

eng: before God, the One of Sinai, before God, the God of Israel. You gave abundant showers, O God;
imn: lungh yaac duih mbiungc njiec. Sinaai Mbong yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien, se I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien, dongz. O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih bun lungh

eng: you refreshed your weary inheritance. Your people settled in it,
imn: duih domh mbiungc njiec. Meih nzipc nyei buonc ndau nqaai, meih bun nyiemz daaih. Meih nyei baeqc fingx liepc nguaaz-gorn yiem wuov.

eng: and from your bounty, God, you provided for the poor. The Lord announces the word,
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Weic zuqc meih longx haic, meih liuc leiz ziangx bun mienh jomc mienh. Ziouv hatc waac,

eng: and the women who proclaim it are a mighty throng: “Kings and armies flee in haste;
imn: maaih domh guanh m'sieqv dorn dorh naaiv deix kuv fienx mingh zunh gorngv, “Gunv jun-baeng nyei hungh tiux biaux nzengc. Biaux nzengc aqv loh!”

eng: the women at home divide the plunder. Even while you sleep among the sheep pens,
imn: Yiem biauv wuov deix m'sieqv dorn bun nqoi caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv. Maiv gunv ninh mbuo corc bueix ba'gi yungh laanh mbu'ndongx,

eng: the wings of my dove are sheathed with silver, its feathers with shining gold.” When the Almighty scattered the kings in the land,
imn: baeqc gopv nyei ndaatv buang jienv nyaanh, ndaatv nyei biei nzaatv jienv zien jiem youc-youc wuov. Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh bun yiem deic-bung wuov deix hungh diex nzaanx mingh nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: it was like snow fallen on Mount Zalmon. Mount Bashan, majestic mountain,
imn: ninh bun sorng duih njiec Sanx^mon Mbong. Mbaasaan Mbong benx hlo hlang nyei domh mbong.

eng: Mount Bashan, rugged mountain, why gaze in envy, you rugged mountain,
imn: Mbaasaan Mbong maaih ziex norm mbong-ningv. Ningv camv nyei mbong aah!

eng: at the mountain where God chooses to reign, where the Lord himself will dwell forever? The chariots of God are tens of thousands
imn: Meih weic haaix diuc mangc buatc korv-fiqv Tin-Hungh oix longc benx ninh yiem nyei dorngx, se dongh Ziouv oix yietc liuz yiem nyei mbong? Ziouv yiem Sinaai Mbong dorh jienv cin-cin waanc-waanc norm mborqv jaax cie

eng: and thousands of thousands; the Lord has come from Sinai into his sanctuary. When you ascended on high,
imn: bieqc cing-nzengc nyei dorngx. Meih faaux hlang nyei dorngx wuov zanc

eng: you took many captives; you received gifts from people, even from the rebellious— that you, Lord God, might dwell there. Praise be to the Lord, to God our Savior,
imn: meih dorh zuqc caangv nyei mienh gan jienv mingh, yaac yiem mienh mbu'ndongx zipv zingh nyeic, liemh yiem hnyouv ngaengc nyei mienh zipv daaih, bun Ziouv Tin-Hungh yiem wuov norm dorngx. Ceng Ziouv, dongh hnoi-hnoi ndaam mbuo nyei kouv naanc wuov dauh.

eng: who daily bears our burdens. Our God is a God who saves;
imn: Se dongh Tin-Hungh njoux yie mbuo. Selaa Yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh se njoux yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: from the Sovereign Lord comes escape from death. Surely God will crush the heads of his enemies,
imn: Se Ziouv Tin-Hungh, njoux yie mbuo biaux ndutv maiv zuqc daic. Mv baac Tin-Hungh oix mborqv huv ninh nyei win-wangv nyei m'nqorngv,

eng: the hairy crowns of those who go on in their sins. The Lord says, “I will bring them from Bashan;
imn: se dongh maaih mba'biei nyei m'nqorngv-baengh, zanc-zanc baamz jienv zuiz nyei mienh. Ziouv gorngv, “Yie oix dorh ninh mbuo yiem Mbaasaan nzuonx daaih,

eng: I will bring them from the depths of the sea, that your feet may wade in the blood of your foes,
imn: yaac bun ninh mbuo yiem ndo haic nyei koiv nzuonx, weic bun meih mbuo comx jienv meih mbuo nyei win-wangv nyei nziaamv gu'nyuoz,

eng: while the tongues of your dogs have their share.” Your procession, God, has come into view,
imn: meih mbuo nyei juv yaac duqv mbiec ninh mbuo nyei nziaamv.” O Tin-Hungh aac, mienh buatc meih nyei mienh mbaih jienv yangh jauv.

eng: the procession of my God and King into the sanctuary. In front are the singers, after them the musicians;
imn: Yie nyei Tin-Hungh, yie nyei Hungh Diex nyei mienh mingh bieqc singx dinc. Baaux nzung nyei mienh yiem wuov ndaangc maengx,

eng: with them are the young women playing the timbrels. Praise God in the great congregation;
imn: patv daanh baah nyei mienh yiem nqa'haav, mborqv nzoz nyei m'sieqv dorn yiem mbu'ndongx. “O I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei zeiv-fun aah!

eng: praise the Lord in the assembly of Israel. There is the little tribe of Benjamin, leading them,
imn: Oix zuqc yiem mienh camv gapv zunv nyei wuic mbu'ndongx ceng Tin-Hungh, se ceng Ziouv. ” Gauh faix jiex nyei Mben^yaa^min Fingx mingh ndaangc.

eng: there the great throng of Judah’s princes, and there the princes of Zebulun and of Naphtali. Summon your power, God ;
imn: Gan nqa'haav daaih maaih Yu^ndaa Fingx nyei bieiv zeiv, maaih Se^mbu^lun nyei bieiv zeiv caux Napv^taa^li nyei bieiv zeiv. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov bun meih nyei qaqv cuotv.

eng: show us your strength, our God, as you have done before. Because of your temple at Jerusalem
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov longc meih nyei qaqv tengx yie mbuo hnangv meih weic yie mbuo zoux jiex nor. Weic meih yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem nyei biauv

eng: kings will bring you gifts. Rebuke the beast among the reeds,
imn: zuangx hungh diex dorh zingh nyeic bun meih. Tov meih hemx I^yipv, dongh yiem luoqc diqc lomc gu'nyuoz nyei hieh zoih.

eng: the herd of bulls among the calves of the nations. Humbled, may the beast bring bars of silver. Scatter the nations who delight in war. Envoys will come from Egypt;
imn: Hemx ngongh gouv caux ngongh dorn, se fingx-fingx mienh. Caaiv njiec mauv aapv mienh fungx nyaanh bun ninh mbuo wuov deix, bun a'hneiv mborqv jaax nyei fingx-fingx mienh nzaanx nzengc. Maaih gong-zoh oix yiem I^yipv daaih.

eng: Cush will submit herself to God. Sing to God, you kingdoms of the earth,
imn: E^ti^o^bie Mienh oix siepv-siepv nyei sung buoz jouh Tin-Hungh. O lungh ndiev maanc guoqv aah!

eng: sing praise to the Lord, to him who rides across the highest heavens, the ancient heavens,
imn: Oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh, oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng Ziouv. Selaa Ceng geh jienv gu'nguaaic lungh wuov dauh,

eng: who thunders with mighty voice. Proclaim the power of God,
imn: se geh jienv yiem loz-hnoi daaih nyei lungh. Mangc maah! Ninh bungx ninh nyei qiex cuotv, se hlo haic nyei qiex. Zunh gorngv Tin-Hungh maaih qaqv,

eng: whose majesty is over Israel, whose power is in the heavens. You, God, are awesome in your sanctuary;
imn: zoux hlo gunv I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh nyei qaqv yaac yiem wuov lungh. O Tin-Hungh aac, meih yiem meih nyei singx dinc za'gengh mbuoqc horngh haic,

eng: the God of Israel gives power and strength to his people. Praise be to God!
imn: se I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh, ninh bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx maaih qaqv henv. Oix zuqc ceng Tin-Hungh.

eng: Save me, O God, for the waters have come up to my neck. I sink in the miry depths,
imn: Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih njoux yie. Wuom hlo jienv faaux, yiemx taux yie nyei jaang-ndiev. Yie zemh njiec ndo haic nyei wuom-bamc gu'nyuoz,

eng: where there is no foothold. I have come into the deep waters; the floods engulf me. I am worn out calling for help;
imn: maiv maaih dorngx bun zaux souv duqv wuonv. Yie bieqc wuom ndo nyei dorngx, wuom yaac yiemx jienv yie. Yie heuc jienv tov gau kouv nzengc,

eng: my throat is parched. My eyes fail, looking for my God. Those who hate me without reason
imn: jaang-hoh nqaai mi'aqv. Yie zuov jienv Tin-Hungh tengx. Mangc gau, m'zing zungv maiv njang aqv. Nzorng yie yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx wuov deix mienh

eng: outnumber the hairs of my head; many are my enemies without cause, those who seek to destroy me. I am forced to restore what I did not steal. You, God, know my folly;
imn: gauh camv yie nyei m'nqorngv nyei mba'biei. Maiv maaih gorn-baengx mv baac oix hoic yie nyei maengc wuov deix win-wangv henv haic, maiv zeiz yie nimc nyei ga'naaiv ih zanc yie oix zuqc fungx nzuonx fai? O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih hiuv duqv yie ndongc haaix hngongx.

eng: my guilt is not hidden from you. Lord, the Lord Almighty,
imn: Yie zoux dorngc nyei sic yaac bingx maiv mbueiz meih. O Ziouv, Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: may those who hope in you not be disgraced because of me; God of Israel, may those who seek you not be put to shame because of me. For I endure scorn for your sake,
imn: Tov maiv dungx bun kaux meih wuov deix laaix yie zuqc nyaiv. O I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov maiv dungx bun lorz meih wuov deix laaix yie zuqc baaic hmien. Se weic meih yie cingx zuqc mienh gorngv doqc,

eng: and shame covers my face. I am a foreigner to my own family,
imn: oix zuqc buang hmien diev nyaiv. Yie nyei gorx-youz buatc yie benx ninh mbuo maiv hiuv nyei mienh.

eng: a stranger to my own mother’s children; for zeal for your house consumes me,
imn: Caux yie juangc maa nyei muoz-doic yaac funx yie benx ganh fingx mienh. Yie weic meih nyei biauv jorm hnyouv hnangv douz zieqc jienv yie nor.

eng: and the insults of those who insult you fall on me. When I weep and fast,
imn: Mienh gorngv doqc meih mv baac ninh mbuo nyei waac gorngv zuqc yie. Yie zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc weic zatv ganh zoux faix,

eng: I must endure scorn; when I put on sackcloth,
imn: yie zuqc mienh jatv yie. Yie zuqv la'maah ndie-cou dorngx lui,

eng: people make sport of me. Those who sit at the gate mock me,
imn: ninh mbuo dorh yie zoux gouv gorngv. Zueiz jienv zingh gaengh ndaangc nyei mienh kuanv yie,

eng: and I am the song of the drunkards. But I pray to you, Lord ,
imn: diuv nquin nyei mienh yaac dorh yie zoux nzung baaux. Mv baac Ziouv aah! Yie daux gaux tov meih.

eng: in the time of your favor; in your great love, O God, answer me with your sure salvation. Rescue me from the mire,
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh, tov meih dau yie ziux meih buatc horpc nyei ziangh hoc, weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei tengx mienh. Tov njoux yie maiv zuqc zemh njiec wuom-bamc gu'nyuoz.

eng: do not let me sink; deliver me from those who hate me, from the deep waters. Do not let the floodwaters engulf me
imn: Tov tengx yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv caux ndo nyei wuom. Tov maiv dungx bun wuom yiemx yie,

eng: or the depths swallow me up or the pit close its mouth over me. Answer me, Lord , out of the goodness of your love;
imn: fai bun wuom-ndo naqv yie, fai bun yie zuqc yiem yiemh gen. O Ziouv aah! Tov dau yie,

eng: in your great mercy turn to me. Do not hide your face from your servant;
imn: weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh se longx haic. Ziux meih korv-lienh haic mienh tov huin nzuonx daaih mangc yie. Maiv dungx bingx meih nyei hmien, maiv mangc meih nyei bou.

eng: answer me quickly, for I am in trouble. Come near and rescue me;
imn: Yie zuqc kouv, tov siepv-siepv nyei dau yie. Tov daaih nitv fatv yie, zuoqc yie,

eng: deliver me because of my foes. You know how I am scorned, disgraced and shamed;
imn: njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv. Meih hiuv duqv yie zuqc mienh huotv, zuqc nyaiv, zuqc baaic hmien.

eng: all my enemies are before you. Scorn has broken my heart
imn: Meih yaac hiuv duqv yie nyei yietc zungv win-wangv. Yie zuqc mienh huotv, yie nyei hnyouv za'gengh mun haic,

eng: and has left me helpless; I looked for sympathy, but there was none, for comforters, but I found none. They put gall in my food
imn: yie ziouc haiz suei aqv. Yie lorz mienh korv-lienh yie, yaac maiv maaih yietc dauh. Lorz mienh orn hnyouv, yaac lorz maiv duqv haaix dauh. Ninh mbuo zorqv daamv dorngx nyanc hopv bun yie.

eng: and gave me vinegar for my thirst. May the table set before them become a snare;
imn: Yie jaang nqaatv ninh mbuo bun a'ngunc diuv-sui yie hopv. Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei yinh wuic benx koux hlopv ninh mbuo,

eng: may it become retribution and a trap. May their eyes be darkened so they cannot see,
imn: bun ninh mbuo baengh orn yiem nyei ziangh hoc zoux hlaang hlopv ninh mbuo. Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei m'zing mbuov, mangc maiv buatc,

eng: and their backs be bent forever. Pour out your wrath on them;
imn: yaac bun ninh mbuo nyei jaaiv yietc liuz jutv mingh. Meih bun mienh nyei ga'qiex baetv cuotv bun ninh mbuo.

eng: let your fierce anger overtake them. May their place be deserted;
imn: Tov bun meih qiex jiez, nouz nyei sic zunc zaaic ninh mbuo. Tov bun ninh mbuo yiem nyei ciangv benx ndau-huaang,

eng: let there be no one to dwell in their tents. For they persecute those you wound
imn: bun ninh mbuo nyei ndopv-liuh maiv maaih mienh yiem. Weic zuqc ninh mbuo hoic meih mborqv nyei mienh,

eng: and talk about the pain of those you hurt. Charge them with crime upon crime;
imn: yaac gorngv meih bun zuqc mun wuov deix mienh nyei kouv naanc. Tov meih dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz aengx jaa dingc,

eng: do not let them share in your salvation. May they be blotted out of the book of life
imn: yaac maiv dungx guangc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz. Tov sortv ninh mbuo nyei mbuox cuotv ziangh maengc daan,

eng: and not be listed with the righteous. But as for me, afflicted and in pain—
imn: yaac maiv dungx faaux ninh mbuo nyei mbuox yiem kuv mienh nyei daan. Mv baac yie zuqc kouv naanc yaac zuqc mun.

eng: may your salvation, God, protect me. I will praise God’s name in song
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov bun meih nyei njoux en bouh yie faaux hlang. Yie oix baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh nyei mengh,

eng: and glorify him with thanksgiving. This will please the Lord more than an ox,
imn: yie oix dor-ziec, ceng ninh weih hlo. Hnangv naaic ziouc bun Ziouv gauh horpc hnyouv fongc horc ngongh gouv,

eng: more than a bull with its horns and hooves. The poor will see and be glad—
imn: fai fongc horc maaih jorng, maaih deih nyei ngongh gouv. Zuqc zeix nyei mienh buatc liuz ziouc a'hneiv.

eng: you who seek God, may your hearts live! The Lord hears the needy
imn: Lorz Tin-Hungh nyei mienh aah! Tov bun meih nyei hnyouv fingv jiez daaih maah! Weic zuqc Ziouv muangx dangx-donx nyei mienh,

eng: and does not despise his captive people. Let heaven and earth praise him,
imn: ninh maiv mangc piex ninh nyei baeqc fingx, se zuqc wuonx loh wuov deix. Tov lungh caux ndau caux koiv

eng: the seas and all that move in them, for God will save Zion
imn: caux yiem naaiv deix yietc zungv gu'nyuoz haih dongz nyei ga'naaiv ceng ninh. Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix njoux Si^on ,

eng: and rebuild the cities of Judah. Then people will settle there and possess it; the children of his servants will inherit it,
imn: aengx liepc Yu^ndaa nyei zingh jiez daaih. Ninh nyei baeqc fingx oix yiem naaic weih benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Ninh nyei bou nyei zeiv-fun

eng: and those who love his name will dwell there.
imn: oix duqv nzipc wuov norm deic-bung. Hnamv ninh nyei mengh nyei mienh yaac oix duqv yiem wuov.

eng: Hasten, O God, to save me; come quickly, Lord , to help me. May those who want to take my life
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov gaanv daaih njoux yie. O Ziouv aah! Tov siepv-siepv nyei tengx yie. Tov bun oix zorqv yie nyei maengc

eng: be put to shame and confusion; may all who desire my ruin be turned back in disgrace. May those who say to me, “Aha! Aha!”
imn: wuov deix mienh zuqc nyaiv zuqc lunc. Tov bun dongh a'hneiv yie zuqc kouv wuov deix zuqc tuix nzuonx nqa'haav yaac zuqc baaic hmien. Tov bun gorngv, “Haav! Haav!” wuov deix,

eng: turn back because of their shame. But may all who seek you
imn: zuqc nyaiv zuqc baaic. Tov bun yietc zungv daaih lorz meih wuov deix,

eng: rejoice and be glad in you; may those who long for your saving help always say, “The Lord is great!” But as for me, I am poor and needy;
imn: njien-youh orn-lorqc, tov bun hnamv meih nyei njoux en wuov deix, zanc-zanc gorngv, “Tin-Hungh za'gengh hlo haic.” Mv baac yie kouv yaac jomc haic.

eng: come quickly to me, O God. You are my help and my deliverer; Lord , do not delay.
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov siepv-siepv nyei daaih yie naaiv. Meih se dongh tengx yie, njoux yie wuov dauh. O Ziouv aah! Tov maiv dungx ngaih.

eng: In you, Lord , I have taken refuge; let me never be put to shame. In your righteousness, rescue me and deliver me;
imn: O Ziouv aah! Yie ndaauh kaux meih. Tov bun yie yietc liuz maiv zuqc nyaiv. Weic zuqc meih maaih gong-fim nyei,

eng: turn your ear to me and save me. Be my rock of refuge,
imn: tov njoux yie, tengx yie. Tov bungx m'normh muangx yaac njoux yie. Tov meih zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei la'bieiv,

eng: to which I can always go; give the command to save me, for you are my rock and my fortress. Deliver me, my God, from the hand of the wicked,
imn: zoux yie wuonv haic nyei dorngx njoux yie, weic zuqc meih zoux yie nyei la'bieiv, zoux wuonv nyei dorngx beu yie. O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: from the grasp of those who are evil and cruel. For you have been my hope, Sovereign Lord ,
imn: Tov njoux yie biaux ndutv orqv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev, biaux ndutv hnyouv njuotv, doqc haic nyei mienh. O Ziouv aah! Meih zoux yie maaih lamh hnamv nyei dorngx.

eng: my confidence since my youth. From birth I have relied on you;
imn: Ziouv aah! Yiem yie lunx taux ih zanc yie kaux meih hnangv. Yiem yie cuotv seix taux ih zanc yie bangc meih,

eng: you brought me forth from my mother’s womb. I will ever praise you. I have become a sign to many;
imn: se dongh meih bun yie cuotv maa nyei ga'sie, yie zanc-zanc ceng meih. Mienh camv nyei mbuoqc horngh haic yie

eng: you are my strong refuge. My mouth is filled with your praise,
imn: mv baac meih zoux yie kaux wuonv nyei dorngx. Yie ziangh hnoi longc yie nyei nzuih ceng meih,

eng: declaring your splendor all day long. Do not cast me away when I am old;
imn: yaac zunh meih nyei njang-laangc. Yie gox nyei ziangh hoc, tov maiv dungx guangc yie.

eng: do not forsake me when my strength is gone. For my enemies speak against me;
imn: Sin zaangc nyei qaqv nzengc, maiv dungx leih nqoi yie. Yie nyei win-wangv lorz jauv gorngv yie,

eng: those who wait to kill me conspire together. They say, “God has forsaken him;
imn: dongh zuov jienv oix zorqv yie nyei maengc wuov deix, lomh nzoih caangh laangh. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Tin-Hungh guangc ninh mi'aqv.

eng: pursue him and seize him, for no one will rescue him.” Do not be far from me, my God;
imn: Zunc jienv zorqv ninh maah! Weic zuqc maiv maaih haaix dauh njoux ninh aqv.” O Tin-Hungh aah! Maiv dungx leih go yie.

eng: come quickly, God, to help me. May my accusers perish in shame;
imn: O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Siepv-siepv nyei daaih tengx yie. Tov bun yie nyei win-wangv zuqc nyaiv zuqc baaic nzengc.

eng: may those who want to harm me be covered with scorn and disgrace. As for me, I will always have hope;
imn: Tov bun lorz jauv hoic yie wuov deix baaic hmien diev nyaiv. Mv baac yie nor, oix zanc-zanc kaux meih maaih lamh hnamv dorngx,

eng: I will praise you more and more. My mouth will tell of your righteous deeds,
imn: yaac oix jaa ceng meih camv jienv faaux. Yie nyei nzuih oix gorngv meih zoux nyei kuv sic,

eng: of your saving acts all day long— though I know not how to relate them all. I will come and proclaim your mighty acts, Sovereign Lord ;
imn: oix ziangh hnoi gorngv taux meih nyei njoux en, maiv gunv yie hiuv maiv toux naaiv deix jauv nyei soux mouc. Ziouv Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: I will proclaim your righteous deeds, yours alone. Since my youth, God, you have taught me,
imn: Yie oix dorh meih zoux henv haic nyei sic daaih gorngv, yie oix ceng meih zoux horpc nyei jauv, kungx meih ganh nyei hnangv. O Tin-Hungh aah! Yie yiem hnyangx-jeiv lunx taux ih zanc meih njaaux yie.

eng: and to this day I declare your marvelous deeds. Even when I am old and gray,
imn: Yie corc zunh meih zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. O Tin-Hungh aah! Yie taux hnyangx-jeiv gox,

eng: do not forsake me, my God, till I declare your power to the next generation, your mighty acts to all who are to come. Your righteousness, God, reaches to the heavens,
imn: mba'biei baeqc nyei ziangh hoc, tov maiv dungx guangc yie. Zuov yie zorqv meih zoux henv haic nyei sic mbuox hoz doic, yaac zunh meih nyei qaqv mbuox nqa'haav cuotv seix nyei mienh. O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih zoux horpc nyei jauv mbaengc lungh hlang.

eng: you who have done great things. Who is like you, God? Though you have made me see troubles,
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Se meih zoux hlo haic nyei sic. Haaix dauh haih hnangv meih? Meih bun yie zuqc domh kouv naanc,

eng: many and bitter, you will restore my life again; from the depths of the earth you will again bring me up. You will increase my honor
imn: mv baac oix bun yie aengx fingv jiez daaih. Meih oix yiem ndau, ndo haic nyei dorngx, aengx zorqv yie cuotv. Meih oix taaih yie zoux gauh hlo zinh ndaangc

eng: and comfort me once more. I will praise you with the harp
imn: yaac aengx orn nzunc yie nyei hnyouv. O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie yaac oix longc daanh baah ceng meih,

eng: for your faithfulness, my God; I will sing praise to you with the lyre, Holy One of Israel. My lips will shout for joy
imn: oix ceng meih weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei. I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Cing-Nzengc Ziouv aah! Yie oix longc ziepc diuh finx nyei daanh baah ceng meih. Yie baaux nzung ceng meih nyei ziangh hoc

eng: when I sing praise to you— I whom you have delivered. My tongue will tell of your righteous acts
imn: yie nyei nzuih meix oix njien-youh nyei heuc. Yie nyei hnyouv yaac oix njien-youh nyei heuc, weic zuqc meih zuoqc yie. Yie nyei mbietc ziangh hnoi oix gorngv

eng: all day long, for those who wanted to harm me have been put to shame and confusion.
imn: meih zoux horpc nyei jauv tengx mienh, weic zuqc oix lorz jauv hoic yie wuov deix zuqc nyaiv zuqc baaic mi'aqv.

eng: Endow the king with your justice, O God, the royal son with your righteousness. May he judge your people in righteousness,
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov ceix bun hungh diex baengh fim nyei siemv hnangv meih nor, yaac bun hungh dorn hnangv meih nor, zoux duqv horpc. Tov bun ninh longc gong-fim siemv meih nyei baeqc fingx,

eng: your afflicted ones with justice. May the mountains bring prosperity to the people,
imn: yaac baengh fim nyei siemv meih nyei mienh jomc mienh. Weic baeqc fingx zoux horpc nyei jauv

eng: the hills the fruit of righteousness. May he defend the afflicted among the people
imn: tov bun domh mbong fiuv-mbong duqv bungx-zuoqc. Tov bun hungh diex baengh fim nyei tengx baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx nyei mienh jomc mienh,

eng: and save the children of the needy; may he crush the oppressor. May he endure as long as the sun,
imn: njoux dangx-donx nyei mienh yaac zatv jienv zeix ninh mbuo wuov deix. Mba'hnoi caux hlaax corc yiem jienv nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: as long as the moon, through all generations. May he be like rain falling on a mown field,
imn: tov bun ninh mbuo taaih meih taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Tov bun hungh diex hnangv mbiungc duih njiec mbietv liuz miev nyei ndau,

eng: like showers watering the earth. In his days may the righteous flourish
imn: yaac hnangv mbiungc-mbuonv puonx ndau-beih nor. Ninh yiem nyei hnoi-nyieqc, tov bun kuv mienh hiaangx jienv faaux,

eng: and prosperity abound till the moon is no more. May he rule from sea to sea
imn: yaac maaih baengh orn camv ndongc maaih hlaax yiem. Tov bun ninh gunv nyei guoqv yiem naaiv bung koiv taux wuov bung koiv,

eng: and from the River to the ends of the earth. May the desert tribes bow before him
imn: yiem Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih taux jomc lungh ndiev. Tov bun yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei mienh yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien gueic njiec baaix,

eng: and his enemies lick the dust. May the kings of Tarshish and of distant shores
imn: yaac bun ninh nyei win-wangv mbiec nie-mbung. Tov bun Taansitv caux zuangx koiv-nzou nyei hungh diex

eng: bring tribute to him. May the kings of Sheba and Seba present him gifts. May all kings bow down to him
imn: cuotv korx-zinh bun ninh. Yaac bun Qe^mbaa caux Se^mbaa nyei hungh diex dorh zingh nyeic bun ninh. Tov bun zuangx hungh diex puoqv njiec ninh nyei nza'hmien,

eng: and all nations serve him. For he will deliver the needy who cry out,
imn: yaac bun maanc guoqv fu-sux ninh. Weic zuqc dangx-donx nyei mienh heuc jienv tov nyei ziangh hoc ninh njoux,

eng: the afflicted who have no one to help. He will take pity on the weak and the needy
imn: yaac njoux mienh jomc mienh caux maiv maaih haaix dauh tengx nyei mienh. Ninh korv-lienh mau nyei mienh caux mienh jomc mienh,

eng: and save the needy from death. He will rescue them from oppression and violence,
imn: yaac njoux jomc kouv mienh nyei maengc. Ninh zuoqc ninh mbuo nyei maengc leih ndutv zuqc zeix, zuqc zoux doqc nyei jauv.

eng: for precious is their blood in his sight. Long may he live!
imn: Ziux ninh mangc, ninh mbuo nyei maengc funx jaaix nyei. Tov bun hungh diex ziangh duqv ndaauv.

eng: May gold from Sheba be given him. May people ever pray for him and bless him all day long. May grain abound throughout the land;
imn: Tov bun ninh duqv Qe^mbaa nyei jiem. Tov bun mienh maiv dingh liouh nyei weic ninh daux gaux, yaac tov Tin-Hungh ziangh hnoi ceix fuqv bun ninh. Tov bun deic-bung nyei ndau cuotv laangh ziqc bungx-zuoqc,

eng: on the tops of the hills may it sway. May the crops flourish like Lebanon and thrive like the grass of the field. May his name endure forever;
imn: yiem mbong gu'nguaaic jiex laangc paan-paan nyei, cuotv daaih gitv yaac jauh nyei hnangv Le^mbaa^norn nyei gemh, yaac bun zingh gu'nyuoz nyei mienh hiaangx hnangv lomc huaang nyei miev nor. Tov bun hungh diex nyei mbuox yietc liuz yiem,

eng: may it continue as long as the sun. Then all nations will be blessed through him, and they will call him blessed. Praise be to the Lord God, the God of Israel,
imn: ninh nyei mengh hoc yiem jienv ndongc mba'hnoi lauh. Maanc guoqv mienh oix weic hungh diex duqv fuqv, maanc fingx mienh yaac heuc ninh zoux maaih fuqv nyei mienh. Ceng Ziouv, I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: who alone does marvelous deeds. Praise be to his glorious name forever;
imn: Kungx ninh ganh haih zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng ninh njang-laangc nyei mbuox,

eng: may the whole earth be filled with his glory. Amen and Amen. This concludes the prayers of David son of Jesse.
imn: tov bun ninh nyei njang-laangc buangv lungh ndiev. Aamen caux Aamen. Jetc^si nyei dorn, Ndaawitv, daux gaux nyei waac dorng mi'aqv.

eng: Surely God is good to Israel, to those who are pure in heart. But as for me, my feet had almost slipped;
imn: Tin-Hungh za'gengh! zoux longx bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh, zoux longx bun maaih hnyouv cing-nzengc nyei mienh. Mv baac yie ganh aeqv, yie nyei zaux aav lamh ndiqv zuqc ndorpc,

eng: I had nearly lost my foothold. For I envied the arrogant
imn: yie nyei zaux-caaiv kaav deix piatv. Weic zuqc yie buatc orqv mienh duqv longx wuov zanc,

eng: when I saw the prosperity of the wicked. They have no struggles;
imn: yie ziouc mueic jieqv zoux maux nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo daic nyei ziangh hoc maiv zuqc diev mun,

eng: their bodies are healthy and strong. They are free from common human burdens;
imn: ninh mbuo nyei sin yaac wangc siangx, henv nyei. Ninh mbuo maiv zuqc siouc kouv hnangv nyiec nyei mienh,

eng: they are not plagued by human ills. Therefore pride is their necklace;
imn: yaac maiv hnangv nyiec nyei mienh zuqc zeqc naanc. Weic naaiv ninh mbuo zoux maux nyei jauv beiv jiem-limc dangh jienv jaang.

eng: they clothe themselves with violence. From their callous hearts comes iniquity ;
imn: Zoux doqc nyei sic buang jienv ninh mbuo hnangv zuqv lui nor. Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv ngaengc, kungx zoux waaic nyei sic hnangv.

eng: their evil imaginations have no limits. They scoff, and speak with malice;
imn: Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv orqv nyei za'eix camv haic. Ninh mbuo jatv mienh, gorngv doqc ki mienh.

eng: with arrogance they threaten oppression. Their mouths lay claim to heaven,
imn: Ninh mbuo ceng-hlo, gorngv oix zeix mienh. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv doqc yiem gu'nguaaic lungh nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: and their tongues take possession of the earth. Therefore their people turn to them
imn: Ninh mbuo nyei mbietc zoux maux gorngv doqc lungh ndiev mienh. Weic naaiv baeqc fingx huin nzuonx ceng ninh mbuo,

eng: and drink up waters in abundance. They say, “How would God know?
imn: lorz maiv duqv dorngx nqemh ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor haih hiuv?

eng: Does the Most High know anything?” This is what the wicked are like—
imn: Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh maaih wuonh zaang nyei fai?” Mangc maah! Orqv mienh se hnangv naaiv nor.

eng: always free of care, they go on amassing wealth. Surely in vain I have kept my heart pure
imn: Ninh mbuo zanc-zanc kuh yiem kuh nyanc, gunv zoux gunv benx jienv faaux. Wuov nyungc yie goux longx yie nyei hnyouv cing-nzengc

eng: and have washed my hands in innocence. All day long I have been afflicted,
imn: yaac maiv baamz zuiz se maiv lamh longc. Weic zuqc yie ziangh hnoi kungx zuqc kouv hnangv,

eng: and every morning brings new punishments. If I had spoken out like that,
imn: ndorm-ndorm yaac zuqc dingc zuiz. Se gorngv yie gorngv, “Yie oix hnangv naaiv nor gorngv,”

eng: I would have betrayed your children. When I tried to understand all this,
imn: yie ziouc zuqc zoux maiv zingx bun meih nyei zuangx baeqc fingx. Yie hnamv mangc gaax hnangv haaix nor haih bieqc hnyouv naaiv deix sic,

eng: it troubled me deeply till I entered the sanctuary of God;
imn: mv baac yie gengh haiz aqc haic, taux yie bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei singx dinc,

eng: then I understood their final destiny. Surely you place them on slippery ground;
imn: yie ziouc mengh baeqc orqv mienh nyei setv mueiz hnoi. Meih za'gengh bun ninh mbuo yiem mbiaangc nyei dorngx,

eng: you cast them down to ruin. How suddenly are they destroyed,
imn: bun ninh mbuo ndorpc, zuqc mietc nzengc. Ninh mbuo nduqc dangh hnangv zuqc mietc mi'aqv.

eng: completely swept away by terrors! They are like a dream when one awakes;
imn: Zuqc gamh nziex haic nyei sic guaatv ninh mbuo mingh nzengc. Hnangv mienh mbeix buatc liuz nyie daaih maiv buatc mi'aqv.

eng: when you arise, Lord, you will despise them as fantasies. When my heart was grieved
imn: O Ziouv aah! Meih nyie daaih meih la'kuqv ninh mbuo nyei fangx mi'aqv. Yie nyei hnyouv kouv wuov zanc,

eng: and my spirit embittered, I was senseless and ignorant;
imn: yie haiz hnangv mba'nziu zuqc baqv jienv mun nor. Yie ziouc hngongx, maiv hiuv haaix nyungc,

eng: I was a brute beast before you. Yet I am always with you;
imn: hnangv dauh hieh zoih yiem meih nyei nza'hmien. Mv baac yie zanc-zanc caux meih yiem.

eng: you hold me by my right hand. You guide me with your counsel,
imn: Meih nanv jienv yie nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz. Meih tengx yie caangh laangh weic dorh yie nyei jauv.

eng: and afterward you will take me into glory. Whom have I in heaven but you?
imn: Nqa'haav meih oix zipv yie, bun yie duqv njang-laangc. Yiem wuov gu'nguaaic lungh, cuotv liuz meih, yie maiv maaih haaix dauh.

eng: And earth has nothing I desire besides you. My flesh and my heart may fail,
imn: Yiem naaiv lungh ndiev, cuotv liuz meih, yie maiv oix longc haaix nyungc. Yie nyei sin caux yie nyei hnyouv haih mau jienv njiec,

eng: but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever. Those who are far from you will perish;
imn: mv baac Tin-Hungh se yie nyei hnyouv nyei qaqv yaac yietc liuz zoux yie nyei buonc. Mangc maah! Leih meih go nyei mienh zungv oix zuqc mietc.

eng: you destroy all who are unfaithful to you. But as for me, it is good to be near God.
imn: Meih oix mietc nzengc maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bun meih wuov deix mienh. Mv baac yie nor, yie yiem nitv Tin-Hungh fatv se longx haic.

eng: I have made the Sovereign Lord my refuge; I will tell of all your deeds.
imn: Yie bun Ziouv Tin-Hungh zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx, weic bun yie zunh gorngv ninh zoux nyei yietc zungv sic.

eng: O God, why have you rejected us forever? Why does your anger smolder against the sheep of your pasture? Remember the nation you purchased long ago,
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih weic haaix diuc yietc liuz guangc yie mbuo? Meih weic haaix diuc qiex jiez meih nyei yungh ciangv nyei ba'gi yungh hnangv cuotv douz-sioux? Tov meih jangx jienv meih loz-hnoi ginv daaih nyei baeqc fingx,

eng: the people of your inheritance, whom you redeemed— Mount Zion, where you dwelt. Turn your steps toward these everlasting ruins,
imn: dongh meih zuoqc nzuonx weic zoux meih ganh nzipc nyei buonc. Jangx jienv Si^on Mbong , dongh meih yiem jiex nyei dorngx. Tov meih laamx mingh mangc naaiv deix yietc liuz baaic huaang nyei dorngx.

eng: all this destruction the enemy has brought on the sanctuary. Your foes roared in the place where you met with us;
imn: Win-wangv mietc nzengc yiem singx dinc nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv. Meih nyei win-wangv yiem meih nyei wuic dorngh qaqv heuc.

eng: they set up their standards as signs. They behaved like men wielding axes
imn: Ninh mbuo cie ninh mbuo ganh nyei geh faaux weic zoux jangx-hoc. Buatc ninh mbuo hnangv mienh yiem lomc

eng: to cut through a thicket of trees. They smashed all the carved paneling
imn: yaamh bouv hngaqv ndiangx nor. Yiem singx dinc gu'nyuoz yietc zungv diu daaih nyei ndiangx,

eng: with their axes and hatchets. They burned your sanctuary to the ground;
imn: ninh mbuo longc bouv longc zueih mborqv waaic nzengc. Ninh mbuo longc douz buov meih nyei singx dinc njiec taux ndau,

eng: they defiled the dwelling place of your Name. They said in their hearts, “We will crush them completely!”
imn: ninh mbuo bun meih nyei Mengh yiem nyei dorngx maaih uix. Ninh mbuo yiem hnyouv hnamv, “Yie mbuo oix hingh jiex nzengc ninh mbuo.”

eng: They burned every place where God was worshiped in the land. We are given no signs from God;
imn: Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv yiem gormx deic-bung, Tin-Hungh nyei norm-norm wuic dorngh, buov nzengc. Yie mbuo maiv buatc yie mbuo nyei jangx-hoc,

eng: no prophets are left, and none of us knows how long this will be. How long will the enemy mock you, God?
imn: yaac maiv zengc yietc dauh douc waac mienh , yiem yie mbuo mbu'ndongx yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh hiuv duqv oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor ndongc haaix lauh. O Tin-Hungh aah! Win-jaa oix huotv ndongc haaix lauh?

eng: Will the foe revile your name forever? Why do you hold back your hand, your right hand?
imn: Win-wangv oix yietc liuz gorngv doqc meih nyei mengh fai? Meih weic haaix diuc nyuotv jienv buoz, se meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz.

eng: Take it from the folds of your garment and destroy them! But God is my King from long ago;
imn: Meih weic haaix diuc maiv zorqv buoz yiem la'kuotv sung cuotv daaih mietc ninh mbuo? Mv baac Tin-Hungh aac, yiem loz-hnoi daaih meih zoux yie nyei hungh.

eng: he brings salvation on the earth. It was you who split open the sea by your power;
imn: Meih yiem lungh ndiev zoux gong weic njoux mienh. Meih longc meih nyei domh qaqv zorqv koiv bun nqoi,

eng: you broke the heads of the monster in the waters. It was you who crushed the heads of Leviathan
imn: mborqv yiem koiv gu'nyuoz nyei jung-hungh nyei m'nqorngv huv. Meih zienv Le^wi^aa^taan nyei m'nqorngv huv,

eng: and gave it as food to the creatures of the desert. It was you who opened up springs and streams;
imn: yaac zorqv ninh jiu bun yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei hieh zoih nyanc. Meih bun wuom-zingv caux ndoqv nyei wuom liouc cuotv.

eng: you dried up the ever-flowing rivers. The day is yours, and yours also the night;
imn: Zanc-zanc maaih wuom liouc jienv nyei ndaaih meih bun nqaai mingh. Lungh hnoi zanc benx meih nyei, lungh muonz zanc yaac meih nyei.

eng: you established the sun and moon. It was you who set all the boundaries of the earth;
imn: Meih liuc leiz hlaax caux mba'hnoi. Ndau-beih nyei yietc zungv gapv-jaaix se meih dingc daaih.

eng: you made both summer and winter. Remember how the enemy has mocked you, Lord ,
imn: Meih yaac bun maaih haac gueix caux dong gueix. O Ziouv aah! Tov meih jangx jienv win-wangv ndongc haaix huotv meih.

eng: how foolish people have reviled your name. Do not hand over the life of your dove to wild beasts;
imn: Mienh hngongx mienh yaac gorngv doqc meih nyei mengh. Maiv dungx zorqv meih nyei norqc nqo nyei maengc jiu bun hieh zoih.

eng: do not forget the lives of your afflicted people forever. Have regard for your covenant,
imn: Tov maiv dungx yietc liuz la'kuqv meih nyei mienh jomc mienh nyei maengc. Tov jangx jienv meih liepc nyei ngaengc waac

eng: because haunts of violence fill the dark places of the land. Do not let the oppressed retreat in disgrace;
imn: weic zuqc ndau-beih norm-norm hmuangx nyei dorngx maaih zoux doqc hoic mienh nyei sic buangv nzengc. Tov maiv dungx bun zuqc zeix nyei mienh zuqc nyaiv.

eng: may the poor and needy praise your name. Rise up, O God, and defend your cause;
imn: Tov bun mienh jomc mienh caux dangx-donx nyei mienh ceng meih nyei mengh. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih jiez daaih maah! Tov weic ganh caengx sic.

eng: remember how fools mock you all day long. Do not ignore the clamor of your adversaries,
imn: Jangx jienv mienh hngongx mienh hnangv haaix nor ziangh hnoi huotv meih. Maiv dungx la'kuqv meih nyei win-wangv qaqv heuc nyei qiex.

eng: the uproar of your enemies, which rises continually.
imn: Se meih nyei win-jaa maiv dingh liouh nyei nauc jienv heuc mbui nyei qiex.

eng: We praise you, God, we praise you, for your Name is near; people tell of your wonderful deeds. You say, “I choose the appointed time;
imn: O Tin-Hungh aac, yie mbuo dor-ziec meih aqv. Yie mbuo dor-ziec meih, weic zuqc meih yiem nitv fatv. Yie mbuo zunh yaangh meih zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Tin-Hungh gorngv, “Ziux yie dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc

eng: it is I who judge with equity. When the earth and all its people quake,
imn: yie oix baengh fim nyei siemv zuiz. Baamh gen caux yiem baamh gen nyei yietc zungv mienh lungh lungh laih laih wuov zanc,

eng: it is I who hold its pillars firm. To the arrogant I say, ‘Boast no more,’
imn: se yie ganh baav jienv baamh gen nyei ndiouh. Selaa Yie gorngv mbuox ceng-hlo nyei mienh, “Maiv dungx ceng-hlo.”

eng: and to the wicked, ‘Do not lift up your horns. Do not lift your horns against heaven;
imn: Yaac gorngv mbuox orqv mienh, “Maiv dungx bungx waac-maux. Maiv dungx taaih ganh hlo, bungx waac-maux,

eng: do not speak so defiantly.’ ” No one from the east or the west
imn: fai ngorngz jienv jaang gorngv waac.” Bouh mienh faaux hlang maiv zeiz yiem dong bung fai bung daaih,

eng: or from the desert can exalt themselves. It is God who judges:
imn: yaac maiv zeiz yiem deic-bung-huaang daaih. Se Tin-Hungh dunx sic.

eng: He brings one down, he exalts another. In the hand of the Lord is a cup
imn: Ninh zatv yietc dauh njiec aiv, bouh yietc dauh faaux hlang. Weic zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei buoz maaih norm zaanv,

eng: full of foaming wine mixed with spices; he pours it out, and all the wicked of the earth drink it down to its very dregs. As for me, I will declare this forever;
imn: dapv buangv maaih mbiaauz nyei diuv, peux duqv longx nyei. Ninh oix dox cuotv daaih, baamh gen nyei yietc zungv orqv mienh oix hopv nqaai nzengc. Mv baac yie nor, yie oix yietc liuz zunh yaangh naaiv deix sic.

eng: I will sing praise to the God of Jacob, who says, “I will cut off the horns of all the wicked,
imn: Yie oix baaux nzung ceng Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh. Yie oix zoux waaic orqv mienh nyei qaqv,

eng: but the horns of the righteous will be lifted up.”
imn: mv baac bun kuv mienh nyei qaqv henv jienv faaux.

eng: God is renowned in Judah; in Israel his name is great. His tent is in Salem,
imn: Yiem Yu^ndaa Deic mienh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh. Yiem I^saa^laa^en ninh nyei mengh hlo haic. Yiem Saalem ninh liepc ninh nyei ndopv-liuh,

eng: his dwelling place in Zion. There he broke the flashing arrows,
imn: ninh yiem nyei dorngx se Si^on . Yiem wuov ninh wuotv nauv maaih douz nyei forng-cang,

eng: the shields and the swords, the weapons of war. You are radiant with light,
imn: torngv-baaih, nzuqc ndaauv caux yietc zungv mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc. Selaa O Tin-Hungh aac, meih za'gengh njang-laangc haic.

eng: more majestic than mountains rich with game. The valiant lie plundered,
imn: Meih gauh hlo gauh njang-laangc jiex yietc liuz yiem nyei mbong. Ninh mbuo hnyouv henv nyei mienh nyei ga'naaiv zungv zuqc caangv nzengc.

eng: they sleep their last sleep; not one of the warriors can lift his hands. At your rebuke, God of Jacob,
imn: Ninh mbuo daic nzengc mi'aqv. Mborqv jaax nyei zuangx mienh, maiv maaih haaix dauh haih cau duqv buoz jiez aqv. O Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh aac, meih hatc ninh mbuo wuov zanc

eng: both horse and chariot lie still. It is you alone who are to be feared.
imn: ninh mbuo nyei maaz caux geh maaz mienh ziouc daic mi'aqv. Mv baac mienh gamh nziex nyei se kungx meih ganh hnangv.

eng: Who can stand before you when you are angry? From heaven you pronounced judgment,
imn: Meih qiex jiez nyei ziangh hoc haaix dauh haih yiem meih nyei nza'hmien? Meih yiem gu'nguaaic lungh gorngv siemv zuiz nyei waac,

eng: and the land feared and was quiet— when you, God, rose up to judge,
imn: lungh ndiev gamh nziex, yaac sekv nzieqc nyei, dongh Tin-Hungh daaih dingc zuiz,

eng: to save all the afflicted of the land. Surely your wrath against mankind brings you praise,
imn: oix njoux yietc zungv yiem baamh gen zuqc zeix nyei mienh. Selaa Baamh mienh qiex jiez, haih bun mienh gauh oix ceng meih.

eng: and the survivors of your wrath are restrained. Make vows to the Lord your God and fulfill them;
imn: Zuqc meih nouz zengc njiec nyei mienh, oix yiem nitv fatv meih. Meih mbuo oix zuqc laengz ngaengc waac bun Ziouv, meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh, yaac ei jienv naaiv deix laengz nyei waac zoux.

eng: let all the neighboring lands bring gifts to the One to be feared. He breaks the spirit of rulers;
imn: Oix zuqc bun weih gormx nyei mienh dorh zingh nyeic daaih bun mienh oix zuqc taaih nyei Ziouv. Ninh zatv jienv zoux hlo wuov deix nyei hnyouv,

eng: he is feared by the kings of the earth.
imn: bun lungh ndiev nyei hungh diex gamh nziex ninh.

eng: I cried out to God for help; I cried out to God to hear me. When I was in distress, I sought the Lord;
imn: Yie heuc jienv jouh Tin-Hungh. Yie heuc jienv tov, ninh zungv oix muangx yie. Yie zuqc kouv naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc yie lorz Ziouv,

eng: at night I stretched out untiring hands, and I would not be comforted. I remembered you, God, and I groaned;
imn: yie ziangh muonz sung jienv buoz maiv dingh liouh nyei daux gaux, mv baac maiv duqv orn hnyouv. Yie hnamv taux Tin-Hungh ziouc tauv domh qiex.

eng: I meditated, and my spirit grew faint. You kept my eyes from closing;
imn: Yie jangx taux naaiv deix jauv, haiz hnyouv mau nzengc aqv. Selaa Meih bun yie maiv haih m'njormh.

eng: I was too troubled to speak. I thought about the former days,
imn: Yie hnyouv nzauh kouv haic, zungv maiv haih gorngv waac. Yie hnamv taux jiex daaih nyei hnoi-nyieqc,

eng: the years of long ago; I remembered my songs in the night.
imn: yaac jangx zuqc loz-hnoi nyei hnyangx-daauh. Yie lungh muonz zanc yiem hnyouv hnamv,

eng: My heart meditated and my spirit asked: “Will the Lord reject forever?
imn: yie yiem hnyouv fei-fangv yaac naaic gaax ganh, “Ziouv oix yietc liuz guangc yie mbuo,

eng: Will he never show his favor again? Has his unfailing love vanished forever?
imn: yietc liuz maiv aengx a'hneiv yie mbuo fai? Ninh yietc liuz maiv aengx hnamv yie mbuo fai?

eng: Has his promise failed for all time? Has God forgotten to be merciful?
imn: Ninh laengz nyei waac yietc liuz yietc seix baac nzengc mi'aqv fai? Tin-Hungh la'kuqv ceix en bun yie mbuo fai?

eng: Has he in anger withheld his compassion?” Then I thought, “To this I will appeal:
imn: Ninh qiex jiez ziouc maiv korv-lienh fai?” Selaa Yie aengx gorngv, “Bun yie hnyouv nzauh nyei se

eng: the years when the Most High stretched out his right hand. I will remember the deeds of the Lord ;
imn: Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz goiv yienc mi'aqv. Yie oix jangx taux Ziouv zoux jiex nyei sic,

eng: yes, I will remember your miracles of long ago. I will consider all your works
imn: za'gengh oix jangx meih loz-hnoi zoux wuov deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Yie yiem hnyouv buih meih zoux nyei yietc zungv gong,

eng: and meditate on all your mighty deeds.” Your ways, God, are holy.
imn: yie oix longx-longx nyei hnamv taux meih zoux jiex maaih qaqv nyei sic. O Tin-Hungh aac, meih zoux nyei jauv-louc se cing-nzengc haic,

eng: What god is as great as our God? You are the God who performs miracles;
imn: maiv maaih haaix dauh zienh ndongc yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh hlo. Meih se zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic wuov dauh Tin-Hungh.

eng: you display your power among the peoples. With your mighty arm you redeemed your people,
imn: Meih yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx bun ninh mbuo buatc meih nyei domh qaqv. Meih longc meih nyei qaqv njoux meih nyei mienh,

eng: the descendants of Jacob and Joseph. The waters saw you, God,
imn: se njoux Yaakopv caux Yosepv nyei zeiv-fun. Selaa O Tin-Hungh aac, wuom buatc meih,

eng: the waters saw you and writhed; the very depths were convulsed. The clouds poured down water,
imn: wuom buatc meih wuov zanc ziouc gamh nziex. Ndo haic nyei koiv yaac dongz. Mbuonx dox cuotv wuom,

eng: the heavens resounded with thunder; your arrows flashed back and forth. Your thunder was heard in the whirlwind,
imn: yiem wuov lungh maaih mba'ong mbui. Mba'lingc yaac njapc njapc nyei biei bung. Mba'ong yiem domh nziaaux-zunc mbui cuotv.

eng: your lightning lit up the world; the earth trembled and quaked. Your path led through the sea,
imn: Meih nyei mba'lingc bun lungh ndiev njang nzengc. Ndau-beih ndanc dongz nzengc. Meih nyei jauv se yiem koiv jiex,

eng: your way through the mighty waters, though your footprints were not seen. You led your people like a flock
imn: meih mingh nyei jauv gan domh wuom mingh, mv baac meih nyei zaux-mienv maiv maaih mienh buatc. Meih dorh meih nyei baeqc fingx hnangv goux yungh mienh dorh ba'gi yungh guanh nor,

eng: by the hand of Moses and Aaron.
imn: yaac bangc Mose caux Aalon nyei buoz dorh.

eng: My people, hear my teaching; listen to the words of my mouth. I will open my mouth with a parable;
imn: O yie nyei baeqc fingx aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc muangx yie njaaux nyei jauv, oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx yie nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Yie oix gorngv waac-beiv,

eng: I will utter hidden things, things from of old— things we have heard and known,
imn: yaac oix gorngv cuotv loz-hnoi gem jienv nyei sic. Se yie mbuo duqv haiz duqv hiuv nyei jauv,

eng: things our ancestors have told us. We will not hide them from their descendants;
imn: dongh yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix gorngv mbuox yie mbuo nyei sic. Yie mbuo maiv zorqv naaiv deix sic bingx yie mbuo nyei dorn-jueiv,

eng: we will tell the next generation the praiseworthy deeds of the Lord , his power, and the wonders he has done. He decreed statutes for Jacob
imn: zungv oix mbuox jiex mingh wuov doic. Oix gorngv Ziouv zoux puix duqv ceng nyei sic, yaac gorngv taux ninh nyei qaqv caux ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh yiem Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun mbu'ndongx liepc leiz-nyeic,

eng: and established the law in Israel, which he commanded our ancestors to teach their children, so the next generation would know them,
imn: yiem I^saa^laa^en njiec lingc, dongh ninh hatc yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix oix zuqc njaaux ninh mbuo nyei fun-faqv, weic bun nqa'haav wuov doic zeiv-fun, dongh maiv gaengh cuotv seix wuov deix, hiuv duqv

eng: even the children yet to be born, and they in turn would tell their children. Then they would put their trust in God
imn: ziouc nzipc jienv gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo ganh nyei dorn-jueiv zeiv-fun. Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo ziouc kaux Tin-Hungh maaih lamh hnamv dorngx,

eng: and would not forget his deeds but would keep his commands. They would not be like their ancestors—
imn: yaac maiv la'kuqv Tin-Hungh zoux nyei sic, mv baac ei jienv ninh nyei leiz-latc zoux. Ninh mbuo ziouc maiv hnangv ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix nor,

eng: a stubborn and rebellious generation, whose hearts were not loyal to God, whose spirits were not faithful to him. The men of Ephraim, though armed with bows,
imn: dongh hnyouv ngaengc faanv lunc wuov doic mienh. Wuov doic mienh maiv kaux wuonv Tin-Hungh, ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv yaac maiv ziepc zuoqv gan Tin-Hungh. E^faa^im Mienh nanv jienv juang-zinx forng-cang,

eng: turned back on the day of battle; they did not keep God’s covenant
imn: mv baac taux mborqv jaax nyei hnoi-nyieqc tuix nqaang nzuonx. Ninh mbuo maiv ei Tin-Hungh liepc nyei ngaengc waac,

eng: and refused to live by his law. They forgot what he had done,
imn: yaac maiv kangv gan ninh nyei leiz-latc. Ninh mbuo la'kuqv ninh zoux jiex nyei sic,

eng: the wonders he had shown them. He did miracles in the sight of their ancestors
imn: caux ninh bun ninh mbuo buatc jiex wuov deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung, So^an nyei ndau-baengh,

eng: in the land of Egypt, in the region of Zoan. He divided the sea and led them through;
imn: Tin-Hungh dorng jienv ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh zorqv koiv bun nqoi, bun ninh mbuo jiex mingh,

eng: he made the water stand up like a wall. He guided them with the cloud by day
imn: aengx bun wuom ndui jienv hnangv zingh laatc nor. Lungh hnoi zanc ninh longc mbuonx,

eng: and with light from the fire all night. He split the rocks in the wilderness
imn: ziangh muonz longc douz nyei njang dorh ninh mbuo. Ninh yiem deic-bung-huaang mborqv mbaaix la'bieiv,

eng: and gave them water as abundant as the seas; he brought streams out of a rocky crag
imn: bun wuom camv-camv nyei ninh mbuo hopv, hnangv yiem ndo haic nyei dorngx cuotv. Ninh bun wuom yiem la'bieiv mbeux cuotv benx ndoqv,

eng: and made water flow down like rivers. But they continued to sin against him,
imn: bun wuom liouc njiec hnangv ndaaih nor. Mv baac ninh mbuo corc baamz zuiz dorngc Tin-Hungh.

eng: rebelling in the wilderness against the Most High. They willfully put God to the test
imn: Ninh mbuo yiem deic-bung-huaang ngaengc jienv Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh. Ninh mbuo yiem hnyouv duqv-eix seix Tin-Hungh,

eng: by demanding the food they craved. They spoke against God;
imn: ngaengc jienv ceuv ninh mbuo ngorc oix nyanc nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh mbuo gorngv doqc Tin-Hungh ziouc gorngv,

eng: they said, “Can God really spread a table in the wilderness? True, he struck the rock,
imn: “Yiem naaiv deic-bung-huaang Tin-Hungh haih bun nyanc hopv fai?” Ninh mborqv la'bieiv-zorng bun wuom baetv cuotv,

eng: and water gushed out, streams flowed abundantly, but can he also give us bread? Can he supply meat for his people?” When the Lord heard them, he was furious;
imn: wuom liouc mingh benx ndoqv buangv mienz nzengc. Ninh aengx haih ceix laangh ziqc fai lorz orv juang ninh nyei baeqc fingx fai? Ziouv muangx haiz ninh mbuo nyei waac ziouc qiex jiez haic.

eng: his fire broke out against Jacob, and his wrath rose against Israel, for they did not believe in God
imn: Ninh longc douz buov Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun. Ninh yietc zei gauh fatv qiex jiez I^saa^laa^en Mienh, weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv sienx Tin-Hungh

eng: or trust in his deliverance. Yet he gave a command to the skies above
imn: yaac maiv kaux ninh nyei njoux en. Mv baac ninh hatc lungh,

eng: and opened the doors of the heavens; he rained down manna for the people to eat,
imn: yaac koi nqoi lungh gaengh. Ninh bun maa^naa duih njiec bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx nyanc,

eng: he gave them the grain of heaven. Human beings ate the bread of angels;
imn: yaac bun lungh nyei laangh ziqc ninh mbuo. Baamh mienh duqv nyanc fin-mienh nyei laangh ziqc,

eng: he sent them all the food they could eat. He let loose the east wind from the heavens
imn: Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo duqv nyanc hopv bungx-zuoqc. Tin-Hungh bun dong bung nyei nziaaux yiem wuov lungh buonc daaih,

eng: and by his power made the south wind blow. He rained meat down on them like dust,
imn: aengx longc ninh nyei qaqv dorh naamh bung nyei nziaaux cuotv daaih. Ninh bun orv njiec ndongc nie-mbung camv,

eng: birds like sand on the seashore. He made them come down inside their camp,
imn: se bun norqc ndaix daaih ndongc saa-ziou camv. Ninh bun norqc ndortv njiec ninh mbuo nyei ciangv mbu'ndongx,

eng: all around their tents. They ate till they were gorged—
imn: huing gormx ninh mbuo nyei ndopv-liuh. Ninh mbuo ziouc nyanc yaac nyanc duqv beuv.

eng: he had given them what they craved. But before they turned from what they craved,
imn: Tin-Hungh ziux ninh mbuo ngorc nyanc nyei ceix bun ninh mbuo. Mv baac ninh mbuo nyanc ngorc nyei ga'naaiv maiv gaengh gaux,

eng: even while the food was still in their mouths, God’s anger rose against them;
imn: corc yiem jienv ninh mbuo nyei nzuih nyei ziangh hoc, Tin-Hungh qiex jiez! haic ninh mbuo,

eng: he put to death the sturdiest among them, cutting down the young men of Israel. In spite of all this, they kept on sinning;
imn: ninh yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx daix ninh mbuo gauh henv jiex nyei mienh, mborqv baaic I^saa^laa^en nyei mienh lunx mienh. Maiv gunv maaih naaiv deix sic,

eng: in spite of his wonders, they did not believe. So he ended their days in futility
imn: ninh mbuo corc baamz zuiz. Maiv gunv ninh zoux naaiv deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic, ninh mbuo maiv sienx kaux ninh. Ninh ziouc zoux bun ninh mbuo setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc maiv lamh longc,

eng: and their years in terror. Whenever God slew them, they would seek him;
imn: bun ninh mbuo setv mueiz nyei hnyangx-daauh zuqc domh heiv sic. Tin-Hungh daix ninh mbuo nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo ziouc lorz ninh aqv.

eng: they eagerly turned to him again. They remembered that God was their Rock,
imn: Ninh mbuo goiv hnyouv, qaqv lorz Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo jangx zuqc Tin-Hungh se ninh mbuo nyei La'bieiv .

eng: that God Most High was their Redeemer. But then they would flatter him with their mouths,
