imn: Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh dongh Zuoqc Ninh Mbuo Wuov Dauh. Ninh mbuo longc nzuih gorngv waac-gaam ceng ninh,

eng: lying to him with their tongues; their hearts were not loyal to him,
imn: yaac longc mbietc gorngv-baeqc nduov ninh hnangv. Ninh mbuo maiv liepc dingc hnyouv kaux ninh,

eng: they were not faithful to his covenant. Yet he was merciful;
imn: yaac maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei ei jienv ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Mv baac ninh corc korv-lienh ninh mbuo,

eng: he forgave their iniquities and did not destroy them. Time after time he restrained his anger and did not stir up his full wrath. He remembered that they were but flesh,
imn: guangc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz, yaac maiv mietc ninh mbuo. Ninh qiex jiez mv baac ninh nyienz jienv ziex nzunc. Ninh zatv jienv ga'qiex, maiv nouz taux daauh. Ninh jangx ninh mbuo kungx benx haih daic nyei baamh mienh,

eng: a passing breeze that does not return. How often they rebelled against him in the wilderness
imn: yaac hnangv gorng nziaaux nor, buonc mingh maiv nzuonx. Yiem deic-bung-huaang ninh mbuo ngaengc ninh ndongc wuov camv,

eng: and grieved him in the wasteland! Again and again they put God to the test;
imn: yiem ndau-huaang ninh mbuo bun ninh hnyouv mun. Ninh mbuo seix ninh yietc nzunc jiex yietc nzunc.

eng: they vexed the Holy One of Israel. They did not remember his power—
imn: Ninh mbuo cuoqv I^saa^laa^en nyei Cing-Nzengc Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo maiv jangx ninh nyei domh qaqv,

eng: the day he redeemed them from the oppressor, the day he displayed his signs in Egypt,
imn: fai zuoqc ninh mbuo leih ndutv win-wangv nyei hnoi, dongh yiem I^yipv ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc,

eng: his wonders in the region of Zoan. He turned their river into blood;
imn: se yiem So^an Ndau-Baengh zoux nyei sic. Ninh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei ndaaih goiv benx nziaamv,

eng: they could not drink from their streams. He sent swarms of flies that devoured them,
imn: ninh mbuo nyei ndoqv zungv maiv haih hopv. Ninh bun mungz faanv daaih hoic,

eng: and frogs that devastated them. He gave their crops to the grasshopper,
imn: aengx bun gaengv hoic ninh mbuo kouv. Ninh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei gaeng-zuangx bun jopv-nyeic lunx,

eng: their produce to the locust. He destroyed their vines with hail
imn: yaac zorqv ninh mbuo ndortv qaqv duqv daaih nyei buonc bun domh jopv-nyeic hoic. Ninh bun borqc mborqv waaic ninh mbuo nyei a'ngunc hmei,

eng: and their sycamore-figs with sleet. He gave over their cattle to the hail,
imn: yaac longc sorng hoic waaic ninh mbuo nyei ngongh nyorx ndiangx. Ninh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei ngongh bun borqc mborqv,

eng: their livestock to bolts of lightning. He unleashed against them his hot anger,
imn: aengx bun ninh mbuo nyei ba'gi yungh guanh zuqc mba'ong piqv. Ninh nyei ga'qiex biuih cuotv, ninh qiex jiez haic, nouz haic, bun ninh mbuo zuqc ciouv nyei sic,

eng: his wrath, indignation and hostility— a band of destroying angels. He prepared a path for his anger;
imn: bun ninh mbuo zuqc guanh zoux mietc nyei fin-mienh. Ninh liuc leiz ziangx bun qiex jiez nyei jauv cuotv.

eng: he did not spare them from death but gave them over to the plague. He struck down all the firstborn of Egypt,
imn: Ninh maiv liouh ninh mbuo nyei maengc, zungv jiu bun ninh mbuo butv domh wuon-baengc. Yiem I^yipv ninh daix mouz dauh dorn-la'gauv,

eng: the firstfruits of manhood in the tents of Ham. But he brought his people out like a flock;
imn: se Haam nyei dauh dauh zeiv-fun nyei daauh toi dorn. Nqa'haav ninh dorh ninh nyei baeqc fingx cuotv daaih hnangv ba'gi yungh.

eng: he led them like sheep through the wilderness. He guided them safely, so they were unafraid;
imn: Ninh dorh ninh mbuo jiex deic-bung-huaang hnangv yungh guanh nor. Ninh dorh longx ninh mbuo, ninh mbuo ziouc maiv gamh nziex,

eng: but the sea engulfed their enemies. And so he brought them to the border of his holy land,
imn: mv baac koiv nyei wuom yiemx daic ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv. Ninh dorh ninh mbuo mingh taux ninh cing-nzengc deic-bung nyei gapv-jaaix dorngx,

eng: to the hill country his right hand had taken. He drove out nations before them
imn: taux ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz duqv daaih nyei mbong. Ninh zunc fingx-fingx mienh yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx cuotv mingh.

eng: and allotted their lands to them as an inheritance; he settled the tribes of Israel in their homes. But they put God to the test
imn: Ninh ndorqc ndau bun nqoi weic benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc, yaac bun fingx-fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem jienv ninh mbuo nyei ndopv-liuh. Mv baac ninh mbuo corc seix yaac ngaengc jienv Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh,

eng: and rebelled against the Most High; they did not keep his statutes. Like their ancestors they were disloyal and faithless,
imn: maiv ei jienv ninh nyei leiz-latc zoux. Daaux nzuonx ninh mbuo ngaengc hnangv ninh mbuo nyei ong-taaix, maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux.

eng: as unreliable as a faulty bow. They angered him with their high places;
imn: Ninh mbuo goiv yienc hnangv juang-zinx nor ngau. Ninh mbuo ceix yiem hlang zaangc zienh nyei dorngx cuoqv ninh qiex jiez haic.

eng: they aroused his jealousy with their idols. When God heard them, he was furious;
imn: Laaix ninh mbuo zoux miuc-fangx, cuoqv ninh hanc haic ninh mbuo. Tin-Hungh muangx haiz ziouc qiex jiez! haic,

eng: he rejected Israel completely. He abandoned the tabernacle of Shiloh,
imn: guangc nzengc I^saa^laa^en Mienh aqv. Yiem Silo, Tin-Hungh guangc ninh nyei ndopv-liuh yiem nyei dorngx,

eng: the tent he had set up among humans. He sent the ark of his might into captivity,
imn: se ninh yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx corng nyei ndopv-liuh. Ninh zorqv ninh nyei Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang jiu bun mienh caangv mingh,

eng: his splendor into the hands of the enemy. He gave his people over to the sword;
imn: bun ninh nyei njang-laangc yiem win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev. Ninh qiex jiez haic ninh nzipc nyei baeqc fingx,

eng: he was furious with his inheritance. Fire consumed their young men,
imn: ziouc jiu bun ninh mbuo zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix. Douz mietc nzengc ninh mbuo nyei houh saeng,

eng: and their young women had no wedding songs; their priests were put to the sword,
imn: ninh mbuo nyei sieqv lorz maiv duqv jaa dorng. Ninh mbuo nyei sai mienh zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix,

eng: and their widows could not weep. Then the Lord awoke as from sleep,
imn: ninh mbuo nyei auv-guaav maiv haih nzauh nyiemv. Wuov zanc Ziouv nyie hnangv mienh m'njormh mingh nyie daaih nor,

eng: as a warrior wakes from the stupor of wine. He beat back his enemies;
imn: ninh heuc mbui hnangv mienh henv mienh hopv diuv heuc nor. Ninh mborqv ninh nyei win-wangv tuix nzuonx,

eng: he put them to everlasting shame. Then he rejected the tents of Joseph,
imn: bun ninh mbuo yietc liuz zuqc nyaiv. Ninh nqemh Yosepv nyei zeiv-fun,

eng: he did not choose the tribe of Ephraim; but he chose the tribe of Judah,
imn: ninh yaac maiv ginv E^faa^im Fingx. Mv baac ninh ginv Yu^ndaa Fingx,

eng: Mount Zion, which he loved. He built his sanctuary like the heights,
imn: ninh hnamv nyei se Si^on Mbong . Ninh ceix ninh nyei singx dinc hnangv hlang haic nyei lungh,

eng: like the earth that he established forever. He chose David his servant
imn: yaac hnangv ninh liepc yietc liuz yiem nyei ndau-beih. Ninh ginv ninh nyei bou, Ndaawitv,

eng: and took him from the sheep pens; from tending the sheep he brought him
imn: yiem ba'gi yungh ciangv dorh ninh cuotv daaih. Ndaawitv goux dorh jienv dorn nyei ba'gi yungh nyeiz wuov zanc,

eng: to be the shepherd of his people Jacob, of Israel his inheritance. And David shepherded them with integrity of heart;
imn: Tin-Hungh heuc ninh daaih goux ninh nyei baeqc fingx, Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun, se Tin-Hungh nzipc nyei buonc, I^saa^laa^en Mienh, hnangv goux ba'gi yungh nor. Ndaawitv longc hnyouv zingx nyei goux ninh mbuo,

eng: with skillful hands he led them.
imn: yaac longc cong-mengh dorh ninh mbuo.

eng: O God, the nations have invaded your inheritance; they have defiled your holy temple, they have reduced Jerusalem to rubble. They have left the dead bodies of your servants
imn: O Tin-Hungh aac, ganh fingx mienh daaih bieqc meih ganh nzipc nyei deic-bung. Ninh mbuo bun meih nyei cing-nzengc biauv maaih uix, bun Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh mbaang nzengc. Ninh mbuo zorqv meih nyei bou nyei sei

eng: as food for the birds of the sky, the flesh of your own people for the animals of the wild. They have poured out blood like water
imn: zoux lungh zaangc norqc nyei nyanc hopv, zorqv meih nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx nyei orv bun ndau-beih nyei hieh zoih nyanc. Ninh mbuo bun meih nyei baeqc fingx nyei nziaamv liouc cuotv hnangv wuom nor,

eng: all around Jerusalem, and there is no one to bury the dead. We are objects of contempt to our neighbors,
imn: gormx nzengc Ye^lu^saa^lem. Zungv maiv maaih mienh biopv sei. Yie mbuo zuqc juangc laangz mienh ki yie mbuo,

eng: of scorn and derision to those around us. How long, Lord ? Will you be angry forever?
imn: zuqc weih gormx nyei mienh jatv yaac huotv yie mbuo. O Ziouv aac, meih oix qiex jiez yie mbuo ndongc haaix lauh? Taux yietc liuz fai?

eng: How long will your jealousy burn like fire? Pour out your wrath on the nations
imn: Meih oix qiex jiez hanc haic hnangv douz buov jienv taux haaix zanc? Tov bun maiv nyiemc meih wuov deix fingx-fingx mienh

eng: that do not acknowledge you, on the kingdoms that do not call on your name; for they have devoured Jacob
imn: caux maiv heuc meih nyei mbuox wuov deix maanc guoqv, zuqc meih nyei ga'qiex baetv cuotv bun ninh mbuo. Weic zuqc ninh mbuo naqv nzengc Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun,

eng: and devastated his homeland. Do not hold against us the sins of past generations;
imn: yaac bun ninh yiem nyei dorngx benx ndau-huaang. Tov meih maiv dungx jangx yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix zoux nyei zuiz,

eng: may your mercy come quickly to meet us, for we are in desperate need. Help us, God our Savior,
imn: bun yie mbuo maiv zuqc laaix ninh mbuo dingc zuiz. Tov siepv-siepv nyei korv-lienh yie mbuo weic zuqc yie mbuo kouv taux ndiev, maiv lamh hnamv dorngx. O yie mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv, Tin-Hungh aac,

eng: for the glory of your name; deliver us and forgive our sins for your name’s sake. Why should the nations say,
imn: tov meih weic meih nyei mengh nyei njang-laangc tengx yie mbuo. Tov weic meih nyei mengh njoux yie mbuo, yaac guangc yie mbuo nyei zuiz. Ganh fingx mienh weic haaix diuc naaic,

eng: “Where is their God?” Before our eyes, make known among the nations that you avenge the outpoured blood of your servants. May the groans of the prisoners come before you;
imn: “Meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh yiem haaix?” Tov bun yie mbuo ganh nyei m'zing buatc meih jaauv maanc guoqv mienh nyei win, weic zuqc ninh mbuo bun meih nyei bou nyei nziaamv liouc cuotv. Tov meih muangx haiz zuqc wuonx nyei mienh njunh nyei qiex,

eng: with your strong arm preserve those condemned to die. Pay back into the laps of our neighbors seven times
imn: yaac ziux meih nyei domh qaqv beu jienv wuov deix oix zuqc daic nyei mienh. O Ziouv aac, tov bun gorngv doqc ki meih wuov deix weih gormx nyei fingx-fingx mienh

eng: the contempt they have hurled at you, Lord. Then we your people, the sheep of your pasture,
imn: aengx zuqc jaa hniev taux siec gouv. Hnangv naaic yie mbuo, meih nyei baeqc fingx,

eng: will praise you forever; from generation to generation we will proclaim your praise.
imn: oix yietc liuz dor-ziec meih. Yie mbuo oix ceng meih taux maanc gouv maanc doic.

eng: Hear us, Shepherd of Israel, you who lead Joseph like a flock. You who sit enthroned between the cherubim, shine forth before Ephraim, Benjamin and Manasseh.
imn: O goux I^saa^laa^en nyei Ziouv aac, dongh dorh Yosepv nyei zeiv-fun hnangv dorh ba'gi yungh wuov dauh aah! Tov baeng m'normh muangx. Meih yiem wuov deix i dauh ke^lu^mbim mbu'ndongx nyei weic, tov aengv cuotv meih nyei njang, yiem E^faa^im, Mben^yaa^min caux Maa^natv^se Fingx nyei nza'hmien.

eng: Awaken your might; come and save us. Restore us, O God;
imn: Tov longc meih nyei domh qaqv daaih njoux yie mbuo. O Tin-Hungh aac, tov bun yie mbuo aengx duqv longx hnangv loz wuov nor.

eng: make your face shine on us, that we may be saved. How long, Lord God Almighty,
imn: Tov bun meih nyei hmien aengv cuotv njang, weic bun yie mbuo duqv njoux. O Ziouv, Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: will your anger smolder against the prayers of your people? You have fed them with the bread of tears;
imn: Meih oix qiex jiez meih nyei baeqc fingx daux gaux nyei waac ndongc haaix lauh? Meih zorqv wuom-mueic dorngx hnaangx bun ninh mbuo nyanc,

eng: you have made them drink tears by the bowlful. You have made us an object of derision to our neighbors,
imn: aengx hlaau wuom-mueic camv nyei bun ninh mbuo hopv. Meih bun weih gormx yie mbuo wuov deix fingx-fingx mienh

eng: and our enemies mock us. Restore us, God Almighty;
imn: nzaeng yie mbuo nyei deic-bung. Yie mbuo nyei win-wangv lomh nzoih jatv. O Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh aac,

eng: make your face shine on us, that we may be saved. You transplanted a vine from Egypt;
imn: tov bun yie mbuo aengx duqv longx hnangv loz wuov nor. Tov bun meih nyei hmien aengv cuotv njang, weic bun yie mbuo duqv njoux. Meih dorh diuh a'ngunc hmei cuotv I^yipv,

eng: you drove out the nations and planted it. You cleared the ground for it,
imn: meih zunc cuotv fingx-fingx mienh, zorqv naaiv diuh hmei zuangx jienv. Meih fioux ndau bun nzungh njiec ndo,

eng: and it took root and filled the land. The mountains were covered with its shade,
imn: hmei mbiorngz buangv deic-bung nzengc. Naaiv diuh hmei nzie jienv geh zorng,

eng: the mighty cedars with its branches. Its branches reached as far as the Sea,
imn: hmei nyei nquaah nzie jiex domh si^ndaa zongh ndiangx. Hmei nyei nquaah mbiorngz mingh taux domh koiv,

eng: its shoots as far as the River. Why have you broken down its walls
imn: hmei nyei cunx mingh taux Yu^fe^ditc Ndaaih. Meih weic haaix diuc mborqv waaic naaiv norm laatc?

eng: so that all who pass by pick its grapes? Boars from the forest ravage it,
imn: Jiex jauv nyei yietc zungv mienh ziouc gaeqv biouv. Hieh dungz yiem lomc cuotv daaih caaiv waaic,

eng: and insects from the fields feed on it. Return to us, God Almighty!
imn: yiem lomc-huaang nyei yietc zungv hieh zoih daaih nyanc aqv. O Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh aac, tov meih huin nzuonx.

eng: Look down from heaven and see! Watch over this vine, the root your right hand has planted,
imn: Tov yiem wuov lungh mangc buatc, aengx goux naaiv diuh a'ngunc hmei, dongh meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz zuangx nyei a'ngunc hmei,

eng: the son you have raised up for yourself. Your vine is cut down, it is burned with fire;
imn: se meih weic ganh bun hlo daaih henv nyei. Ninh mbuo longc douz buov naaiv diuh hmei yaac hngaqv njiec nzengc.

eng: at your rebuke your people perish. Let your hand rest on the man at your right hand,
imn: Tov bun ninh mbuo buatc meih nyei hmien qiex jiez, ziouc mietc ninh mbuo. Tov bun meih nyei buoz maan jienv yiem meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz nyei mienh,

eng: the son of man you have raised up for yourself. Then we will not turn away from you;
imn: se dongh meih ganh liepc daaih henv wuov dauh baamh mienh. Hnangv naaic yie mbuo ziouc yietc liuz maiv tuix nzuonx leih nqoi meih.

eng: revive us, and we will call on your name. Restore us, Lord God Almighty;
imn: Tov bun yie mbuo duqv maengc ziangh, yie mbuo ziouc jouh meih, kaux meih nyei mbuox. O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac,

eng: make your face shine on us, that we may be saved.
imn: tov bun yie mbuo aengx duqv longx hnangv loz wuov nor. Tov bun meih nyei hmien aengv cuotv njang, weic bun yie mbuo duqv njoux.

eng: Sing for joy to God our strength; shout aloud to the God of Jacob! Begin the music, strike the timbrel,
imn: Baaux nzung ceng Tin-Hungh, yie mbuo nyei qaqv. Njien-youh nyei heuc jienv ceng Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh. Jiez gorn baaux nzung, mborqv nzoz,

eng: play the melodious harp and lyre. Sound the ram’s horn at the New Moon,
imn: longc domh daanh baah caux fiuv-daanh baah patv kuh muangx nyei nzung. Siang-Hlaax caux ziepc hmz,

eng: and when the moon is full, on the day of our festival; this is a decree for Israel,
imn: dongh hlaax junh wuov hnoi, jiex zipv oix zuqc biomv nzatc. Naaiv se weic I^saa^laa^en benx diuh leiz-nyeic,

eng: an ordinance of the God of Jacob. When God went out against Egypt,
imn: benx Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh nyei leiz. Ninh cuotv mingh mborqv I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov zanc,

eng: he established it as a statute for Joseph. I heard an unknown voice say: “I removed the burden from their shoulders;
imn: ninh yiem Yosepv nyei zeiv-fun mbu'ndongx liepc naaiv diuh lingc. Yiem wuov yie mbuo duqv haiz yie mbuo muangx maiv mengh baeqc nyei waac gorngv, “Yie zorqv meih mbuo nyiex hniev nyei ga'naaiv bouh njiec,

eng: their hands were set free from the basket. In your distress you called and I rescued you,
imn: yaac zorqv meih mbuo nyei buoz bouh nyei ndaan bungx njiec mingh. Zuqc naanc zingh nyei ziangh hoc meih mbuo heuc, yie yaac njoux meih mbuo.

eng: I answered you out of a thundercloud; I tested you at the waters of Meribah. Hear me, my people, and I will warn you—
imn: Yie yiem mbuonx-jieqv, mba'ong bingx nyei dorngx, dau meih mbuo. Yie yiem Me^li^mbaa Wuom seix meih mbuo. Selaa “O yie nyei baeqc fingx aah! Muangx yie kuinx meih mbuo.

eng: if you would only listen to me, Israel! You shall have no foreign god among you;
imn: O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Feix duqv meih mbuo muangx yie gorngv nyei waac. Yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx maiv dungx maaih nyiec nyei zienh,

eng: you shall not worship any god other than me. I am the Lord your God,
imn: maiv dungx gueic njiec baaix ganh fingx nyei zienh. Yie se Ziouv, meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh,

eng: who brought you up out of Egypt. Open wide your mouth and I will fill it. “But my people would not listen to me;
imn: dongh dorh meih mbuo cuotv I^yipv wuov dauh. Meih mbuo oix zuqc morngx nzuih hlo nyei, yie ziouc uix meih mbuo beuv. “Mv baac yie nyei mienh maiv muangx yie nyei waac.

eng: Israel would not submit to me. So I gave them over to their stubborn hearts
imn: I^saa^laa^en Mienh zungv maiv longc yie. Yie ziouc sueih binc ninh mbuo ziux ninh mbuo hnyouv ngaengc nyei eix zoux.

eng: to follow their own devices. “If my people would only listen to me,
imn: Sueih ninh mbuo ei ninh mbuo ganh nyei za'eix. “Feix duqv yie nyei baeqc fingx muangx yie nyei waac.

eng: if Israel would only follow my ways, how quickly I would subdue their enemies
imn: Feix duqv I^saa^laa^en Mienh yangh yie nyei jauv. Yie ziouc siepv-siepv nyei hingh jiex ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv,

eng: and turn my hand against their foes! Those who hate the Lord would cringe before him,
imn: huin nzuonx cau buoz mborqv ninh mbuo nyei win-jaa. Nzorng Ziouv nyei mienh zungv zuqc mbaapv njiec ninh nyei nza'hmien,

eng: and their punishment would last forever. But you would be fed with the finest of wheat;
imn: ninh mbuo yaac zuqc dingc zuiz taux yietc liuz. Ziouv oix zorqv gauh longx jiex nyei mbiauh bun meih mbuo nyanc,

eng: with honey from the rock I would satisfy you.”
imn: yaac zorqv yiem la'bieiv-mbaengx nyei mueiz-dorngh bun meih mbuo buangv hnyouv.

eng: God presides in the great assembly; he renders judgment among the “gods”: “How long will you defend the unjust
imn: Tin-Hungh yiem lungh zaangc nyei wuic zueiz ninh nyei weic, yiem zuangx zienh mbu'ndongx dunx sic. Ninh gorngv, “Meih mbuo oix longc maiv baengh fim nyei leiz siemv

eng: and show partiality to the wicked? Defend the weak and the fatherless;
imn: yaac bouc orqv mienh nyei leiz ndongc haaix lauh? Selaa Oix zuqc baengh fim nyei tengx mau nyei mienh caux guh hanh fu'jueiv

eng: uphold the cause of the poor and the oppressed. Rescue the weak and the needy;
imn: yaac bouc doh naanc caux guh hanh fu'jueiv nyei leiz. Oix zuqc njoux mau nyei caux jomc kouv nyei mienh,

eng: deliver them from the hand of the wicked. “The ‘gods’ know nothing, they understand nothing.
imn: tengx ninh mbuo biaux ndutv orqv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev. “Ninh mbuo maiv hiuv yaac maiv mengh baeqc,

eng: They walk about in darkness; all the foundations of the earth are shaken. “I said, ‘You are “gods”;
imn: ninh mbuo yiem hmuangx yangh mingh yangh daaih. Baamh gen nyei gorn-ndoqv zungv zuqc ndanc dongz nzengc. “Yie gorngv, ‘Meih mbuo se zienh.

eng: you are all sons of the Most High.’ But you will die like mere mortals;
imn: Meih mbuo yietc zungv zoux Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei dorn.’ Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc daic hnangv baamh mienh nor,

eng: you will fall like every other ruler.” Rise up, O God, judge the earth,
imn: yaac king njiec hnangv zuangx jien mbu'ndongx nyei yietc dauh.” O Tin-Hungh aac. Tov meih daaih siemv lungh ndiev,

eng: for all the nations are your inheritance.
imn: weic zuqc maanc guoqv benx meih nyei.

eng: O God, do not remain silent; do not turn a deaf ear, do not stand aloof, O God. See how your enemies growl,
imn: Tin-Hungh aac, tov meih maiv dungx sekv-sekv nyei yiem. O Tin-Hungh aac, tov maiv dungx kungx nqapc jienv nzuih, maiv ko lo. Mangc maah! Meih nyei win-wangv faanv.

eng: how your foes rear their heads. With cunning they conspire against your people;
imn: Nzorng meih wuov deix cau jiez m'nqorngv daaih aqv. Ninh mbuo daav guv guaix nyei za'eix hoic meih nyei baeqc fingx.

eng: they plot against those you cherish. “Come,” they say, “let us destroy them as a nation,
imn: Ninh mbuo lomh nzoih caangh laangh zoux bun meih beu jienv nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Daaih maah! Mbuo zorqv ninh mbuo yietc guoqv mienh mietc nzengc,

eng: so that Israel’s name is remembered no more.” With one mind they plot together;
imn: ziouc maiv maaih haaix dauh haih jangx duqv I^saa^laa^en wuov norm mbuox.” Ninh mbuo dongh hnyouv daav za'eix,

eng: they form an alliance against you— the tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites,
imn: yaac liepc jiez ngaengc waac caux meih doix-dekc. Se maaih E^ndom Mienh caux I^saa^maa^en Mienh,

eng: of Moab and the Hagrites, Byblos, Ammon and Amalek,
imn: Mo^apc Mienh caux Haagaa Mienh, maaih Ge^mbaan Mienh, Ammon Mienh, caux Aa^maa^lekv Mienh,

eng: Philistia, with the people of Tyre. Even Assyria has joined them
imn: maaih Fi^li^saa^die Mienh caux Tailaqv Mienh. Atc^si^lie Mienh yaac caux ninh mbuo gapv jienv doic.

eng: to reinforce Lot’s descendants. Do to them as you did to Midian,
imn: Ninh mbuo tengx qaqv Lotv nyei zeiv-fun. Tov zoux bun ninh mbuo hnangv meih zoux bun Mi^ndien Mienh,

eng: as you did to Sisera and Jabin at the river Kishon, who perished at Endor
imn: yaac hnangv yiem Kison Ndaaih zoux bun Si^se^laa caux Yaa^mbin, dongh yiem En^ndo zuqc mietc,

eng: and became like dung on the ground. Make their nobles like Oreb and Zeeb,
imn: benx ndau nyei buonx. Tov bun ninh mbuo zoux hlo nyei mienh zuqc hnangv Olepv caux Se^epc,

eng: all their princes like Zebah and Zalmunna, who said, “Let us take possession
imn: ninh mbuo nyei zuangx hungh dorn yaac zuqc hnangv Ze^mbaa caux Saanx^mun^naa. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Mbuo oix zuqc zorqv

eng: of the pasturelands of God.” Make them like tumbleweed, my God,
imn: Tin-Hungh nyei miev-ciangv weic benx mbuo ganh nyei buonc.” O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac, tov bun ninh mbuo hnangv nziaaux-zunc nyei nie-mbung,

eng: like chaff before the wind. As fire consumes the forest
imn: yaac hnangv cuqv-maux zuqc nziaaux buonc nor. Hnangv douz buov qui gemh,

eng: or a flame sets the mountains ablaze, so pursue them with your tempest
imn: yaac hnangv douz-mbietc zieqc jienv mbong, tov hnangv naaic longc meih nyei domh nziaaux zunc ninh mbuo,

eng: and terrify them with your storm. Cover their faces with shame, Lord ,
imn: yaac longc meih nyei domh mbiungc-nziaaux haeqv ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic. O Ziouv aac, tov bun ninh mbuo zuqc baaic hmien nyaiv nzengc

eng: so that they will seek your name. May they ever be ashamed and dismayed;
imn: weic bun ninh mbuo daaih lorz meih. Tov bun ninh mbuo yietc liuz nyaiv yaac gamh nziex,

eng: may they perish in disgrace. Let them know that you, whose name is the Lord —
imn: bun ninh mbuo baaic hmien yaac zuqc mietc. Tov bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv kungx meih ganh hnangv,

eng: that you alone are the Most High over all the earth.
imn: dongh maaih mbuox heuc Ziouv, se Yiem Hlang Jiex gunv lungh ndiev Wuov Dauh.

eng: How lovely is your dwelling place, Lord Almighty! My soul yearns, even faints,
imn: O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv aac, yie hnamv haic meih yiem nyei dorngx. Yie nyei hnyouv ndongc haaix oix yiem Ziouv nyei biauv, laatc gu'nyuoz,

eng: for the courts of the Lord ; my heart and my flesh cry out for the living God. Even the sparrow has found a home,
imn: zungv haiz ngorc jienv yiem. Yie nyei sin caux hnyouv njien-youh nyei baaux nzung ceng ziangh jienv nyei Tin-Hungh. O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv, yie nyei Hungh,

eng: and the swallow a nest for herself, where she may have her young— a place near your altar, Lord Almighty, my King and my God. Blessed are those who dwell in your house;
imn: yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac, yiem meih nyei ziec-dorngh ga'hlen, norqc meix lorz duqv dorngx yiem, mba'hinx yaac weic ganh lorz dorngx zoux lauz buoc dorn. Yiem meih nyei biauv wuov deix mienh maaih orn-lorqc,

eng: they are ever praising you. Blessed are those whose strength is in you,
imn: zanc-zanc baaux nzung ceng meih. Selaa Kaux meih duqv qaqv wuov deix,

eng: whose hearts are set on pilgrimage. As they pass through the Valley of Baka,
imn: se liepc dingc hnyouv mingh Si^on Mbong nyei mienh, maaih orn-lorqc. Ninh mbuo jiex Mbaakaa Horngz,

eng: they make it a place of springs; the autumn rains also cover it with pools. They go from strength to strength,
imn: naaiv norm horngz tiuv benx wuom-zingv nyei dorngx. Ciou gueix mbiungc yaac bun wuov norm dorngx, zaangh wuom buangv nzengc. Mingh nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo gunv mingh gunv henv,

eng: till each appears before God in Zion. Hear my prayer, Lord God Almighty;
imn: dauh dauh ziouc mingh taux Si^on , yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien. O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv Tin-Hungh aah! Tov muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac.

eng: listen to me, God of Jacob. Look on our shield, O God;
imn: O Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov baeng m'normh muangx. Selaa O Tin-Hungh aac, tov meih mangc yie mbuo nyei torngv-baaih,

eng: look with favor on your anointed one. Better is one day in your courts
imn: tov meih mangc meih longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh nyei hmien. Yiem meih nyei biauv nyei laatc gu'nyuoz yietc hnoi

eng: than a thousand elsewhere; I would rather be a doorkeeper in the house of my God than dwell in the tents of the wicked. For the Lord God is a sun and shield;
imn: se gauh longx yiem ganh norm dorngx yietc cin hnoi. Yie yiem yie nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zuov gaengh se gauh longx yiem orqv mienh nyei biauv. Ziouv Tin-Hungh se mba'hnoi caux torngv-baaih,

eng: the Lord bestows favor and honor; no good thing does he withhold from those whose walk is blameless. Lord Almighty,
imn: ninh ceix en caux njang-laangc. Maiv maaih haaix nyungc longx nyei, Ziouv ngaengc jienv maiv ceix bun zoux horpc nyei mienh. O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv aac,

eng: blessed is the one who trusts in you.
imn: sienx kaux meih wuov deix maaih orn-lorqc.

eng: You, Lord , showed favor to your land; you restored the fortunes of Jacob. You forgave the iniquity of your people
imn: Ziouv aac, meih ceix en bun meih nyei deic-bung. Meih bun Yaakopv nzuonx daaih duqv longx hnangv loz wuov nor. Meih guangc meih nyei baeqc fingx nyei zuiz-nipc,

eng: and covered all their sins. You set aside all your wrath
imn: zorqv nqoi ninh mbuo zoux dorngc nyei yietc zungv zuiz. Selaa Meih dingh njiec, maiv qiex jiez ninh mbuo,

eng: and turned from your fierce anger. Restore us again, God our Savior,
imn: meih huin nzuonx, maiv nouz ninh mbuo aqv. Yie mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv, Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: and put away your displeasure toward us. Will you be angry with us forever?
imn: Tov bun yie mbuo duqv longx hnangv loz wuov nor. Tov guangc nqoi maiv dungx qiex jiez yie mbuo. Meih oix qiex jiez yie mbuo taux yietc liuz fai?

eng: Will you prolong your anger through all generations? Will you not revive us again,
imn: Oix nouz yie mbuo taux maanc gouv maanc doic fai? Meih maiv bun yie mbuo aengx fingv jiez daaih

eng: that your people may rejoice in you? Show us your unfailing love, Lord ,
imn: weic bun yie mbuo kaux meih duqv njien-youh fai? O Ziouv aac, tov bun cing meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie mbuo,

eng: and grant us your salvation. I will listen to what God the Lord says;
imn: aengx zorqv meih nyei njoux en ceix bun yie mbuo. Yie oix muangx Ziouv Tin-Hungh gorngv nyei waac.

eng: he promises peace to his people, his faithful servants— but let them not turn to folly. Surely his salvation is near those who fear him,
imn: Se gorngv ninh nyei baeqc fingx, se ninh nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx, maiv aengx nzuonx mingh zoux hngongx nyei jauv, ninh laengz bun ninh mbuo duqv baengh orn. Ninh nyei njoux en ndongc haaix zungv yiem nitv fatv

eng: that his glory may dwell in our land. Love and faithfulness meet together;
imn: taaih ninh wuov deix mienh, weic bun ninh nyei njang-laangc yiem yie mbuo nyei deic-bung. Ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei jauv caux hnyouv zingx nyei jauv oix faang-buangh,

eng: righteousness and peace kiss each other. Faithfulness springs forth from the earth,
imn: baengh fim caux baengh orn oix zom jaax. Ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv oix yiem ndau cuotv,

eng: and righteousness looks down from heaven. The Lord will indeed give what is good,
imn: baengh fim nyei jauv oix yiem wuov lungh mangc njiec. Ziouv oix zorqv longx nyei ga'naaiv bun yie mbuo.

eng: and our land will yield its harvest. Righteousness goes before him
imn: Yie mbuo nyei deic-bung ziouc aengx cuotv gaeng-zuangx longx. Baengh fim nyei jauv oix yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc mingh,

eng: and prepares the way for his steps.
imn: weic liuc leiz jauv bun ninh nyei zaux caaiv.

eng: Hear me, Lord , and answer me, for I am poor and needy. Guard my life, for I am faithful to you;
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov meih baeng m'normh muangx yie yaac dau yie, weic zuqc yie jomc yaac dangx-donx. Tov beu yie nyei maengc weic zuqc yie gan longx meih.

eng: save your servant who trusts in you. You are my God; have mercy on me, Lord,
imn: Tov njoux yie, meih nyei bou. Yie sienx kaux meih. Meih zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh. O Ziouv aac, tov korv-lienh yie,

eng: for I call to you all day long. Bring joy to your servant, Lord,
imn: weic zuqc yie ziangh hnoi heuc jienv tov meih. O Ziouv aac, tov bun yie, meih nyei bou, nyei hnyouv maaih njien-youh,

eng: for I put my trust in you. You, Lord, are forgiving and good,
imn: weic zuqc yie nyei hnyouv kaux meih maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. O Ziouv aac, meih se longx haic yaac maaih hnyouv guangc mienh nyei zuiz.

eng: abounding in love to all who call to you. Hear my prayer, Lord ;
imn: Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei zien-zien hnamv yietc zungv heuc jienv jouh meih nyei mienh. O Ziouv aac, tov baeng m'normh muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac.

eng: listen to my cry for mercy. When I am in distress, I call to you,
imn: Tov muangx haiz yie qaqv heuc jienv jouh nyei sing-qiex. Buangh zuqc kouv naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc yie heuc meih,

eng: because you answer me. Among the gods there is none like you, Lord;
imn: weic zuqc meih dau yie. O Ziouv aac, yiem yietc zungv zienh mbu'ndongx,

eng: no deeds can compare with yours. All the nations you have made
imn: maiv maaih haaix dauh hnangv meih. Meih zoux nyei gong, maiv maaih haaix nyungc haih beiv duqv. O Ziouv aac, meih zeix daaih nyei maanc guoqv maanc fingx

eng: will come and worship before you, Lord; they will bring glory to your name. For you are great and do marvelous deeds;
imn: oix daaih yiem meih nyei nza'hmien gueic njiec baaix, yaac oix ceng meih nyei mengh. Weic zuqc meih za'gengh hlo haic yaac zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.

eng: you alone are God. Teach me your way, Lord ,
imn: Kungx meih ganh se Tin-Hungh. O Ziouv aac, tov meih njaaux yie hiuv duqv meih nyei jauv

eng: that I may rely on your faithfulness; give me an undivided heart, that I may fear your name. I will praise you, Lord my God, with all my heart;
imn: weic bun yie haih ei meih nyei zien leiz yangh. Tov bun yie zunv dingc hnyouv, weic taaih meih nyei mbuox. O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac,

eng: I will glorify your name forever. For great is your love toward me;
imn: yie longc nzengc hnyouv dor-ziec meih. Yie oix yietc liuz ceng meih nyei mbuox. Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv se hlo haic.

eng: you have delivered me from the depths, from the realm of the dead. Arrogant foes are attacking me, O God;
imn: Meih yaac njoux yie, bun yie maiv zuqc mingh yiemh gen, ndo haic nyei dorngx. Tin-Hungh aac, zoux maux nyei mienh cuotv daaih oix hoic yie.

eng: ruthless people are trying to kill me— they have no regard for you. But you, Lord, are a compassionate and gracious God,
imn: Maaih guanh mienh doqc mienh oix zorqv yie nyei maengc. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv zorqv meih an jienv ninh mbuo nyei nza'hmien. Mv baac Ziouv aac, meih se korv-lienh mienh,

eng: slow to anger, abounding in love and faithfulness. Turn to me and have mercy on me;
imn: ceix en bun mienh nyei Tin-Hungh. Meih maiv qiex jiez siepv, maaih hnyouv zien-zien hnamv mienh, yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei. Tov huin nzuonx korv-lienh yie,

eng: show your strength in behalf of your servant; save me, because I serve you just as my mother did. Give me a sign of your goodness,
imn: tov ceix meih nyei qaqv bun yie, meih nyei bou, yaac njoux meih nyei m'sieqv bou nyei dorn. Tov biux mengh meih zoux longx

eng: that my enemies may see it and be put to shame, for you, Lord , have helped me and comforted me.
imn: weic bun nzorng yie wuov deix mienh buatc ziouc nyaiv. Weic zuqc Ziouv aac, meih tengx yie yaac orn yie nyei hnyouv.

eng: He has founded his city on the holy mountain. The Lord loves the gates of Zion
imn: Ziouv liepc nyei zingh yiem cing-nzengc mbong gu'nguaaic. Ninh hnamv Si^on nyei zingh gaengh,

eng: more than all the other dwellings of Jacob. Glorious things are said of you,
imn: gauh camv Yaakopv yiem nyei norm-norm dorngx. O Tin-Hungh nyei zingh aac,

eng: city of God: “I will record Rahab and Babylon
imn: mienh nuqv jienv gorngv meih njang-laangc nyei jauv. Selaa Mangc maah! Yiem hiuv duqv yie nyei mienh

eng: among those who acknowledge me— Philistia too, and Tyre, along with Cush — and will say, ‘This one was born in Zion.’ ” Indeed, of Zion it will be said,
imn: yie lengc jeiv oix tih taux Laa^hapc caux Mbaa^mbi^lon. Fi^li^saa^die caux Tailaqv caux jienv E^ti^o^bie. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Naaiv laanh mienh yiem Si^on cuotv seix.” Ninh mbuo oix zorqv Si^on nyei jauv-louc daaih gorngv,

eng: “This one and that one were born in her, and the Most High himself will establish her.” The Lord will write in the register of the peoples:
imn: “Naaiv laanh caux wuov laanh yiem naaic cuotv seix,” weic zuqc Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh ganh oix liepc naaiv norm zingh. Ziouv faaux maanc fingx nyei mienh hoz daan nyei ziangh hoc

eng: “This one was born in Zion.” As they make music they will sing,
imn: ninh fiev jienv, “Naaiv laanh yiem Si^on cuotv seix.” Selaa Baaux nzung caux cangx heix nyei mienh oix gorngv,

eng: “All my fountains are in you.”
imn: “Yie nyei yietc zungv wuom-zingv yiem meih gu'nyuoz.”

eng: Lord , you are the God who saves me; day and night I cry out to you. May my prayer come before you;
imn: O Ziouv, yie nyei njoux en nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie lungh hnoi lungh muonz yiem meih nyei nza'hmien heuc jienv jouh meih. Tov bun yie daux gaux nyei waac daaih taux meih nyei nza'hmien.

eng: turn your ear to my cry. I am overwhelmed with troubles
imn: Tov baeng m'normh muangx yie heuc jienv tov nyei waac. Weic zuqc yie nyei hnyouv maaih kuonx naanh buangv nzengc.

eng: and my life draws near to death. I am counted among those who go down to the pit;
imn: Yie nyei maengc yiem nitv fatv yiemh gen. Yie funx caux aav lamh bieqc yiemh gen wuov deix fih hnangv nyei.

eng: I am like one without strength. I am set apart with the dead,
imn: Yie yaac hnangv maiv maaih qaqv nyei mienh. Selaa Yie hnangv zuqc guangc yiem janx-daic mbu'ndongx nyei mienh nor,

eng: like the slain who lie in the grave, whom you remember no more, who are cut off from your care. You have put me in the lowest pit,
imn: hnangv zuqc daix daic nyei mienh bueix jienv zouv gu'nyuoz, dongh meih maiv zoix jangx nyei mienh, yaac nqaeqv ndutv maiv duqv meih tengx. Meih zorqv yie dapv ndo jiex nyei kuotv,

eng: in the darkest depths. Your wrath lies heavily on me;
imn: youc hmuangx youc ndo nyei dorngx. Meih nouz yie hnangv ngatv jienv yie nyei sin,

eng: you have overwhelmed me with all your waves. You have taken from me my closest friends
imn: yaac hnangv wuom-laangc nqomz jienv yie nor. Selaa Meih bun yie nyei loz-gaeng doic guangc yie,

eng: and have made me repulsive to them. I am confined and cannot escape; my eyes are dim with grief.
imn: yaac bun ninh mbuo gamh nziev yie. Yie zuqc kuonx jienv, maiv haih biaux maiv ndutv. Laaix nzauh kouv yie nyei m'zing maiv njang.

eng: I call to you, Lord , every day; I spread out my hands to you. Do you show your wonders to the dead?
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie hnoi-hnoi heuc jienv tov meih. Yie sung buoz hungx jienv meih daux gaux. Meih weic daic mingh nyei mienh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic fai?

eng: Do their spirits rise up and praise you? Is your love declared in the grave,
imn: Ninh mbuo haih jiez sin ceng meih fai? Selaa Yiem zouv gu'nyuoz ninh mbuo gorngv meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv mienh nyei fai?

eng: your faithfulness in Destruction ? Are your wonders known in the place of darkness,
imn: Yiem zuqc mietc nyei dorngx gorngv taux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv fai? Yiem hmuangx nyei dorngx ninh mbuo fungc hiuv duqv meih zoux nyei mbuoqc horngh sic?

eng: or your righteous deeds in the land of oblivion? But I cry to you for help, Lord ;
imn: Yiem la'kuqv mienh nyei dorngx ninh mbuo haih hiuv duqv meih ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv fai? Mv baac Ziouv aac, yie heuc jienv jouh meih.

eng: in the morning my prayer comes before you. Why, Lord , do you reject me
imn: Lungh ndorm yie daux gaux tov meih. O Ziouv aac, meih weic haaix diuc guangc yie?

eng: and hide your face from me? From my youth I have suffered and been close to death;
imn: Weic haaix diuc buang meih nyei hmien, maiv mangc yie? Yiem yie lunx taux ih zanc yie zuqc zeqc naanc morh, kaav deix daic mi'aqv.

eng: I have borne your terrors and am in despair. Your wrath has swept over me;
imn: Yie diev jienv meih zoux bun yie gamh nziex nyei sic, yie kouv taux ndoqv. Meih qiex jiez nouz hnangv ngatv jienv yie.

eng: your terrors have destroyed me. All day long they surround me like a flood;
imn: Meih bun yie zuqc gamh nziex nyei sic zorqv yie mietc nzengc. Naaiv deix ziangh hnoi weih jienv yie, hnangv wuom yiemx nor,

eng: they have completely engulfed me. You have taken from me friend and neighbor—
imn: yiem biei bung dangv jienv yie. Meih zorqv yie hnamv nyei doic caux yie nyei loz-gaeng doic leih guangc yie.

eng: darkness is my closest friend.
imn: Kungx maaih hmuangx zoux yie nyei doic hnangv.

eng: I will sing of the Lord ’s great love forever; with my mouth I will make your faithfulness known through all generations. I will declare that your love stands firm forever,
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie oix yietc liuz baaux nzung ceng meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Yie oix longc yie nyei nzuih zunh meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv gorngv mbuox yietc doic jiex yietc doic. Yie oix gorngv meih oix yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.

eng: that you have established your faithfulness in heaven itself. You said, “I have made a covenant with my chosen one,
imn: Meih maaih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv ndongc lungh wuonv. Meih gorngv, yie caux yie ginv daaih nyei mienh liepc jiez ngaengc waac,

eng: I have sworn to David my servant, ‘I will establish your line forever
imn: yie caux yie nyei bou, Ndaawitv, houv jienv waac gorngv, “Yie oix liepc meih nyei zeiv-fun taux yietc liuz,

eng: and make your throne firm through all generations.’ ” The heavens praise your wonders, Lord ,
imn: liepc meih nyei hungh weic taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Selaa O Ziouv aac, tov bun lungh ceng meih zoux wuov deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic,

eng: your faithfulness too, in the assembly of the holy ones. For who in the skies above can compare with the Lord ?
imn: yaac bun cing-nzengc wuov deix yiem gapv zunv nyei dorngx ceng meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv. Yiem wuov lungh maaih haaix dauh haih hnangv Ziouv?

eng: Who is like the Lord among the heavenly beings? In the council of the holy ones God is greatly feared;
imn: Yiem lungh zaangc wuov deix maaih haaix dauh haih ndongc Ziouv? Se yiem cing-nzengc wuov deix nyei wuic gu'nyuoz ninh mbuo taaih nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: he is more awesome than all who surround him. Who is like you, Lord God Almighty?
imn: Yiem weih gormx ninh nyei yietc zungv ninh gauh hlo gauh peix fuc jiex. O Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac, maiv maaih haaix dauh ndongc meih henv.

eng: You, Lord , are mighty, and your faithfulness surrounds you. You rule over the surging sea;
imn: O Ziouv aac, meih zoux nyei yietc zungv se ziepc zuoqv nyei. Meih gunv seix haic nyei koiv.

eng: when its waves mount up, you still them. You crushed Rahab like one of the slain;
imn: Koiv jiez domh laangc meih bun sekv nzengc. Meih mborqv huv Laa^hapc hnangv daix daic nyei mienh,

eng: with your strong arm you scattered your enemies. The heavens are yours, and yours also the earth;
imn: meih longc meih henv haic nyei buoz mborqv meih nyei win-wangv nzaanx nzengc. Lungh benx meih nyei. Ndau yaac meih nyei.

eng: you founded the world and all that is in it. You created the north and the south;
imn: Baamh gen caux yiem baamh gen nyei maanc muotc meih zeix daaih. Naamh bung caux baqv bung meih zeix daaih.

eng: Tabor and Hermon sing for joy at your name. Your arm is endowed with power;
imn: Taa^mbo Mbong caux Hemon Mbong njien-youh nyei ceng meih nyei mengh. Meih nyei buoz maaih qaqv henv haic.

eng: your hand is strong, your right hand exalted. Righteousness and justice are the foundation of your throne;
imn: Meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz yaac sung faaux hlang. Zoux horpc nyei jauv caux baengh fim nyei sic zoux meih nyei weic nyei gorn-ndoqv.

eng: love and faithfulness go before you. Blessed are those who have learned to acclaim you,
imn: Meih zoux nyei yietc zungv se meih hnamv mienh yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux. O Ziouv aac, hiuv duqv njien-youh nyei heuc wuov deix mienh maaih orn-lorqc,

eng: who walk in the light of your presence, Lord . They rejoice in your name all day long;
imn: se yiem meih nyei nza'hmien nyei njang yangh nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo weic meih nyei mbuox ziangh hnoi njien-youh.

eng: they celebrate your righteousness. For you are their glory and strength,
imn: Ninh mbuo yaac ceng meih weic meih zoux horpc nyei jauv. Meih se ninh mbuo nyei qaqv nyei njang-laangc.

eng: and by your favor you exalt our horn. Indeed, our shield belongs to the Lord ,
imn: Meih ceix en bun yie mbuo nyei qaqv henv jienv faaux. Yie mbuo nyei torngv-baaih benx Ziouv nyei,

eng: our king to the Holy One of Israel. Once you spoke in a vision,
imn: yie mbuo nyei hungh diex guei I^saa^laa^en nyei Cing-Nzengc Tin-Hungh. Zinh ndaangc lauh aqv, meih yiem laauc yaangh nyei sic

eng: to your faithful people you said: “I have bestowed strength on a warrior; I have raised up a young man from among the people. I have found David my servant;
imn: gorngv mbuox meih nyei ziepc zuoqv baeqc fingx, “Yie bun qaqv yietc dauh mborqv jaax henv nyei mienh. Yie yiem baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx ginv dauh yaac taaih ninh zoux hlo. Yie lorz buatc yie nyei bou, Ndaawitv,

eng: with my sacred oil I have anointed him. My hand will sustain him;
imn: yaac longc yie nyei cing-nzengc youh orn ninh. Yie nyei buoz oix liepc ninh wuonv,

eng: surely my arm will strengthen him. The enemy will not get the better of him;
imn: yaac oix bun qaqv ninh henv. Win-wangv zungv maiv haih noic maiv duqv ninh,

eng: the wicked will not oppress him. I will crush his foes before him
imn: orqv mienh yaac maiv haih bun ninh zuqc baaic. Yie oix yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx mborqv muonc ninh nyei win-wangv,

eng: and strike down his adversaries. My faithful love will be with him,
imn: yaac daix nzengc yietc zungv nzorng ninh wuov deix mienh. Yie oix hnamv ninh yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei caux ninh yiem.

eng: and through my name his horn will be exalted. I will set his hand over the sea,
imn: Weic yie nyei mengh ninh nyei qaqv oix henv jienv faaux. Yie oix bun ninh nyei buoz sung koiv gu'nguaaic,

eng: his right hand over the rivers. He will call out to me, ‘You are my Father,
imn: ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz yaac sung ndaaih gu'nguaaic. Ninh oix heuc jienv mbuox yie, “Meih se yie nyei die,

eng: my God, the Rock my Savior.’ And I will appoint him to be my firstborn,
imn: yie nyei Tin-Hungh, caux bun yie duqv njoux nyei La'bieiv .” Yie oix bun ninh zoux yie nyei dorn-la'gauv,

eng: the most exalted of the kings of the earth. I will maintain my love to him forever,
imn: yiem lungh ndiev zoux gauh hlo jiex nyei hungh. Yie oix ziepc zuoqv nyei yietc liuz hnamv ninh,

eng: and my covenant with him will never fail. I will establish his line forever,
imn: yie caux ninh liepc nyei ngaengc waac yaac yietc liuz wuonv nyei. Yie oix liepc ninh nyei hungh douh taux yietc liuz,

eng: his throne as long as the heavens endure. “If his sons forsake my law
imn: yaac bun ninh nyei hungh weic ndongc lungh nyei hnoi-nyieqc lauh. Se gorngv ninh nyei zeiv-fun guangc yie nyei leiz-latc,

eng: and do not follow my statutes, if they violate my decrees
imn: maiv gan yie nyei leiz, se gorngv ninh mbuo baamz yie nyei leiz-nyeic,

eng: and fail to keep my commands, I will punish their sin with the rod,
imn: yaac maiv gan yie nyei lingc, yie ziouc longc biaav dingc ninh mbuo baamz nyei zuiz,

eng: their iniquity with flogging; but I will not take my love from him,
imn: longc biaav-bin mborqv weic ninh mbuo zoux dorngc nyei sic. Mv baac yie ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei hnyouv yie maiv zorqv nzuonx,

eng: nor will I ever betray my faithfulness. I will not violate my covenant
imn: yaac maiv guangc yie ziepc zuoqv zoux nyei jauv. Yie maiv bungx ndortv yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac,

eng: or alter what my lips have uttered. Once for all, I have sworn by my holiness—
imn: yaac maiv goiv yie nyei nzuih gorngv cuotv nyei waac. Yie ziangv jienv yie nyei cing-nzengc mbuox houv nzunc dorngx yietc liuz,

eng: and I will not lie to David— that his line will continue forever
imn: yie maiv gorngv-baeqc nduov Ndaawitv. Ninh nyei hungh douh oix yietc liuz yiem,

eng: and his throne endure before me like the sun; it will be established forever like the moon,
imn: ninh nyei hungh weic oix yiem yie nyei nza'hmien ndongc mba'hnoi lauh, aengx hnangv hlaax nor, liepc daaih taux yietc liuz,

eng: the faithful witness in the sky.” But you have rejected, you have spurned,
imn: yaac yiem wuonv ndongc lungh lauh. Selaa Mv baac meih qiex jiez meih longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh

eng: you have been very angry with your anointed one. You have renounced the covenant with your servant
imn: ziouc guangc aengx nqemh ninh. Meih tuix meih caux meih nyei bou liepc nyei ngaengc waac.

eng: and have defiled his crown in the dust. You have broken through all his walls
imn: Meih zorqv ninh nyei hungh ningv zoi njiec nie-mbung bun maaih uix. Meih caeqv nzengc ninh nyei yietc zungv zingh laatc,

eng: and reduced his strongholds to ruins. All who pass by have plundered him;
imn: bun ninh weih jienv wuonv nyei dorngx baaic waaic nzengc. Da'faanh jiex jauv nyei mienh caangv ninh nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: he has become the scorn of his neighbors. You have exalted the right hand of his foes;
imn: laangz zaangc mienh yaac huotv ninh. Meih bun ninh nyei win-wangv duqv hingh jiex,

eng: you have made all his enemies rejoice. Indeed, you have turned back the edge of his sword
imn: bun ninh nyei yietc zungv win-jaa njien-youh. Meih zungv bun ninh nyei nzuqc ndaauv nyei nza'hmien mbienv mi'aqv,

eng: and have not supported him in battle. You have put an end to his splendor
imn: yaac bun ninh yiem mborqv jaax ciangv zuqc suei. Meih bun ninh nyei njang-laangc zitc nzengc,

eng: and cast his throne to the ground. You have cut short the days of his youth;
imn: yaac zorqv ninh nyei hungh weic fongv njiec ndau. Meih jamv ninh lunx nyei ziangh hoc zoqc njiec,

eng: you have covered him with a mantle of shame. How long, Lord ? Will you hide yourself forever?
imn: yaac bun ninh buang hmien diev nyaiv. Selaa O Ziouv aac, ndongc haaix lauh? Meih oix zorqv meih ganh bingx taux yietc liuz fai?

eng: How long will your wrath burn like fire? Remember how fleeting is my life.
imn: Meih oix qiex jiez hnangv douz buov jienv taux haaix zanc? O Ziouv aac, tov jangx jienv yie nyei maengc ndongc haaix nangv.

eng: For what futility you have created all humanity! Who can live and not see death,
imn: Meih zeix mienh maanh daaih bun ninh mbuo ndongc naaic maiv lamh longc yietc deix. Maaih haaix dauh ziangh yaac maiv zuqc daic?

eng: or who can escape the power of the grave? Lord, where is your former great love,
imn: Fai haaix dauh haih njoux ninh ganh leih ndutv yiemh gen nyei qaqv? Selaa Ziouv aac, meih zinh ndaangc ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei hnyouv jiex haaix?

eng: which in your faithfulness you swore to David? Remember, Lord, how your servant has been mocked,
imn: Se meih ziepc zuoqv nyei caux Ndaawitv laengz jiex nyei waac yiem haaix? O Ziouv aac, tov jangx jienv meih nyei bou hnangv haaix nor zuqc mienh huotv,

eng: how I bear in my heart the taunts of all the nations, the taunts with which your enemies, Lord , have mocked,
imn: yaac jangx jienv yie nyei hnyouv hnangv haaix nor diev maanc mienh ki. O Ziouv aac, meih nyei win-wangv huotv meih longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh.

eng: with which they have mocked every step of your anointed one. Praise be to the Lord forever!
imn: Maiv gunv mingh taux haaix ninh mbuo jatv ninh. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv taux yietc liuz.

eng: Lord, you have been our dwelling place throughout all generations. Before the mountains were born
imn: Ziouv aac, maanc gouv maanc doic meih zoux yie mbuo yiem nyei dorngx. Zinh ndaangc meih maiv gaengh zeix cuotv mbong,

eng: or you brought forth the whole world, from everlasting to everlasting you are God. You turn people back to dust,
imn: yaac maiv gaengh zeix ndau-beih caux baamh gen, yiem loz! hnoi taux nqa'haav hingv meih m'daaih zoux Tin-Hungh taux yietc liuz. Meih bun mienh nzuonx benx nie-mbung.

eng: saying, “Return to dust, you mortals.” A thousand years in your sight
imn: Meih gorngv, “Baamh mienh nyei naamh nyouz aac, oix zuqc nzuonx benx nie-mbung.” Weic zuqc ziux meih mangc,

eng: are like a day that has just gone by, or like a watch in the night. Yet you sweep people away in the sleep of death—
imn: yietc cin hnyangx se hnangv jiex liuz nyei yietc hnoi, fai hnangv lungh muonz zanc yietc gaeng nor. Meih guaatv mienh mingh mi'aqv.

eng: they are like the new grass of the morning: In the morning it springs up new,
imn: Ninh mbuo hnangv mbeix norm mbeix nor, yaac hnangv lungh ndorm nziouv cuotv daaih nyei miev, lungh ndorm nziouv baetv cuotv hlo daaih,

eng: but by evening it is dry and withered. We are consumed by your anger
imn: lungh maanz-hmuangx nyaux, kou nqaai mi'aqv. Yie mbuo zuqc meih qiex jiez, mietc nzengc yie mbuo.

eng: and terrified by your indignation. You have set our iniquities before you,
imn: Zuqc meih nouz ziouc haeqv yie mbuo gamh nziex haic. Meih zorqv yie mbuo nyei zuiz baaiv jienv meih nyei nza'hmien,

eng: our secret sins in the light of your presence. All our days pass away under your wrath;
imn: zorqv yie mbuo bingx jienv zoux nyei zuiz an meih nyei nza'hmien, njang nyei dorngx. Yie mbuo ziangh jienv nyei yietc zungv hnoi-nyieqc zuqc meih nouz.

eng: we finish our years with a moan. Our days may come to seventy years,
imn: Yie mbuo ziangh nyei hnyangx-daauh jiex liuz hnangv tauv nzunc qiex-ndoqc nor. Yie mbuo nyei hnyangx-daauh ziangh duqv taux cietv ziepc,

eng: or eighty, if our strength endures; yet the best of them are but trouble and sorrow, for they quickly pass, and we fly away. If only we knew the power of your anger!
imn: henv nyei nor, haih ziangh taux betv ziepc, mv baac naaiv deix ziangh hoc gu'nyuoz kungx laauh luic, nzauh kouv hnangv, maiv lauh jiex liuz aqv. Yie mbuo yaac fih hnangv nyei jiex mi'aqv. Haaix dauh mengh baeqc meih qiex jiez nyei qaqv?

eng: Your wrath is as great as the fear that is your due. Teach us to number our days,
imn: Haaix dauh hiuv meih nouz nyei jauv hnangv taaih meih nyei mienh? Tov njaaux yie mbuo saauv ganh nyei hnoi-nyieqc,

eng: that we may gain a heart of wisdom. Relent, Lord ! How long will it be?
imn: weic bun yie mbuo haih maaih cong-mengh nyei hnyouv. O Ziouv aac, meih oix qiex jiez ndongc haaix lauh?

eng: Have compassion on your servants. Satisfy us in the morning with your unfailing love,
imn: Tov huin nzuonx daaih. Tov korv-lienh meih nyei bou. Tov bun yie mbuo ndorm-ndorm buangv eix meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv nyei hnyouv,

eng: that we may sing for joy and be glad all our days. Make us glad for as many days as you have afflicted us,
imn: weic bun yie mbuo yietc seix njien-youh a'hneiv. Tov bun yie mbuo duqv njien-youh

eng: for as many years as we have seen trouble. May your deeds be shown to your servants,
imn: ndongc meih bun yie mbuo zuqc kouv nyei hnoi-nyieqc lauh, yaac ndongc yie mbuo zuqc ciouv nyei zeqc naanc nyei hnyangx-daauh. Tov bun meih nyei bou buatc meih zoux nyei sic,

eng: your splendor to their children. May the favor of the Lord our God rest on us;
imn: yaac bun ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun buatc meih nyei njang-laangc nyei qaqv. Tov Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh, bun yie mbuo duqv longx.

eng: establish the work of our hands for us— yes, establish the work of our hands.
imn: Tov liepc wuonv yie mbuo nyei buoz zoux nyei gong. Tov za'gengh liepc wuonv yie mbuo nyei buoz zoux nyei gong.

eng: Whoever dwells in the shelter of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty. I will say of the Lord , “He is my refuge and my fortress,
imn: Haaix dauh yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei torngv laangh dorngx, se zanx yiem Nernh Jiex Wuov Dauh nyei dongh linh gu'nyuoz, wuov dauh ziouc gorngv mbuox Ziouv,

eng: my God, in whom I trust.” Surely he will save you
imn: “Meih se yie ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx, caux weih wuonv nyei dorngx, yie nyei Tin-Hungh, dongh yie kaux wuov dauh.” Ninh oix njoux meih simv ndutv zaeng norqc mienh nyei koux,

eng: from the fowler’s snare and from the deadly pestilence. He will cover you with his feathers,
imn: caux doqc haic nyei wuon-baengc. Ninh zungv longc ninh nyei ndaatv gomv jienv meih.

eng: and under his wings you will find refuge; his faithfulness will be your shield and rampart. You will not fear the terror of night,
imn: Yiem ninh nyei ndaatv ga'ndiev ziouc bun meih maaih ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv zoux domh torngv-baaih, fiuv-torngv-baaih beu jienv. Meih yaac maiv zuqc gamh nziex lungh muonz-zanc nyei heiv sic,

eng: nor the arrow that flies by day, nor the pestilence that stalks in the darkness,
imn: fai lungh hnoi zanc buonv daaih nyei forng-cang, fai lungh muonz zanc daaih nyei domh wuon-baengc,

eng: nor the plague that destroys at midday. A thousand may fall at your side,
imn: fai lungh aanx zanc bun mienh zuqc mietc nyei zeqc naanc. Nziex haih maaih yietc cin dauh mienh king njiec meih nyei ga'hlen,

eng: ten thousand at your right hand, but it will not come near you. You will only observe with your eyes
imn: yietc waanc dauh king njiec meih nyei mbiaauc maengx, mv baac naaiv deix sic maiv daaih nitv fatv meih. Meih ganh nyei m'zing ziouc mangc buatc

eng: and see the punishment of the wicked. If you say, “The Lord is my refuge,”
imn: winh bun orqv mienh zuqc dingc nyei zuiz. Weic zuqc meih bun Ziouv, zoux meih ndaauh kaux wuov dauh,

eng: and you make the Most High your dwelling, no harm will overtake you,
imn: se Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh, benx meih yiem nyei dorngx, maiv maaih haaix nyungc ciouv nyei sic ndortv zuqc meih.

eng: no disaster will come near your tent. For he will command his angels concerning you
imn: Maiv maaih haaix nyungc siem nyei zeqc naanc daaih nitv fatv meih nyei biauv, weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix paaiv ninh nyei fin-mienh goux jienv meih,

eng: to guard you in all your ways; they will lift you up in their hands,
imn: beu jienv meih maiv gunv meih mingh taux haaix. Ninh mbuo oix longc buoz bouh jienv meih,

eng: so that you will not strike your foot against a stone. You will tread on the lion and the cobra;
imn: maiv bun meih nyei zaux zong zuqc la'bieiv. Meih oix caaiv sienh caux naang-jieqv,

eng: you will trample the great lion and the serpent. “Because he loves me,” says the Lord , “I will rescue him;
imn: oix ndamc sienh lunx caux domh naang. Tin-Hungh gorngv, “Weic zuqc ninh longc hnyouv hnamv yie, yie ziouc dau ninh.

eng: I will protect him, for he acknowledges my name. He will call on me, and I will answer him;
imn: Yie oix beu jienv ninh, weic zuqc ninh nyiemc yie nyei mbuox. Se gorngv ninh heuc yie, yie ziouc dau ninh.

eng: I will be with him in trouble, I will deliver him and honor him. With long life I will satisfy him
imn: Ninh buangh zuqc haaix nyungc naanc zingh, yie oix caux ninh yiem. Yie oix njoux ninh yaac taaih ninh. Yie oix bun ninh buangv eix duqv siouc nyuonh ndaauv,

eng: and show him my salvation.”
imn: yaac bun ninh buatc yie nyei njoux en.”

eng: It is good to praise the Lord and make music to your name, O Most High, proclaiming your love in the morning
imn: O Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Ziouv aac, mienh dor-ziec, baaux nzung ceng meih nyei mengh se longx haic. Lungh ndorm zunh yaangh meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv mienh,

eng: and your faithfulness at night, to the music of the ten-stringed lyre
imn: lungh muonz zanc zunh yaangh meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv. Longc ziepc diuh finx patv nyei jaa-sic

eng: and the melody of the harp. For you make me glad by your deeds, Lord ;
imn: caux domh daanh baah, fiuv-daanh baah patv puix nzung nyei pou. O Ziouv aac, meih zoux nyei sic bun yie a'hneiv,

eng: I sing for joy at what your hands have done. How great are your works, Lord ,
imn: meih nyei buoz zoux nyei gong bun yie njien-youh nyei baaux nzung. O Ziouv aac, meih zoux nyei gong za'gengh hlo haic,

eng: how profound your thoughts! Senseless people do not know,
imn: meih nyei hnyouv hnamv nyei sic yaac ndo. Mienh hnam mienh maiv haih hiuv,

eng: fools do not understand, that though the wicked spring up like grass
imn: mienh hngongx mienh maiv haih mengh baeqc, maiv gunv mienh waaic mienh hnangv miev baetv cuotv,

eng: and all evildoers flourish, they will be destroyed forever. But you, Lord , are forever exalted.
imn: yietc zungv orqv mienh yaac duqv longx jienv faaux, ninh mbuo za'gengh oix zuqc mietc taux yietc liuz. Mv baac Ziouv aac, meih yietc liuz duqv zoux hlo jiex.

eng: For surely your enemies, Lord ,
imn: O Ziouv aac, meih nyei win-wangv, meih nyei win-jaa zungv oix zuqc mietc.

eng: surely your enemies will perish; all evildoers will be scattered. You have exalted my horn like that of a wild ox;
imn: Orqv mienh yietc zungv oix zuqc nzaanx. Meih bun yie henv hnangv hieh ngongh nor,

eng: fine oils have been poured on me. My eyes have seen the defeat of my adversaries;
imn: meih longc siang-youh dox jienv yie. Yie nyei m'zing duqv buatc yie nyei win-wangv suei.

eng: my ears have heard the rout of my wicked foes. The righteous will flourish like a palm tree,
imn: Yie nyei m'normh muangx haiz oix mborqv yie wuov deix orqv mienh zuqc mietc. Kuv mienh oix hnangv daau nor hiaangx,

eng: they will grow like a cedar of Lebanon; planted in the house of the Lord ,
imn: yaac hlo daaih hnangv yiem Le^mbaa^norn nyei si^ndaa zongh ndiangx nor. Ninh mbuo hnangv zuangx yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv nyei ndiangx,

eng: they will flourish in the courts of our God. They will still bear fruit in old age,
imn: yiem yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei laatc gu'nyuoz hiaangx jiez daaih. Ninh mbuo hnyangx-jeiv gox mv baac corc ziangh biouv,

eng: they will stay fresh and green, proclaiming, “The Lord is upright;
imn: haaix zanc yaac nyiemz, maeng nyei, weic bun cing Ziouv se zien nyei.

eng: he is my Rock, and there is no wickedness in him.”
imn: Ninh se yie nyei La'bieiv , yiem ninh maiv maaih haaix nyungc maiv horpc.

eng: The Lord reigns, he is robed in majesty; the Lord is robed in majesty and armed with strength; indeed, the world is established, firm and secure. Your throne was established long ago;
imn: Ziouv zoux hungh. Haangh daauh benx ninh nyei zorng-zuqv. Ziouv zuqv jienv aengx longc domh qaqv sai jienv. Baamh gen liepc duqv wuonv, maiv haih zuqc ndanc dongz. Meih nyei weic yiem dongh cor liepc daaih,

eng: you are from all eternity. The seas have lifted up, Lord ,
imn: loz-hnoi meih m'daaih yietc liuz yiem. O Ziouv aac, domh wuom jiez laangc seix,

eng: the seas have lifted up their voice; the seas have lifted up their pounding waves. Mightier than the thunder of the great waters,
imn: domh wuom cuotv qiex mbui, domh wuom mbui zoz-zoz nyei. Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Ziouv maaih domh qaqv,

eng: mightier than the breakers of the sea— the Lord on high is mighty. Your statutes, Lord , stand firm;
imn: gauh henv jiex domh wuom nyei qiex mbui, gauh henv jiex koiv nyei domh wuom-laangc. O Ziouv aac, meih nyei lingc se wuonv nyei.

eng: holiness adorns your house for endless days.
imn: Meih nyei biauv puix duqv cing-nzengc, taux maanc gouv maanc doic.

eng: The Lord is a God who avenges. O God who avenges, shine forth. Rise up, Judge of the earth;
imn: O Ziouv aac, meih se jaauv win nyei Tin-Hungh. Jaauv win nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov ziux cuotv njang daaih maah! Siemv lungh ndiev nyei Jien aah! Daaih maah!

eng: pay back to the proud what they deserve. How long, Lord , will the wicked,
imn: Daaih bun zoux maux nyei mienh duqv ziux ninh mbuo horpc zuqc duqv nyei buonc. Ziouv aac, orqv mienh oix a'hneiv ndongc haaix lauh?

eng: how long will the wicked be jubilant? They pour out arrogant words;
imn: Oix ndongc haaix lauh? Ninh mbuo bungx waac-maux.

eng: all the evildoers are full of boasting. They crush your people, Lord ;
imn: Yietc zungv zoux orqv nyei mienh ceng-hlo. O Ziouv aac, ninh mbuo njiec qaqv zeix meih nyei baeqc fingx

eng: they oppress your inheritance. They slay the widow and the foreigner;
imn: yaac hoic meih nzipc nyei buonc. Ninh mbuo daix auv-guaav caux yiem deic-bung nyei ganh fingx mienh,

eng: they murder the fatherless. They say, “The Lord does not see;
imn: yaac daix guh hanh fu'jueiv. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “ Ziouv maiv buatc.

eng: the God of Jacob takes no notice.” Take notice, you senseless ones among the people;
imn: Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh maiv hnamv taux.” Yiem baeqc fingx mbu'ndongx nyei mienh hngongx mienh aah! Oix zuqc hiuv aqv.

eng: you fools, when will you become wise? Does he who fashioned the ear not hear?
imn: Meih mbuo mbanc haic nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo taux haaix zanc cingx guai? Tin-Hungh zeix m'normh, ninh ganh muangx maiv haiz fai?

eng: Does he who formed the eye not see? Does he who disciplines nations not punish?
imn: Ninh zeix m'zing, ninh ganh mangc maiv buatc? Ninh mborqv njaaux maanc guoqv mienh, ninh maiv zeiz oix dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz?

eng: Does he who teaches mankind lack knowledge? The Lord knows all human plans;
imn: Ninh njaaux baamh mienh, ninh ganh maiv maaih wuonh zaang fai? Ziouv hiuv duqv baamh mienh hnamv nyei sic

eng: he knows that they are futile. Blessed is the one you discipline, Lord ,
imn: kungx hnangv tauv yietc nzunc qiex. O Ziouv aac, meih mborqv njaaux nyei mienh maaih orn-lorqc,

eng: the one you teach from your law; you grant them relief from days of trouble,
imn: se meih longc meih nyei leiz-latc njaaux nyei mienh. Yiem ninh zuqc kouv nyei hnoi-nyieqc meih bun ninh duqv fong deix,

eng: till a pit is dug for the wicked. For the Lord will not reject his people;
imn: zuov wetv ziangx kuotv bun orqv mienh zuqc mietc. Weic zuqc Ziouv zungv maiv guangc ninh ganh nyei baeqc fingx,

eng: he will never forsake his inheritance. Judgment will again be founded on righteousness,
imn: ninh maiv leih guangc ninh nzipc daaih nyei buonc. Siemv nyei jauv ziouc aengx nzuonx daaih gan baengh fim nyei leiz.

eng: and all the upright in heart will follow it. Who will rise up for me against the wicked?
imn: Yietc zungv hnyouv zingx nyei mienh yaac oix gan. Maaih haaix dauh weic yie jiez daaih ngaengc orqv mienh?

eng: Who will take a stand for me against evildoers? Unless the Lord had given me help,
imn: Haaix dauh weic yie ngaengc jienv zoux orqv nyei mienh? Se gorngv Ziouv maiv tengx yie,

eng: I would soon have dwelt in the silence of death. When I said, “My foot is slipping,”
imn: yie zungv siepv-siepv nyei mingh yiem sekv nzieqc nyei deic-bung. Yie gorngv, “Yie nyei zaux caaiv piatv mi'aqv.”

eng: your unfailing love, Lord , supported me. When anxiety was great within me,
imn: O Ziouv aac, wuov zanc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie ziouc baav jienv yie. Yie maaih you-nzauh kuonx hnyouv nyei sic camv nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: your consolation brought me joy. Can a corrupt throne be allied with you—
imn: meih orn yie nyei hnyouv bun yie njien-youh. Waaic haic nyei gunv sic jien haih caux meih jiu tong nyei fai?

eng: a throne that brings on misery by its decrees? The wicked band together against the righteous
imn: Ninh mbuo longc leiz-nyeic zoux waaic nyei sic. Ninh mbuo gapv zunv hoic kuv mienh nyei maengc

eng: and condemn the innocent to death. But the Lord has become my fortress,
imn: yaac dingc daix maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh. Mv baac Ziouv se yie kaux wuonv nyei dorngx,

eng: and my God the rock in whom I take refuge. He will repay them for their sins
imn: yie nyei Tin-Hungh, se yie ndaauh kaux nyei la'bieiv. Ninh oix ziux ninh mbuo zoux dorngc nyei zuiz winh bun ninh mbuo,

eng: and destroy them for their wickedness; the Lord our God will destroy them.
imn: weic ninh mbuo zoux nyei orqv sic mietc ninh mbuo. Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh, oix mietc nzengc ninh mbuo.

eng: Come, let us sing for joy to the Lord ; let us shout aloud to the Rock of our salvation. Let us come before him with thanksgiving
imn: Daaih maah! Mbuo oix zuqc daaih baaux nzung ceng Ziouv. Mbuo njien-youh nyei heuc jienv ceng njoux yie mbuo nyei La'bieiv . Mbuo oix zuqc daaih yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien dor-ziec ninh,

eng: and extol him with music and song. For the Lord is the great God,
imn: yaac oix zuqc njien-youh nyei heuc jienv baaux nzung ceng ninh. Weic zuqc Ziouv se hlo haic nyei Tin-Hungh,

eng: the great King above all gods. In his hand are the depths of the earth,
imn: yaac zoux domh Hungh Diex, gauh hlo jiex maanc zienh. Ndau-ndiev ndo jiex nyei dorngx yiem ninh nyei buoz gu'nyuoz.

eng: and the mountain peaks belong to him. The sea is his, for he made it,
imn: Hlang jiex nyei mbong yaac benx ninh nyei. Koiv benx ninh nyei, weic zuqc ninh ganh zeix daaih.

eng: and his hands formed the dry land. Come, let us bow down in worship,
imn: Ninh nyei buoz zeix cuotv ndau-beih. Daaih maah! Mbuo oix zuqc puoqv njiec baaix ninh.

eng: let us kneel before the Lord our Maker; for he is our God
imn: Mbuo oix zuqc gueic njiec Zeix Mbuo Daaih Wuov Dauh Ziouv nyei nza'hmien. Weic zuqc ninh benx mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: and we are the people of his pasture, the flock under his care. Today, if only you would hear his voice, “Do not harden your hearts as you did at Meribah,
imn: Mbuo se ninh nyei miev-ciangv nyei baeqc fingx, yiem ninh nyei buoz-ndiev nyei ba'gi yungh. Tov meih mbuo ih hnoi muangx ninh nyei qiex. Maiv dungx zoux hnyouv ngaengc hnangv zinh ndaangc yiem Me^li^mbaa,

eng: as you did that day at Massah in the wilderness, where your ancestors tested me;
imn: yaac hnangv yiem deic-bung-huaang, Matv^saax, wuov hnoi nor. Wuov zanc meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix seix yie yaac cuoqv yie,

eng: they tried me, though they had seen what I did. For forty years I was angry with that generation;
imn: maiv gunv ninh mbuo buatc yie zoux nyei sic. Feix ziepc hnyangx gu'nyuoz yie nouz haic naaic doic mienh.

eng: I said, ‘They are a people whose hearts go astray, and they have not known my ways.’ So I declared on oath in my anger,
imn: Yie gorngv, “Ninh mbuo benx yietc fingx hnyouv maiv zingx nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv bieqc hnyouv yie nyei jauv.” Weic naaiv yie qiex jiez ziouc houv jienv gorngv,

eng: ‘They shall never enter my rest.’ ”
imn: “Ninh mbuo yietc liuz maiv duqv bieqc yie nyei hitv kuonx dorngx.”

eng: Sing to the Lord a new song; sing to the Lord , all the earth. Sing to the Lord , praise his name;
imn: Oix zuqc baaux diuh siang-nzung bun Ziouv. Lungh ndiev oix zuqc baaux nzung bun Ziouv. Baaux nzung bun Ziouv, baaux ceng ninh nyei mengh,

eng: proclaim his salvation day after day. Declare his glory among the nations,
imn: hnoi-hnoi zunh yaangh ninh nyei njoux en. Yiem maanc guoqv zunh yaangh ninh nyei njang-laangc.

eng: his marvelous deeds among all peoples. For great is the Lord and most worthy of praise;
imn: Yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx gorngv ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Weic zuqc Ziouv se hlo haic, horpc zuqc camv-camv nyei ceng,

eng: he is to be feared above all gods. For all the gods of the nations are idols,
imn: oix zuqc taaih ninh gauh camv maanc zienh. Weic zuqc zuangx fingx nyei yietc zungv zienh benx miuc-fangx hnangv,

eng: but the Lord made the heavens. Splendor and majesty are before him;
imn: mv baac Ziouv zeix lungh. Maaih njang-laangc caux haangh daauh yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien,

eng: strength and glory are in his sanctuary. Ascribe to the Lord , all you families of nations,
imn: yiem ninh nyei singx dinc bun cing ninh maaih qaqv yaac nzueic haic. O maanc fingx mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: ascribe to the Lord glory and strength. Ascribe to the Lord the glory due his name;
imn: Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei njang-laangc caux qaqv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv puix ninh njang-laangc nyei mbuox,

eng: bring an offering and come into his courts. Worship the Lord in the splendor of his holiness;
imn: dorh fongc horc nyei ga'naaiv daaih bieqc ninh nyei singx dinc nyei laatc gu'nyuoz. Zaangc Ziouv nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc zuqv cing-nzengc nyei lui-houx.

eng: tremble before him, all the earth. Say among the nations, “The Lord reigns.”
imn: Lungh ndiev mienh aah! Oix zuqc sin zinx jienv yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien. Yiem maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx oix zuqc gorngv, “ Ziouv zoux hungh.”

eng: The world is firmly established, it cannot be moved; he will judge the peoples with equity. Let the heavens rejoice, let the earth be glad;
imn: Baamh gen liepc duqv wuonv, maiv maaih haaix nyungc haih ndanc duqv dongz. Ninh yaac oix baengh fim nyei siemv maanc fingx. Lungh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh. Ndau aah! Oix zuqc orn-lorqc.

eng: let the sea resound, and all that is in it. Let the fields be jubilant, and everything in them;
imn: Koiv caux yiem koiv nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv oix zuqc zoz-zoz nyei mbui. Lingh deic caux yiem lingh deic gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv, oix zuqc njien-youh a'hneiv.

eng: let all the trees of the forest sing for joy. Let all creation rejoice before the Lord , for he comes,
imn: Wuov zanc lomc zaangc nyei yietc zungv ndiangx ziouc njien-youh nyei baaux nzung, yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien,

eng: he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world in righteousness and the peoples in his faithfulness.
imn: weic zuqc ninh oix daaih siemv lungh ndiev. Ninh oix baengh fim nyei siemv baamh gen, yaac longc ninh nyei zien leiz siemv maanc fingx.

eng: The Lord reigns, let the earth be glad; let the distant shores rejoice. Clouds and thick darkness surround him;
imn: Ziouv zoux hungh, bun lungh ndiev ndau-beih njien-youh, bun zuangx koiv-nzou a'hneiv. Maaih mbuonx caux hmatv jieqv nyei hmuangx weih gormx ninh,

eng: righteousness and justice are the foundation of his throne. Fire goes before him
imn: zoux horpc nyei jauv caux baengh fim nyei jauv zoux ninh nyei weic nyei gorn-ndoqv. Maaih douz yiem ninh nyei wuov ndaangc maengx

eng: and consumes his foes on every side. His lightning lights up the world;
imn: buov qui weih gormx ninh wuov deix win-wangv. Ninh nyei mba'lingc bun lungh ndiev njang nzengc.

eng: the earth sees and trembles. The mountains melt like wax before the Lord ,
imn: Ndau-beih buatc ziouc dongz nzengc. Mbong yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien yuqc hnangv mueiz-nzing nor,

eng: before the Lord of all the earth. The heavens proclaim his righteousness,
imn: se yiem lungh ndiev nyei Ziouv nyei nza'hmien. Lungh bun cing Tin-Hungh se baengh fim nyei,

eng: and all peoples see his glory. All who worship images are put to shame,
imn: maanc fingx yaac buatc ninh nyei njang-laangc. Bun yietc zungv baaix miuc-fangx nyei mienh zuqc nyaiv,

eng: those who boast in idols— worship him, all you gods! Zion hears and rejoices
imn: dongh ceng maiv lamh longc nyei miuc-fangx nyei mienh. Bun maanc zienh puoqv njiec Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien. O Tin-Hungh aac, Si^on muangx haiz meih dunx nyei sic ziouc a'hneiv.

eng: and the villages of Judah are glad because of your judgments, Lord . For you, Lord , are the Most High over all the earth;
imn: Yu^ndaa Mienh yaac orn-lorqc. O Ziouv aac, meih se Yiem Hlang Jiex, gunv lungh ndiev Wuov Dauh.

eng: you are exalted far above all gods. Let those who love the Lord hate evil,
imn: Meih yaac yiem gauh hlang jiex maanc zienh. Meih mbuo hnamv Ziouv nyei mienh oix zuqc nzorng orqv nyei sic.

eng: for he guards the lives of his faithful ones and delivers them from the hand of the wicked. Light shines on the righteous
imn: Ninh beu jienv ninh nyei cing-nzengc mienh nyei maengc. Ninh njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv orqv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev. Njang ziux jienv kuv mienh,

eng: and joy on the upright in heart. Rejoice in the Lord , you who are righteous,
imn: hnyouv zingx nyei mienh maaih njien-youh. Meih mbuo kuv mienh aah! Oix zuqc kaux Ziouv njien-youh,

eng: and praise his holy name.
imn: yaac oix zuqc dor-ziec ninh nyei cing-nzengc mengh.

eng: Sing to the Lord a new song, for he has done marvelous things; his right hand and his holy arm have worked salvation for him. The Lord has made his salvation known
imn: Oix zuqc baaux diuh siang-nzung ceng Ziouv weic zuqc ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz caux cing-nzengc qaqv bun ninh duqv hingh jiex. Ziouv bun mienh hiuv duqv ninh hingh jiex

eng: and revealed his righteousness to the nations. He has remembered his love
imn: ninh bun maanc fingx hiuv duqv ninh baengh fim nyei. Ninh jangx taux ninh weic I^saa^laa^en Mienh

eng: and his faithfulness to Israel; all the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God. Shout for joy to the Lord , all the earth,
imn: maaih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv yaac hnamv ninh mbuo. Gormx lungh ndiev duqv buatc mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh duqv hingh jiex. Lungh ndiev mienh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh nyei heuc jienv ceng Ziouv.

eng: burst into jubilant song with music; make music to the Lord with the harp,
imn: Cuotv qiex njien-youh nyei baaux nzung ceng ninh. Patv daanh baah baaux nzung ceng Ziouv,

eng: with the harp and the sound of singing, with trumpets and the blast of the ram’s horn—
imn: longc daanh baah patv puix nzung nyei sing-qiex. Longc nzatc caux jorng nyei qiex,

eng: shout for joy before the Lord , the King. Let the sea resound, and everything in it,
imn: cuotv njien-youh nyei qiex mbui fungx bun Ziouv, mbuo nyei Hungh Diex. Koiv caux yiem koiv nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: the world, and all who live in it. Let the rivers clap their hands,
imn: lungh ndiev caux yiem lungh ndiev nyei ga'naaiv oix zuqc cuotv qiex mbui. Bun zuangx ndaaih mbaix ninh mbuo nyei buoz,

eng: let the mountains sing together for joy; let them sing before the Lord ,
imn: zuangx mbong oix zuqc lomh nzoih njien-youh nyei baaux nzung yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien,

eng: for he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world in righteousness and the peoples with equity.
imn: weic zuqc ninh oix daaih siemv lungh ndiev. Ninh oix baengh fim nyei siemv baamh gen, yaac longc gong-fim siemv maanc fingx.

eng: The Lord reigns, let the nations tremble; he sits enthroned between the cherubim, let the earth shake. Great is the Lord in Zion;
imn: Ziouv zoux hungh. Oix zuqc bun maanc fingx sin zinx. Ninh yiem wuov deix i dauh ke^lu^mbim mbu'ndongx nyei weic, bun ndau-beih zuqc ndanc dongz. Ziouv yiem Si^on zoux hlo,

eng: he is exalted over all the nations. Let them praise your great and awesome name—
imn: ninh zungv zoux gauh hlo jiex maanc fingx. Dauh dauh oix zuqc ceng meih hlo haic caux mbuoqc horngh nyei mbuox.

eng: he is holy. The King is mighty, he loves justice—
imn: Ninh se cing-nzengc. Henv nyei Hungh Diex aah!

eng: you have established equity; in Jacob you have done what is just and right. Exalt the Lord our God
imn: Meih hnamv baengh fim nyei jauv yaac liepc gong-fim. Yiem I^saa^laa^en Mienh mbu'ndongx meih zoux horpc caux baengh fim nyei sic. Ceng Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: and worship at his footstool; he is holy. Moses and Aaron were among his priests,
imn: Yiem ninh lorngx zaux nyei dorngx baaix ninh. Ninh se cing-nzengc nyei. Yiem ninh nyei sai mienh mbu'ndongx maaih Mose caux Aalon.

eng: Samuel was among those who called on his name; they called on the Lord and he answered them. He spoke to them from the pillar of cloud;
imn: Saa^mu^en yaac benx dauh jouh ninh nyei mbuox nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo heuc Ziouv, ninh yaac dau ninh mbuo. Ninh yiem mbuonx-ndiouh gu'nyuoz caux ninh mbuo gorngv waac.

eng: they kept his statutes and the decrees he gave them. Lord our God,
imn: Ninh mbuo ei jienv ninh gorngv nyei waac caux jiu bun ninh mbuo nyei leiz-nyeic. O Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh aac,

eng: you answered them; you were to Israel a forgiving God, though you punished their misdeeds. Exalt the Lord our God
imn: meih dau ninh mbuo. Meih se guangc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz nyei Tin-Hungh, mv baac ziux ninh mbuo zoux dorngc nyei jauv meih winh bun ninh mbuo. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: and worship at his holy mountain, for the Lord our God is holy.
imn: Yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc mbong zaangc ninh, weic zuqc Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh, se cing-nzengc nyei.

eng: Shout for joy to the Lord , all the earth. Worship the Lord with gladness;
imn: Lungh ndiev nyei zuangx mienh aah! Oix zuqc njien-youh nyei heuc jienv ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc a'hneiv nyei fu-sux Ziouv,

eng: come before him with joyful songs. Know that the Lord is God.
imn: oix zuqc baaux jienv nzung daaih yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien. Oix zuqc hiuv duqv Ziouv se Tin-Hungh,

eng: It is he who made us, and we are his ; we are his people, the sheep of his pasture. Enter his gates with thanksgiving
imn: se dongh ninh zeix mbuo daaih, mbuo yaac benx ninh nyei, mbuo benx ninh nyei baeqc fingx, ninh nyei miev-ciangv nyei ba'gi yungh. Oix zuqc dor-ziec jienv bieqc ninh nyei singx dinc nyei laatc gaengh,

eng: and his courts with praise; give thanks to him and praise his name. For the Lord is good and his love endures forever;
imn: ceng jienv bieqc laatc gu'nyuoz. Oix zuqc dor-ziec ninh, ceng ninh nyei mengh, weic zuqc Ziouv za'gengh longx haic.

eng: his faithfulness continues through all generations.
imn: Ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh maaih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv taux maanc gouv maanc doic.

eng: I will sing of your love and justice; to you, Lord , I will sing praise. I will be careful to lead a blameless life—
imn: Yie oix baaux nzung gorngv ziepc zuoqv nyei caux baengh fim nyei jauv. O Ziouv aac, yie oix baaux nzung bun meih. Yie oix longc hnyouv yangh maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei jauv.

eng: when will you come to me? I will conduct the affairs of my house with a blameless heart. I will not look with approval
imn: Meih taux haaix zanc cingx daaih yie naaiv? Yie oix hnyouv zingx nyei yiem yie nyei biauv. Orqv haic nyei ga'naaiv yie zungv
