eng: on anything that is vile. I hate what faithless people do; I will have no part in it. The perverse of heart shall be far from me;
imn: maiv bun doix hmien doix minc. Yie nzorng leih Tin-Hungh nyei mienh zoux nyei sic, yie zungv maiv bun guoqv zuqc yie. Yie yaac maiv nyiemc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh,

eng: I will have nothing to do with what is evil. Whoever slanders their neighbor in secret,
imn: maiv bun haaix nyungc orqv sic guen zuqc yie. Haaix dauh beic ndiev gorngv doqc ninh juangc laangz nyei gorx-youz

eng: I will put to silence; whoever has haughty eyes and a proud heart, I will not tolerate. My eyes will be on the faithful in the land,
imn: yie oix mietc nzengc. Zoux maux, ceng-hlo nyei mienh yie diev maiv duqv. Yie nyei m'zing oix mangc jienv yiem deic-bung ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh,

eng: that they may dwell with me; the one whose walk is blameless will minister to me. No one who practices deceit
imn: weic bun ninh mbuo duqv caux yie yiem. Haaix dauh yangh maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei jauv, ziouc duqv fu-sux yie. Haaix dauh zoux nduov mienh nyei mienh

eng: will dwell in my house; no one who speaks falsely will stand in my presence. Every morning I will put to silence
imn: maiv duqv yiem yie nyei biauv. Haaix dauh gorngv-baeqc, maiv duqv yiem yie nyei nza'hmien. Ndorm-ndorm yie oix mietc

eng: all the wicked in the land; I will cut off every evildoer from the city of the Lord .
imn: yiem deic-bung nyei yietc zungv orqv mienh. Yie oix zorqv dauh dauh zoux waaic sic nyei mienh pai guangc, maiv bun yiem Ziouv nyei zingh.

eng: Hear my prayer, Lord ; let my cry for help come to you. Do not hide your face from me
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac. Tov bun yie heuc jienv jouh nyei waac taux meih nyei m'normh. Yie zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: when I am in distress. Turn your ear to me; when I call, answer me quickly. For my days vanish like smoke;
imn: tov maiv dungx buang meih nyei hmien maiv mangc yie. Tov baeng m'normh muangx yie. Yie haaix zanc heuc tov siepv-siepv nyei dau yie. Weic zuqc yie nyei hnoi-nyieqc hnangv douz-sioux mitc nzengc.

eng: my bones burn like glowing embers. My heart is blighted and withered like grass;
imn: Yie nyei mbungv yaac hnangv douz buov jienv nor. Yie nyei hnyouv zuqc siang hnangv miev nor nyaux nqaai,

eng: I forget to eat my food. In my distress I groan aloud
imn: yie zungv maiv jangx nyanc hnaangx. Laaix yie njunh duqv mbui,

eng: and am reduced to skin and bones. I am like a desert owl,
imn: yie nyei sin ziouc kungx ndopv buang jienv mbungv hnangv. Yie hnangv yiem deic-bung-huaang nyei domh jaangv,

eng: like an owl among the ruins. I lie awake; I have become
imn: hnangv yiem lomc-huaang nyei norqc guv long nor. Yie bueix maiv njormh,

eng: like a bird alone on a roof. All day long my enemies taunt me;
imn: yie hnangv norm norqc ndoqc yiem biauv-ngorh gu'nguaaic. Yie nyei win-wangv ziangh hnoi huotv yie.

eng: those who rail against me use my name as a curse. For I eat ashes as my food
imn: Ki yie wuov deix longc yie nyei mbuox zioux mienh. Yie nyanc saaiv dorngx hnaangx,

eng: and mingle my drink with tears because of your great wrath,
imn: yie hopv nyei ga'naaiv yaac zorpc jienv wuom-mueic, weic zuqc meih qiex jiez nouz yie,

eng: for you have taken me up and thrown me aside. My days are like the evening shadow;
imn: meih zungv zorqv yie daaih aengx zoi guangc mingh. Yie nyei hnoi-nyieqc se hnangv nziemx-yaangh nyei dongh linh.

eng: I wither away like grass. But you, Lord , sit enthroned forever;
imn: Yie hnangv miev nor nyaux nqaai. Mv baac Ziouv aac, meih yietc liuz zueiz weic.

eng: your renown endures through all generations. You will arise and have compassion on Zion,
imn: Doic jiex doic oix jangx meih nyei mengh. Meih oix jiez daaih korv-lienh Si^on

eng: for it is time to show favor to her; the appointed time has come. For her stones are dear to your servants;
imn: weic zuqc korv-lienh ninh nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv. Dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc zungv taux aqv. Meih nyei bou hnamv Si^on Zingh nyei la'bieiv,

eng: her very dust moves them to pity. The nations will fear the name of the Lord ,
imn: korv-lienh ninh zuqc baaic njiec nyei nie-mbung. Maanc fingx oix gamh nziex Ziouv nyei mengh,

eng: all the kings of the earth will revere your glory. For the Lord will rebuild Zion
imn: lungh ndiev nyei hungh oix gamh nziex meih nyei njang-laangc. Weic zuqc Ziouv oix ceix Si^on.

eng: and appear in his glory. He will respond to the prayer of the destitute;
imn: Ninh oix yiem ninh nyei njang-laangc hinc cuotv daaih. Ninh oix muangx jomc kouv nyei mienh daux gaux.

eng: he will not despise their plea. Let this be written for a future generation,
imn: Ninh maiv mangc piex ninh mbuo jouh nyei waac. Oix zuqc zorqv naaiv deix sic fiev jienv weic hoz doic zeiv-fun,

eng: that a people not yet created may praise the Lord : “The Lord looked down from his sanctuary on high,
imn: bun maiv gaengh cuotv seix nyei mienh hiuv duqv ceng Ziouv. “ Ziouv yiem ninh hlang jiex nyei cing-nzengc dorngx mangc njiec,

eng: from heaven he viewed the earth, to hear the groans of the prisoners
imn: yiem lungh gu'nguaaic mangc lungh ndiev, weic muangx zuqc wuonx nyei mienh njunh nyei qiex,

eng: and release those condemned to death.” So the name of the Lord will be declared in Zion
imn: weic bungx nqoi zuqc dingc daix daic nyei mienh,” weic bun mienh yiem Si^on zunh Ziouv nyei mengh,

eng: and his praise in Jerusalem when the peoples and the kingdoms
imn: yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem yaac ceng ninh. Wuov zanc maanc fingx caux maanc guoqv

eng: assemble to worship the Lord . In the course of my life he broke my strength;
imn: ziouc gapv zunv zaangc Ziouv. Yie corc lunx nyei ziangh hoc ninh bun yie mau,

eng: he cut short my days. So I said:
imn: ninh jamv yie nyei siouc nyuonh nangv. Yie gorngv, “O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac,

eng: “Do not take me away, my God, in the midst of my days; your years go on through all generations. In the beginning you laid the foundations of the earth,
imn: yie ziangh taux ndaamv-seix hnangv, tov maiv dungx gaengh dorh yie mingh. Meih ganh nyei hnyangx-daauh yietc liuz yiem taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Dongh cor meih liepc ndau nyei gorn-ndoqv,

eng: and the heavens are the work of your hands. They will perish, but you remain;
imn: lungh meih ganh nyei buoz zeix daaih. Lungh ndau zungv oix zuqc mietc, mv baac meih corc yiem jienv.

eng: they will all wear out like a garment. Like clothing you will change them and they will be discarded. But you remain the same,
imn: Lungh caux ndau oix hnangv lui-houx nor, pei nzengc. Meih oix yienc lungh ndau hnangv yienc lui-houx, lungh ndau ziouc jiex nzengc aqv. Mv baac meih zanc-zanc hnangv loz nor,

eng: and your years will never end. The children of your servants will live in your presence;
imn: meih nyei hnyangx-daauh yietc liuz maiv haih nzengc. Meih nyei bou nyei dorn-jueiv oix duqv yiem longx.

eng: their descendants will be established before you.”
imn: Ninh mbuo nyei hoz doic oix liepc wuonv yiem meih nyei nza'hmien.

eng: Praise the Lord , my soul; all my inmost being, praise his holy name. Praise the Lord , my soul,
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv aac, oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Yie longc nzengc hnyouv ceng ninh nyei cing-nzengc mbuox. Yie nyei hnyouv oix ceng Ziouv,

eng: and forget not all his benefits— who forgives all your sins
imn: yaac maiv dungx la'kuqv ninh nyei yietc zungv en-zingh. Ninh guangc yie nyei yietc zungv zuiz,

eng: and heals all your diseases, who redeems your life from the pit
imn: yaac zorc yie nyei yietc zungv baengc. Ninh zuoqc yie nyei maengc leih ndutv ndo haic nyei kuotv,

eng: and crowns you with love and compassion, who satisfies your desires with good things
imn: ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie, korv-lienh yie. Ninh ceix longx nyei ga'naaiv bun yie buangv eix,

eng: so that your youth is renewed like the eagle’s. The Lord works righteousness
imn: yie ziouc nzuonx-lunx daaih hnangv domh jaangv nor henv. Ziouv zoux kuv sic

eng: and justice for all the oppressed. He made known his ways to Moses,
imn: yaac baengh fim nyei tengx zuqc zeix nyei mienh. Ninh bun Mose hiuv duqv ninh nyei za'eix,

eng: his deeds to the people of Israel: The Lord is compassionate and gracious,
imn: bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh hiuv duqv ninh zoux nyei sic. Ziouv korv-lienh mienh, ceix en bun mienh,

eng: slow to anger, abounding in love. He will not always accuse,
imn: ninh maiv qiex jiez siepv, yaac maaih hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv buangv nzengc. Ninh maiv zanc-zanc hemx,

eng: nor will he harbor his anger forever; he does not treat us as our sins deserve
imn: yaac maiv yietc liuz qiex jiez. Ninh maiv ziux mbuo zoux nyei zuiz dingc,

eng: or repay us according to our iniquities. For as high as the heavens are above the earth,
imn: yaac maiv ziux mbuo zoux dorngc nyei jauv winh bun. Lungh leih ndau ndongc haaix hlang,

eng: so great is his love for those who fear him; as far as the east is from the west,
imn: ninh hnamv taaih ninh wuov deix ndongc wuov hlo. Dong bung leih fai bung ndongc haaix go,

eng: so far has he removed our transgressions from us. As a father has compassion on his children,
imn: ninh zorqv mbuo zoux dorngc nyei zuiz guangc ndongc wuov go. Die hnangv haaix nor korv-lienh ninh nyei fu'jueiv,

eng: so the Lord has compassion on those who fear him; for he knows how we are formed,
imn: Ziouv yaac hnangv wuov nor korv-lienh taaih ninh nyei mienh, weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv mbuo nyei sin zaangc,

eng: he remembers that we are dust. The life of mortals is like grass,
imn: jangx duqv mbuo benx nie-mbung. Baamh mienh aeqv, ninh nyei hnoi-nyieqc hnangv miev nor,

eng: they flourish like a flower of the field; the wind blows over it and it is gone,
imn: ninh hnangv lomc-huaang nyei miev-biangh, zuqc nziaaux buonc, ziang naaic maiv maaih aqv.

eng: and its place remembers it no more. But from everlasting to everlasting
imn: Ninh nyei loz-dorngx yaac maiv nyiemc ninh aqv. Mv baac Ziouv ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv taaih ninh wuov deix yietc liuz taux yietc liuz,

eng: the Lord ’s love is with those who fear him, and his righteousness with their children’s children— with those who keep his covenant
imn: ninh baengh fim nyei jauv yaac njiec taux ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun zeiv-faqv, se ei jienv ninh nyei ngaengc waac

eng: and remember to obey his precepts. The Lord has established his throne in heaven,
imn: caux jangx ninh nyei leiz-latc wuov deix. Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh liepc ninh nyei weic,

eng: and his kingdom rules over all. Praise the Lord , you his angels,
imn: ninh nyei guoqv gunv maanc muotc. Meih mbuo, ninh nyei fin-mienh aah! Dongh ei jienv ninh hatc nyei waac,

eng: you mighty ones who do his bidding, who obey his word. Praise the Lord , all his heavenly hosts,
imn: se muangx ninh nyei waac, maaih domh qaqv nyei fin-mienh, oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Ninh nyei zuangx baeng, se fu-sux ninh,

eng: you his servants who do his will. Praise the Lord , all his works
imn: ei jienv ninh nyei eix nyei bou aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Meih mbuo yietc zungv zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc aah!

eng: everywhere in his dominion. Praise the Lord , my soul.
imn: Yiem ninh gunv nyei norm-norm dorngx, oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. O yie nyei hnyouv aac, oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: Praise the Lord , my soul. Lord my God, you are very great; you are clothed with splendor and majesty. The Lord wraps himself in light as with a garment;
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv aac, oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac, meih za'gengh hlo! haic. Meih maaih njang-laangc caux mengh hoc zuqv jienv zoux meih nyei lui. Meih buix jienv njang hnangv buix lui-ndaauv.

eng: he stretches out the heavens like a tent and lays the beams of his upper chambers on their waters.
imn: Meih corng lungh hnangv corng ndopv-liuh wuov nor. Yiem lungh gu'nguaaic maengx nyei wuom meih liepc meih yiem nyei dorngx.

eng: He makes the clouds his chariot and rides on the wings of the wind. He makes winds his messengers,
imn: Meih longc mbuonx zoux meih nyei cie, yaac bangc nziaaux nyei ndaatv mingh. Meih longc nziaaux zoux meih nyei douc fienx mienh,

eng: flames of fire his servants. He set the earth on its foundations;
imn: longc douz-mbietc zoux meih nyei bou. Meih zorqv ndau liepc yiem gorn-ndoqv gu'nguaaic,

eng: it can never be moved. You covered it with the watery depths as with a garment;
imn: weic bun yietc liuz maiv dongz. Meih longc ndo nyei wuom yiemx ndau-beih gu'nguaaic hnangv lui nor,

eng: the waters stood above the mountains. But at your rebuke the waters fled,
imn: wuom jiex mbong gu'nguaaic. Meih yietv hatc, wuom ziouc biaux.

eng: at the sound of your thunder they took to flight; they flowed over the mountains,
imn: Yietv haiz meih nyei qiex mbui, wuom ziouc mingh nzengc. Geh zorng baetv faaux, horngz biopc njiec

eng: they went down into the valleys, to the place you assigned for them. You set a boundary they cannot cross;
imn: taux meih dingc bun ninh mbuo yiem nyei dorngx. Meih dingc ziangx gapv-jaaix bun wuom maiv haih jiex ndaangc,

eng: never again will they cover the earth. He makes springs pour water into the ravines;
imn: weic maiv bun wuom aengx buang jienv ndau-beih. Meih bun wuom-zingv yiem horngz baetv cuotv,

eng: it flows between the mountains. They give water to all the beasts of the field;
imn: liouc njiec mbong mbu'ndongx, bun zuangx hieh zoih duqv hopv,

eng: the wild donkeys quench their thirst. The birds of the sky nest by the waters;
imn: bun hieh lorh jaiv nqaatv. Yiem wuom-hlen maaih norqc zoux lauz,

eng: they sing among the branches. He waters the mountains from his upper chambers;
imn: yiem ndiangx-nquaah maaih norqc heuc. Yiem lungh gu'nguaaic meih bun mbiungc duih njiec mbong,

eng: the land is satisfied by the fruit of his work. He makes grass grow for the cattle,
imn: weic meih zoux nyei yietc zungv gong, ndau-beih duqv bungx-zuoqc. Meih bun miev-maeng cuotv daaih yungz saeng-kuv,

eng: and plants for people to cultivate— bringing forth food from the earth: wine that gladdens human hearts,
imn: bun lai-coix cuotv daaih bun mienh longc, bun ndau cuotv gaeng-zuangx ga'naaiv bun mienh nyanc. Aengx cuotv a'ngunc diuv tengx mienh njien-youh,

eng: oil to make their faces shine, and bread that sustains their hearts. The trees of the Lord are well watered,
imn: yaac duqv hmei tengx ninh nyei hmien njang, duqv laangh ziqc weic bun sin zaangc henv. Ziouv nyei ndiangx duqv wuom gaux,

eng: the cedars of Lebanon that he planted. There the birds make their nests;
imn: se yiem Le^mbaa^norn ninh zuangx nyei si^ndaa zongh ndiangx. Norqc zoux lauz yiem wuov deix ndiangx.

eng: the stork has its home in the junipers. The high mountains belong to the wild goats;
imn: Norqc nyieh yiem zongh ndiangx zoux ninh nyei biauv. Mbong-hlang benx hieh yungh nyei dinc,

eng: the crags are a refuge for the hyrax. He made the moon to mark the seasons,
imn: la'bieiv-mbaengx zoux naauz nyei ndaauh kaux dorngx. Meih zeix hlaax weic dingc gueix,

eng: and the sun knows when to go down. You bring darkness, it becomes night,
imn: mba'hnoi hiuv duqv ziangh hoc muotv. Meih zeix hmuangx benx lungh muonz zanc,

eng: and all the beasts of the forest prowl. The lions roar for their prey
imn: lomc gu'nyuoz yietc zungv hieh zoih ziouc cuotv daaih. Sienh lunx heuc jienv mingh lorz nyanc,

eng: and seek their food from God. The sun rises, and they steal away;
imn: lorz Tin-Hungh ceix bun nyei ga'naaiv. Mba'hnoi cuotv nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo ziouc mingh aqv.

eng: they return and lie down in their dens. Then people go out to their work,
imn: Mingh bueix ninh mbuo ganh nyei kuotv. Mienh ziouc cuotv mingh zoux ninh mbuo nyei gong,

eng: to their labor until evening. How many are your works, Lord !
imn: yaac zoux jienv mingh taux lungh hmuangx. O Ziouv aac, meih zoux nyei gong camv haic,

eng: In wisdom you made them all; the earth is full of your creatures. There is the sea, vast and spacious,
imn: yietc zungv se meih longc cong-mengh zeix daaih. Meih zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc buangv nzengc ndau-beih. Yiem wuov maaih koiv youc hlo youc jangv.

eng: teeming with creatures beyond number— living things both large and small. There the ships go to and fro,
imn: Koiv gu'nyuoz maaih haih dongz nyei ga'naaiv saauv maiv hingh, se maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv hlo-hlo faix-faix. Yiem wuov maaih nzangv mingh daaih,

eng: and Leviathan, which you formed to frolic there. All creatures look to you
imn: aengx maaih meih zeix daaih nyei Le^wi^aa^taan yiem wuov nyienx. Naaiv deix yietc zungv kaux meih

eng: to give them their food at the proper time. When you give it to them,
imn: ziux ziangh hoc bun ga'naaiv ninh mbuo nyanc. Meih bun ninh mbuo, ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv daaih,

eng: they gather it up; when you open your hand, they are satisfied with good things. When you hide your face,
imn: meih sung meih nyei buoz ninh mbuo ziouc duqv longx nyei ga'naaiv beuv. Meih buang hmien maiv mangc ninh mbuo, ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic.

eng: they are terrified; when you take away their breath, they die and return to the dust. When you send your Spirit,
imn: Meih zorqv cuotv ninh mbuo tauv nyei qiex ninh mbuo daic mi'aqv, nzuonx mingh benx nie-mbung. Meih bun meih nyei Singx Lingh cuotv mingh wuov zanc

eng: they are created, and you renew the face of the ground. May the glory of the Lord endure forever;
imn: ninh mbuo duqv zeix cuotv daaih aqv. Meih yaac bun ndau-beih goiv yienc siang daaih. Tov Ziouv nyei njang-laangc yietc liuz yiem.

eng: may the Lord rejoice in his works— he who looks at the earth, and it trembles,
imn: Tov Ziouv a'hneiv ninh zeix daaih nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh mangc ndau, ndau ziouc dongz,

eng: who touches the mountains, and they smoke. I will sing to the Lord all my life;
imn: ninh hluo zuqc mbong, mbong ziouc cuotv douz-sioux. Yie yietc seix oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv.

eng: I will sing praise to my God as long as I live. May my meditation be pleasing to him,
imn: Yie corc ziangh jienv nyei ziangh hoc, yie oix baaux nzung bun yie nyei Tin-Hungh. Tov ninh weic yie buih nyei waac horpc hnyouv,

eng: as I rejoice in the Lord . But may sinners vanish from the earth
imn: weic zuqc Ziouv bun yie njien-youh. Tov bun zuiz-mienh yiem baamh gen zuqc mietc nzengc,

eng: and the wicked be no more. Praise the Lord , my soul. Praise the Lord .
imn: yaac bun orqv mienh zutc nzengc. Yie nyei hnyouv aac, oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: Give praise to the Lord , proclaim his name; make known among the nations what he has done. Sing to him, sing praise to him;
imn: Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv, oix zuqc jouh ninh nyei mengh, yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx zunh yaangh ninh zoux nyei sic. Oix zuqc dorng jienv ninh baaux nzung, baaux nzung ceng ninh.

eng: tell of all his wonderful acts. Glory in his holy name;
imn: Oix zuqc zunh yaangh ninh zoux yietc zungv mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Oix zuqc weic ninh nyei cing-nzengc mbuox bungx waac-maux.

eng: let the hearts of those who seek the Lord rejoice. Look to the Lord and his strength;
imn: Bun zimh lorz Ziouv nyei mienh nyei hnyouv njien-youh. Oix zuqc zimh lorz Ziouv caux ninh nyei qaqv,

eng: seek his face always. Remember the wonders he has done,
imn: zanc-zanc oix yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien. Ninh nyei bou, Apc^laa^ham, nyei hoz doic,

eng: his judgments are in all the earth. He remembers his covenant forever,
imn: Ninh se Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh. Ninh siemv nyei waac yiem gormx lungh ndiev. Ninh jangx ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac taux yietc liuz,

eng: the promise he made, for a thousand generations, the covenant he made with Abraham,
imn: ninh paaiv nyei waac weic yietc cin doic, se caux Apc^laa^ham liepc nyei ngaengc waac,

eng: the oath he swore to Isaac. He confirmed it to Jacob as a decree,
imn: dongh ninh houv jienv laengz bun I^sakc nyei ngaengc waac. Ninh zorqv naaiv deix ngaengc waac caux Yaakopv liepc benx leiz-nyeic,

eng: to Israel as an everlasting covenant: “To you I will give the land of Canaan
imn: jiu bun I^saa^laa^en weic zoux yietc liuz nyei ngaengc waac. Ninh gorngv, “Yie oix zorqv Kaa^naa^an Deic-Bung jiu bun meih

eng: as the portion you will inherit.” When they were but few in number,
imn: benx meih nzipc nyei buonc.” Ninh mbuo mienh zoqc wuov zanc,

eng: few indeed, and strangers in it, they wandered from nation to nation,
imn: se mienh za'gengh zoqc nyei, kungx dingh zepv yiem wuov norm deic-bung hnangv, ninh mbuo yiem naaiv norm deic-bung jiex wuov norm deic-bung,

eng: from one kingdom to another. He allowed no one to oppress them;
imn: yiem yietc norm guoqv mingh taux ganh norm guoqv. Ninh maiv bun haaix dauh mienh zeix ninh mbuo,

eng: for their sake he rebuked kings: “Do not touch my anointed ones;
imn: weic ninh mbuo nyei gorn ninh hemx ziex dauh hungh diex. Ninh gorngv, “Maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc bun yie longc youh orn daaih nyei mienh,

eng: do my prophets no harm.” He called down famine on the land
imn: yaac maiv dungx hoic yie nyei douc waac mienh .” Ninh bun wuov norm deic-bung zuqc domh huaang domh ngorc,

eng: and destroyed all their supplies of food; and he sent a man before them—
imn: dongh ninh mbuo kaux nyei laangh ziqc dangx nzengc, ninh paaiv laanh mienh mingh ndaangc ninh mbuo,

eng: Joseph, sold as a slave. They bruised his feet with shackles,
imn: se Yosepv, zuqc maaic mingh zoux nouh. Yosepv nyei zaux zuqc hlieqv-limc ndoh jienv mun,

eng: his neck was put in irons, till what he foretold came to pass,
imn: yaac zuqc hlieqv-kou kou jienv jaang, zuov taux ninh gorngv oix cuotv nyei sic cuotv daaih zien.

eng: till the word of the Lord proved him true. The king sent and released him,
imn: Ziouv nyei waac seix ninh. Hungh diex paaiv mienh mingh bungx nqoi ninh,

eng: the ruler of peoples set him free. He made him master of his household,
imn: gunv zuangx fingx wuov dauh bungx ninh cuotv, liepc ninh zoux hungh dinc nyei ziouv,

eng: ruler over all he possessed, to instruct his princes as he pleased
imn: bun ninh gunv hungh dinc maaih nyei yietc zungv, bun ninh sueih eix njaaux hungh diex nyei jien,

eng: and teach his elders wisdom. Then Israel entered Egypt;
imn: njaaux hungh diex nyei mienh gox maaih cong-mengh. Nqa'haav I^saa^laa^en daaih taux I^yipv,

eng: Jacob resided as a foreigner in the land of Ham. The Lord made his people very fruitful;
imn: Yaakopv dingh zepv yiem Haam nyei deic-bung. Ziouv bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx hiaangx camv,

eng: he made them too numerous for their foes, whose hearts he turned to hate his people,
imn: yaac bun ninh mbuo gauh henv jiex ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv. Ninh bun win-wangv nyei hnyouv nzorng ninh nyei baeqc fingx,

eng: to conspire against his servants. He sent Moses his servant,
imn: zoux guv guaix nyei sic hoic ninh nyei bou. Ninh paaiv ninh nyei bou, Mose,

eng: and Aaron, whom he had chosen. They performed his signs among them,
imn: caux ninh ginv daaih wuov dauh Aalon . Ninh mbuo yiem wuov deix mienh mbu'ndongx zoux jangx-hoc,

eng: his wonders in the land of Ham. He sent darkness and made the land dark—
imn: yiem Haam nyei deic-bung zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh bun hmuangx daaih om jienv deic-bung,

eng: for had they not rebelled against his words? He turned their waters into blood,
imn: I^yipv Mienh yaac ngaengc ninh nyei waac. Ninh bun ninh mbuo nyei wuom benx nziaamv,

eng: causing their fish to die. Their land teemed with frogs,
imn: bun ninh mbuo nyei mbiauz daic nzengc. Yiem ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung,

eng: which went up into the bedrooms of their rulers. He spoke, and there came swarms of flies,
imn: liemh ninh mbuo nyei hungh dinc gu'nyuoz maaih gaengv buangv nzengc. Ninh gorngv ziouc maaih mungz faanv,

eng: and gnats throughout their country. He turned their rain into hail,
imn: maaih gaeng-mbung faanv buangv deic-bung. Ninh bun borqc div mbiungc duih njiec,

eng: with lightning throughout their land; he struck down their vines and fig trees
imn: bun mba'lingc njapc njapc nyei gormx deic-bung. Ninh mborqv waaic ninh mbuo nyei a'ngunc hmei caux ngongh nyorx ndiangx,

eng: and shattered the trees of their country. He spoke, and the locusts came,
imn: mborqv ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung nyei ndiangx nauv nzengc. Ninh gorngv yietc joux, jopv-nyeic ziouc daaih,

eng: grasshoppers without number; they ate up every green thing in their land,
imn: jopv-nyeic lunx saauv maiv hingh, nyanc ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung nyei nyungc-nyungc lai-coix,

eng: ate up the produce of their soil. Then he struck down all the firstborn in their land,
imn: caux yiem lingh deic cuotv nyei gaeng-zuangx. Ninh daix yiem ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung gu'nyuoz nyei yietc zungv dorn-la'gauv,

eng: the firstfruits of all their manhood. He brought out Israel, laden with silver and gold,
imn: se mouz buonc nyei daauh dauh dorn. Nqa'haav ninh dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh, caux jienv jiem nyaanh cuotv,

eng: and from among their tribes no one faltered. Egypt was glad when they left,
imn: yiem ninh mbuo nyei fingx-fingx maiv maaih haaix dauh mau. Ninh mbuo biaux cuotv, I^yipv Mienh a'hneiv nyei,

eng: because dread of Israel had fallen on them. He spread out a cloud as a covering,
imn: weic zuqc ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Tin-Hungh bun mbuonx om jienv,

eng: and a fire to give light at night. They asked, and he brought them quail;
imn: lungh muonz zanc bun douz ziux njang. Ninh mbuo tov, ninh ziouc bun norqc mbunh ndaix daaih,

eng: he fed them well with the bread of heaven. He opened the rock, and water gushed out;
imn: yaac bun laangh ziqc yiem lungh daaih bun ninh mbuo nyanc beuv. Ninh mborqv nqoi la'bieiv, wuom ziouc baetv cuotv

eng: it flowed like a river in the desert. For he remembered his holy promise
imn: liouc jiex deic-bung-huaang benx diuh ndaaih, weic zuqc ninh jangx ninh caux ninh nyei bou, Apc^laa^ham,

eng: given to his servant Abraham. He brought out his people with rejoicing,
imn: laengz nyei cing-nzengc waac. Ninh dorh ninh nyei baeqc fingx njien-youh nyei cuotv,

eng: his chosen ones with shouts of joy; he gave them the lands of the nations,
imn: dorh jienv ninh ginv daaih nyei mienh baaux jienv nzung mingh. Ninh zorqv ganh fingx mienh nyei deic-bung jiu bun ninh mbuo.

eng: and they fell heir to what others had toiled for— that they might keep his precepts
imn: Ninh mbuo duqv nzipc wuov deix mienh ndortv qaqv zoux nyei buonc weic bun ninh mbuo gan ninh nyei leiz-nyeic

eng: and observe his laws. Praise the Lord .
imn: yaac ei nzengc ninh nyei leiz-latc. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: Praise the Lord . Give thanks to the Lord , for he is good; his love endures forever. Who can proclaim the mighty acts of the Lord
imn: Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh se longx haic, ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Haaix dauh haih gorngv Ziouv zoux hlo haic nyei sic?

eng: or fully declare his praise? Blessed are those who act justly,
imn: Fai haaix dauh haih biux mengh puix duqv ceng ninh nyei yietc zungv? Da'faanh ei jienv baengh fim nyei jauv zoux wuov deix,

eng: who always do what is right. Remember me, Lord , when you show favor to your people,
imn: se zanc-zanc zoux horpc nyei mienh, maaih orn-lorqc. O Ziouv aac, meih zoux longx bun meih nyei baeqc fingx wuov zanc, tov jangx yie.

eng: come to my aid when you save them, that I may enjoy the prosperity of your chosen ones,
imn: Meih daaih njoux ninh mbuo nyei ziangh hoc tov tengx yie, weic bun yie buatc meih ginv daaih nyei mienh duqv bungx-zuoqc,

eng: that I may share in the joy of your nation and join your inheritance in giving praise. We have sinned, even as our ancestors did;
imn: yaac bun yie a'hneiv meih nyei baeqc fingx duqv daaih nyei njien-youh, yaac duqv caux meih nzipc daaih nyei buonc juangc jienv ceng. Yie mbuo caux yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix fih hnangv nyei baamz zuiz.

eng: we have done wrong and acted wickedly. When our ancestors were in Egypt,
imn: Yie mbuo zoux dorngc, zoux orqv nyei sic. Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov zanc,

eng: they gave no thought to your miracles; they did not remember your many kindnesses, and they rebelled by the sea, the Red Sea. Yet he saved them for his name’s sake,
imn: yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix maiv mengh baeqc meih zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh mbuo maiv jangx taux meih ndongc haaix ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo zungv yiem wuov Koiv-Siqv ga'hlen, ngaengc Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh. Maiv gunv hnangv naaic, ninh weic ganh nyei mengh njoux ninh mbuo,

eng: to make his mighty power known. He rebuked the Red Sea, and it dried up;
imn: weic bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv ninh nyei domh qaqv. Ninh hatc Koiv-Siqv, koiv ziouc nqaai mi'aqv.

eng: he led them through the depths as through a desert. He saved them from the hand of the foe;
imn: Ninh dorh ninh mbuo jiex ndo nyei dorngx hnangv jiex deic-bung-huaang nor. Ninh njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev,

eng: from the hand of the enemy he redeemed them. The waters covered their adversaries;
imn: yiem win-jaa nyei buoz-ndiev njoux ninh mbuo cuotv daaih. Wuom yiemx ninh mbuo nyei win-jaa,

eng: not one of them survived. Then they believed his promises
imn: zungv maiv zengc yietc dauh aqv. Wuov zanc ninh mbuo sienx ninh nyei waac,

eng: and sang his praise. But they soon forgot what he had done
imn: ninh mbuo yaac baaux nzung ceng ninh. Mv baac maiv lauh ninh mbuo la'kuqv ninh zoux nyei sic,

eng: and did not wait for his plan to unfold. In the desert they gave in to their craving;
imn: ninh mbuo maiv longc hnyouv zuov ninh njaaux nyei za'eix. Yiem wuov deic-bung-huaang ninh mbuo cei duqv kouv haic,

eng: in the wilderness they put God to the test. So he gave them what they asked for,
imn: ziouc yiem wuov seix Tin-Hungh. Ziux ninh mbuo tov nyei ninh ceix bun ninh mbuo,

eng: but sent a wasting disease among them. In the camp they grew envious of Moses
imn: mv baac bun ninh mbuo butv baengc-ngaaiz. Yiem ndopv-liuh ciangv gu'nyuoz

eng: and of Aaron, who was consecrated to the Lord . The earth opened up and swallowed Dathan;
imn: mienh mueic jieqv Mose caux Ziouv nyei cing-nzengc mienh, Aalon, wuov zanc, ndau nqoi, naqv Ndaataan

eng: it buried the company of Abiram. Fire blazed among their followers;
imn: yaac biopv ndipc Aa^mbi^lam yietc guanh mienh. Maaih douz yiem ninh mbuo nyei guanh mbu'ndongx cuotv daaih,

eng: a flame consumed the wicked. At Horeb they made a calf
imn: douz-mbietc buov nzengc orqv mienh. Yiem Holepv Mbong ninh mbuo zoux dauh ngongh gouv dorn,

eng: and worshiped an idol cast from metal. They exchanged their glorious God
imn: yaac baaix dox daaih nyei miuc-fangx. Ninh mbuo zorqv Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc

eng: for an image of a bull, which eats grass. They forgot the God who saved them,
imn: tiuv nyanc miev nyei ngongh gouv nyei miuc-fangx. Ninh mbuo la'kuqv ninh mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv, Tin-Hungh,

eng: who had done great things in Egypt, miracles in the land of Ham
imn: dongh yiem I^yipv zoux hlo haic nyei sic, yiem Haam nyei deic zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jauv,

eng: and awesome deeds by the Red Sea. So he said he would destroy them—
imn: yiem Koiv-Siqv zoux peix fuc nyei sic. Weic naaiv ninh gorngv ninh oix mietc ninh nyei baeqc fingx.

eng: had not Moses, his chosen one, stood in the breach before him to keep his wrath from destroying them. Then they despised the pleasant land;
imn: Kaux bangc maaih ninh ginv daaih wuov dauh Mose dorng jienv Tin-Hungh tengx ninh mbuo gorngv, yaac bun ninh ga'qiex fiu, maiv mietc ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo yaac mangc piex wuov norm kuh yiem nyei deic-bung,

eng: they did not believe his promise. They grumbled in their tents
imn: ninh mbuo maiv sienx Tin-Hungh laengz nyei waac. Ninh mbuo yiem ganh nyei ndopv-liuh ngopv,

eng: and did not obey the Lord . So he swore to them with uplifted hand
imn: yaac maiv muangx Ziouv nyei waac. Weic naaiv ninh sung jienv buoz houv waac gorngv

eng: that he would make them fall in the wilderness, make their descendants fall among the nations
imn: ninh oix bun ninh mbuo yiem deic-bung-huaang ndortv nzengc. Bun ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun nzaanx mingh yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx,

eng: and scatter them throughout the lands. They yoked themselves to the Baal of Peor
imn: bun ninh mbuo faatv nzaanx yiem buangv norm-norm guoqv. Nqa'haav yiem Be^o ninh mbuo bieqc Mbaa^an zienh

eng: and ate sacrifices offered to lifeless gods; they aroused the Lord ’s anger by their wicked deeds,
imn: yaac nyanc ziec bun maiv maaih maengc nyei zienh nyei ga'naaiv. Ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic cuoqv Ziouv qiex jiez haic,

eng: and a plague broke out among them. But Phinehas stood up and intervened,
imn: ziouc maaih domh wuon-baengc yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx butv cuotv. Wuov zanc Fi^ne^hatc souv jiez daaih dingc zoux dorngc nyei mienh nyei zuiz,

eng: and the plague was checked. This was credited to him as righteousness
imn: domh wuon-baengc ziouc dingh mi'aqv. Ninh hnangv naaiv zoux, Ziouv funx ninh zoux duqv horpc,

eng: for endless generations to come. By the waters of Meribah they angered the Lord ,
imn: yaac funx taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Ninh mbuo yiem Me^li^mbaa Wuom cuoqv Ziouv qiex jiez.

eng: and trouble came to Moses because of them; for they rebelled against the Spirit of God,
imn: Laaix ninh mbuo, Mose yaac zuqc kouv aqv. Weic naaiv ninh mbuo bun Mose nyei hnyouv mun,

eng: and rash words came from Moses’ lips. They did not destroy the peoples
imn: ninh ziouc qiex beqv gorngv cuotv ninh maiv horpc zuqc gorngv nyei waac. Ninh mbuo maiv ei Ziouv hatc nyei waac

eng: as the Lord had commanded them, but they mingled with the nations
imn: mietc wuov deix ganh fingx mienh. Daaux nzuonx zorpc jienv caux wuov deix fingx yiem,

eng: and adopted their customs. They worshiped their idols,
imn: yaac hoqc zoux hnangv ninh mbuo nor zoux. Tin-Hungh nyei mienh fu-sux wuov deix mienh nyei miuc-fangx

eng: which became a snare to them. They sacrificed their sons
imn: ziouc benx koux hlopv jienv ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo zorqv ninh mbuo ganh nyei naamh nyouz

eng: and their daughters to false gods. They shed innocent blood,
imn: ziec bun mienv. Ninh mbuo daix maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh,

eng: the blood of their sons and daughters, whom they sacrificed to the idols of Canaan, and the land was desecrated by their blood. They defiled themselves by what they did;
imn: se bun ganh nyei naamh nyouz nyei nziaamv liouc cuotv, dongh ninh mbuo longc ziec bun Kaa^naa^an nyei miuc-fangx. Wuov deix nziaamv ziouc bun deic-bung maaih uix. Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo ganh zoux nyei jauv bun ninh mbuo maaih uix,

eng: by their deeds they prostituted themselves. Therefore the Lord was angry with his people
imn: yiem ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic ninh mbuo hnangv maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn. Weic naaiv Ziouv ziouc qiex jiez ninh nyei baeqc fingx,

eng: and abhorred his inheritance. He gave them into the hands of the nations,
imn: yaac youx haic ninh nzipc nyei buonc. Ninh ziouc zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun yiem camv-fingx mienh nyei buoz-ndiev,

eng: and their foes ruled over them. Their enemies oppressed them
imn: nzorng ninh mbuo wuov deix ziouc duqv gunv ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv yaac zeix ninh mbuo,

eng: and subjected them to their power. Many times he delivered them,
imn: ninh mbuo ziouc zuqc yiem ninh mbuo nyei hatc maaz ga'ndiev. Ninh njoux ninh nyei baeqc fingx ziex nzunc,

eng: but they were bent on rebellion and they wasted away in their sin. Yet he took note of their distress
imn: mv baac ninh mbuo duqv-eix ngaengc jienv Tin-Hungh ziouc laaix ganh nyei zuiz ndortv njiec aiv. Maiv gunv hnangv naaic, ninh haiz ninh mbuo heuc jienv tov nyei waac,

eng: when he heard their cry; for their sake he remembered his covenant
imn: ninh ziouc jangx ninh mbuo nyei kouv naanc. Ninh jangx jienv ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac,

eng: and out of his great love he relented. He caused all who held them captive
imn: ziux ninh ndongc naaic ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv ninh ziouc goiv za'eix. Ninh bun yietc zungv caangv ninh nyei mienh wuov deix

eng: to show them mercy. Save us, Lord our God,
imn: korv-lienh ninh mbuo. O Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh aac, tov njoux yie mbuo.

eng: and gather us from the nations, that we may give thanks to your holy name and glory in your praise. Praise be to the Lord , the God of Israel,
imn: Tov siou yie mbuo yiem maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx nzuonx, weic bun yie mbuo haih dor-ziec meih nyei cing-nzengc mbuox, yaac a'hneiv nyei ceng. Ceng Ziouv, I^saa^laa^en nyei Tin-Hungh,

eng: from everlasting to everlasting. Let all the people say, “Amen!” Praise the Lord .
imn: yiem yietc liuz taux yietc liuz. Zuangx mienh oix zuqc lomh nzoih gorngv, “ Aamen ”. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: Give thanks to the Lord , for he is good; his love endures forever. Let the redeemed of the Lord tell their story—
imn: Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh longx haic, ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh taux yietc liuz. Tov bun Ziouv zuoqc nzuonx nyei mienh hnangv naaic nor gorngv,

eng: those he redeemed from the hand of the foe, those he gathered from the lands,
imn: se dongh ninh yiem win-wangv nyei buoz-ndiev zuoqc nzuonx nyei mienh, yaac yiem norm-norm deic-bung,

eng: from east and west, from north and south. Some wandered in desert wastelands,
imn: se yiem dong naamh fai baqv bung siou nzuonx daaih nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo yiem deic-bung-huaang, deic-bung haanz, youh jienv mingh,

eng: finding no way to a city where they could settle. They were hungry and thirsty,
imn: lorz maiv duqv jauv mingh horpc ninh mbuo yiem nyei zingh. Ninh mbuo youc hnyouv sie youc jaang nqaatv,

eng: and their lives ebbed away. Then they cried out to the Lord in their trouble,
imn: ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv mau nzengc mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz heuc jienv tov Ziouv,

eng: and he delivered them from their distress. He led them by a straight way
imn: ninh ziouc njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei kouv naanc. Ninh dorh ninh mbuo yangh diuh jauv-zaqc,

eng: to a city where they could settle. Let them give thanks to the Lord for his unfailing love
imn: taux horpc ninh mbuo yiem nyei zingh. Ninh mbuo horpc zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh,

eng: and his wonderful deeds for mankind, for he satisfies the thirsty
imn: ninh yaac weic baamh mienh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh bun jaang nqaatv nyei mienh jaiv nqaatv,

eng: and fills the hungry with good things. Some sat in darkness, in utter darkness,
imn: bun hnyouv sie nyei mienh duqv longx nyei ga'naaiv nyanc beuv. Maaih deix mienh yiem hmuangx zong, yiem-yiem nyei dorngx,

eng: prisoners suffering in iron chains, because they rebelled against God’s commands
imn: se zuqc wuonx loh nyei caux zuqc limc ndoh nyei mienh, weic zuqc ninh mbuo ngaengc Tin-Hungh nyei waac,

eng: and despised the plans of the Most High. So he subjected them to bitter labor;
imn: mangc piex Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh njaaux nyei za'eix. Ninh bun ninh mbuo zuqc zoux gong kouv weic zatv ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv njiec.

eng: they stumbled, and there was no one to help. Then they cried to the Lord in their trouble,
imn: Ninh mbuo ndorpc, yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh tengx. Ninh mbuo yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz heuc jienv tov Ziouv.

eng: and he saved them from their distress. He brought them out of darkness, the utter darkness,
imn: Ninh ziouc njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei kouv naanc. Ninh dorh ninh mbuo yiem hmuangx caux zuqc daic nyei dongh linh gu'nyuoz cuotv daaih,

eng: and broke away their chains. Let them give thanks to the Lord for his unfailing love
imn: yaac cutv ninh mbuo zuqc ndoh nyei limc dangx. Ninh mbuo horpc zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh,

eng: and his wonderful deeds for mankind, for he breaks down gates of bronze
imn: ninh yaac weic baamh mienh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh mborqv huv dongh siqv gaengh,

eng: and cuts through bars of iron. Some became fools through their rebellious ways
imn: yaac hngaqv ndutv hlieqv-gaengh sorn. Maaih deix butv baengc laaix ninh mbuo zoux nyei zuiz,

eng: and suffered affliction because of their iniquities. They loathed all food
imn: yaac laaix ninh mbuo zoux waaic sic zuqc siouc kouv. Ninh mbuo youx haic nyungc-nyungc nyanc nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: and drew near the gates of death. Then they cried to the Lord in their trouble,
imn: yaac taux fatv zuqc daic nyei gaengh. Ninh mbuo yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz heuc jienv tov Ziouv,

eng: and he saved them from their distress. He sent out his word and healed them;
imn: ninh ziouc njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei kouv naanc. Ninh gorngv cuotv waac zorc ninh mbuo longx,

eng: he rescued them from the grave. Let them give thanks to the Lord for his unfailing love
imn: yaac njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv zuqc daic nyei kuotv. Ninh mbuo horpc zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh,

eng: and his wonderful deeds for mankind. Let them sacrifice thank offerings
imn: ninh yaac weic baamh mienh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Oix zuqc bun ninh mbuo fongc horc ziec weic dor-ziec,

eng: and tell of his works with songs of joy. Some went out on the sea in ships;
imn: yaac njien-youh nyei baaux nzung gorngv ninh zoux nyei sic. Maaih deix bieqc nzangv,

eng: they were merchants on the mighty waters. They saw the works of the Lord ,
imn: yiem domh wuom bangc nzangv lorz nyanc. Ninh mbuo buatc Ziouv zoux nyei gong,

eng: his wonderful deeds in the deep. For he spoke and stirred up a tempest
imn: se ninh yiem wuom ndo nyei dorngx zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh yietv hatc, domh nziaaux buonc daaih

eng: that lifted high the waves. They mounted up to the heavens and went down to the depths;
imn: bun koiv jiez laangc. Ninh mbuo nyei nzangv faaux taux ndaamv-lungh,

eng: in their peril their courage melted away. They reeled and staggered like drunkards;
imn: aengx ndortv njiec wuom-laangc taux ndo nyei dorngx. Ninh mbuo hnyouv waaic nzengc, laaix ninh mbuo zuqc gamh nziex nyei sic. Ninh mbuo laih mingh laih daaih hnangv diuv nquin nyei mienh nor,

eng: they were at their wits’ end. Then they cried out to the Lord in their trouble,
imn: ninh mbuo jomc za'eix aqv. Ninh mbuo yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz heuc jienv tov Ziouv.

eng: and he brought them out of their distress. He stilled the storm to a whisper;
imn: Ninh ziouc tengx ninh mbuo biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei kouv naanc. Ninh bun domh nziaaux dingh,

eng: the waves of the sea were hushed. They were glad when it grew calm,
imn: bun koiv nyei wuom-laangc sekv nzengc. Ninh mbuo ziouc a'hneiv weic zuqc sekv nzieqc nyei.

eng: and he guided them to their desired haven. Let them give thanks to the Lord for his unfailing love
imn: Ninh yaac dorh ninh mbuo mingh taux ninh mbuo oix mingh nyei nzangv-bouc. Ninh mbuo horpc zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.

eng: and his wonderful deeds for mankind. Let them exalt him in the assembly of the people
imn: Ninh yaac weic baamh mienh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc yiem baeqc fingx gapv zunv nyei dorngx zunh gorngv ninh zoux hlo,

eng: and praise him in the council of the elders. He turned rivers into a desert,
imn: yaac yiem zuangx mienh gox mbu'ndongx ceng ninh. Ninh bun ndaaih tiuv benx deic-bung-huaang,

eng: flowing springs into thirsty ground, and fruitful land into a salt waste,
imn: bun wuom-zingv tiuv benx mborngx nqaai nyei ndau, bun ndau-junc tiuv benx ndau-nzaaih ndau-huaang,

eng: because of the wickedness of those who lived there. He turned the desert into pools of water
imn: laaix yiem wuov nyei mienh waaic haic. Ninh bun deic-bung-huaang benx wuom-domh,

eng: and the parched ground into flowing springs; there he brought the hungry to live,
imn: bun ndau-nqaai benx wuom-zingv. Ninh bun ngorc nyei mienh yiem wuov,

eng: and they founded a city where they could settle. They sowed fields and planted vineyards
imn: ninh mbuo yaac ceix norm zingh yiem. Ninh mbuo zoux ndeic zuangx ga'naaiv, zuangx a'ngunc biouv,

eng: that yielded a fruitful harvest; he blessed them, and their numbers greatly increased,
imn: yaac duqv bungx-zuoqc nyei siou. Ninh ceix fuqv bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx hiaangx camv,

eng: and he did not let their herds diminish. Then their numbers decreased, and they were humbled
imn: yaac maiv bun ninh mbuo nyei saeng-kuv zoqc njiec. Baeqc fingx zuqc zeix, zuqc kouv, zuqc nzauh,

eng: by oppression, calamity and sorrow; he who pours contempt on nobles
imn: ninh mbuo ziouc zoqc yaac ndortv njiec aiv nyei ziangh hoc, ninh bun zeix ninh nyei baeqc fingx wuov deix zoux hlo nyei mienh zuqc mangc piex,

eng: made them wander in a trackless waste. But he lifted the needy out of their affliction
imn: yaac bun ninh mbuo youh jienv mingh maiv maaih jauv nyei deic-bung-huaang. Mv baac ninh bouh mienh jomc mienh faaux hlaang,

eng: and increased their families like flocks. The upright see and rejoice,
imn: bun ninh mbuo leih ndutv kouv naanc, bun ninh mbuo nyei hmuangv doic hiaangx, hnangv yungh guanh nor camv. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh buatc ninh mbuo ziouc a'hneiv.

eng: but all the wicked shut their mouths. Let the one who is wise heed these things
imn: Zoux orqv nyei mienh nqapc jienv nzuih, maiv maaih waac gorngv aqv. Haaix dauh maaih cong-mengh oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx naaiv deix sic,

eng: and ponder the loving deeds of the Lord .
imn: yaac oix zuqc samx mangc Ziouv ziepc zuoqv hnamv mienh nyei jauv.

eng: My heart, O God, is steadfast; I will sing and make music with all my soul. Awake, harp and lyre!
imn: O Tin-Hungh aac, yie nyei hnyouv kaux wuonv, yie nyei hnyouv kaux wuonv. Yie oix baaux nzung, oix baaux nzung ceng meih. Yie nyei hnyouv aah! Nyie daaih maah! Domh daanh baah, fiuv-daanh baah aah! Nyie daaih maah!

eng: I will awaken the dawn. I will praise you, Lord , among the nations;
imn: Yie oix bun mba'hnoi nyie daaih. O Ziouv aac, yie oix yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx dor-ziec meih.

eng: I will sing of you among the peoples. For great is your love, higher than the heavens;
imn: Yie oix yiem maanc guoqv mbu'ndongx baaux nzung ceng meih. Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh gauh hlang jiex lungh.

eng: your faithfulness reaches to the skies. Be exalted, O God, above the heavens;
imn: Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv yaac mbaengc mbuonx hlang. O Tin-Hungh aac, tov bun mienh taaih meih gauh hlang jiex lungh.

eng: let your glory be over all the earth. Save us and help us with your right hand,
imn: Tov bun meih nyei njang-laangc yiem buangv lungh ndiev. Tov dau yie mbuo, longc meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz njoux yie mbuo,

eng: that those you love may be delivered. God has spoken from his sanctuary:
imn: weic bun meih hnamv nyei mienh duqv njoux. Tin-Hungh yiem ninh nyei singx dinc gorngv,

eng: “In triumph I will parcel out Shechem and measure off the Valley of Sukkoth. Gilead is mine, Manasseh is mine;
imn: “Yie oix a'hneiv nyei zorqv Sekem bun nqoi, yaac ndorqc Sukc^kotv Horngz paaiv bun nqoi. Gi^le^aatc se yie nyei, Maa^natv^se yaac yie nyei.

eng: Ephraim is my helmet, Judah is my scepter. Moab is my washbasin,
imn: E^faa^im se yie mborqv jaax nyei muoc. Yu^ndaa se yie nyei hungh biaav. Mo^apc se yie nyei nzaaux buoz-zaux bunh.

eng: on Edom I toss my sandal; over Philistia I shout in triumph.” Who will bring me to the fortified city?
imn: Yie yaac zoi yie nyei heh njiec E^ndom. Yie heuc jienv gorngv, ‘Fi^li^saa^die aah! Yie hingh jiex meih aqv.’+” Haaix dauh oix dorh yie mingh taux wuov norm weih wuonv nyei zingh?

eng: Who will lead me to Edom? Is it not you, God, you who have rejected us
imn: Haaix dauh oix dorh yie mingh taux E^ndom Deic-Bung? O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih maiv zeiz guangc yie mbuo fai?

eng: and no longer go out with our armies? Give us aid against the enemy,
imn: O Tin-Hungh aah! Meih maiv caux yie mbuo nyei jun-baeng cuotv mingh mborqv jaax fai? Tov meih tengx yie mbuo mborqv win-wangv,

eng: for human help is worthless. With God we will gain the victory,
imn: weic zuqc baamh mienh tengx se maiv lamh longc. Yie mbuo kaux Tin-Hungh yie mbuo ziouc duqv hingh jiex.

eng: and he will trample down our enemies.
imn: Se dongh ninh oix caaiv yie mbuo nyei win-wangv njiec.

eng: My God, whom I praise, do not remain silent, for people who are wicked and deceitful
imn: O yie ceng nyei Tin-Hungh aac, tov meih maiv dungx sekv-sekv nyei yiem, weic zuqc orqv mienh caux guv guaix nyei mienh gorngv yie.

eng: have opened their mouths against me; they have spoken against me with lying tongues. With words of hatred they surround me;
imn: Ninh mbuo longc gorngv-baeqc nyei waac hoic yie. Ninh mbuo weih gormx yie gorngv nzorng nyei waac

eng: they attack me without cause. In return for my friendship they accuse me,
imn: yaac mborqv yie mv baac maiv maaih gorn-baengx. Maiv gunv yie hnamv ninh mbuo

eng: but I am a man of prayer. They repay me evil for good,
imn: yaac weic ninh mbuo daux gaux, ninh mbuo gox yie. Yie zoux longx nyei ninh mbuo winh orqv nyei bun yie,

eng: and hatred for my friendship. Appoint someone evil to oppose my enemy;
imn: yie hnamv nyei ninh mbuo winh nzorng nyei. Tov paaiv dauh orqv mienh daaih caux ninh doix-dekc,

eng: let an accuser stand at his right hand. When he is tried, let him be found guilty,
imn: bun dauh ninh ganh nyei win-wangv gox ninh. Siemv nyei ziangh hoc, tov bun ninh zuqc dingc zuiz,

eng: and may his prayers condemn him. May his days be few;
imn: tov bun liemh ninh daux gaux nyei waac funx benx zuiz. Tov bun ninh nyei siouc nyuonh nangv,

eng: may another take his place of leadership. May his children be fatherless
imn: bun ganh dauh duqv ninh nyei weic. Tov bun ninh nyei fu'jueiv benx guh hanh fu'jueiv,

eng: and his wife a widow. May his children be wandering beggars;
imn: bun ninh nyei auv benx auv-guaav. Tov bun ninh nyei naamh nyouz benx njouh huaax mienh

eng: may they be driven from their ruined homes. May a creditor seize all he has;
imn: youh jienv mingh tov nyanc. Ninh mbuo yiem baaic waaic nyei dorngx, tov bun ninh mbuo zuqc zunc cuotv mingh. Tov bun zaeqv-ziouv daaih zorqv ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv,

eng: may strangers plunder the fruits of his labor. May no one extend kindness to him
imn: tov bun dongh ninh maiv hiuv nyei mienh daaih caangv ninh ndortv qaqv duqv daaih nyei ga'naaiv. Tov maiv dungx bun haaix dauh zoux longx bun ninh,

eng: or take pity on his fatherless children. May his descendants be cut off,
imn: yaac maiv dungx bun haaix dauh korv-lienh ninh nyei guh hanh fu'jueiv. Tov bun ninh nyei hoz doic zeiv-fun zutc nzengc.

eng: their names blotted out from the next generation. May the iniquity of his fathers be remembered before the Lord ;
imn: Tov bun ninh nyei mbuox zuqc sortv guangc, maiv bun da'nyeic doic mienh jangx ninh. Tov Ziouv jangx jienv ninh nyei ong-taaix mbuo zoux nyei zuiz.

eng: may the sin of his mother never be blotted out. May their sins always remain before the Lord ,
imn: Yaac maiv dungx sortv ninh nyei maa nyei zuiz guangc. Tov bun naaiv deix zuiz zanc-zanc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien,

eng: that he may blot out their name from the earth. For he never thought of doing a kindness,
imn: mv baac bun yiem naaiv lungh ndiev maiv maaih haaix dauh jangx duqv ninh nyei mbuox. Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz maiv hnamv taux zoux longx bun mienh,

eng: but hounded to death the poor and the needy and the brokenhearted. He loved to pronounce a curse—
imn: zungv zoux doqc hoic mienh jomc mienh, ndortv naanc mienh, caux hnyouv mun nyei mienh, bun ninh mbuo zuqc daic. Ninh oix zioux, tov bun ninh zioux nyei waac

eng: may it come back on him. He found no pleasure in blessing— may it be far from him. He wore cursing as his garment;
imn: ndortv zuqc ninh ganh. Ninh maiv oix buang waac bun mienh, tov bun fuqv leih ninh go. Ninh zorqv zioux nyei waac dorngx lui zuqv,

eng: it entered into his body like water, into his bones like oil. May it be like a cloak wrapped about him,
imn: tov bun naaiv deix waac saamx bieqc ninh nyei sin hnangv wuom, yaac hnangv hmei saamx bieqc ninh nyei mbungv. Tov bun zioux nyei waac hnangv domh lui buang jienv ninh,

eng: like a belt tied forever around him. May this be the Lord ’s payment to my accusers,
imn: yaac hnangv houx-hlaang zanc-zanc sai jienv ninh nyei jaaiv. Tov Ziouv bun gox yie caux gorngv doqc hoic yie nyei maengc wuov deix,

eng: to those who speak evil of me. But you, Sovereign Lord ,
imn: hnangv naaiv nor zuqc daaih weic benx ninh mbuo nyei zingh nyeic. Mv baac yie nyei Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac,

eng: help me for your name’s sake; out of the goodness of your love, deliver me. For I am poor and needy,
imn: tov weic meih nyei mengh zoux longx bun yie. Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh se longx haic, tov njoux yie. Weic zuqc yie jomc, ga'naanh haic,

eng: and my heart is wounded within me. I fade away like an evening shadow;
imn: yie nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz za'gengh mun haic aqv. Yie nyei maengc jiex jienv mingh hnangv lungh maanz-hmuangx nyei dongh linh nor,

eng: I am shaken off like a locust. My knees give way from fasting;
imn: yie hnangv norm jopv-nyeic zuqc nziaaux buonc mingh. Yie zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc cingh mborqc ziouc mau.

eng: my body is thin and gaunt. I am an object of scorn to my accusers;
imn: Yie nyei sin zaangc jaic jienv njiec. Gox yie wuov deix kungx huotv yie hnangv.

eng: when they see me, they shake their heads. Help me, Lord my God;
imn: Ninh mbuo buatc yie, ninh mbuo huangx m'nqorngv. O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov tengx yie.

eng: save me according to your unfailing love. Let them know that it is your hand,
imn: Ziux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh, tov njoux yie. Tov bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv naaiv se meih nyei buoz zoux nyei.

eng: that you, Lord , have done it. While they curse, may you bless;
imn: O Ziouv aac, naaiv se meih zoux nyei sic. Sueih ninh mbuo zioux, mv baac tov meih ceix fuqv.

eng: may those who attack me be put to shame, but may your servant rejoice. May my accusers be clothed with disgrace
imn: Tov bun jiez daaih oix mborqv yie wuov deix zuqc nyaiv, yaac tov bun yie, meih nyei bou, a'hneiv. Tov bun gox yie wuov deix zuqc buang hmien diev nyaiv,

eng: and wrapped in shame as in a cloak. With my mouth I will greatly extol the Lord ;
imn: bun ninh mbuo baaic hmien beiv hnangv buix domh lui-ndaauv nor. Yie oix longc yie nyei nzuih camv-camv nyei dor-ziec Ziouv.

eng: in the great throng of worshipers I will praise him. For he stands at the right hand of the needy,
imn: Yie oix yiem zuangx mienh camv nyei mbu'ndongx ceng ninh, weic zuqc ninh souv jienv mienh jomc mienh nyei mbiaauc maengx,

eng: to save their lives from those who would condemn them.
imn: weic njoux ninh mbuo biaux ndutv dingc bun ninh mbuo zuqc daix daic wuov deix.

eng: The Lord says to my lord: “Sit at my right hand until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet.” The Lord will extend your mighty scepter from Zion, saying,
imn: Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie nyei Ziouv, “Zueiz jienv yie nyei mbiaauc maengx bung, zuov yie bun meih nyei win-wangv zoux meih lorngx zaux nyei dorngx.” Ziouv oix yiem Si^on sung cuotv meih nyei domh qaqv nyei biaav,

eng: “Rule in the midst of your enemies!” Your troops will be willing
imn: bun meih yiem meih nyei win-wangv mbu'ndongx gunv. Meih dorh meih nyei jun-baeng mingh cing-nzengc mbong gu'nguaaic wuov hnoi,

eng: on your day of battle. Arrayed in holy splendor, your young men will come to you like dew from the morning’s womb. The Lord has sworn
imn: meih nyei baeqc fingx a'hneiv zorqv ganh fungx bun meih. Hnangv lungh ndorm nyei mbiungc-suiv meih nyei mienh lunx mienh oix daaih lorz meih. Ziouv laengz ngaengc waac gorngv,

eng: and will not change his mind: “You are a priest forever, in the order of Melchizedek.” The Lord is at your right hand ;
imn: nqa'haav zungv maiv tiuv hnyouv, “Meih yietc liuz zoux sai mienh hnangv Men^ki^se^ndekc wuov nyungc sai mienh nor.” Ziouv yiem meih nyei mbiaauc maengx.

eng: he will crush kings on the day of his wrath. He will judge the nations, heaping up the dead
imn: Taux ninh qiex jiez wuov hnoi, ninh oix mborqv baaic zuangx hungh. Ninh oix dingc maanc guoqv mienh nyei zuiz,

eng: and crushing the rulers of the whole earth. He will drink from a brook along the way,
imn: oix bun janx-daic nyei sei buangv nzengc naaiv deix guoqv. Ninh oix mborqv baaic ndau-beih norm-norm guoqv nyei hungh diex. Ninh oix hopv jauv-hlen nyei ndoqv nyei wuom,

eng: and so he will lift his head high.
imn: ninh ziouc cau jiez m'nqorngv.

eng: Praise the Lord . I will extol the Lord with all my heart in the council of the upright and in the assembly. Great are the works of the Lord ;
imn: Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Yie oix yiem hnyouv zingx nyei mienh gapv zunv nyei mbu'ndongx longc nzengc hnyouv dor-ziec Ziouv. Ziouv zoux nyei sic za'gengh hlo haic,

eng: they are pondered by all who delight in them. Glorious and majestic are his deeds,
imn: da'faanh a'hneiv nyei mienh longc hnyouv zaah. Ninh zoux nyei sic maaih njang-laangc, maaih haangh daauh buangv nzengc.

eng: and his righteousness endures forever. He has caused his wonders to be remembered;
imn: Ninh zoux horpc nyei jauv yietc liuz yiem. Ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic bun mienh jangx,

eng: the Lord is gracious and compassionate. He provides food for those who fear him;
imn: Ziouv ceix en yaac korv-lienh mienh. Ninh ceix nyanc hopv bun taaih ninh wuov deix.

eng: he remembers his covenant forever. He has shown his people the power of his works,
imn: Ninh yietc liuz jangx ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Ninh bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx buatc ninh longc domh qaqv zoux nyei jauv,

eng: giving them the lands of other nations. The works of his hands are faithful and just;
imn: ninh zorqv ziex fingx nyei guoqv jiu bun ninh mbuo benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc. Ninh nyei buoz zoux nyei gong se ziepc zuoqv baengh fim nyei,

eng: all his precepts are trustworthy. They are established for ever and ever,
imn: ninh hatc nyei yietc zungv waac kaux duqv wuonv nyei. Naaiv deix hatc nyei waac liepc daaih wuonv taux yietc liuz,

eng: enacted in faithfulness and uprightness. He provided redemption for his people;
imn: yaac ziepc zuoqv, hnyouv zingx nyei zoux. Ninh zuoqc ninh nyei baeqc fingx

eng: he ordained his covenant forever— holy and awesome is his name. The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom;
imn: yaac liepc ninh nyei ngaengc waac taux yietc liuz. Ninh nyei mengh se cing-nzengc, bun mienh gamh nziex nyei. Taaih Ziouv zoux gorn bun mienh maaih cong-mengh.

eng: all who follow his precepts have good understanding. To him belongs eternal praise.
imn: Da'faanh ei jienv ninh nyei lingc wuov deix haih mengh baeqc longx. Oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng ninh.

eng: Praise the Lord . Blessed are those who fear the Lord , who find great delight in his commands. Their children will be mighty in the land;
imn: Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Taaih Ziouv nyei mienh, se za'gengh a'hneiv muangx ninh nyei lingc wuov deix, maaih orn-lorqc. Ninh nyei hoz doic yiem deic-bung zungv oix henv,

eng: the generation of the upright will be blessed. Wealth and riches are in their houses,
imn: hnyouv zingx mienh nyei hoz doic oix duqv fuqv. Ninh nyei biauv zong butv zoih, benx haic,

eng: and their righteousness endures forever. Even in darkness light dawns for the upright,
imn: ninh zoux horpc nyei jauv yietc liuz yiem. Kuv mienh yiem hmuangx gu'nyuoz maaih njang cuotv daaih.

eng: for those who are gracious and compassionate and righteous. Good will come to those who are generous and lend freely,
imn: Ziouv ceix en, maaih hnyouv korv-lienh mienh, yaac maaih gong-fim. Zoux hnyouv jangv gaav ga'naaiv bun mienh wuov dauh duqv longx,

eng: who conduct their affairs with justice. Surely the righteous will never be shaken;
imn: ninh zoux nyei jauv yietc zungv baengh fim nyei. Weic zuqc kuv mienh yietc liuz maiv zuqc ndanc dongz,

eng: they will be remembered forever. They will have no fear of bad news;
imn: mienh yietc liuz oix jangx ninh. Ninh maiv gamh nziex ciouv nyei fienx,

eng: their hearts are steadfast, trusting in the Lord . Their hearts are secure, they will have no fear;
imn: ninh bungx dingc hnyouv wuonv nyei kaux Ziouv. Ninh zunv dingc hnyouv, maiv gamh nziex.

eng: in the end they will look in triumph on their foes. They have freely scattered their gifts to the poor,
imn: Zuov taux buatc ninh nyei win-wangv zuqc suei nzengc. Ninh zoux hnyouv jangv tengx mienh jomc mienh.

eng: their righteousness endures forever; their horn will be lifted high in honor. The wicked will see and be vexed,
imn: Ninh zoux horpc nyei jauv yietc liuz yiem, ninh ziouc henv yaac duqv mienh taaih. Orqv mienh buatc hnangv naaic ziouc qiex jiez,

eng: they will gnash their teeth and waste away; the longings of the wicked will come to nothing.
imn: ngaatc jienv nyaah yaac baaic jienv njiec. Orqv mienh hnamv oix duqv nyei, ziang naaic baac mi'aqv.

eng: Praise the Lord . Praise the Lord , you his servants; praise the name of the Lord . Let the name of the Lord be praised,
imn: Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. O Ziouv nyei zuangx bou aah! Oix zuqc ceng, oix zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei mengh. Yiem naaiv mingh oix zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei mbuox taux yietc liuz.

eng: both now and forevermore. From the rising of the sun to the place where it sets,
imn: Yiem mba'hnoi cuotv taux mba'hnoi muotv nyei dorngx

eng: the name of the Lord is to be praised. The Lord is exalted over all the nations,
imn: horpc zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei mengh. Ziouv yiem gauh hlang jiex maanc fingx,

eng: his glory above the heavens. Who is like the Lord our God,
imn: ninh nyei njang-laangc gauh hlang jiex lungh. Maiv maaih haaix dauh hnangv Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh,

eng: the One who sits enthroned on high, who stoops down to look
imn: dongh zueiz jienv gauh hlang jiex nyei dorngx wuov dauh. Ninh mangc njiec aiv nyei dorngx,

eng: on the heavens and the earth? He raises the poor from the dust
imn: mangc lungh caux ga'ndiev ndau. Ninh bouh mienh jomc mienh cuotv nie-mbung,

eng: and lifts the needy from the ash heap; he seats them with princes,
imn: aengx bouh dangx-donx nyei mienh cuotv saaiv-ndui, bun ninh mbuo caux zoux hlo nyei mienh yiem,

eng: with the princes of his people. He settles the childless woman in her home
imn: se caux ninh nyei baeqc fingx zoux hlo nyei mienh. Ninh bun maiv haih maaih gu'nguaaz nyei m'sieqv dorn duqv biauv yiem,

eng: as a happy mother of children. Praise the Lord .
imn: bun ninh duqv fu'jueiv ziouc orn-lorqc. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: When Israel came out of Egypt, Jacob from a people of foreign tongue, Judah became God’s sanctuary,
imn: I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem I^yipv cuotv wuov zanc, se Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun leih nqoi gorngv ganh nyungc waac nyei fingx, Yu^ndaa benx Tin-Hungh nyei singx dinc,

eng: Israel his dominion. The sea looked and fled,
imn: I^saa^laa^en benx ninh gunv nyei guoqv. Koiv mangc buatc liuz ziouc biaux,

eng: the Jordan turned back; the mountains leaped like rams,
imn: Jor^ndaen Ndaaih yaac liouc daaux nqaang. Zuangx mbong biu hnangv ba'gi yungh gouv nor,

eng: the hills like lambs. Why was it, sea, that you fled?
imn: mbong-aiv tiux hnangv ba'gi yungh dorn. O koiv aac, meih weic haaix diuc biaux?

eng: Why, Jordan, did you turn back? Why, mountains, did you leap like rams,
imn: O Jor^ndaen Ndaaih aac, meih weic haaix diuc liouc daaux nqaang? Domh mbong aac, meih weic haaix diuc biu hnangv ba'gi yungh gouv?

eng: you hills, like lambs? Tremble, earth, at the presence of the Lord,
imn: Fiuv-mbong aac, meih weic haaix diuc tiux hnangv ba'gi yungh dorn? Ndau-beih aac, oix zuqc yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien dongz,

eng: at the presence of the God of Jacob, who turned the rock into a pool,
imn: se dorng jienv Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh, dongh bun la'bieiv tiuv benx wuom-domh,

eng: the hard rock into springs of water.
imn: bun la'bieiv-mbaengx tiuv benx wuom-zingv wuov dauh.

eng: Not to us, Lord , not to us but to your name be the glory, because of your love and faithfulness. Why do the nations say,
imn: O Ziouv aac, njang-laangc maiv zeiz bun yie mbuo, maiv zeiz bun yie mbuo, se oix zuqc bun meih ganh nyei mengh duqv njang-laangc, weic zuqc meih za'gengh hnamv mienh yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux. Maanc fingx mienh weic haaix diuc oix gorngv,

eng: “Where is their God?” Our God is in heaven;
imn: “Ninh mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh yiem haaix?” Yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh yiem gu'nguaaic lungh,

eng: he does whatever pleases him. But their idols are silver and gold,
imn: ziux ninh buatc horpc nyei ninh ziouc zoux. Ninh mbuo nyei miuc-fangx longc jiem longc nyaanh zoux daaih.

eng: made by human hands. They have mouths, but cannot speak,
imn: Se mienh nyei buoz zoux cuotv daaih nyei. Naaiv deix miuc-fangx maaih nzuih mv baac maiv haih gorngv waac,

eng: eyes, but cannot see. They have ears, but cannot hear,
imn: maaih m'zing mv baac mangc maiv buatc, maaih m'normh mv baac muangx maiv haiz,

eng: noses, but cannot smell. They have hands, but cannot feel,
imn: maaih mba'zorng mv baac maiv haih hnomv, maaih buoz mv baac maiv haih hluo,

eng: feet, but cannot walk, nor can they utter a sound with their throats. Those who make them will be like them,
imn: maaih zaux mv baac maiv haih yangh jauv. Ninh mbuo nyei jaang-hoh yaac maiv haih cuotv qiex mbui. Zoux naaiv deix miuc-fangx nyei mienh ziouc hnangv naaiv deix miuc-fangx nor.

eng: and so will all who trust in them. All you Israelites, trust in the Lord —
imn: Da'faanh kaux miuc-fangx nyei mienh yaac fih hnangv nyei. O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac, oix zuqc kaux Ziouv.

eng: he is their help and shield. House of Aaron, trust in the Lord —
imn: Ninh tengx ninh mbuo yaac zoux ninh mbuo nyei torngv-baaih. O Aalon nyei zeiv-fun aac, oix zuqc kaux Ziouv.

eng: he is their help and shield. You who fear him, trust in the Lord —
imn: Ninh tengx ninh mbuo yaac zoux ninh mbuo nyei torngv-baaih. Taaih Ziouv nyei zuangx mienh aah! Oix zuqc kaux Ziouv.

eng: he is their help and shield. The Lord remembers us and will bless us:
imn: Ninh tengx ninh mbuo yaac zoux ninh mbuo nyei torngv-baaih. Ziouv jangx yie mbuo. Ninh oix ceix fuqv bun yie mbuo.

eng: He will bless his people Israel, he will bless the house of Aaron, he will bless those who fear the Lord —
imn: Ninh oix ceix fuqv bun I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun. Ninh oix ceix fuqv bun Aalon nyei zeiv-fun. Ninh oix ceix fuqv bun taaih Ziouv nyei zuangx mienh,

eng: small and great alike. May the Lord cause you to flourish,
imn: liemh zoux hlo zoux faix. Tov Ziouv bun meih mbuo caux meih mbuo nyei zeiv-fun

eng: both you and your children. May you be blessed by the Lord ,
imn: jaa hiaangx jienv faaux. Tov bun meih mbuo duqv Ziouv nyei fuqv,

eng: the Maker of heaven and earth. The highest heavens belong to the Lord ,
imn: se Zeix Lungh Zeix Ndau Wuov Dauh nyei fuqv. Lungh se Ziouv nyei lungh,

eng: but the earth he has given to mankind. It is not the dead who praise the Lord ,
imn: mv baac ndau ninh ceix bun baamh mienh. Daic mingh nyei mienh maiv ceng Ziouv,

eng: those who go down to the place of silence; it is we who extol the Lord ,
imn: njiec taux sekv nzieqc nyei dorngx wuov deix yaac maiv ceng. Mv baac yie mbuo oix ceng Ziouv

eng: both now and forevermore. Praise the Lord .
imn: yiem naaiv mingh taux yietc liuz. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: I love the Lord , for he heard my voice; he heard my cry for mercy. Because he turned his ear to me,
imn: Yie hnamv Ziouv weic zuqc ninh muangx yie nyei qiex caux yie jouh nyei waac. Ninh baeng m'normh muangx yie,

eng: I will call on him as long as I live. The cords of death entangled me,
imn: yie ziouc yietc seix jouh ninh. Zuqc daic nyei hlaang zaeng weih gormx yie.

eng: the anguish of the grave came over me; I was overcome by distress and sorrow. Then I called on the name of the Lord :
imn: Yiemh gen zuqc kouv nyei jauv zorqv jienv yie. Yie buangh zuqc domh naanc zingh, zuqc nzauh kouv. Wuov zanc yie heuc Ziouv nyei mbuox,

eng: “ Lord , save me!” The Lord is gracious and righteous;
imn: “O Ziouv aac, tov meih njoux cuotv yie nyei maengc.” Ziouv maaih en-zingh yaac baengh fim nyei.

eng: our God is full of compassion. The Lord protects the unwary;
imn: Yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh maaih hnyouv korv-lienh mienh. Ziouv beu jienv maiv hiuv camv nyei mienh.

eng: when I was brought low, he saved me. Return to your rest, my soul,
imn: Yie zuqc kouv haic nyei ziangh hoc ninh njoux yie. O yie nyei hnyouv aac, meih oix zuqc aengx baengh orn aqv,

eng: for the Lord has been good to you. For you, Lord , have delivered me from death,
imn: weic zuqc Ziouv za'gengh zoux longx bun meih. Ziouv aac, meih njoux yie maiv zuqc daic,

eng: my eyes from tears, my feet from stumbling, that I may walk before the Lord
imn: bun yie nyei m'zing maiv liouc wuom-mueic, bun yie nyei zaux yaac maiv ndiqv zuqc ndorpc. Yie yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien,

eng: in the land of the living. I trusted in the Lord when I said,
imn: yangh ziangh jienv nyei mienh nyei jauv. Yie corc sienx maiv gunv yie gorngv,

eng: “I am greatly afflicted”; in my alarm I said,
imn: “Yie zuqc domh naanc zingh.” Yie hnyouv lunc jienv nyei ziangh hoc yie gorngv,

eng: “Everyone is a liar.” What shall I return to the Lord
imn: “Zuangx mienh kungx gorngv-baeqc hnangv.” Yie haih zorqv haaix nyungc winh bun Ziouv

eng: for all his goodness to me? I will lift up the cup of salvation
imn: weic ninh ceix nyei yietc zungv en? Yie bouh jiez njoux en nyei zaanv,

eng: and call on the name of the Lord . I will fulfill my vows to the Lord
imn: yaac heuc jienv Ziouv nyei mbuox. Yie oix yiem ninh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx nyei nza'hmien

eng: in the presence of all his people. Precious in the sight of the Lord
imn: jaauv sung yie caux Ziouv laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Ziux Ziouv mangc,

eng: is the death of his faithful servants. Truly I am your servant, Lord ;
imn: ninh nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx daic se weih jaaix. O Ziouv aac, yie se meih nyei bou,

eng: I serve you just as my mother did; you have freed me from my chains. I will sacrifice a thank offering to you
imn: yie se meih nyei bou, meih nyei m'sieqv bou nyei dorn. Meih jaiv nqoi ndoh yie nyei limc. Yie oix dor-ziec weic fongc horc ziec bun meih,

eng: and call on the name of the Lord . I will fulfill my vows to the Lord
imn: yaac oix heuc jienv gorngv Ziouv nyei mbuox. Yie oix yiem ninh nyei zuangx baeqc fingx nyei nza'hmien

eng: in the presence of all his people, in the courts of the house of the Lord —
imn: jaauv sung yie caux Ziouv laengz nyei ngaengc waac, se yiem zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv, laatc gu'nyuoz,

eng: in your midst, Jerusalem. Praise the Lord .
imn: Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh mbu'ndongx. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: Praise the Lord , all you nations; extol him, all you peoples. For great is his love toward us,
imn: Maanc guoqv mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Maanc fingx mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng ninh. Ziouv ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mbuo camv nyei,

eng: and the faithfulness of the Lord endures forever. Praise the Lord .
imn: ninh yaac ziepc zuoqv taux yietc liuz. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: Give thanks to the Lord , for he is good; his love endures forever. Let Israel say:
imn: Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh longx haic. Ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh gorngv,

eng: “His love endures forever.” Let the house of Aaron say:
imn: “Ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.” Bun Aalon nyei zeiv-fun gorngv,

eng: “His love endures forever.” Let those who fear the Lord say:
imn: “Ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.” Bun yietc zungv taaih Ziouv nyei mienh gorngv,

eng: “His love endures forever.” When hard pressed, I cried to the Lord ;
imn: “Ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.” Zuqc kouv naanc wuov zanc yie heuc Ziouv.

eng: he brought me into a spacious place. The Lord is with me; I will not be afraid.
imn: Ziouv dau yie yaac bungx nqoi yie. Maaih Ziouv tengx yie, yie ziouc maiv gamh nziex.

eng: What can mere mortals do to me? The Lord is with me; he is my helper.
imn: Baamh mienh haih zoux haaix nyungc bun yie? Ziouv caux yie yiem yaac tengx yie,

eng: I look in triumph on my enemies. It is better to take refuge in the Lord
imn: yie ziouc mangc buatc nzorng yie wuov deix win-wangv zuqc suei. Ndaauh kaux Ziouv se gauh longx

eng: than to trust in humans. It is better to take refuge in the Lord
imn: kaux baamh mienh. Ndaauh kaux Ziouv se gauh longx

eng: than to trust in princes. All the nations surrounded me,
imn: kaux zoux hlo nyei mienh. Maanc guoqv nyei mienh weih gormx yie.

eng: but in the name of the Lord I cut them down. They surrounded me on every side,
imn: Yie dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox mietc ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo weih gormx yie, feix bung weih gormx yie.

eng: but in the name of the Lord I cut them down. They swarmed around me like bees,
imn: Yie dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox mietc ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo hnangv mueiz nor, weih gormx yie.

eng: but they were consumed as quickly as burning thorns; in the name of the Lord I cut them down. I was pushed back and about to fall,
imn: Ninh mbuo hnangv buov njimv-lomc nyei douz daic siepv. Yie dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox mietc ninh mbuo. Yie zuqc ninh mbuo fongv seix nyei, bun yie kaav deix ndorpc,

eng: but the Lord helped me. The Lord is my strength and my defense ;
imn: mv baac Ziouv tengx yie. Ziouv se yie nyei qaqv caux yie nyei nzung,

eng: he has become my salvation. Shouts of joy and victory
imn: ninh benx yie nyei njoux en. Muangx maah! Yiem kuv mienh nyei ndopv-liuh

eng: resound in the tents of the righteous: “The Lord ’s right hand has done mighty things! The Lord ’s right hand is lifted high;
imn: maaih njien-youh caux hingh jiex nyei qiex aengv cuotv gorngv, “ Ziouv nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz tengx hingh jiex. Ziouv sung ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz faaux hlang.

eng: the Lord ’s right hand has done mighty things!” I will not die but live,
imn: Ziouv sung ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz tengx hingh jiex.” Yie ziouc maiv daic mv baac duqv ziangh jienv

eng: and will proclaim what the Lord has done. The Lord has chastened me severely,
imn: yaac zunh Ziouv zoux nyei sic. Ziouv dingc yie nyei zuiz hniev nyei

eng: but he has not given me over to death. Open for me the gates of the righteous;
imn: mv baac maiv bun yie zuqc daic. Tengx yie koi nqoi zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei gaengh

eng: I will enter and give thanks to the Lord . This is the gate of the Lord
imn: weic bun yie haih bieqc mingh dor-ziec Ziouv. Naaiv se Ziouv nyei gaengh.

eng: through which the righteous may enter. I will give you thanks, for you answered me;
imn: Kuv mienh duqv yangh naaiv bieqc. Yie dor-ziec meih weic zuqc meih dau yie.

eng: you have become my salvation. The stone the builders rejected
imn: Yaac benx yie nyei njoux en. Gomv biauv zaangc nqemh cuotv wuov norm la'bieiv,

eng: has become the cornerstone; the Lord has done this,
imn: zungv benx an biauv-gorqv gauh longc jienv jiex wuov norm. Naaiv se Ziouv zoux nyei sic.

eng: and it is marvelous in our eyes. The Lord has done it this very day;
imn: Ziux yie mbuo nyei m'zing mangc, yie mbuo buatc mbuoqc horngh haic. Naaiv se Ziouv liepc daaih nyei hnoi.

eng: let us rejoice today and be glad. Lord , save us!
imn: Yie mbuo oix zuqc yiem naaiv norm hnoi njien-youh, a'hneiv. O Ziouv aah! Njoux yie mbuo maah!

eng: Lord , grant us success! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord .
imn: O Ziouv aah! Tov tengx yie mbuo haih zoux duqv ziangx nyei. Tov ceix fuqv bun dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox bieqc daaih nyei mienh.

eng: From the house of the Lord we bless you. The Lord is God,
imn: Yie mbuo yiem Ziouv nyei biauv tov Ziouv ceix fuqv bun meih mbuo. Ziouv se dongh Tin-Hungh.

eng: and he has made his light shine on us. With boughs in hand, join in the festal procession up to the horns of the altar. You are my God, and I will praise you;
imn: Ninh yaac ceix njang bun yie mbuo. Longc hlaang ndoh jienv fongc horc ziec weic jiex zipv nyei saeng-kuv yaac dorh mingh taux ziec-dorngh nyei jorng. Meih zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh. Yie oix dor-ziec meih.

eng: you are my God, and I will exalt you. Give thanks to the Lord , for he is good;
imn: Meih zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh. Yie oix taaih meih weih hlo. Oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh longx haic.

eng: his love endures forever.
imn: Ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.

eng: Blessed are those whose ways are blameless, who walk according to the law of the Lord . Blessed are those who keep his statutes
imn: Da'faanh ninh mbuo zoux nyei jauv maiv maaih dorngx nqemh, se gan Ziouv nyei leiz-latc yangh wuov deix, maaih orn-lorqc. Gan longx ninh gorngv nyei waac,

eng: and seek him with all their heart— they do no wrong
imn: se longc nzengc hnyouv lorz ninh wuov deix, maaih orn-lorqc. Naaiv nyungc mienh maiv zoux dorngc haaix nyungc,

eng: but follow his ways. You have laid down precepts
imn: ninh mbuo kungx yangh Ziouv nyei jauv hnangv. Meih zorqv meih hatc nyei waac

eng: that are to be fully obeyed. Oh, that my ways were steadfast
imn: paaiv bun yie mbuo jienh ei jienv zoux. Tov bun yie nyei jauv wuonv,

eng: in obeying your decrees! Then I would not be put to shame
imn: haih gan longx meih nyei leiz-nyeic. Yie nyei m'zing mangc jienv meih nyei yietc zungv lingc,

eng: when I consider all your commands. I will praise you with an upright heart
imn: yie ziouc maiv zuqc nyaiv. Yie hoqc liuz meih baengh fim nyei leiz,

eng: as I learn your righteous laws. I will obey your decrees;
imn: yie ziouc longc cing-nzengc hnyouv ceng meih. Yie oix gan meih nyei leiz-nyeic.

eng: do not utterly forsake me. How can a young person stay on the path of purity?
imn: Tov yietc liuz maiv dungx guangc ziangh yie. Mbetc Houh saeng mienh oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor goux duqv ninh ganh nyei jauv cing-nzengc?

eng: By living according to your word. I seek you with all my heart;
imn: Se oix zuqc ei jienv meih nyei waac zoux. Yie longc nzengc hnyouv lorz meih.

eng: do not let me stray from your commands. I have hidden your word in my heart
imn: Tov bun yie maiv dungx leih nqoi meih nyei lingc. Yie zorqv meih nyei waac zaangh jienv yie nyei hnyouv,

eng: that I might not sin against you. Praise be to you, Lord ;
imn: weic bun yie maiv baamz zuiz dorngc meih. O Ziouv aac, yie ceng meih.

eng: teach me your decrees. With my lips I recount
imn: Tov njaaux meih nyei leiz-nyeic yie. Yie oix longc yie nyei nzuih meix zunh yaangh

eng: all the laws that come from your mouth. I rejoice in following your statutes
imn: meih nyei nzuih gorngv nyei yietc zungv leiz. Yie a'hneiv meih gorngv nyei waac

eng: as one rejoices in great riches. I meditate on your precepts
imn: ndongc a'hneiv yietc zungv zinh zoih. Yie oix fei-fangv meih hatc nyei waac

eng: and consider your ways. I delight in your decrees;
imn: yaac mangc dingc meih nyei jauv-louc. Yie a'hneiv meih nyei leiz-nyeic,

eng: I will not neglect your word. Be good to your servant while I live,
imn: yie maiv haih la'kuqv meih nyei waac. Nqi^men Tov zoux longx bun meih nyei bou,

eng: that I may obey your word. Open my eyes that I may see
imn: weic bun yie duqv ziangh jienv yaac gan meih nyei waac. Tov bun yie nyei m'zing mangc duqv cuotv

eng: wonderful things in your law. I am a stranger on earth;
imn: yiem meih nyei leiz-latc mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Yie yiem lungh ndiev zoux dingh zepv dangh baav nyei mienh,

eng: do not hide your commands from me. My soul is consumed with longing
imn: tov maiv dungx zorqv meih nyei lingc bingx yie. Yie gengh! jorm hnyouv zanc-zanc jangx meih nyei leiz,

eng: for your laws at all times. You rebuke the arrogant, who are accursed,
imn: taux mba'nziu zungv oix mbaaix nyei. Meih hemx ceng ganh hlo, se zuqc zioux nyei mienh,

eng: those who stray from your commands. Remove from me their scorn and contempt,
imn: dongh yangh pien, leih meih nyei lingc wuov deix. Tov zorqv guangc yie zuqc nyaiv zuqc mienh mangc piex nyei sic,

eng: for I keep your statutes. Though rulers sit together and slander me,
imn: weic zuqc yie gan longx meih nyei waac. Maiv gunv zoux hlo nyei mienh zueiz jienv caangh laangh hoic yie,

eng: your servant will meditate on your decrees. Your statutes are my delight;
imn: meih nyei bou fei-fangv meih nyei leiz-nyeic. Meih njaaux nyei yietc zungv waac bun yie a'hneiv,

eng: they are my counselors. I am laid low in the dust;
