imn: yaac zoux yie caangh laangh nyei mienh. Ndaa^letv Yie nyei maengc se hnangv zuqc njiec taux nie-mbung.

eng: preserve my life according to your word. I gave an account of my ways and you answered me;
imn: Tov ziux meih nyei waac tengx yie nyei maengc aengx fingv jiez daaih. Yie gorngv yie zoux nyei jauv, meih yaac dau yie.

eng: teach me your decrees. Cause me to understand the way of your precepts,
imn: Tov zorqv meih nyei leiz-nyeic njaaux yie. Tov meih tengx yie mengh baeqc meih hatc nyei waac,

eng: that I may meditate on your wonderful deeds. My soul is weary with sorrow;
imn: yie ziouc fei-fangv meih zoux nyei mbuoqc horngh sic. Yie nyei hnyouv nzauh duqv kouv hnangv yuqc nzengc nor,

eng: strengthen me according to your word. Keep me from deceitful ways;
imn: tov ziux meih nyei waac tengx yie henv jiez daaih. Tov meih bun yie leih nqoi jaav nyei jauv

eng: be gracious to me and teach me your law. I have chosen the way of faithfulness;
imn: yaac nqoi eix njaaux meih nyei leiz-latc yie. Yie ginv ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv yangh.

eng: I have set my heart on your laws. I hold fast to your statutes, Lord ;
imn: Yie zorqv meih nyei leiz an jienv yie nyei nza'hmien. O Ziouv aac, yie kaux wuonv meih njaaux nyei waac,

eng: do not let me be put to shame. I run in the path of your commands,
imn: tov maiv dungx bun yie zuqc nyaiv. Yie oix tiux gan jienv meih nyei lingc nyei jauv,

eng: for you have broadened my understanding. Teach me, Lord , the way of your decrees,
imn: weic zuqc meih bun yie bieqc hnyouv camv jienv faaux. He O Ziouv aac, tov njaaux yie gan meih nyei leiz-nyeic,

eng: that I may follow it to the end. Give me understanding, so that I may keep your law
imn: yie ziouc gan meih taux daauh taux mueiz. Tov bun yie mengh baeqc weic bun yie haih gan meih nyei leiz-latc,

eng: and obey it with all my heart. Direct me in the path of your commands,
imn: yaac longc nzengc hnyouv ei jienv zoux. Tov dorh yie gan meih nyei lingc nyei jauv,

eng: for there I find delight. Turn my heart toward your statutes
imn: weic zuqc naaiv diuh jauv yie a'hneiv haic. Tov bun yie maaih hnyouv oix longc meih njaaux nyei waac,

eng: and not toward selfish gain. Turn my eyes away from worthless things;
imn: maiv zeiz kungx douh leic zinh. Tov maiv dungx bun yie huin mangc maiv lamh longc nyei sic.

eng: preserve my life according to your word. Fulfill your promise to your servant,
imn: Tov bun yie yiem meih nyei jauv duqv ziangh maengc. Tov meih ei jienv meih laengz nyei waac zoux weic yie, meih nyei bou,

eng: so that you may be feared. Take away the disgrace I dread,
imn: se weic taaih meih wuov deix laengz nyei waac. Tov tengx yie leih nqoi gamh nziex zuqc nyaiv nyei sic,

eng: for your laws are good. How I long for your precepts!
imn: weic zuqc meih nyei leiz se longx haic. Yie ngorc meih hatc nyei waac.

eng: In your righteousness preserve my life. May your unfailing love come to me, Lord ,
imn: Weic zuqc meih baengh fim nyei, tov bun yie duqv ziangh jienv. Waau O Ziouv aac, tov bun cing meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie,

eng: your salvation, according to your promise; then I can answer anyone who taunts me,
imn: tov ziux meih laengz nyei waac njoux yie. Yie ziouc maaih waac dau huotv yie wuov deix mienh,

eng: for I trust in your word. Never take your word of truth from my mouth,
imn: weic zuqc yie kaux meih nyei waac. Tov meih maiv dungx zorqv zien leiz nyei waac cuotv nzengc yie nyei nzuih,

eng: for I have put my hope in your laws. I will always obey your law,
imn: weic zuqc meih nyei leiz bun yie maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. Yie oix zanc-zanc ei jienv meih nyei leiz-latc

eng: for ever and ever. I will walk about in freedom,
imn: taux yietc liuz yietc seix. Yie ziouc yangh bungx nqoi nyei jauv,

eng: for I have sought out your precepts. I will speak of your statutes before kings
imn: weic zuqc yie ei jienv meih hatc nyei waac. Yie oix yiem hungh diex nyei nza'hmien gorngv meih hatc nyei waac,

eng: and will not be put to shame, for I delight in your commands
imn: yie zungv maiv zuqc nyaiv, weic zuqc yie a'hneiv meih nyei lingc,

eng: because I love them. I reach out for your commands, which I love,
imn: se dongh yie hnamv nyei. Yie taaih meih nyei lingc,

eng: that I may meditate on your decrees. Remember your word to your servant,
imn: se dongh yie hnamv nyei, yie yaac fei-fangv meih nyei leiz-nyeic. Zaa^yin Jangx jienv meih caux meih nyei bou laengz nyei waac,

eng: for you have given me hope. My comfort in my suffering is this:
imn: weic zuqc meih nyei waac bun yie maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. Meih laengz nyei waac bun yie maaih maengc ziangh,

eng: Your promise preserves my life. The arrogant mock me unmercifully,
imn: yie zuqc naanc zingh nyei ziangh hoc ziouc orn yie nyei hnyouv. Zoux maux nyei mienh maiv dingh liouh nyei huotv yie,

eng: but I do not turn from your law. I remember, Lord , your ancient laws,
imn: mv baac yie maiv leih nqoi meih nyei leiz-latc. O Ziouv aac, yie jangx duqv meih loz-hnoi bun daaih nyei leiz,

eng: and I find comfort in them. Indignation grips me because of the wicked,
imn: ziouc orn yie nyei hnyouv. Yie buatc mienh waaic mienh guangc meih nyei leiz-latc,

eng: who have forsaken your law. Your decrees are the theme of my song
imn: yie qiex jiez haic hnangv oix njopc douz nor. Yie yiem lungh ndiev dingh zepv nyei dorngx,

eng: wherever I lodge. In the night, Lord , I remember your name,
imn: meih nyei leiz-nyeic benx yie nyei nzung. O Ziouv aac, yie lungh muonz zanc jangx meih nyei mengh,

eng: that I may keep your law. This has been my practice:
imn: yaac ei jienv meih nyei leiz-latc. Yie ei jienv meih hatc nyei waac zoux.

eng: I obey your precepts. You are my portion, Lord ;
imn: Naaiv se yie nyei orn-lorqc. Hetc Ziouv benx yie nyei buonc,

eng: I have promised to obey your words. I have sought your face with all my heart;
imn: yie laengz ei jienv meih nyei waac. Yie longc nzengc hnyouv tov meih

eng: be gracious to me according to your promise. I have considered my ways
imn: ziux meih laengz nyei waac korv-lienh yie. Yie hnamv taux yie yangh nyei diuc-diuc jauv,

eng: and have turned my steps to your statutes. I will hasten and not delay
imn: yie ziouc huin nzuonx daaih lorz meih njaaux nyei yietc zungv waac. Yie siepv-siepv nyei gan meih nyei lingc,

eng: to obey your commands. Though the wicked bind me with ropes,
imn: zungv maiv ngaih. Maiv gunv orqv mienh zaeng hlaang ndoh yie,

eng: I will not forget your law. At midnight I rise to give you thanks
imn: yie zungv maiv la'kuqv meih nyei leiz-latc. Ndaamv muonz yie jiez sin daaih ceng meih,

eng: for your righteous laws. I am a friend to all who fear you,
imn: weic meih baengh fim nyei leiz. Da'faanh taaih meih, ei jienv meih hatc nyei waac zoux wuov deix,

eng: to all who follow your precepts. The earth is filled with your love, Lord ;
imn: yie caux ninh mbuo zoux doic. O Ziouv aac, meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv lungh ndiev mienh,

eng: teach me your decrees. Do good to your servant
imn: tov njaaux meih nyei leiz-nyeic yie. Tetc O Ziouv aac, meih ziux meih nyei waac

eng: according to your word, Lord . Teach me knowledge and good judgment,
imn: zoux longx bun meih nyei bou. Tov ceix bun yie maaih cong-mengh caux wuonh zaang,

eng: for I trust your commands. Before I was afflicted I went astray,
imn: weic zuqc yie sienx meih nyei lingc. Yie maiv gaengh zuqc kouv wuov zanc, yie baamz zuiz zoux dorngc,

eng: but now I obey your word. You are good, and what you do is good;
imn: mv baac ih zanc yie ei jienv meih nyei waac. Meih se longx, meih zoux nyei yaac zoux longx,

eng: teach me your decrees. Though the arrogant have smeared me with lies,
imn: tov njaaux meih nyei leiz-nyeic yie. Zoux maux nyei mienh gorngv-baeqc hoic yie,

eng: I keep your precepts with all my heart. Their hearts are callous and unfeeling,
imn: mv baac yie longc nzengc hnyouv gan meih hatc nyei waac. Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv hngongx,

eng: but I delight in your law. It was good for me to be afflicted
imn: mv baac yie a'hneiv meih nyei leiz-latc. Yie zuqc kouv se longx nyei,

eng: so that I might learn your decrees. The law from your mouth is more precious to me
imn: weic bun yie hoqc linc meih nyei leiz-nyeic. Meih nyei nzuih gorngv cuotv nyei leiz-latc

eng: than thousands of pieces of silver and gold. Your hands made me and formed me;
imn: weic yie gauh maaih lamh longc jiex cin-cin waanc-waanc jiem nyaanh. Yotv Meih nyei buoz zeix yie daaih aengx liepc yie,

eng: give me understanding to learn your commands. May those who fear you rejoice when they see me,
imn: tov bun yie bieqc hnyouv weic bun yie duqv hoqc linc meih nyei lingc. Taaih meih wuov deix mienh buatc yie ziouc a'hneiv haic,

eng: for I have put my hope in your word. I know, Lord , that your laws are righteous,
imn: weic zuqc yie kaux meih nyei waac maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. O Ziouv aac, yie hiuv duqv meih siemv nyei waac se baengh fim nyei,

eng: and that in faithfulness you have afflicted me. May your unfailing love be my comfort,
imn: yaac hiuv duqv yie zuqc siouc kouv se meih ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux. Tov ziux meih laengz bun meih nyei bou nyei waac

eng: according to your promise to your servant. Let your compassion come to me that I may live,
imn: longc meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv orn yie nyei hnyouv. Tov meih korv-lienh yie, bun yie duqv ziangh jienv,

eng: for your law is my delight. May the arrogant be put to shame for wronging me without cause;
imn: weic zuqc meih nyei leiz-latc bun yie a'hneiv. Tov bun ceng-hlo nyei mienh zuqc nyaiv,

eng: but I will meditate on your precepts. May those who fear you turn to me,
imn: weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv longc leiz nyei hoic yie. Mv baac yie ganh aeqv, yie fei-fangv meih hatc nyei waac. Tov bun taaih meih wuov deix huin nzuonx daaih lorz yie,

eng: those who understand your statutes. May I wholeheartedly follow your decrees,
imn: weic bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv meih nyei waac. Tov bun yie nyei hnyouv ei jienv meih nyei leiz-nyeic yaac maiv maaih dorngx nqemh,

eng: that I may not be put to shame. My soul faints with longing for your salvation,
imn: weic bun yie maiv zuqc nyaiv. Kapv Yie nyei hnyouv za'gengh zuov jienv oix duqv meih nyei njoux en,

eng: but I have put my hope in your word. My eyes fail, looking for your promise;
imn: yie kaux meih nyei waac maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. Yie zuov gau meih ei meih laengz nyei waac zoux, m'zing zungv mbuov mi'aqv.

eng: I say, “When will you comfort me?” Though I am like a wineskin in the smoke,
imn: Yie naaic gaax, “Meih haaix zanc cingx orn yie nyei hnyouv?” Yie se hnangv norm dapv a'ngunc diuv nyei ndopv-mbuoqc kangx jienv douz-sioux gu'nguaaic,

eng: I do not forget your decrees. How long must your servant wait?
imn: mv baac yie maiv la'kuqv meih nyei leiz-nyeic. Meih nyei bou oix zuqc diev ndongc haaix lauh?

eng: When will you punish my persecutors? The arrogant dig pits to trap me,
imn: Meih taux haaix zanc cingx siemv hoic yie wuov deix mienh nyei zuiz? Zoux maux, maiv ei meih nyei leiz-latc nyei mienh,

eng: contrary to your law. All your commands are trustworthy;
imn: wetv kuotv oix hoic yie ndortv. Meih nyei yietc zungv lingc kaux duqv wuonv nyei.

eng: help me, for I am being persecuted without cause. They almost wiped me from the earth,
imn: Ninh mbuo gorngv-baeqc hoic yie, tov tengx yie. Ninh mbuo kaav deix mietc yie, bun yie maiv maaih maengc yiem lungh ndiev,

eng: but I have not forsaken your precepts. In your unfailing love preserve my life,
imn: mv baac yie maiv guangc meih hatc nyei waac. Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh ziouc tov siex cuotv yie nyei maengc

eng: that I may obey the statutes of your mouth. Your word, Lord , is eternal;
imn: weic bun yie haih ei jienv meih nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Laa^metv O Ziouv aac, meih nyei waac yiem lungh gu'nguaaic

eng: it stands firm in the heavens. Your faithfulness continues through all generations;
imn: liepc wuonv taux yietc liuz. Doic jiex doic meih se ziepc zuoqv nyei.

eng: you established the earth, and it endures. Your laws endure to this day,
imn: Meih liepc baamh gen daaih, baamh gen ziouc yiem jienv taux ih zanc. Ziux meih hatc nyei waac yietc zungv yiem jienv taux ih hnoi

eng: for all things serve you. If your law had not been my delight,
imn: weic zuqc maanc muotc se benx meih nyei bou. Se gorngv meih nyei leiz-latc maiv zeiz bun yie a'hneiv,

eng: I would have perished in my affliction. I will never forget your precepts,
imn: yie yiem kouv naanc gu'nyuoz zungv zuqc mietc mi'aqv. Yie yietc liuz maiv la'kuqv meih hatc nyei waac,

eng: for by them you have preserved my life. Save me, for I am yours;
imn: weic zuqc meih longc meih hatc nyei waac bun yie duqv ziangh jienv. Yie benx meih nyei mienh, tov njoux yie,

eng: I have sought out your precepts. The wicked are waiting to destroy me,
imn: weic zuqc yie ei jienv meih hatc nyei waac. Orqv mienh zuov jienv oix daix yie,

eng: but I will ponder your statutes. To all perfection I see a limit,
imn: mv baac yie oix samx mangc meih nyei leiz-latc. Yie buatc maanc sic maaih ninh nyei soux mouc,

eng: but your commands are boundless. Oh, how I love your law!
imn: mv baac meih nyei lingc za'gengh! jangv haic. Mem O yie za'gengh hnamv meih nyei leiz-latc,

eng: I meditate on it all day long. Your commands are always with me
imn: yie ziangh hnoi maiv dingh liouh nyei fei-fangv. Meih nyei lingc zanc-zanc yiem yie nyei hnyouv,

eng: and make me wiser than my enemies. I have more insight than all my teachers,
imn: ziouc bun yie maaih cong-mengh gauh camv yie nyei win-wangv. Yie gauh hnamv duqv tong yie nyei yietc zungv fin-saeng,

eng: for I meditate on your statutes. I have more understanding than the elders,
imn: weic zuqc yie fei-fangv meih njaaux nyei waac. Beiv mienh gox mienh yie gauh mengh baeqc

eng: for I obey your precepts. I have kept my feet from every evil path
imn: weic zuqc yie ei jienv meih hatc nyei waac. Yie hatc jienv maiv bun yie nyei zaux yangh yietc zungv orqv nyei jauv,

eng: so that I might obey your word. I have not departed from your laws,
imn: weic bun yie ei jienv meih nyei waac zoux. Yie maiv leih nqoi meih nyei leiz

eng: for you yourself have taught me. How sweet are your words to my taste,
imn: weic zuqc meih ganh njaaux jiex yie. Yie seix liuz meih nyei waac, za'gengh gaam haic,

eng: sweeter than honey to my mouth! I gain understanding from your precepts;
imn: yiem yie nyei nzuih zungv gauh gaam mueiz-dorngh. Yie kaux meih hatc nyei waac tengx yie bieqc hnyouv,

eng: therefore I hate every wrong path. Your word is a lamp for my feet,
imn: weic naaiv yie nzorng haic yietc zungv jaav nyei jauv. Nun Meih nyei waac se hnangv dang ziux yie nyei zaux-mbiec,

eng: a light on my path. I have taken an oath and confirmed it,
imn: yaac zoux yie jauv zaangc nyei njang. Yie houv jienv liepc ngaengc waac

eng: that I will follow your righteous laws. I have suffered much;
imn: yaac laengz ei jienv baengh fim nyei leiz zoux. O Ziouv aac, yie za'gengh siouc kouv naanc hniev haic,

eng: preserve my life, Lord , according to your word. Accept, Lord , the willing praise of my mouth,
imn: tov meih ziux meih nyei waac bun yie duqv ziangh jienv. O Ziouv aac, tov zipv yie nyei nzuih ceng nyei waac benx ziec nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: and teach me your laws. Though I constantly take my life in my hands,
imn: yaac njaaux yie hiuv duqv meih nyei leiz. Yie nyei maengc zanc-zanc zuqc gamh nziex nyei sic,

eng: I will not forget your law. The wicked have set a snare for me,
imn: mv baac yie maiv la'kuqv meih nyei leiz-latc. Orqv mienh zaeng koux oix hlopv yie,

eng: but I have not strayed from your precepts. Your statutes are my heritage forever;
imn: mv baac yie maiv leih nqoi meih hatc nyei waac. Meih njaaux nyei waac se yie yietc liuz nzipc nyei buonc,

eng: they are the joy of my heart. My heart is set on keeping your decrees
imn: yaac bun yie nyei hnyouv a'hneiv haic. Yie liepc dingc hnyouv gan meih nyei leiz-nyeic,

eng: to the very end. I hate double-minded people,
imn: yietc liuz gan taux daauh taux mueiz. Saa^mekv Maaih i diuc hnyouv nyei mienh yie nzorng haic,

eng: but I love your law. You are my refuge and my shield;
imn: mv baac yie hnamv meih nyei leiz-latc. Meih zoux yie bingx nyei dorngx yaac zoux yie nyei torngv-baaih.

eng: I have put my hope in your word. Away from me, you evildoers,
imn: Yie kaux meih nyei waac maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. Zoux orqv nyei mienh aah! Biaux nqoi yie maah!

eng: that I may keep the commands of my God! Sustain me, my God, according to your promise, and I will live;
imn: Weic bun yie haih gan longx yie nyei Tin-Hungh hatc nyei lingc. Tov ziux meih laengz nyei waac baav jienv yie, bun yie duqv ziangh jienv.

eng: do not let my hopes be dashed. Uphold me, and I will be delivered;
imn: Yie maaih lamh hnamv nyei yaac tov maiv dungx bungx ndortv weic bun yie maiv zuqc nyaiv. Tov baav jienv yie, yie ziouc yiem duqv longx

eng: I will always have regard for your decrees. You reject all who stray from your decrees,
imn: yaac zanc-zanc taaih meih nyei leiz-nyeic. Meih nqemh maiv ei meih nyei leiz-nyeic nyei mienh.

eng: for their delusions come to nothing. All the wicked of the earth you discard like dross;
imn: Ninh mbuo guv guaix nyei za'eix se maiv lamh longc. Meih zorqv lungh ndiev nyei orqv mienh funx hnangv hlieqv-nqaiv nor,

eng: therefore I love your statutes. My flesh trembles in fear of you;
imn: weic naaiv yie hnamv meih njaaux nyei waac. Yie sin zinx weic zuqc yie gamh nziex meih.

eng: I stand in awe of your laws. I have done what is righteous and just;
imn: Yie yaac gamh nziex meih siemv nyei waac. Aayin Yie zoux nyei se baengh fim, horpc nyei.

eng: do not leave me to my oppressors. Ensure your servant’s well-being;
imn: Tov maiv dungx guangc yie yiem zeix yie wuov deix nyei buoz-ndiev. Tov beu jienv meih nyei bou bun yie duqv longx,

eng: do not let the arrogant oppress me. My eyes fail, looking for your salvation,
imn: maiv dungx bun zoux maux nyei mienh zeix yie. Yie zuov gau meih nyei njoux en,

eng: looking for your righteous promise. Deal with your servant according to your love
imn: caux meih zoux ziangx meih baengh fim laengz nyei waac, yie m'zing zungv maiv njang aqv. Tov meih ziux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh dorh meih nyei bou,

eng: and teach me your decrees. I am your servant; give me discernment
imn: yaac tov njaaux meih nyei leiz-nyeic yie. Yie se meih nyei bou. Tov bun yie bieqc hnyouv,

eng: that I may understand your statutes. It is time for you to act, Lord ;
imn: weic bun yie mengh baeqc meih njaaux nyei waac. Ziouv dingc zuiz nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv,

eng: your law is being broken. Because I love your commands
imn: weic zuqc mienh baamz meih nyei leiz-latc. Yie za'gengh hnamv meih nyei lingc gauh camv jiem,

eng: more than gold, more than pure gold, and because I consider all your precepts right,
imn: zungv gauh camv zien jiem. Weic naaiv yie yangh meih hatc nyei waac,

eng: I hate every wrong path. Your statutes are wonderful;
imn: yie nzorng haic yietc zungv jaav nyei jauv. Pe Meih njaaux nyei waac gengh peix fuc haic,

eng: therefore I obey them. The unfolding of your words gives light;
imn: weic naaiv yie longc hnyouv gan jienv mingh. Meih nyei waac porv nqoi se hnangv ziux njang nor,

eng: it gives understanding to the simple. I open my mouth and pant,
imn: bun maiv nangc hiuv camv nyei mienh bieqc hnyouv. Yie morngx nqoi nzuih tauv qiex hae hae nyei,

eng: longing for your commands. Turn to me and have mercy on me,
imn: weic zuqc yie za'gengh oix meih nyei lingc. Tov huin mangc yie yaac korv-lienh yie,

eng: as you always do to those who love your name. Direct my footsteps according to your word;
imn: hnangv meih zoux jiex weic hnamv meih nyei mengh wuov deix mienh. Tov meih longc meih nyei waac bun yie nyei zaux-mbiec haih caaiv duqv jienv,

eng: let no sin rule over me. Redeem me from human oppression,
imn: yaac maiv dungx bun haaix nyungc zuiz gunv yie. Tov tengx yie biaux ndutv zeix yie wuov deix mienh,

eng: that I may obey your precepts. Make your face shine on your servant
imn: weic bun yie haih ei jienv meih hatc nyei waac. Tov meih nyei hmien ziux njang meih nyei bou,

eng: and teach me your decrees. Streams of tears flow from my eyes,
imn: yaac tov njaaux meih nyei leiz-nyeic yie. Yie nyei wuom-mueic liouc njiec hnangv ndoqv nor,

eng: for your law is not obeyed. You are righteous, Lord ,
imn: weic zuqc mienh maiv ei meih nyei leiz-latc. Zaa^nde O Ziouv aac, meih se baengh fim nyei,

eng: and your laws are right. The statutes you have laid down are righteous;
imn: meih nyei leiz-latc yaac zingx nyei. Meih dingc daaih nyei leiz-nyeic se horpc nyei,

eng: they are fully trustworthy. My zeal wears me out,
imn: yaac baengh fim nzengc. Yie nyei hnyouv qiex jiez haic hnangv douz buov jienv nor,

eng: for my enemies ignore your words. Your promises have been thoroughly tested,
imn: weic zuqc yie nyei win-wangv la'kuqv meih nyei waac. Meih laengz nyei waac seix liuz, hiuv duqv kaux duqv wuonv nyei,

eng: and your servant loves them. Though I am lowly and despised,
imn: yie, meih nyei bou, yaac hnamv haic. Yie zoux faix, zuqc mienh mangc piex,

eng: I do not forget your precepts. Your righteousness is everlasting
imn: mv baac yie maiv la'kuqv meih hatc nyei waac. Meih se baengh fim nyei, yaac yietc liuz baengh fim.

eng: and your law is true. Trouble and distress have come upon me,
imn: Meih nyei leiz-latc yaac zien. Yie zuqc doh naanc, nzauh kouv,

eng: but your commands give me delight. Your statutes are always righteous;
imn: mv baac meih nyei lingc bun yie njien-youh. Meih njaaux nyei waac yietc liuz baengh fim nyei,

eng: give me understanding that I may live. I call with all my heart; answer me, Lord ,
imn: tov bun yie mengh baeqc weic bun yie duqv ziangh jienv. Kopv O Ziouv aac, yie longc nzengc hnyouv heuc jienv meih. Tov dau yie,

eng: and I will obey your decrees. I call out to you; save me
imn: yie ziouc ei jienv meih nyei leiz-nyeic. Yie heuc jienv meih, tov njoux yie,

eng: and I will keep your statutes. I rise before dawn and cry for help;
imn: weic bun yie haih ei jienv meih njaaux nyei waac. Lungh maiv gaengh njang yie jiez sin heuc meih tengx.

eng: I have put my hope in your word. My eyes stay open through the watches of the night,
imn: Yie kaux meih nyei waac maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. Yie ziangh muonz nungx jienv m'zing

eng: that I may meditate on your promises. Hear my voice in accordance with your love;
imn: weic fei-fangv meih laengz nyei waac. Ziux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh tov muangx yie nyei qiex.

eng: preserve my life, Lord , according to your laws. Those who devise wicked schemes are near,
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov ziux meih nyei leiz beu yie nyei maengc. Daav orqv za'eix zeix yie wuov deix mienh taux fatv aqv.

eng: but they are far from your law. Yet you are near, Lord ,
imn: Ninh mbuo leih go meih nyei leiz-latc. Mv baac Ziouv aac, meih yiem nitv fatv.

eng: and all your commands are true. Long ago I learned from your statutes
imn: Meih nyei yietc zungv lingc yaac zien. Yie weic hoqc meih njaaux nyei waac hiuv duqv lauh aqv,

eng: that you established them to last forever. Look on my suffering and deliver me,
imn: meih njaaux nyei waac yietc liuz liepc wuonv. Letv Tov mangc buatc yie nyei kouv naanc yaac njoux yie,

eng: for I have not forgotten your law. Defend my cause and redeem me;
imn: weic zuqc yie maiv la'kuqv meih nyei leiz-latc. Tov tengx mbenc yie nyei sic yaac zuoqc yie.

eng: preserve my life according to your promise. Salvation is far from the wicked,
imn: Ziux meih laengz nyei waac tov bun yie duqv ziangh jienv. Zoux orqv nyei mienh maiv haih duqv njoux,

eng: for they do not seek out your decrees. Your compassion, Lord , is great;
imn: ninh mbuo maiv gan meih nyei leiz-nyeic. O Ziouv aac, meih za'gengh korv-lienh mienh haic.

eng: preserve my life according to your laws. Many are the foes who persecute me,
imn: Tov ziux meih nyei leiz bun yie maaih maengc ziangh jienv. Zeix yie, caux yie doix-dekc nyei mienh camv haic,

eng: but I have not turned from your statutes. I look on the faithless with loathing,
imn: mv baac yie maiv leih nqoi meih hatc nyei waac. Yie buatc maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh ziouc youx haic

eng: for they do not obey your word. See how I love your precepts;
imn: weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv ei meih nyei waac. Samx mangc gaax yie ndongc haaix hnamv meih hatc nyei waac.

eng: preserve my life, Lord , in accordance with your love. All your words are true;
imn: Tov ziux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh beu yie nyei maengc. Meih nyei waac nzutv zunv gorngv se zien leiz,

eng: all your righteous laws are eternal. Rulers persecute me without cause,
imn: meih nyei yietc zungv gong-fim nyei leiz yietc liuz yiem. Sin Zoux hlo nyei mienh maiv longc leiz nyei hoic yie,

eng: but my heart trembles at your word. I rejoice in your promise
imn: mv baac yie nyei hnyouv gamh nziex nyei se meih nyei waac. Yie weic meih nyei waac a'hneiv,

eng: like one who finds great spoil. I hate and detest falsehood
imn: hnangv mienh duqv caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv camv nor. Yie nzorng haic, youx haic yietc zungv gorngv-baeqc nyei waac,

eng: but I love your law. Seven times a day I praise you
imn: mv baac yie hnamv haic meih nyei leiz-latc. Weic meih baengh fim nyei leiz

eng: for your righteous laws. Great peace have those who love your law,
imn: yie yietc hnoi ceng meih siec nzunc. Hnamv meih nyei leiz nyei mienh duqv baengh orn camv,

eng: and nothing can make them stumble. I wait for your salvation, Lord ,
imn: yaac maiv maaih haaix nyungc haih bun ninh mbuo ndiqv zuqc ndorpc. O Ziouv aac, yie zuov jienv meih njoux yie,

eng: and I follow your commands. I obey your statutes,
imn: yie yaac ei meih hatc nyei lingc zoux. Yie nyei hnyouv ei jienv meih nyei waac.

eng: for I love them greatly. I obey your precepts and your statutes,
imn: Yie za'gengh! hnamv haic meih nyei waac. Yie ei jienv meih hatc nyei, paaiv nyei waac,

eng: for all my ways are known to you. May my cry come before you, Lord ;
imn: weic zuqc yie nyei diuc-diuc jauv yiem meih nyei nza'hmien. Tau O Ziouv aac, tov bun yie heuc nyei sing-qiex taux meih nyei nza'hmien,

eng: give me understanding according to your word. May my supplication come before you;
imn: yaac ziux meih nyei waac bun yie bieqc hnyouv. Tov bun yie jouh nyei waac taux meih nyei nza'hmien,

eng: deliver me according to your promise. May my lips overflow with praise,
imn: tov ziux meih nyei waac njoux yie. Yie nyei nzuih meix oix gorngv cuotv ceng nyei waac,

eng: for you teach me your decrees. May my tongue sing of your word,
imn: weic zuqc meih njaaux meih nyei leiz-nyeic yie. Yie nyei mbietc oix baaux nzung gorngv meih nyei waac,

eng: for all your commands are righteous. May your hand be ready to help me,
imn: weic zuqc meih nyei yietc zungv lingc se baengh fim nyei. Tov liuc leiz ziangx meih nyei buoz tengx yie,

eng: for I have chosen your precepts. I long for your salvation, Lord ,
imn: weic zuqc yie ginv liuz meih hatc nyei waac. O Ziouv aac, yie gengh oix duqv meih nyei njoux en,

eng: and your law gives me delight. Let me live that I may praise you,
imn: meih nyei leiz-latc yaac bun yie a'hneiv. Tov bun yie duqv ziangh jienv weic bun yie haih ceng meih,

eng: and may your laws sustain me. I have strayed like a lost sheep.
imn: tov bun meih nyei leiz tengx yie. Yie mingh dorngc jauv hnangv ba'gi yungh dingx laaih nor,

eng: Seek your servant, for I have not forgotten your commands.
imn: tov daaih lorz meih nyei bou, weic zuqc yie maiv la'kuqv meih nyei lingc.

eng: I call on the Lord in my distress, and he answers me. Save me, Lord ,
imn: Yie zuqc kouv naanc nyei ziangh hoc yie heuc Ziouv, ninh yaac dau yie. O Ziouv aac, tov njoux yie biaux ndutv gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh,

eng: from lying lips and from deceitful tongues. What will he do to you,
imn: caux nduov mienh nyei mienh. Meih mbuo gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh aah!

eng: and what more besides, you deceitful tongue? He will punish you with a warrior’s sharp arrows,
imn: Oix zuqc bun haaix nyungc meih? Aengx jaa haaix nyungc bun meih? Ninh oix longc mborqv jaax baeng nyei forng-cang laic nyei,

eng: with burning coals of the broom bush. Woe to me that I dwell in Meshek,
imn: caux maaih douz nyei douz-taanx dingc meih nyei zuiz. Yie zuqc kouv aqv, weic zuqc yie yiem Mesekv Deic,

eng: that I live among the tents of Kedar! Too long have I lived
imn: yaac yiem Ke^ndaa nyei ndopv-liuh mbu'ndongx. Yie yiem nzorng baengh orn nyei jauv

eng: among those who hate peace. I am for peace;
imn: wuov deix mienh mbu'ndongx lauh jiex ndaangc. Yie oix taaix-baengh, mv baac yie gorngv nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: but when I speak, they are for war.
imn: ninh mbuo oix mborqv jaax.

eng: I lift up my eyes to the mountains— where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord ,
imn: Yie cau hmien mangc mbong, tengx yie wuov dauh oix yiem haaix daaih? Tengx yie wuov dauh se Ziouv,

eng: the Maker of heaven and earth. He will not let your foot slip—
imn: dongh Zeix Lungh Zeix Ndau Wuov Dauh. Ninh zungv maiv bun meih nyei zaux caaiv piatv,

eng: he who watches over you will not slumber; indeed, he who watches over Israel
imn: beu meih wuov dauh maiv njormh da'hngatv. Beu I^saa^laa^en wuov dauh

eng: will neither slumber nor sleep. The Lord watches over you—
imn: zungv maiv njormh da'hngatv yaac maiv bueix m'njormh. Ziouv beu jienv meih,

eng: the Lord is your shade at your right hand; the sun will not harm you by day,
imn: Ziouv yiem meih nyei mbiaauc bung tengx meih torngv laangh. Lungh hnoi zanc mba'hnoi maiv hoic meih,

eng: nor the moon by night. The Lord will keep you from all harm—
imn: lungh muonz zanc hlaax yaac maiv hoic meih. Ziouv oix beu jienv meih, maiv bun zuqc haaix nyungc zeqc naanc.

eng: he will watch over your life; the Lord will watch over your coming and going
imn: Ninh oix beu jienv meih nyei maengc. Meih bieqc bieqc cuotv-cuotv, Ziouv oix beu jienv meih

eng: both now and forevermore.
imn: yiem naaiv mingh taux yietc liuz.

eng: I rejoiced with those who said to me, “Let us go to the house of the Lord .” Our feet are standing
imn: Maaih mienh mbuox yie, “Mbuo mingh zaangc Ziouv nyei biauv orqc?” Yie ziouc njien-youh haic. O Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh aac, yie mbuo nyei zaux souv jienv

eng: in your gates, Jerusalem. Jerusalem is built like a city
imn: meih nyei zingh gaengh gu'nyuoz. Ye^lu^saa^lem ceix daaih benx

eng: that is closely compacted together. That is where the tribes go up—
imn: norm zingh zunv nyei, wuonv nyei. Zuangx fingx, se Ziouv nyei fingx,

eng: the tribes of the Lord — to praise the name of the Lord according to the statute given to Israel. There stand the thrones for judgment,
imn: daaih taux naaiv, ziux dingc daaih bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh zoux, weic dor-ziec Ziouv nyei mengh. Yiem naaiv liepc siemv zuiz nyei weic,

eng: the thrones of the house of David. Pray for the peace of Jerusalem:
imn: se Ndaawitv douh zong nyei weic. Oix zuqc daux gaux tov bun

eng: “May those who love you be secure. May there be peace within your walls
imn: Ye^lu^saa^lem duqv baengh orn, “Tov bun hnamv meih wuov deix duqv longx, bun yiem meih nyei zingh laatc gu'nyuoz baengh orn,

eng: and security within your citadels.” For the sake of my family and friends,
imn: bun meih nyei hungh dinc taaix-baengh.” Weic yie nyei gorx-youz caux loz-gaeng doic

eng: I will say, “Peace be within you.” For the sake of the house of the Lord our God,
imn: yie oix gorngv, “Tov yiem meih gu'nyuoz taaix-baengh.” Weic Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv,

eng: I will seek your prosperity.
imn: yie oix tengx meih duqv longx.

eng: I lift up my eyes to you, to you who sit enthroned in heaven. As the eyes of slaves look to the hand of their master,
imn: Yiem lungh gu'nguaaic zueiz weic nyei Ziouv aac, yie cau hmien mangc meih. Hnangv m'jangc bou kaux ganh nyei ziouv,

eng: as the eyes of a female slave look to the hand of her mistress, so our eyes look to the Lord our God, till he shows us his mercy. Have mercy on us, Lord , have mercy on us,
imn: yaac hnangv m'sieqv bou kaux ganh nyei biauv-ziouv maac, yie mbuo hnangv wuov nor kaux Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh, zuov taux ninh korv-lienh yie mbuo. O Ziouv aac, tov korv-lienh yie mbuo, tov korv-lienh yie mbuo oc,

eng: for we have endured no end of contempt. We have endured no end
imn: weic zuqc yie mbuo zuqc mienh mangc piex taux ndiev. Yie mbuo zuqc butv zoih butv zieqv nyei mienh huotv yie mbuo,

eng: of ridicule from the arrogant, of contempt from the proud.
imn: zuqc zoux maux nyei mienh mangc piex yie mbuo lauh haic.

eng: If the Lord had not been on our side— let Israel say— if the Lord had not been on our side
imn: Se gorngv Ziouv maiv caux yie mbuo yiem naaiv bung hnangv haaix nor? I^saa^laa^en Mienh dau maah! Se gorngv Ziouv maiv caux yie mbuo yiem naaiv bung,

eng: when people attacked us, they would have swallowed us alive
imn: win-wangv daaih mborqv yie mbuo wuov zanc, se ninh mbuo qiex jiez yie mbuo hnangv njopc douz nor,

eng: when their anger flared against us; the flood would have engulfed us,
imn: ninh mbuo haih zorqv yie mbuo liemh nangh nyei naqv nzengc. Wuom yiemx oix torngx yie mbuo mingh,

eng: the torrent would have swept over us, the raging waters
imn: wuom-seix oix yiemx yie mbuo gu'nguaaic, domh wuom beqv yaac oix guaatv yie mbuo mingh.

eng: would have swept us away. Praise be to the Lord ,
imn: Ceng Ziouv weic zuqc ninh maiv bun yie mbuo zuqc win-wangv hoic

eng: who has not let us be torn by their teeth. We have escaped like a bird
imn: hnangv zuqc hieh ga'naaiv nyei nyaah betv nor. Yie mbuo hnangv norqc yiem zaeng norqc mienh nyei koux biaux ndutv.

eng: from the fowler’s snare; the snare has been broken, and we have escaped. Our help is in the name of the Lord ,
imn: Koux dangx, yie mbuo biaux ndutv daaih. Tengx yie mbuo wuov dauh se Ziouv,

eng: the Maker of heaven and earth.
imn: dongh Zeix Lungh Zeix Ndau Wuov Dauh.

eng: Those who trust in the Lord are like Mount Zion, which cannot be shaken but endures forever. As the mountains surround Jerusalem,
imn: Da'faanh kaux Ziouv nyei mienh hnangv Si^on Mbong maiv zuqc ndanc dongz, zungv yiem taux yietc liuz. Zuangx mbong hnangv haaix nor weih gormx Ye^lu^saa^lem,

eng: so the Lord surrounds his people both now and forevermore. The scepter of the wicked will not remain
imn: Ziouv hnangv wuov nor weih gormx ninh nyei baeqc fingx, yiem naaiv mingh taux yietc liuz. Orqv mienh maiv duqv yietc liuz gunv

eng: over the land allotted to the righteous, for then the righteous might use their hands to do evil. Lord , do good to those who are good,
imn: paaiv bun kuv mienh nyei buonc deic-bung. Nzauh heix kuv mienh haih sung buoz zoux orqv sic. O Ziouv aac, tov zoux longx bun longx nyei,

eng: to those who are upright in heart. But those who turn to crooked ways
imn: caux hnyouv zingx nyei mienh. Mv baac haaix dauh huin mingh gan hnyouv njuotv mienh nyei jauv,

eng: the Lord will banish with the evildoers. Peace be on Israel.
imn: Ziouv oix dorh ninh mbuo caux jienv orqv mienh yietc jauv mingh. Tov bun I^saa^laa^en duqv baengh orn.

eng: When the Lord restored the fortunes of Zion, we were like those who dreamed. Our mouths were filled with laughter,
imn: Ziouv bun Si^on nzuonx daaih duqv longx hnangv loz wuov zanc, yie mbuo hnangv mbeix buatc nor. Yie mbuo nyei nzuih ziouc qaqv jatv,

eng: our tongues with songs of joy. Then it was said among the nations, “The Lord has done great things for them.” The Lord has done great things for us,
imn: yie mbuo nyei mbietc yaac njien-youh nyei heuc. Wuov zanc maanc guoqv mienh gorngv, “ Ziouv weic ninh mbuo zoux hlo haic nyei sic.” Ziouv weic yie mbuo zoux hlo haic nyei sic,

eng: and we are filled with joy. Restore our fortunes, Lord ,
imn: yie mbuo ziouc njien-youh haic. O Ziouv aac, tov bun yie mbuo nzuonx daaih duqv longx hnangv loz wuov nor,

eng: like streams in the Negev. Those who sow with tears
imn: hnangv Negepc nyei wuom liouc njiec ndoqv-nzuonx. Tov bun liouc jienv wuom-mueic zuangx nyei mienh

eng: will reap with songs of joy. Those who go out weeping,
imn: duqv njien-youh nyei heuc jienv siou. Liouc jienv wuom-mueic

eng: carrying seed to sow, will return with songs of joy, carrying sheaves with them.
imn: dorh nyim cuotv mingh zuangx nyei mienh, oix njien-njien youh youh nyei heuc, dorh jienv ninh nyei mbiauh zeiv nzuonx.

eng: Unless the Lord builds the house, the builders labor in vain. Unless the Lord watches over the city, the guards stand watch in vain. In vain you rise early
imn: Se gorngv maiv zeiz Ziouv zoux biauv, zoux biauv nyei mienh baeqc baeqc ndortv qaqv. Se gorngv maiv zeiz Ziouv zuov zingh, zuov zingh nyei mienh maiv njormh mv baac maiv lamh longc. Lungh ndorm jiez sin nziouv,

eng: and stay up late, toiling for food to eat— for he grants sleep to those he loves. Children are a heritage from the Lord ,
imn: lungh muonz zanc bueix hmuangx lauh, cuotv qaqv zoux kouv weic yungz maengc se maiv lamh longc, weic zuqc Ziouv bun ninh hnamv nyei mienh bueix duqv njormh. Naamh nyouz se Ziouv bun nzipc nyei buonc,

eng: offspring a reward from him. Like arrows in the hands of a warrior
imn: yungz daaih nyei fu'jueiv benx ninh nyei zingh nyeic. Mienh hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei ziangh hoc yungz nyei naamh nyouz,

eng: are children born in one’s youth. Blessed is the man
imn: se hnangv forng-cang yiem mborqv jaax baeng nyei buoz. Maaih forng buangv forng-ndongh nyei mienh orn-lorqc haic.

eng: whose quiver is full of them. They will not be put to shame when they contend with their opponents in court.
imn: Yiem zingh gaengh caux win-wangv dunx sic nyei ziangh hoc yaac maiv zuqc nyaiv.

eng: Blessed are all who fear the Lord , who walk in obedience to him. You will eat the fruit of your labor;
imn: Dauh dauh taaih Ziouv nyei mienh, dongh gan ninh nyei jauv yangh wuov deix, maaih orn-lorqc. Meih duqv nyanc meih ganh nyei buoz zoux daaih nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: blessings and prosperity will be yours. Your wife will be like a fruitful vine
imn: meih ziouc orn-lorqc yaac duqv fuqv-loqc. Meih nyei auv oix yiem meih nyei biauv

eng: within your house; your children will be like olive shoots around your table. Yes, this will be the blessing
imn: hnangv a'ngunc hmei ziangh biouv gitv nor. Meih nyei naamh nyouz oix weih gormx meih nyei dieh, hnangv ga'lanv ndiangx nyei cunx nor. Mangc maah! Taaih Ziouv nyei mienh

eng: for the man who fears the Lord . May the Lord bless you from Zion;
imn: zungv oix hnangv naaic duqv fuqv. Tov Ziouv yiem Si^on ceix fuqv bun meih.

eng: may you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life. May you live to see your children’s children—
imn: Tov bun meih yietc seix buatc Ye^lu^saa^lem duqv longx. Yaac tov bun meih maaih maengc ziangh jienv

eng: peace be on Israel.
imn: duqv buatc meih nyei fun-faqv. Tov bun I^saa^laa^en duqv baengh orn.

eng: “They have greatly oppressed me from my youth,” let Israel say; “they have greatly oppressed me from my youth,
imn: Ninh mbuo hoic yie zuqc kouv yiem yie hnyangx-jeiv lunx taux ih zanc. I^saa^laa^en Mienh aah! Ih zanc gorngv maah! Ninh mbuo hoic yie zuqc kouv yiem yie hnyangx-jeiv lunx taux ih zanc,

eng: but they have not gained the victory over me. Plowmen have plowed my back
imn: mv baac ninh mbuo maiv hingh yie. Ninh mbuo mborqv yie nyei diqc daanz butv mbiuz ndaauv nyei,

eng: and made their furrows long. But the Lord is righteous;
imn: hnangv laih ndau nyei mienh laih ndau nor. Ziouv se baengh fim nyei.

eng: he has cut me free from the cords of the wicked.” May all who hate Zion
imn: Ninh hngaqv ndutv orqv mienh ndoh nyei hlaang. Tov bun nzorng Si^on wuov deix yietc zungv mienh

eng: be turned back in shame. May they be like grass on the roof,
imn: zuqc nyaiv yaac zuqc tuix nzuonx nqa'haav. Tov bun ninh mbuo hnangv yiem biauv-ngorh cuotv nyei miev,

eng: which withers before it can grow; a reaper cannot fill his hands with it,
imn: maiv gaengh hlo ziouc kou nqaai mi'aqv. Gaatv mbiauh nyei mienh maiv zorqv daaih gaatv,

eng: nor one who gathers fill his arms. May those who pass by not say to them,
imn: sai mbiauh nyei mienh yaac maiv gaux yietc zeiv. Jiex jauv nyei mienh maiv gorngv,

eng: “The blessing of the Lord be on you; we bless you in the name of the Lord .”
imn: “Tov Ziouv ceix fuqv bun meih mbuo. Yie mbuo dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox buang waac bun meih mbuo.”

eng: Out of the depths I cry to you, Lord ; Lord, hear my voice.
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie yiem siem nyei dorngx heuc jienv meih. Ziouv aac, tov meih muangx yie nyei sing-qiex.

eng: Let your ears be attentive to my cry for mercy. If you, Lord , kept a record of sins,
imn: Tov baeng m'normh muangx yie heuc jienv jouh nyei waac. O Ziouv aac, se gorngv meih nipc jienv yie nyei zuiz,

eng: Lord, who could stand? But with you there is forgiveness,
imn: Ziouv aac, haaix dauh haih biaux duqv ndutv, maiv zuqc dingc zuiz? Mv baac meih guangc mienh nyei zuiz

eng: so that we can, with reverence, serve you. I wait for the Lord , my whole being waits,
imn: weic bun mienh taaih meih. Yie zuov Ziouv, yie nyei hnyouv zuov jienv.

eng: and in his word I put my hope. I wait for the Lord
imn: Yie yaac kaux ninh nyei waac maaih lamh hnamv dorngx. Yie nyei hnyouv zuov Ziouv

eng: more than watchmen wait for the morning, more than watchmen wait for the morning. Israel, put your hope in the Lord ,
imn: gauh camv jiex siouv gaeng mienh zuov lungh njang, gauh camv jiex siouv gaeng mienh zuov lungh njang. O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac, oix zuqc kaux Ziouv maaih lamh hnamv dorngx,

eng: for with the Lord is unfailing love and with him is full redemption. He himself will redeem Israel
imn: weic zuqc Ziouv ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh, ninh yaac maaih hnyouv zuoqc mienh taux daauh. Ninh yaac oix zuoqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh biaux ndutv

eng: from all their sins.
imn: yietc zungv zoux dorngc nyei zuiz.

eng: My heart is not proud, Lord , my eyes are not haughty; I do not concern myself with great matters or things too wonderful for me. But I have calmed and quieted myself,
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie nyei hnyouv maiv ceng-hlo, m'zing yaac maiv mangc hlang. Yie maiv la'nyauv taux haaix nyungc hlo nyei sic fai jiex ndaangc yie haih bieqc hnyouv nyei mbuoqc horngh sic. Mv baac yie bun yie nyei hnyouv sekv nzieqc, baengh orn nyei,

eng: I am like a weaned child with its mother; like a weaned child I am content. Israel, put your hope in the Lord
imn: hnangv guangc ndutv nyorx nyei gu'nguaaz yiem maa nyei la'kuotv sekv nzieqc, yie nyei hnyouv yiem yie gu'nyuoz baengh orn nyei hnangv dangx ndutv nyorx nyei gu'nguaaz. O I^saa^laa^en Mienh aac, oix zuqc kaux Ziouv maaih lamh hnamv dorngx,

eng: both now and forevermore.
imn: yiem naaiv mingh taux yietc liuz.

eng: Lord , remember David and all his self-denial. He swore an oath to the Lord ,
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov meih jangx jienv Ndaawitv, dongh ninh diev nyei yietc zungv kouv naanc. Jangx jienv ninh hnangv haaix nor caux Ziouv houv jienv laengz waac,

eng: he made a vow to the Mighty One of Jacob: “I will not enter my house
imn: se caux Yaakopv nyei Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh. “Yie zungv maiv bieqc yie nyei biauv

eng: or go to my bed, I will allow no sleep to my eyes
imn: yaac maiv faaux yie nyei coux. Yie maiv bun yie nyei m'zing m'njormh,

eng: or slumber to my eyelids, till I find a place for the Lord ,
imn: yaac maiv bun m'zing-ndopv njipv. Zuov taux yie weic Ziouv lorz duqv dorngx yiem,

eng: a dwelling for the Mighty One of Jacob.” We heard it in Ephrathah,
imn: se lorz dorngx bun Yaakopv nyei Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh.” Muangx gaax, yie mbuo haiz gorngv Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang yiem E^faa^taa,

eng: we came upon it in the fields of Jaar: “Let us go to his dwelling place,
imn: yie mbuo lorz buatc yiem Yaa^aa nyei ndeic. “Mbuo oix zuqc bieqc ninh yiem nyei dorngx,

eng: let us worship at his footstool, saying, ‘Arise, Lord , and come to your resting place,
imn: yiem ninh lorngx zaux nyei dorngx baaix. Ziouv aac, daaih maah! Liemh meih caux

eng: you and the ark of your might. May your priests be clothed with your righteousness;
imn: biux mengh meih nyei qaqv wuov norm Laengz Ngaengc Waac Faang daaih bieqc meih hitv kuonx nyei dorngx. Tov bun meih nyei sai mienh zanc-zanc zoux horpc,

eng: may your faithful people sing for joy.’ ” For the sake of your servant David,
imn: yaac tov bun meih nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx njien-youh nyei heuc.” Tov weic meih nyei bou, Ndaawitv,

eng: do not reject your anointed one. The Lord swore an oath to David,
imn: maiv dungx nqemh guangc meih longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh. Ziouv dorng jienv Ndaawitv ziepc zuoqv nyei laengz ngaengc waac,

eng: a sure oath he will not revoke: “One of your own descendants I will place on your throne. If your sons keep my covenant
imn: ninh yaac maiv haih tuix. Ninh gorngv, “Yie oix liepc dauh meih ganh nyei dorn zueiz jienv meih nyei weic. Se gorngv meih nyei dorn mbuo ei jienv yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac,

eng: and the statutes I teach them, then their sons will sit on your throne for ever and ever.” For the Lord has chosen Zion,
imn: yaac gan yie oix njaaux ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv waac, ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun ziouc duqv yietc liuz zueiz jienv meih nyei weic.” Weic zuqc Ziouv ginv Si^on .

eng: he has desired it for his dwelling, saying, “This is my resting place for ever and ever;
imn: Ninh oix longc weic zoux ninh yiem nyei dorngx. Ninh gorngv, “Naaiv se yie yietc liuz hitv nyei dorngx,

eng: here I will sit enthroned, for I have desired it. I will bless her with abundant provisions;
imn: yie oix yiem naaiv. Naaiv se yie nyei eix. Yie oix ceix fuqv bun naaiv norm zingh nyei laangh ziqc bungx-zuoqc,

eng: her poor I will satisfy with food. I will clothe her priests with salvation,
imn: yaac bun naaiv norm zingh nyei mienh jomc mienh duqv nyanc beuv. Yie oix bun ninh nyei sai mienh duqv njoux en.

eng: and her faithful people will ever sing for joy. “Here I will make a horn grow for David
imn: Ninh nyei baeqc fingx yaac oix njien-youh nyei heuc. Yie oix bun Ndaawitv nyei yietc dauh zeiv-fun yiem wuov zoux hungh.

eng: and set up a lamp for my anointed one. I will clothe his enemies with shame,
imn: Yie weic yie longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh liepc dauh nzipc jienv zoux hungh. Yie oix bun ninh nyei win-wangv zuqc nyaiv,

eng: but his head will be adorned with a radiant crown.”
imn: mv baac ninh ganh ndongx nyei hungh ningv oix aengv cuotv njang.

eng: How good and pleasant it is when God’s people live together in unity! It is like precious oil poured on the head,
imn: Mangc maah! Gorx-youz horpc fim dongh eix nyei yiem se za'gengh longx nyei, orn-lorqc haic. Naaiv beiv jaaix haic nyei youh

eng: running down on the beard, running down on Aaron’s beard, down on the collar of his robe. It is as if the dew of Hermon
imn: dox jienv Aalon nyei m'nqorngv aengx liouc njiec siaam, aengx liouc njiec taux ninh nyei lui-ndaauv nyei lui-jaang. Se hnangv Hemon Mbong nyei mbiungc-suiv

eng: were falling on Mount Zion. For there the Lord bestows his blessing, even life forevermore.
imn: duih njiec Si^on Mbong . Weic zuqc yiem wuov maaih Ziouv ceix nyei fuqv, se yietc liuz ziangh nyei maengc.

eng: Praise the Lord , all you servants of the Lord who minister by night in the house of the Lord . Lift up your hands in the sanctuary
imn: Ziouv nyei zuangx bou daaih maah! Dongh lungh muonz zanc souv jienv Ziouv nyei biauv nyei mienh, meih mbuo gunv ceng Ziouv aqv. Hungx jienv cing-nzengc nyei dorngx

eng: and praise the Lord . May the Lord bless you from Zion,
imn: sung buoz ceng Ziouv. Tov Ziouv, dongh Zeix Lungh Zeix Ndau Wuov Dauh,

eng: he who is the Maker of heaven and earth.
imn: yiem Si^on ceix fuqv bun meih mbuo.

eng: Praise the Lord . Praise the name of the Lord ; praise him, you servants of the Lord , you who minister in the house of the Lord ,
imn: Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei mengh. Ziouv nyei zuangx bou aah! Oix zuqc ceng, se meih mbuo souv jienv Ziouv nyei biauv,

eng: in the courts of the house of our God. Praise the Lord , for the Lord is good;
imn: yiem yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei laatc gu'nyuoz nyei mienh. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv weic zuqc Ziouv se longx haic.

eng: sing praise to his name, for that is pleasant. For the Lord has chosen Jacob to be his own,
imn: Baaux nzung ceng ninh nyei mengh, weic zuqc ninh korv-lienh mienh. Weic zuqc Ziouv ginv Yaakopv weic ninh ganh,

eng: Israel to be his treasured possession. I know that the Lord is great,
imn: ginv I^saa^laa^en benx ninh ganh nyei buonc. Yie hiuv duqv Ziouv se hlo haic,

eng: that our Lord is greater than all gods. The Lord does whatever pleases him,
imn: yie mbuo nyei Ziouv se gauh hlo jiex zuangx zienh. Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh, yiem ga'ndiev ndau,

eng: in the heavens and on the earth, in the seas and all their depths. He makes clouds rise from the ends of the earth;
imn: yiem koiv gu'nyuoz caux yietc zungv ndo nyei dorngx, sueih ganh nyei eix oix zoux haaix nyungc ziouc zoux aqv. Ninh bun mbuonx yiem lungh gorn faaux,

eng: he sends lightning with the rain and brings out the wind from his storehouses. He struck down the firstborn of Egypt,
imn: ninh bun mba'lingc gan mbiungc daaih, yaac dorh nziaaux yiem ninh siou nyei dorngx cuotv daaih. Se dongh ninh daix yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung nyei daauh toi dorn,

eng: the firstborn of people and animals. He sent his signs and wonders into your midst, Egypt,
imn: liemh mienh, liemh saeng-kuv. O I^yipv Mienh aah! Ninh yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zoux jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic

eng: against Pharaoh and all his servants. He struck down many nations
imn: dingc Faalo Hungh caux ninh nyei zuangx jien nyei zuiz. Ninh mietc ziex! ziex fingx mienh,

eng: and killed mighty kings— Sihon king of the Amorites,
imn: aengx daix henv haic nyei hungh diex. Ninh daix Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei Si^honx Hungh,

eng: Og king of Bashan, and all the kings of Canaan— and he gave their land as an inheritance,
imn: caux Mbaasaan Deic nyei Okc Hungh, caux Kaa^naa^an nyei yietc zungv hungh diex. Ninh yaac zorqv ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung

eng: an inheritance to his people Israel. Your name, Lord , endures forever,
imn: jiu bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx, I^saa^laa^en Mienh, benx ninh mbuo nzipc nyei buonc. O Ziouv aac, meih nyei mengh yietc liuz yiem.

eng: your renown, Lord , through all generations. For the Lord will vindicate his people
imn: O Ziouv aac, mienh oix jangx meih nyei mengh dauh taux maanc doic. Ziouv oix tengx ninh nyei baeqc fingx caengx sic,

eng: and have compassion on his servants. The idols of the nations are silver and gold,
imn: yaac korv-lienh ninh nyei zuangx bou. Ganh fingx mienh nyei miuc-fangx longc jiem longc nyaanh zoux,

eng: made by human hands. They have mouths, but cannot speak,
imn: se mienh nyei buoz zoux daaih. Naaiv deix miuc-fangx maaih nzuih mv baac maiv haih gorngv waac,

eng: eyes, but cannot see. They have ears, but cannot hear,
imn: maaih m'zing mv baac mangc maiv buatc. Ninh mbuo maaih m'normh mv baac ninh mbuo muangx maiv haiz,

eng: nor is there breath in their mouths. Those who make them will be like them,
imn: ninh mbuo nyei nzuih maiv maaih yietc deix tauv nyei qiex. Zoux naaiv deix miuc-fangx nyei mienh ziouc hnangv naaiv deix miuc-fangx nor.

eng: and so will all who trust in them. All you Israelites, praise the Lord ;
imn: Da'faanh kaux miuc-fangx nyei mienh yaac fih hnangv nyei. O I^saa^laa^en nyei zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: house of Aaron, praise the Lord ; house of Levi, praise the Lord ;
imn: O Aalon nyei zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. O Lewi nyei zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: you who fear him, praise the Lord . Praise be to the Lord from Zion,
imn: Taaih Ziouv nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc yiem Si^on ceng Ziouv,

eng: to him who dwells in Jerusalem. Praise the Lord .
imn: se yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei Ziouv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv.

eng: Give thanks to the Lord , for he is good. His love endures forever. Give thanks to the God of gods.
imn: Meih mbuo oix zuqc dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh longx haic. Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Oix zuqc dor-ziec maanc zienh nyei Zienh,

eng: His love endures forever. Give thanks to the Lord of lords:
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Oix zuqc dor-ziec maanc ziouv nyei Ziouv,

eng: His love endures forever. to him who alone does great wonders,
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Kungx ninh ganh zoux domh mbuoqc horngh nyei sic,

eng: His love endures forever. who by his understanding made the heavens,
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh longc ninh ganh nyei wuonh zaang zeix lungh,

eng: His love endures forever. who spread out the earth upon the waters,
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh ceix ndau yiem wuom-minc gu'nguaaic,

eng: His love endures forever. who made the great lights—
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh zeix domh njang cuotv daaih,

eng: His love endures forever. the sun to govern the day,
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh zeix mba'hnoi gunv lungh hnoi zanc,

eng: His love endures forever. the moon and stars to govern the night;
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh zeix hlaax caux hleix gunv lungh muonz zanc,

eng: His love endures forever. to him who struck down the firstborn of Egypt
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh daix I^yipv Mienh nyei dorn-la'gauv,

eng: His love endures forever. and brought Israel out from among them
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx cuotv daaih,

eng: His love endures forever. with a mighty hand and outstretched arm;
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh sung cuotv ninh domh qaqv nyei buoz,

eng: His love endures forever. to him who divided the Red Sea asunder
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh bun nqoi Koiv-Siqv nyei wuom,

eng: His love endures forever. and brought Israel through the midst of it,
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh dorh I^saa^laa^en Mienh yangh koiv mbu'ndongx jiex

eng: His love endures forever. but swept Pharaoh and his army into the Red Sea;
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh zorqv Faalo Hungh caux ninh nyei baeng-guanh mbienv njiec Koiv-Siqv.

eng: His love endures forever. to him who led his people through the wilderness;
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Mv baac ninh yienz ganh nyei baeqc fingx jiex deic-bung-huaang,

eng: His love endures forever. to him who struck down great kings,
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh daix domh hungh diex,

eng: His love endures forever. and killed mighty kings—
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh daix ziex dauh maaih mengh hoc nyei hungh,

eng: His love endures forever. Sihon king of the Amorites
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh daix Aa^mo^lai Mienh nyei Si^honx Hungh,

eng: His love endures forever. and Og king of Bashan—
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh aengx daix Mbaasaan Deic nyei Okc Hungh,

eng: His love endures forever. and gave their land as an inheritance,
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx nzipc,

eng: His love endures forever. an inheritance to his servant Israel.
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Se jiu bun ninh nyei bou, I^saa^laa^en Mienh, nzipc nyei buonc,

eng: His love endures forever. He remembered us in our low estate
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Yie mbuo ndortv njiec zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc ninh jangx yie mbuo,

eng: His love endures forever. and freed us from our enemies.
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh njoux yie mbuo biaux ndutv win-wangv,

eng: His love endures forever. He gives food to every creature.
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Ninh ceix nyanc hopv bun maaih maengc nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: His love endures forever. Give thanks to the God of heaven.
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh. Oix zuqc dor-ziec lungh zaangc nyei Tin-Hungh,

eng: His love endures forever.
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yietc liuz ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh.

eng: By the rivers of Babylon we sat and wept when we remembered Zion. There on the poplars
imn: Yie mbuo zueiz jienv Mbaa^mbi^lon nyei ndoqv-hlen, yietv jangx zuqc Si^on ziouc nyiemv. Yie mbuo zorqv yie mbuo nyei daanh baah

eng: we hung our harps, for there our captors asked us for songs,
imn: kuangx jienv yiem naaiv nyei suiv-liemh ndiangx, weic zuqc caangv yie mbuo daaih wuov deix oix yie mbuo baaux nzung,

eng: our tormentors demanded songs of joy; they said, “Sing us one of the songs of Zion!” How can we sing the songs of the Lord
imn: hoic yie mbuo wuov deix oix yie mbuo tengx ninh mbuo zoux nauc nyitc ziouc gorngv, “Baaux diuh Si^on nyei nzung bun yie mbuo muangx maah!” Yie mbuo yiem ganh fingx mienh nyei deic-bung,

eng: while in a foreign land? If I forget you, Jerusalem,
imn: hnangv haaix nor haih baaux Ziouv nyei nzung? O Ye^lu^saa^lem aah! Se gorngv yie la'kuqv meih,

eng: may my right hand forget its skill. May my tongue cling to the roof of my mouth
imn: tov bun yie nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz hngongx mingh. Se gorngv yie maiv jangx Ye^lu^saa^lem,

eng: if I do not remember you, if I do not consider Jerusalem my highest joy. Remember, Lord , what the Edomites did
imn: yaac maiv funx Ye^lu^saa^lem weih bun yie gauh duqv njien-youh jiex, tov bun yie nyei mbietc naetv jienv yie nyei nzuih dungz. O Ziouv aac, tov jangx E^ndom Mienh hnangv haaix nor zoux.

eng: on the day Jerusalem fell. “Tear it down,” they cried, “tear it down to its foundations!” Daughter Babylon, doomed to destruction,
imn: Ye^lu^saa^lem mbaang wuov hnoi ninh mbuo gorngv, “Oix zuqc baaic, oix zuqc baaic aqv, oix zuqc caeqv njiec taux gorn-ndoqv.” O Mbaa^mbi^lon aah!

eng: happy is the one who repays you according to what you have done to us. Happy is the one who seizes your infants
imn: Weic meih zoux bun yie mbuo nyei sic, jaauv win bun meih wuov dauh oix zuqc orn-lorqc. Zorqv meih nyei gu'nguaaz-faix

eng: and dashes them against the rocks.
imn: guaeqv la'bieiv wuov dauh yaac maaih orn-lorqc aqv.

eng: I will praise you, Lord , with all my heart; before the “gods” I will sing your praise. I will bow down toward your holy temple
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie longc nzengc hnyouv dor-ziec meih. Yie dorng jienv zuangx zienh nyei nza'hmien baaux nzung ceng meih. Yie hungx jienv meih nyei singx dinc baaix,

eng: and will praise your name for your unfailing love and your faithfulness, for you have so exalted your solemn decree that it surpasses your fame. When I called, you answered me;
imn: yaac dor-ziec meih, weic meih se ziepc zuoqv nyei yaac ziepc zuoqv hnamv meih nyei mienh, weic zuqc meih taaih meih nyei mengh caux meih nyei waac gauh hlo jiex maanc muotc. Yie heuc meih wuov hnoi meih dau yie,

eng: you greatly emboldened me. May all the kings of the earth praise you, Lord ,
imn: meih longc meih nyei qaqv bun yie nyei hnyouv henv jiez daaih. O Ziouv aac, lungh ndiev nyei zuangx hungh oix ceng meih,

eng: when they hear what you have decreed. May they sing of the ways of the Lord ,
imn: weic zuqc ninh mbuo haiz meih nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Ninh mbuo oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv zoux nyei jauv,

eng: for the glory of the Lord is great. Though the Lord is exalted, he looks kindly on the lowly;
imn: weic zuqc Ziouv nyei njang-laangc gengh hlo haic. Maiv gunv Ziouv yiem hlang,

eng: though lofty, he sees them from afar. Though I walk in the midst of trouble,
imn: ninh ziux goux haac dangv nyei mienh, mv baac ninh yiem go nyei dorngx mangc duqv hiuv zoux maux nyei mienh. Maiv gunv yie yiem naanc zingh gu'nyuoz,

eng: you preserve my life. You stretch out your hand against the anger of my foes; with your right hand you save me. The Lord will vindicate me;
imn: meih beu yie nyei maengc. Yie nyei win-wangv qiex jiez, meih sung meih nyei buoz cuotv mborqv hingh, meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz njoux yie. Ziouv oix zoux ziangx nyungc-nyungc

eng: your love, Lord , endures forever— do not abandon the works of your hands.
imn: ziux ninh weic yie maaih nyei za'eix. O Ziouv aac, meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv mienh taux yietc liuz. Tov meih maiv dungx guangc meih nyei buoz zoux nyei gong.

eng: You have searched me, Lord , and you know me. You know when I sit and when I rise;
imn: O Ziouv aac, meih zaah mangc yie, yaac hiuv yie. Yie zueiz njiec fai jiez sin meih hiuv nyei.

eng: you perceive my thoughts from afar. You discern my going out and my lying down;
imn: Meih yiem go nyei dorngx hiuv duqv yie nyei hnyouv hnamv nyei jauv. Yie bieqc cuotv fai bueix njiec meih mangc muonc nyei,

eng: you are familiar with all my ways. Before a word is on my tongue
imn: yaac hiuv toux yie zoux nyei yietc zungv jauv. O Ziouv aac, yie liemh maiv gaengh gorngv cuotv yietc joux waac

eng: you, Lord , know it completely. You hem me in behind and before,
imn: meih zungv hiuv nzengc mi'aqv. Meih yiem yie nyei nza'hmien maengx caux yie nyei nqa'haav nqaang,

eng: and you lay your hand upon me. Such knowledge is too wonderful for me,
imn: yaac longc meih nyei buoz maan jienv yie. Meih ndongc naaiv hiuv yie, yie gengh! mbuoqc horngh haic,

eng: too lofty for me to attain. Where can I go from your Spirit?
imn: se gauh hlang yie haih bieqc hnyouv nyei. Yie haih mingh haaix cingx haih biaux ndutv meih nyei Singx Lingh?

eng: Where can I flee from your presence? If I go up to the heavens, you are there;
imn: Fai yie haih biaux mingh haaix cingx leih ndutv meih nyei hmien? Se gorngv yie faaux lungh, meih yiem wuov.

eng: if I make my bed in the depths, you are there. If I rise on the wings of the dawn,
imn: Se gorngv yie njiec yiemh gen, meih yaac yiem wuov. Se gorngv yie ndaix mingh mba'hnoi cuotv nyei dorngx,

eng: if I settle on the far side of the sea, even there your hand will guide me,
imn: fai yiem wuov bung ziqc koiv, meih zungv yiem wuov dorh yie,

eng: your right hand will hold me fast. If I say, “Surely the darkness will hide me
imn: yaac yiem wuov tengx yie. Se gorngv yie gorngv, “Tov bun hmuangx torngv jienv yie,

eng: and the light become night around me,” even the darkness will not be dark to you;
imn: bun weih gormx yie nyei njang tiuv benx lungh muonz zanc.” Weic meih nor, liemh hmuangx yaac maiv zeiz hmuangx,

eng: the night will shine like the day, for darkness is as light to you. For you created my inmost being;
imn: lungh muonz zanc yaac ndongc lungh hnoi zanc njang, weic meih aeqv, hmuangx se hnangv njang. Meih zeix yiem yie gu'nyuoz nyei nyungc-nyungc.

eng: you knit me together in my mother’s womb. I praise you because I am fearfully and wonderfully made;
imn: Yiem maa nyei ga'sie meih gapv yie daaih. Yie ceng meih weic zuqc meih zeix yie cuotv daaih peix fuc haic, mbuoqc horngh haic.

eng: your works are wonderful, I know that full well. My frame was not hidden from you
imn: Meih zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc za'gengh peix fuc haic. Yie nyei hnyouv zien-zien hiuv duqv. Yie yiem maa nyei ga'sie zeix cuotv,

eng: when I was made in the secret place, when I was woven together in the depths of the earth. Your eyes saw my unformed body;
imn: se yiem gem jienv nyei dorngx gapv yie nyei mbungv-qorng nyei ziangh hoc, zungv bingx meih maiv mbueiz. Yie nyei sin maiv gaengh benx fangx zeiv,

eng: all the days ordained for me were written in your book before one of them came to be. How precious to me are your thoughts, God!
imn: meih nyei m'zing zungv buatc yie mi'aqv. Yie liemh maiv gaengh maaih yietc norm hnoi wuov zanc, meih weic yie dingc daaih nyei hnoi-nyieqc yietc zungv fiev jienv meih nyei sou-daan. O Tin-Hungh aac, meih hnamv nyei sic weic yie nor za'gengh jaaix haic.

eng: How vast is the sum of them! Were I to count them,
imn: Gapv daaih nyei soux mouc ndongc haaix camv aqv. Se gorngv yie saauv nor,

eng: they would outnumber the grains of sand— when I awake, I am still with you. If only you, God, would slay the wicked!
imn: maaih gauh camv saa-ziou. Yie nyie daaih nyei ziangh hoc, yie corc caux meih yiem. O Tin-Hungh aac, feix duqv meih daix nzengc orqv mienh,

eng: Away from me, you who are bloodthirsty! They speak of you with evil intent;
imn: feix duqv daix mienh nyei mienh leih nqoi yie. Ninh mbuo gorngv orqv nyei waac daanh meih,

eng: your adversaries misuse your name. Do I not hate those who hate you, Lord ,
imn: yaac gorngv doqc meih nyei mengh. O Ziouv aac, yie nzorng haic dongh nzorng meih wuov deix mienh.

eng: and abhor those who are in rebellion against you? I have nothing but hatred for them;
imn: Yie yaac youx dongh ngaengc jienv meih wuov deix. Yie nzorng ninh mbuo taux mbungv-fim,

eng: I count them my enemies. Search me, God, and know my heart;
imn: yaac funx ninh mbuo benx yie nyei win-wangv. O Tin-Hungh aac, tov zaah mangc yie,

eng: test me and know my anxious thoughts. See if there is any offensive way in me,
imn: seix yie yaac hiuv duqv yie hnyouv hnamv nyei jauv. Mangc gaax yiem yie maaih haaix nyungc orqv nyei sic,

eng: and lead me in the way everlasting.
imn: yaac tov dorh yie yangh yietc liuz nyei jauv.

eng: Rescue me, Lord , from evildoers; protect me from the violent, who devise evil plans in their hearts
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov njoux yie biaux ndutv orqv mienh. Tov beu jienv yie, maiv bun mienh doqc mienh hoic. Ninh mbuo yiem hnyouv daav cuotv waaic nyei za'eix,

eng: and stir up war every day. They make their tongues as sharp as a serpent’s;
imn: yaac zanc-zanc coqv-huv mborqv jaax. Ninh mbuo bun ninh mbuo nyei mbietc laic hnangv naang nyei mbietc laic nor.

eng: the poison of vipers is on their lips. Keep me safe, Lord , from the hands of the wicked;
imn: Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih meix maaih naang-jieqv nyei ndie-doqc. Selaa O Ziouv aac, tov njoux yie biaux ndutv orqv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev,

eng: protect me from the violent, who devise ways to trip my feet. The arrogant have hidden a snare for me;
imn: beu yie maiv zuqc doqc nyei mienh hoic, ninh mbuo daav za'eix bun yie nyei zaux ndiqv zuqc ndorpc. Zoux maux nyei mienh bingx jienv zaeng koux zorqv yie,

eng: they have spread out the cords of their net and have set traps for me along my path. I say to the Lord , “You are my God.”
imn: ninh mbuo longc hlaang corng mungz, yiem jauv-hlen zaeng koux hlopv yie. Selaa Yie gorngv mbuox Ziouv, “Meih zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: Hear, Lord , my cry for mercy. Sovereign Lord , my strong deliverer,
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov baeng m'normh muangx yie jouh nyei sing-qiex. O Ziouv, yie nyei Ziouv, dongh maaih qaqv henv njoux yie wuov dauh aac,

eng: you shield my head in the day of battle. Do not grant the wicked their desires, Lord ;
imn: mborqv domh jaax nyei hnoi-nyieqc meih torngv jienv yie nyei m'nqorngv. O Ziouv aac, tov maiv dungx ei jienv orqv mienh nyei eix zoux,

eng: do not let their plans succeed. Those who surround me proudly rear their heads;
imn: maiv dungx bun ninh mbuo orqv nyei za'eix cuotv, nziex ninh mbuo haih ceng-hlo. Selaa Tov maiv dungx bun weih jienv yie wuov deix mienh hingh jiex.

eng: may the mischief of their lips engulf them. May burning coals fall on them;
imn: Tov bun ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac nzuonx daaih hoic ninh mbuo ganh. Tov bun zieqc jienv douz nyei taanx ndortv njiec ninh mbuo.

eng: may they be thrown into the fire, into miry pits, never to rise. May slanderers not be established in the land;
imn: Tov bun ninh mbuo zuqc zoi njiec ndo nyei kuotv, yietc liuz maiv haih cuotv. Tov maiv dungx bun gorngv waac-huv nyei mienh liepc nguaaz-gorn yiem deic-bung.

eng: may disaster hunt down the violent. I know that the Lord secures justice for the poor
imn: Tov bun orqv nyei sic siepv-siepv zorqv jienv zoux doqc nyei mienh. Yie hiuv duqv Ziouv baav jienv ndortv naanc nyei mienh,

eng: and upholds the cause of the needy. Surely the righteous will praise your name,
imn: yaac baengh fim nyei dunx weic mienh jomc mienh. Kuv mienh zungv oix ceng meih nyei mengh,

eng: and the upright will live in your presence.
imn: hnyouv zingx nyei mienh yaac oix yiem meih nyei nza'hmien.

eng: I call to you, Lord , come quickly to me; hear me when I call to you. May my prayer be set before you like incense;
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie heuc jienv meih. Tov siepv-siepv nyei daaih tengx yie. Yie heuc meih nyei ziangh hoc, tov baeng m'normh muangx yie nyei sing-qiex. Tov bun yie daux gaux nyei waac hnangv hung yiem meih nyei nza'hmien.

eng: may the lifting up of my hands be like the evening sacrifice. Set a guard over my mouth, Lord ;
imn: Yie sung jienv nyei buoz hnangv lungh maanz-hmuangx ziec nyei ga'naaiv. O Ziouv aac, tov gunv yie nyei nzuih hnangv zuov gaengh mienh zuov gaengh nor.

eng: keep watch over the door of my lips. Do not let my heart be drawn to what is evil
imn: Tov goux jienv yie nyei nzuih meix nyei gaengh. Tov bun yie maiv maaih hnyouv zoux orqv sic,

eng: so that I take part in wicked deeds along with those who are evildoers; do not let me eat their delicacies. Let a righteous man strike me—that is a kindness;
imn: bun yie maiv dungx caux zoux orqv nyei mienh juangc jienv zoux waaic sic, yaac maiv dungx bun yie nyanc ninh mbuo kuv haic nyei lai-hnaangx. Tov bun kuv mienh mborqv yie. Naaiv se weih zoux longx.

eng: let him rebuke me—that is oil on my head. My head will not refuse it, for my prayer will still be against the deeds of evildoers. Their rulers will be thrown down from the cliffs,
imn: Tov bun ninh gorngv-hemx yie, se hnangv zorqv youh dox yie nyei m'nqorngv. Tov bun yie nyei m'nqorngv maiv nqemh. Weic zuqc yie daux gaux nyei waac zanc-zanc ngaengc jienv orqv mienh nyei orqv sic. Ninh mbuo nyei siemv zuiz jien zuqc zoi njiec la'bieiv-mbaengx wuov zanc,

eng: and the wicked will learn that my words were well spoken. They will say, “As one plows and breaks up the earth,
imn: mienh ziouc hoqc hiuv Ziouv nyei waac se zien nyei. Hnangv mienh laih ndau cenv muonc nzengc,

eng: so our bones have been scattered at the mouth of the grave.” But my eyes are fixed on you, Sovereign Lord ;
imn: ninh mbuo nyei mbungv oix zuqc nzaanx mingh taux yiemh gen nyei kuotv-ndaangc. O Ziouv Tin-Hungh aac, yie nyei m'zing mangc jienv meih.

eng: in you I take refuge—do not give me over to death. Keep me safe from the traps set by evildoers,
imn: Yie ndaauh kaux meih. Maiv dungx guangc yie, bun yie maiv lamh kaux dorngx. Tov beu jienv yie biaux ndutv ninh mbuo zaeng weic hlopv yie nyei koux,

eng: from the snares they have laid for me. Let the wicked fall into their own nets,
imn: caux orqv mienh zaeng nyei hlaang. Tov bun orqv mienh ndortv njiec ninh mbuo ganh zaeng nyei mungz,

eng: while I pass by in safety.
imn: mv baac tov bun yie duqv biaux ndutv mingh.

eng: I cry aloud to the Lord ; I lift up my voice to the Lord for mercy. I pour out before him my complaint;
imn: Yie cuotv qiex heuc Ziouv, yie longc yie nyei sing-qiex jouh Ziouv. Yie yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien qaqv gorngv yie nyei kouv-zingh kouv-latc,

eng: before him I tell my trouble. When my spirit grows faint within me,
imn: zorqv yie nyei kuonx naanh mbuox ninh. Yie hnyouv mau jienv njiec nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: it is you who watch over my way. In the path where I walk people have hidden a snare for me. Look and see, there is no one at my right hand;
imn: meih hiuv duqv yie nyei jauv-louc. Yiem yie yangh nyei jauv win-wangv zaeng hlaang oix hlopv yie. Tov meih huin mbiaauc bung mangc,

eng: no one is concerned for me. I have no refuge; no one cares for my life. I cry to you, Lord ;
imn: maiv maaih haaix dauh ciepv yie. Yie maiv maaih dorngx kaux, maiv maaih haaix dauh maaih hnyouv tengx yie. O Ziouv aac, yie heuc jienv meih.

eng: I say, “You are my refuge, my portion in the land of the living.” Listen to my cry,
imn: Yie gorngv, “Meih zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx, yiem yaangh seix meih zoux yie nyei fuqv-buonc.” Tov muangx yie heuc jienv jouh nyei waac,

eng: for I am in desperate need; rescue me from those who pursue me, for they are too strong for me. Set me free from my prison,
imn: weic zuqc yie kouv taux ndiev. Tov njoux yie biaux ndutv zeix yie wuov deix, weic zuqc ninh mbuo gauh henv yie. Tov dorh yie cuotv loh,

eng: that I may praise your name. Then the righteous will gather about me because of your goodness to me.
imn: weic bun yie haih dor-ziec meih nyei mengh. Kuv mienh oix weih gormx yie, weic zuqc meih za'gengh zoux longx bun yie.

eng: Lord , hear my prayer, listen to my cry for mercy; in your faithfulness and righteousness come to my relief. Do not bring your servant into judgment,
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov muangx yie daux gaux, tov baeng m'normh muangx yie jouh nyei waac. Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei, baengh fim nyei, tov dau yie. Tov maiv dungx siemv yie, meih nyei bou,

eng: for no one living is righteous before you. The enemy pursues me,
imn: weic zuqc ziux meih mangc, maiv maaih yietc dauh ziangh jienv nyei mienh zoux duqv horpc nzengc. Yie nyei win-wangv zunc yie,

eng: he crushes me to the ground; he makes me dwell in the darkness like those long dead. So my spirit grows faint within me;
imn: caaiv yie njiec taux ndau. Ninh bun yie yiem hmuangx nyei dorngx, hnangv daic mingh lauh haic nyei mienh nor. Weic naaiv yie nyei hnyouv mau jienv njiec,

eng: my heart within me is dismayed. I remember the days of long ago;
imn: yie nyei hnyouv gengh kouv taux ndiev. Yie jangx taux loz-hnoi,

eng: I meditate on all your works and consider what your hands have done. I spread out my hands to you;
imn: yie fei-fangv meih zoux nyei yietc zungv sic, yaac hnamv taux meih nyei buoz zoux nyei gong. Yie hungx jienv meih sung buoz.

eng: I thirst for you like a parched land. Answer me quickly, Lord ;
imn: Yie ngorc meih ndongc ndau-nqaai ngorc mbiungc. Selaa O Ziouv aac, tov siepv-siepv nyei dau yie.

eng: my spirit fails. Do not hide your face from me or I will be like those who go down to the pit. Let the morning bring me word of your unfailing love,
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv maiv lamh hnamv dorngx. Tov meih maiv dungx bingx meih nyei hmien, maiv mangc yie, nziex yie haih hnangv mingh yiem yiemh gen wuov deix mienh. Tov bun yie lungh ndorm nziouv duqv haiz meih ziepc zuoqv hnamv yie

eng: for I have put my trust in you. Show me the way I should go, for to you I entrust my life. Rescue me from my enemies, Lord ,
imn: weic zuqc yie kaux meih. Tov meih bun yie hiuv duqv horpc yangh nyei jauv, weic zuqc yie daux gaux nyei waac faaux taux meih. O Ziouv aac, tov meih njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv.

eng: for I hide myself in you. Teach me to do your will,
imn: Yie bingx jienv meih weic zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Tov meih njaaux yie ei meih nyei eix,

eng: for you are my God; may your good Spirit lead me on level ground. For your name’s sake, Lord , preserve my life;
imn: weic zuqc meih se yie nyei Tin-Hungh. Tov bun meih longx haic nyei Singx Lingh dorh yie yangh baengh nyei jauv. O Ziouv aac, tov weic meih nyei mengh beu yie nyei maengc.

eng: in your righteousness, bring me out of trouble. In your unfailing love, silence my enemies;
imn: Tov longc meih baengh fim nyei za'eix dorh yie yiem kuonx naanh cuotv daaih. Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie,

eng: destroy all my foes, for I am your servant.
imn: tov meih jamv guangc yie nyei win-wangv, yaac mietc nzengc yie nyei yietc zungv win-jaa, weic zuqc yie zoux meih nyei bou.

eng: Praise be to the Lord my Rock, who trains my hands for war, my fingers for battle. He is my loving God and my fortress,
imn: Ceng Ziouv, yie nyei La'bieiv . Ninh tengx yie hoqc linc mborqv jaax, njaaux yie haih mborqv domh jaax. Ninh se ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie wuov dauh Ziouv,

eng: my stronghold and my deliverer, my shield, in whom I take refuge, who subdues peoples under me. Lord , what are human beings that you care for them,
imn: zoux beu yie nyei dorngx, dongh yie kaux wuonv nyei dorngx, caux njoux yie wuov dauh. Ninh zoux yie nyei torngv-baaih, zoux yie ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Ninh bun ganh fingx zuqc yiem yie nyei buoz-ndiev. O Ziouv aac, baamh mienh benx haaix nyungc meih cingx jangx taux ninh?

eng: mere mortals that you think of them? They are like a breath;
imn: Seix zaangc mienh benx haaix nyungc meih cingx hnamv taux ninh? Mienh se hnangv tauv nzunc qiex.

eng: their days are like a fleeting shadow. Part your heavens, Lord , and come down;
imn: Ninh nyei hnoi-nyieqc jiex hnangv dongh linh siepv-siepv nyei jiex mingh nor. O Ziouv aac, koi nqoi lungh njiec daaih,

eng: touch the mountains, so that they smoke. Send forth lightning and scatter the enemy;
imn: hluo mbong bun mbong cuotv sioux. Tov borngz mba'lingc cuotv bun win-wangv nzaanx nzengc.

eng: shoot your arrows and rout them. Reach down your hand from on high;
imn: Buonv meih nyei forng-cang bun ninh mbuo faatv nzaanx nyei biaux. Tov meih yiem hlang nyei dorngx sung buoz cuotv daaih,

eng: deliver me and rescue me from the mighty waters, from the hands of foreigners whose mouths are full of lies,
imn: njoux yie, baeng yie cuotv wuom ndo nyei dorngx, aengx njoux yie biaux ndutv ganh fingx nyei buoz-ndiev. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih kungx gorngv-baeqc hnangv,

eng: whose right hands are deceitful. I will sing a new song to you, my God;
imn: liemh sung mbiaauc jieqv buoz laengz waac yaac jaav nyei. O Tin-Hungh aac, yie oix baaux diuh siang-nzung bun meih,

eng: on the ten-stringed lyre I will make music to you, to the One who gives victory to kings,
imn: oix longc ziepc diuh finx nyei daanh baah patv bun meih. Meih bun hungh diex duqv hingh,

eng: who delivers his servant David. From the deadly sword deliver me;
imn: yaac njoux meih nyei bou, Ndaawitv, biaux ndutv hoic maengc nyei nzuqc ndaauv. Tov meih njoux yie, tengx yie

eng: rescue me from the hands of foreigners whose mouths are full of lies, whose right hands are deceitful. Then our sons in their youth
imn: biaux ndutv ganh fingx mienh nyei buoz-ndiev. Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih kungx gorngv-baeqc hnangv. Liemh sung mbiaauc jieqv buoz laengz waac yaac jaav nyei. Tov bun yie mbuo nyei dorn yiem hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei ziangh hoc

eng: will be like well-nurtured plants, and our daughters will be like pillars carved to adorn a palace. Our barns will be filled
imn: hnangv ndiangx hlo dingc nor. Tov bun yie mbuo nyei sieqv hnangv zuqc daaih zoux hungh dinc biauv-gorqv nyei ndiouh. Tov bun yie mbuo nyei lamz dapv buangv nyungc-nyungc laangh ziqc.

eng: with every kind of provision. Our sheep will increase by thousands, by tens of thousands in our fields; our oxen will draw heavy loads.
imn: Tov bun yie mbuo nyei ba'gi yungh yiem yie mbuo nyei ciangv njiec dorn cin-cin waanc-waanc. Tov bun yie mbuo nyei ngongh njiec dorn camv,

eng: There will be no breaching of walls, no going into captivity, no cry of distress in our streets. Blessed is the people of whom this is true;
imn: maiv waaic, maiv dingx laaih. Yaac tov bun yie mbuo nyei jaai-horngc maiv maaih zuqc kouv, nyiemv nyei sing-qiex. Duqv naaiv nyungc fuqv nyei baeqc fingx maaih orn-lorqc.

eng: blessed is the people whose God is the Lord .
imn: Maaih Ziouv zoux ninh mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh wuov deix baeqc fingx maaih orn-lorqc.

eng: I will exalt you, my God the King; I will praise your name for ever and ever. Every day I will praise you
imn: Yie nyei Tin-Hungh, yie nyei Hungh Diex aac, yie oix ceng meih weih hlo. Yie oix yietc liuz ceng meih nyei mengh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Yie oix hnoi-hnoi ceng meih.

eng: and extol your name for ever and ever. Great is the Lord and most worthy of praise;
imn: Yie oix ceng meih nyei mengh yietc liuz yietc seix. Ziouv za'gengh hlo haic, horpc zuqc camv-camv nyei ceng.
